E: Character Story: Part IV

C: 孤独的英灵走过命运的长夜， 圆桌的旗帜仍在梦中舒展。卡美洛的骑士之王，此时尚未抵达理想乡。\n仍是少女的她于这场特殊的「圣杯战争」中应召前来，当再度面临石中剑的抉择，她将如何突破过往的幻境？\n——「我未实现的愿望，也将在此作结。」
E: The solitary Heroic Spirit traverses the long night of fate. The banner of the round table remains unfurled in a dream. Alas, the knight-king of Camelot has yet to reach that ever-distant utopia.\nThough still a young maiden, she has heeded the call for this most unique iteration of the Holy Grail War. With the Sword in the Stone offering its choice once more, how shall she shatter the illusions of the past?\n"The wishes I did not fulfill will end here."

C: 不知不觉，她已习惯了战场。 她看着同胞们在眼前倒下，自己仍毅然向前。她知道终有一天她也会倒在那里，而后来者将前仆后继地跨过自己的身躯。 所以休憩时光总是那么珍贵，她抬起头，看着银海高悬头顶，星光倾泻而下。 星空下的一切都很安静。即使面临失熵的威胁，她也想卸下战甲，一睹世界的究竟。 记忆中的声音逐渐浮现。 「只是透过镜片望去，就觉得整个世界都不同了。」 ——她的编号是AR-214，她戴着「眼镜」。 「格拉默军规第8条，存活的骑士应当主动归队。」 ——她是AR-1368，性格很认真。她的战甲上有红色的绶带。 「下一片战场，希望能看见星星。」 ——AR-53935，他是和自己不同的「另一种型号」。 「各位，欢迎归队！」 ——AR-4077，虽然自己和他素未谋面，但知道他从来不上战场，只待在后方。 茫茫虫群自星空深处飞起，如往常一样，刺耳的警报打断了短暂的休憩时光。 她启动装甲，进入作战状态，只是这一次，一切来得格外猛烈。 「这不是普通的袭击，是虫潮…虫潮！」 通讯中的声音微微颤抖，越来越多的铁骑升上天空，却如渺然的星火，匆匆爆发便被黑暗吞没。 「守住防线，继续突围！」 无数的铁骑在她眼前倒下。 他们中有此前同自己搭话的人吗？她第一次意识到这个问题。 ——原来…每个人是不一样的？ 虫群终于裂出一道缝隙，而在那缝隙的尽头，母虫正缓步踏出。 她如同一道流光穿梭在密密麻麻的虫群之中，和其他铁骑一同冲向巨型银蛰虫的口器。在被母虫吞噬的最后一刻，她闭上眼睛，引爆了足以毁灭一颗行星的火弹—— 足以致盲的光芒以母虫为中心爆发，那一刻万籁俱寂。 她如同脱线的风筝，被巨大的冲击力弹开。向着大地坠落时，一些令她难以忘怀的记忆在眼前闪过—— 火萤飞舞的水面旁，她离开装甲，感受夜晚的清风和丝丝凉意。 她看着火萤停驻在她的手背，翕动着翅膀。 「…它们虽然是渺小的生命，却比星星更耀眼。」 黑暗吞没了她。 虫群的残肢和破损的战甲化为尘埃，落在群星之上，纷纷扬扬如同宇宙下了一场无声的雪。
E: As time passed, she had grown accustomed to the battlefield. She witnessed her comrades fall before her eyes, yet she remained resolute, pressing forward. She knew that one day, she too, would meet her end on the battlefield, paving the way for those who would follow unblinkingly. Thus, moments of rest held immense value for her. She lifted her gaze toward the sea of stars hanging high above, its radiance cascading down upon her. Tranquility pervaded everything under the starry sky. Despite the looming threat of entropy loss, she yearned to shed her battle armor and catch a glimpse of the world's true nature. The voices from memory gradually resurface. "Just looking through the lens makes the whole world feel different." — Her designation is AR-214, and she wears "glasses." "Glamoth Military Regulation Article 8: Surviving knights should actively return to base." — She is AR-1368, a very austere character. There is a red ribbon on her armor. "I hope to see the stars on the next battlefield." — AR-53935, he is a "different type." "Welcome back, everyone!" — AR-4077, though she has never met him, she knew he never goes to the battlefield, always staying in the rear. From the depths of the starry expanse, the immense insects ascended. Its abrupt invasion interrupted their brief respite. Reactivating her armor, she was ready to charge into the fray. However, the offense exhibited unprecedented ferocity. "No, this is not an ordinary attack! It's the Swarm... the Swarm!" The voices in her comms trembled as more and more of the Iron Cavalry soared to the sky like sparkling fire, only to be swallowed by the encroaching darkness as soon as they ignited. "Hold the line! Push forward!" In her line of sight, countless numbers of the Iron Cavalry fell. Are there any of them that have spoken to her? It was a realization that struck her for the first time. So... each person is unique? Finally, an opening was created within the Swarm, and from it emerged the Swarm Mother, advancing slowly. Like a streak of light, she skillfully navigated through the dense swarm, racing alongside her fellow Iron Cavalry comrades toward the mouthpiece of the towering Silver Sting. Just as the Swarm Mother was about to devour her, she closed her eyes, detonating a bomb with enough firepower to obliterate an entire planet. A blinding light erupted, engulfing the Swarm Mother, plunging everything into silence. Like a kite severed from its string, she was propelled by the tremendous impact, descending toward the ground. Fleeting memories that she would never forget flickered before her eyes... Beside the lake where fyreflies danced, she shed her armor, relishing the refreshing breeze and coolness of the night. She observed fyreflies alighted on the back of her hand, their wings gracefully fluttering. "...Despite their tiny size, they shine brighter than the stars at night." Darkness enveloped her. The remnants of the Swarm and her shattered armor disintegrated, dissipating like silent snowfall across the universe.

C: 「亲爱的妹妹： 许久未写信了。 往后的一段时间里，或许会有一阵子没法联系了，但我向你保证，这不会是寄给你的最后一封信。 一条充满希望的路也许只是一条充满诱惑的路，感谢你们，我还没有迷失得太远。以我现在的身份，我能补偿的不多，只能清除残留在匹诺康尼的秩序余响。如此，梦境便不会再有「秩序」的隐患了。 为了一睹天空的容貌，折翼的鸟儿也会选择再次出发。就像我们小时候共同养育的那只鸟儿，即便明知有坠落的可能，它也要飞上天空，因为那是它的宿命。我不会忘记我们「让所有人幸福」的愿望，但现在我必须离开，去往更广阔的世界找寻实现的道路。这是我的命运，也是我的选择。 瓦尔特先生已同意我登上列车，作为搭车客前往寻找我的应许之地。他们为人和善，品行高洁，你应当比我更了解。 很多时候，你不说，我还把你当成那个需要被人保护的孩子。但你早就长大了，匹诺康尼有你在，我很放心。 母亲的墓我已打扫过了，我折了一朵蓝花带在身旁，她会像一直以来那样祝福我们。 最后，谢谢你送的巨恐鸟布丁蛋挞，这么多年过去，它们还是那个令人怀念的味道。 在路上的， 哥哥」 ——一封未署名的信，留在了美梦的某个角落
E: "To my dearest sister: It's been quite a while since I wrote a letter. I may not be able to contact you for a while from now on, but I assure you, this will not be the last letter you receive from me. A path full of hope can often be a path of full temptation, and thanks to all of you, I haven't strayed too far. In my current position, there's little I can do to make amends except to eliminate the lingering echoes of Order that remain on Penacony. By doing this, I can ensure that there are no more hidden dangers of Order in the Dreamscape. To catch a glimpse of the sky, even a bird with a broken wing will choose to take flight again. Just like the little bird we raised together as children, it soared into the heavens despite knowing it might fall — because that was its destiny. I will never forget our shared wish to "make everyone happy," but now I must embark on a journey to seek fulfillment in the wider world. This is my destiny and my choice. Mr. Yang has granted me permission to board the Express and travel as a passenger in search of my promised land. They are kind and of noble character. You should know them better than I do. Many times, even when you don't say it, I still see you as a child who needs protection. But you've long since grown up, and I'm truly relieved that Penacony has you. I have tended to Mom's grave and picked a blue flower to carry with me. She will continue to bless us as always. Finally, thank you for the giantmoa pudding tarts. They still carry that same nostalgic taste after all these years. On the road, Your big brother" — An unsigned letter, left in a certain corner of the Dreamscape

C: 失落的盗寇之都多洛斯，三百侠盗纵情游戏，横行无忌。\n捷足的贼星赛法利娅，戏弄「诡计」火种的黄金裔，奔走吧。愿你的谎言随风同行，吹遍此世大地\n——「呵，还想诓我？没门！」
E: In the fallen city of bandits, Dolos, the 300 Rogues run wild and free.\nRace onward, fleet-footed Thief Star Cifera, Chrysos Heir of the "Trickery" Coreflame. May your web of lies spread with the breeze throughout all lands.\n—"Tryna trick me? Not a chance!"

C: 流亡至黎明的圣城，她目睹黄金裔的传说在城中激荡。但当她看到那些逼仄肮脏的角落时，只觉得这里与多洛斯并无不同。 「哼，什么逐火，什么英雄，按赛法利娅的经验判断，其中定有不可告人的猫腻！」 将黄金裔视作沽名钓誉的骗徒，她把手伸向那黄金的织坊。 「蜜酿？棋盘…还有一把怪模怪样的琴？都是搜刮来的吧……」 她饮下蜜酿，大啖葡萄叶包饭，耍弄着水晶的棋子。 「呵，地板还会转呢……」 待她从酩酊大醉中清醒，手中多了一封带着香味的密信。 她寒毛狂竖，挣脱毯子，逃向自己阴暗的小窝。 「小馋猫： 玩得还开心么？织坊厅堂被你当作了肆意嬉闹的游乐场。 你品尝蜜酿，不胜酒力。棋盘乱作一团，连旧琴也不放过。 有句话你需记得：蜜酿须饮尽，世事有转圜。 知道你手艺甚巧，把你碰坏的琴修好。幸好那位骑士统领不在，不然她一定会用剑锋钉住你的尾巴。」 拿着密信，女孩心中第一次涌出来说不清的感受。 「大城邦的人…花样这么多啊。」 流浪的猫儿等了一天又一天，却没等到严厉的兴师问罪。 于是，她吹着口哨，抛着金币，一次次装作不经意在织坊门前停下脚步。 「飞儿，有什么想吃的，直接和*我们*说！」红发的女孩们每次都准备一大堆食物。 跟随织者编织的时候，她常常听到那些英雄的故事。 「对于流着黄金血的人们来说，逐火是不断失却的旅途…即使连生命本身，也微不足惜。」 织者谈起提琴最后的悲鸣，死局中陷落的棋子，碎作千道的门径…… 「…那跟我有什么关系？我只是想吃顿饱饭而已。」 她嘟囔着，蜷起了手指，不小心刺破的指尖上，冒出一滴小小的金色血珠。 这一晚，她也悄无声息地溜出了织坊。 「没关系。奔跑吧，赛法利娅。 只有你知道，你的终点在何方……」 月下的身影从视野中消失，房间中只留下织者的喃喃自语。
E: Exiled to the holy city of dawn, she witnessed how the legends of the Chrysos Heirs surged through the streets. Yet when she saw its squalid alleys and filthy, cramped corners, she found the place no different from Dolos. "Hmph! What Flame-Chase? What heroes? If my experience isn't wrong, I smell shady schemes afoot!" Deeming the Chrysos Heirs glory-hungry frauds, she targeted a certain golden weaving workshop. "Honey brew? A chessboard... and a weird lyre? These have got to be stolen..." She guzzled the honey brew, devoured the dolmadakia, and toyed with the crystal chess pieces. "Heh, even the floor's spinning..." When she awoke from her drunken stupor, she found a perfumed letter in her hand. Hair standing on end, she threw off the blanket and fled to her shadowy den. "Little Glutton: Did you enjoy your fun? You treated the weaving hall like your personal playground. You tasted the honey brew, but couldn't handle it. The chessboard's a complete mess, and you didn't even spare the old lyre. But remember this: Always drink honey brew to the last drop, and no situation in this world is beyond salvation. I know you possess great skill, so fix the lyre you damaged. You're lucky a certain knight commander wasn't there, or she surely would've pinned your tail to the floor with her sword." Clutching the confidential letter, the girl felt a vague, indescribable emotion rising within her for the first time. "Big city folks... they sure got a lot of tricks, huh?" The stray cat waited day after day for a harsh reckoning, yet she wasn't held to account. So, she would whistle, tossing a coin in the air, and time and time again "accidentally" stop in front of the weaving workshop. "Ciphy, if there's anything you want to eat, just tell us!" The red-haired girls would always have a heap of food at the ready. While following the weaver at work, she often heard the stories of those heroes. "For those with golden blood, losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey... and even life itself holds little value." The weavers spoke of the violin's final wail, the chess pieces that fell in a doomed game, the shattered pathways splitting into a thousand fragments... "...And what's that have to do with me? I just want a full belly." She muttered, curling her fingers. A tiny bead of golden blood welled up from her pricked fingertip. That night, she silently slipped out of the weaving shop once again. "It's okay. Run, Cifera. Only you know where your path ends..." Under the moonlight, her figure vanished from sight, leaving nothing in the room but the weaver's murmured words.

C: 「扎格列斯，旧日的诡计之神： 偷窃珍宝，挑唆诸神，掀起纷争—— 你的老把戏，我们已经看厌了。 在那即将到来的幽灵日，三百侠盗将于翁法罗斯上演迄今为止至为精彩的剧目。 世界将由我们收下，胆怯的神—— 看看我们是怎么把世界搅个天翻地覆的吧！」 ——绘有猫爪的预告信，散落于翁法罗斯各个城邦 「从奥赫玛向北，越过覆雪的山脉，便是厄涅俄努斯。 「在那里，我偷偷改了花岗岩法典上的两个字，在裁定生死的审判里赢得了一位侠盗的卖身契。 「南方的海湾里，我扒上抛锚的船，在风暴中与一位侠盗单挑，我最讨厌水了！ 「后来你猜怎么着？我灵机一动，拿出吸吸乐把他的长剑吸走了！ 「还有呐，在大漠的烈阳下和亡命徒比谁能坚持不喝水，在密林中与猎手比追逐，直至三百侠盗归位……」 穿着金靴的少女眉飞色舞地讲着这一路的经历。 「然后，该让全翁法罗斯的僭主、蛀虫、奴隶主，见识下他们口中混蛋的力量了！」 她回想起翻飞之币落下的刹那，三百颗贼星滑过天穹，奔赴翁法罗斯的大地。 高高在上的僭主从王座滑落，手挥长鞭的奴隶主狼狈逃窜，如雨的金钱凭空消失，又自天空落向饥寒交迫的人群…… 在那场盛大的表演中，扎格列斯忍不住诱惑而露面，正中黄金裔的埋伏。 燃动的火种，最终沉寂于涡心。 奥赫玛城中，渐渐传起那神速无影的半神之名，流浪者的保护神，作恶者的惩戒人—— 「我能做到的，只有奔跑呀。」
E: "Zagreus, god of trickery of old: Stealing treasures, sowing discord among the gods, stirring up conflict... Your stale ploys weary us. This next Spirit Day, the 300 Rogues will stage their most spectacular performance in Amphoreus yet. The world will be ours, craven god! Watch us turn it upside down!" A proclamation adorned with a cat's paw prints, scattered across the city-states of Amphoreus. "North from Okhema, across the snow-covered mountains, lies Aenionus. There, I secretly changed two characters on the Granite Code, winning a rogue's indenture in a trial of life and death. In bays of the south, I snuck aboard a moored ship and dueled a rogue in the middle of a storm, and I hate water most of all! Then guess what? In a stroke of genius, I whipped out my Pulleroo and took his sword away! And there's more — under the blazing desert sun, I competed with outlaws to see who could last the longest without water, and in the dense jungle, I raced against hunters... until all 300 Rogues were in place..." The girl in golden boots spoke animatedly about her journey. "Next, it's time for every tyrant, parasite, and slaver in all of Amphoreus to witness the power of the so-called wretches they despise!" She recalled how the moment the Coin of Whimsy fell, three hundred Thief Stars streaked across the sky, descending upon the lands of Amphoreus. Lofty tyrants tumbled from their thrones, whip-wielding slavers fled in disgrace, torrents of gold vanished into thin air, only to rain down from the heavens upon the starving and the shivering... During that grand spectacle, Zagreus could not resist the temptation and revealed themselves, falling right into the Chrysos Heirs' ambush. The blazing Coreflame, at last, fell silent within the vortex's core. In the city of Okhema, whispers began to spread of a demigod swift as a shadow, a guardian of vagrants, a scourge to the wicked — "All I can do, is run!"

C: 「可以把翅膀慢慢打开，对…就像我们上次做的那样，配合医生一起深呼吸哦！」 「放松一点，没问题的…嗯，翼展变宽啦，你在很努力地吃饭，对不对？」 毛茸茸的脑袋被烛光衬得暖烘烘的，女孩抱起小马，轻轻地放在体重秤上。 「放心吧，很快你就能和其他翼兽长得一样又高又壮的，嗯？」 戴上听诊器，女孩开始各项检查，她触碰到小马肋下新的「伤口」。 「你受伤了？」 她摩挲着小马的翅膀，小心翼翼地将棉花塞进松落的裂口，又取出针线。 「会有一点疼，但别担心，我扎针很稳…… 「你又拼命训练了吗？是因为有很多人和你说，你的母亲，祖母，还有好多厉害的先辈，一个腾飞就能飞到天上，一个冲撞便能撞碎岩石？ 「大家期待你会成为如雷霆一样的英雄，可不管训练多久，你好像都只能让他们失望…… 「就好像…你和他们完全不一样……」 小马一动不动，黑溜溜的眼珠看着窗外。 划破天幕的雷鸣仍在远空回荡，那是天空城邦的英雄与他们的翼兽掀起的风暴。 「偷偷告诉你一个秘密…我和你一样……」 在那孤独昏暗的病房，养病已久的女孩抱着玩偶，拿着针线，第一百次演练父亲教习的医术—— 「但也许…不一样的光芒，也有它存在的意义……」
E: "Slowly spread your wings... yes, just like we did last time. Breathe deeply together with the doctor, okay?" "Relax a little. It's all fine... hmm, your wingspan has grown! You've been eating well, haven't you?" The candlelight cast a warm glow on the fluffy little head as the girl picked up the pony and gently placed it on the scale. "Don't worry. Soon you'll be just as tall and strong as the other winged beasts, okay?" Putting on the stethoscope, the girl began her examination. As she touched the pony's side, she felt a new "wound" beneath its ribs. "You're hurt?" She gently stroked the pony's wings, carefully stuffing cotton into the loosened crack before taking out a needle and thread. "It'll hurt a little, but don't worry, my stitches are steady..." "You've been training too hard again, haven't you? Because so many people keep telling you about your mother, your grandmother, and all the great ancestors? How they could soar into the sky with a single leap, and how they could shatter rock with a single charge?" "Everyone expects you to become a hero like the thunder itself, but no matter how much you train, it feels like you only let them down..." "Like you're completely different from them..." The pony remained still, its dark, glossy eyes gazing out the window. The thunder that tore through the sky still echoed in the distance, a storm stirred by the heroes of the sky city and their winged beasts. "Let me tell you a secret... I'm just like you..." In that lonely, dimly lit ward, the girl, bedridden for so long, clutched her doll and needle, practising for the hundredth time the medical techniques her father had taught her. "But maybe... a different kind of light has its own meaning too..."

C: 广袤的珊瑚礁已成一片死地。 第一次将剑刺入黑潮造物的身体时，她的双手仍会轻轻地颤抖。 第一百次与腐朽的昔日伙伴相向，那暗哑的弦已能毫不费力地割开喉咙。 第一千次，第一万次…提琴的珠光零落在海面，而深海已成血色—— 在那寂然无声的宫殿废墟，只剩海列屈拉与她一个人的欢宴。 「♫陆地上的人们呐，会举办永不散场的欢宴，将我们的牺牲奖赏……♫」 哀婉的歌声回荡，当「纷争」的泰坦接过抵御黑潮的使命，欣喜的海列屈拉第一次踏出昏黑的海水。 她用珠贝妆点面容，她的尾鳍变为双腿，身上的泡沫化作盛装。波澜不再在她的头顶怒吼，而是在脚下呻吟。 海鸟围绕着大海盘旋，声声凄厉。波涛息止了一瞬，又再次滚滚而逝去。 就像是泡影破裂之后，什么都不曾存在过一样。 她忍受着每一步锥心刺骨的疼痛，前往应许的斯缇科西亚—— 这片大地有刺鼻的空气，堆积如山的尸骨，纷争与战火…却唯独没有那场神明许诺的欢宴之地。 「我……海……瑟……」 在那污浊的空气中，她的声音喑哑。 她学习人类的话语，但那些喧嚣的字眼让她无法再如歌般吟唱。她逐渐学会以沉默代替言语。 「一柄不会锈蚀的刀剑」，「一曲冷酷的琴音」…终日与她相伴的，是刺穿肌体的弹响，是生命洒血的悲鸣—— 他们说，那来自海洋的剑士明明极善演奏，却缄默疏离，从不言明心迹。 她看见向自己伸来的许多双手，有些意图将她抹杀，有些则声称会为她提供援助，它们曾点燃一盏盏灯火，然后一盏盏熄灭。 「海瑟音，你在往何处去？」 她无法回答。 旧日的琴已化为两把利剑，唯有锋利的挽歌流淌弦上。 即便渴望有一日会有人听懂其中向往，但她逐渐意识到人世也与寂寞的深海无异。 每个人都像是迷失的鱼儿，每个人都在盲目地朝着光芒游去。
E: The once-lush coral reef had become a graveyard of lifeless stone. The first time she drove her blade into the Black Tide Creature, her hands trembled ever so slightly. The hundredth time she faced a corrupted former friend, her dull strings could slice through flesh without hesitation. The thousandth, the ten thousandth... Pearls from her instrument scattered over the sea, and the deep water had turned to blood... In the silent ruins of that forgotten palace, only Helektra remained at her solitary feast. "♫ The people on the land will throw feasts that never end, to honor our sacrifice... ♫" The mournful song echoed through the sea as the Titan of Strife took up the fight against black tide. And for the first time, Helektra rose from the dark waters with joy in her heart. She adorned her face with pearls. Her tail split into legs. The seafoam on her body became a gown. The crashing tide no longer roared over her head, but whimpered beneath her feet. Seabirds cried overhead in chilling tones. The waves stilled for a moment, then rolled away again. As if the dream had popped like a bubble and never truly existed. She bore each step toward the Promised Land of Styxia with searing pain, like walking on knives... The land reeked of pungent air as corpses piled high. Conflict and fire ravaged every corner... But the feast promised by the gods was nowhere to be found. "I... Hy...si..." Her voice rasped in the polluted air. She had tried to learn the language of humans, but their noisy, jagged words made it impossible to sing as she once did. So, she slowly chose silence over speech. "A blade that would never rust," "A melody of cruelty"... What accompanied her day after day were the twangs that pierced flesh, and the cries of lives bleeding out... They said the swordmaster from the sea could play like no other, yet she stayed distant and mute, never revealing what lay in her heart. She had seen many hands reach out to her. Some sought to erase her, others offered help. They had lit one flame after another, only to let each flicker out. "Hysilens, where are you headed?" She couldn't answer. Her old instrument had long become two blades, with only sharp requiems now echoing from the strings. She had once wished someone might understand the longing within her song, but came to realize that the human world was no different from the lonely deep sea. Everyone was just another lost fish, blindly swimming toward the light.

C: 那刻夏：与神对谈的黄昏
E: Anaxa: An Afternoon's Dialogue With the Divine

C: 昔涟：时漾余漪
E: Cyrene: Ripples of Time

C: 新的危机——末日兽已经袭来，而你似乎成为了某种「关键」。\n想要摆脱这样的困境，让空间站免于毁灭的命运，或许只有前往月台，与列车、与那个被称为「瓦尔特」的男人会合后，才有解法。\n离开月台已经越来越近了，加快脚步吧。
E: New crisis — the Doomsday Beast is coming, and it seems that you've become some sort of "key element."\nIf you want to get out of this predicament and save the space station from destruction, the only way may be to head to the railway platform and meet up with the Express and the man named Welt.\nYou're getting closer to the railway platform, hurry.

C: 列车搁浅在了一颗白色星球的外空间。根据姬子的说法，是「星核」带来的影响阻塞了列车的前进路线。\n想要继续旅程的话，就必须清除「星核」造成的轨道阻塞。\n姬子想让你去找丹恒聊聊，她希望你们三人能结伴成行，完成这一次对雅利洛-Ⅵ的「开拓之旅」。
E: The Express runs aground in the outer space of a white planet. According to Himeko, the effects of the Stellaron are what's obstructing the Express' path forward.\nIf you wish to continue the journey, you must clear out the obstruction caused by the Stellaron.\nHimeko wants you to talk to Dan Heng and hopes the three of you can team up to complete this trailblazing expedition on Jarilo-VI.

C: 布洛妮娅被恶徒围攻之际，「地火」骨干希儿及时赶到解围，却转头又与铁卫少女对峙起来。\n最终，希儿终于表明来意：原来是「地火」首领奥列格要求面见这位来自地上的高贵少女。\n而你们自然不能放过这个接触「地火」的机会。按照希儿的指示，立刻前往「大矿区」吧！
E: Just as Bronya's being surrounded by the enemies, Seele, the backbone of Wildfire arrives just in time to save her but immediately turns to confront her after.\nIn the end, Seele finally reveals her reason for being there: Oleg, leader of Wildfire is asking for an audience with the noble girl from the surface.\nNaturally, you can't pass up on this opportunity to get in touch with Wildfire. Follow Seele's instructions and head to the Great Mine.

C: 在雅利洛-Ⅵ上旅行至此，你已经充分学会如何以理服人了。大守护者最忠实的戍卫官此刻也终于同你站在一条战线上…只可惜他无法同你一道前进，共同见证贝洛伯格的结局。\n但杰帕德在此处把守着阻隔裂界的大门——只要你一声令下，他和他的亲信铁卫便会迅速结成战阵，为你们开辟前路。
E: Thanks to your time on Jarilo-VI, you have mastered the art of persuasion. The Supreme Guardian's most loyal Captain is now on your side... It's a pity that he cannot go with you and witness what awaits Belobog.\nGepard is guarding the gate to the Fragmentum. He and his best guards will form up and clear the way for you once you are ready.

C: 根据周围的陈设判断，你多半是来到了这旧时边堡城塞的核心区域。\n你大可以在此处稍作盘桓，对你认为有价值的垃圾堆进行充分调查，直到你对这里的历史不再感兴趣为止。\n旧城残骸出口附近的危险已经全部排除，你可以随时离开这里了。
E: Based on the surrounding structures, it's likely that you've arrived in a core area of an ancient citadel that used to stand on the edge of civilization.\nYou can gather yourself here and investigate the trash piles you think may be of value until you lose interest in the history of this place.\nThe dangers that surround the exit of the old town wreckage have been cleared out. You can leave this place at any time.

C: 布洛妮娅捎来信息，上下层区长达十余年的封锁即将终结。\n你和一众下层区居民乘坐缆车回到了行政区，面前出现了不久前才与之交手过的杰帕德。\n只不过，银鬃铁卫的戍卫官这一次面带笑容。
E: Bronya sent news that the blockade between the Overworld and Underworld is about to lift after more than a decade.\nYou and other Underworld residents take the cable car back to the Administrative District and face Gepard, with whom you had fought just a short time ago.\nThis time, however, the captain of the Silvermane Guards is wearing a smile.

C: 救下自称「十王司判官」的少女后，你们得知仙舟之上正在发生一些不可思议的变故。
E: After saving the girl who calls herself a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, you learn that strange happenings are currently occurring on Xianzhou.

C: 受符玄之托，你们要前往天舶司将「停云」留下的扇子送交驭空。无论幻胧究竟是幻化伪装停云，抑或是操控了她，这其中都潜藏着某种危险的可能性——那位停云也许遭遇了不测。\n驭空司舵在悲伤中撑持，力主举办一场「仪式」，来安抚所有人内心的伤痛。司辰宫中，你们与岩明一同整理了停云所留的物品，其中有些竟是尚未送出的礼物……
E: Fu Xuan had entrusted you to head to the Sky-Faring Commission and give to Yukong the fan "Tingyun" left behind. Whether Phantylia was disguised as Tingyun or mind-controlled her — both spell out dangerous possibilities. The real Tingyun might have suffered a lethal accident.\nBarely holding herself up in her immense sorrow, Helm Master Yukong insists on holding a "soul-soothing ceremony" to appease the pain everyone must be feeling. You and Yanming work through the items Tingyun left behind in the Palace of Astrum, only to discover that some were in fact gifts yet to be sent out...

C: 黑天鹅表示你们应当尽快撤离。而在撤离的途中，如果你们足够幸运，还可以找到流萤留下的痕迹，甚至揭开这场突如其来的死亡的真相。\n你们在撤离的途中找到了许多烧焦的残骸，值得仔细调查一番。
E: Black Swan tells you that you should evacuate as quickly as possible. But, as you are evacuating, you may be fortunate enough to find some traces left by Firefly that could help unravel the truth behind this sudden demise.\nYou discovered a large number of charred remains during your evacuation. They are worth a thorough investigation.

C: 黑天鹅表示你们应当尽快撤离。而在撤离的途中，如果你们足够幸运，还可以找到流萤留下的痕迹，甚至揭开这场突如其来的死亡的真相。\n忆域正在不断变化。有时候，你们得依靠一些的小技巧才能找到真正的出口。
E: Black Swan tells you that you should evacuate as quickly as possible. But, as you are evacuating, you may be fortunate enough to find some traces left by Firefly that could help unravel the truth behind this sudden demise.\nThe Memory Zone keeps transforming. Sometimes, you may have to rely on certain tricks to find the true exit.

C: 另一边，黄泉——意思是你——和瓦尔特为了挖掘出家族正在隐瞒的真相，孤身潜入至朝露公馆。然而，你们发现本应壁垒森严的公馆里全然不见人影，仅有游荡的怪物四处巡逻。\n究竟发生什么事了？
E: Meanwhile, Acheron — that is to say, you — and Welt have infiltrated the Dewlight Pavilion to bring to light the truth hidden by The Family. To your surprise, the place is empty when it is supposed to be heavily guarded. Only some wandering monsters can be seen patrolling the place.\nWhat's going on?

C: 你耳边的低语正变得越来越响亮。希望你能坚持到登上游乐园舞台的那一刻。
E: The murmurs near your ears grow louder, more booming. Let's hope you can hold on until the moment you step onto the stage of the amusement park.

C: 即便砂金以生命为代价向众人揭示了家族在匹诺康尼的黑暗秘密，但经由万众一心的家族运作，谐乐大典的倒计时仍未中止。与此同时，星穹列车似乎迎来了一位不速之客……
E: Despite Aventurine revealing The Family's dark secrets in Penacony to all at the cost of his own life, the countdown to the Charmony Festival continues thanks to the operations of The Family's united efforts. At the same time, the Astral Express seems to have welcomed an uninvited guest...

C: 你在入梦池中醒来，惊觉自己已经返回现实「白日梦」酒店。根据三月七的说法，这次你确实是从太一之梦中醒来了——在你昏迷期间，星核已被封印，而橡木以外的四大家系正在尽力平息事件余波。她还说列车组受到了邀请，要去家族的「晖长石号」上一坐，以见证人的身份参与重要会谈。\n高档游轮、豪华宴会…这才是庆功宴该有的样子。还等什么？做好准备就出发吧。
E: You wake up in the dreampool and find yourself back in the real Reverie Hotel. According to March 7th, you really have woken up this time from Ena's Dream — the Stellaron was sealed while you were out, and all the major lineages, except for the Oak Family, are dealing with the aftermath. She also said that The Family has invited the Crew to The Family's Radiant Feldspar as witnesses for an important meeting.\nHigh-end cruise ships, luxury banquets... Now THIS is what a celebration banquet ought to look like. What else are you waiting for? Get ready to set off.

C: 在威逼和利诱并行之下，老奥帝不得不接受了翡翠提出的条件。\n翡翠已经掌握了匹诺康尼的秘密，而在谈判中引入星穹列车则是为了给结果加上一层保险。\n大事已经谈妥，翡翠和托帕对于如何享受身在「晖长石号」上的时光有着各自的打算。
E: With a little carrot and a little stick, Old Oti has to submit to Jade's conditions.\nJade already knew the secrets of Penacony, and the introduction of the Astral Express into the negotiations is an extra insurance for the outcome.\nNow that the major issues have been discussed, Jade and Topaz have their own ideas about how to best enjoy their time aboard the Radiant Feldspar.

C:
坏消息：原来「晖长石号」上的娃娃有<unbreak>1000</unbreak>只——花火大人把所有人都耍得团团转！
好消息：为了奖励各位努力付出，她把最后一枚炸弹的坐标发给了所有人！
另一个坏消息：根据经验，这份坐标十有八九是假的……
可你们还能怎么办呢？在打开箱子前，你永远不知道猫咪是死是活…现在就去验明真相吧！
E:
Bad news: There are actually <unbreak>1000</unbreak> dolls on the Radiant Feldspar — Mistress Sparkle fooled everyone!
Good news: To reward everyone for their efforts, she sent everyone the coordinates of the final bomb!
More bad news: Based on experience, these coordinates are most likely going to be fake...
But what can you do about it? You never know whether the cat is alive or dead until you open the box... Go now and get to the bottom of it!

C: 只有坠落于地，才能习得如何飞翔，而一个人若想谢幕，就必须再一次站上台前。\n向瓦尔特表明万维克的正身。
E: Only when one has fallen to the ground can they learn how to fly. If one wants to take a curtain call, they must stand on the stage once more.\nExplain Wonweek's true identity to Welt.

C: 正因决意前行，星期日才选择回望过去——拥抱了往日种种后，用于启程的第八日，也拥抱了他。但眼下，也还差最后一件事——登上列车的许可。
E: Having resolved to advance, Sunday decides to look back on his past... Having embraced everything that happened, on the eighth day, the day of his departure also embraces him. However, he is still missing one thing... Permission to board the Express.

C: 故障的根本原因是窃忆者的入侵。将问题连根拔起后，黑塔即将正式进入命途狭间，觐见博识尊。
E: The root cause of the malfunction is an invasion of Memosnatchers. After uprooting the problem, Herta is about to formally enter the Path Space to seek an audience with Nous.

C: 白厄的火种试炼失败，意味着承载尼卡多利神权的重任落到了唯一的悬锋王储——你的身上。但纵然身为「纷争」的正统继承人，你的心中却似乎有一处难以抹消的病灶……
E: The failure of Phainon's Coreflame trial means the responsibility of bearing Nikador's divinity now falls to the lone crown prince of Kremnos — you. Yet, even as the orthodox heir to "Strife," you seem to have an absurd extent of hesitation and objection to accepting the god's authority...

C: 艾格勒于激战之后坠入黄金池中，其火种也顺利被风堇所接收——当务之急，是从逐渐崩毁的天空堡垒中逃离。
E: After a fierce battle, Aquila plunged into the pool of gold, and their Coreflame was seamlessly claimed by Hyacine. Now, the urgent task is to flee the crumbling sky fortress before it collapses entirely.

C: 呈现在{NICKNAME}面前的第三幕，似乎是逐火之旅的终点，但与白厄一同见证末世的，是那名在我们的认知中，殒命于他童年时期的少女——昔涟。
E: The third act, as it plays out before {NICKNAME}, appears to mark the end of the Flame-Chase Journey. But the one who witnesses the world's end times with Phainon is Cyrene — the girl we believe to have perished in his childhood years.

C: 工作，工作，工作，工作，工作，工作，工作，工作。
E: Work. Work. Work. Work. Work. Work. Work. Work.

C: 每场远征之前，必经一场预示命运坎坷的风浪。于神话之外的观剧台上，唯一的观众将你引入英雄未死之前的故事，拉开一场悲剧的序幕。
E: Every expedition begins with a storm that foretells the hardships to come. On the audience's seats in the Exomyth, the only audience member leads you into the story titled "Before Their Deaths," and thus draws the curtain on a tragedy.

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C: 在翁法罗斯经历的一切，在列车上又到底经过了多长呢？好像自己还是和星穹列车隔了一层，这究竟是怎么回事？\n总之，别忘记出发时大家的担忧，看看三月现在怎么样了。
E: How long has it really been since everything that happened in Amphoreus, and how much time has passed on the Express? It feels like there's still some kind of barrier between you and the Astral Express. What exactly is going on here?\nIn any case, don't forget everyone's concerns when you set out. Let's see how March is doing.

C: 「再创世」的仪式已经顺利完成，翁法罗斯的旅程结束…果然是假的！\n这里是用你的「记忆」构筑的假象，你必须和昔涟一起赶紧逃进其他的记忆里。\n星期日正在用他的能力入侵你的「梦境」来拯救你…没想到还会有这样的一天。
E: The Era Nova Ceremony has been completed. The journey in Amphoreus is over... As if!\nThis is all an illusion constructed from your "memory." You must now escape with Cyrene into other memories!\nSunday is using his powers to invade your "dreamscape" to save you... Never thought this day would come.

C: 我追上了德谬歌的记忆，踏入一处静谧的花园——这是一页永恒的美好记忆。
E: I caught up with the Demiurge's memories and stepped into a tranquil garden... This is an eternal page of beautiful memories.

C: 怎么回事？智械哥不在「神话之外」。保持警惕，螺丝，把这个装腔作势的管理员揪出来。
E: What's going on? Old Intellitron isn't in Exomyth. Stay alert, Screwy, let's drag this stuck-up administrator out.

C: 如今怪物在舱室内巡回，亚伯拉罕恐有性命之虞。当务之急是保障他的生死安危，待脱离险境，再仔细盘问他的失踪原委。
E: The monsters are roaming in the cabin, and Abraham's life is at stake. His safety is the most urgent matter at the moment. Ask him about the details after the crisis has been averted.

C: 拉明娜履行承诺，帮助你寻访「水魈」踪迹，抵达第一可疑藏匿点后，你们决定守株待兔——虽然似乎早已猜到无功而返的结局。
E: Lamina keeps her promise and helps you look for the Xenohydro. After arriving at its first potential hiding place, you decide to wait here... Although you know you might find nothing in the end.

C: 姬子大方地摆好姿势让你拍下照片，你连忙将照片发给帕梅拉，换取谣言制造者的情报。
E: Himeko struck a pose for you to take her picture, and you immediately sent it to Pamela for information about the rumor spreader.

C: 已收集到足够的信标数据了，赶紧将它们交调查人员吧。
E: You've collected enough data from the beacons. Hurry and hand them over to the investigators.

C: 艾丝妲不在基座舱段，黑塔又似乎受到了袭击，你决定先去黑塔办公室看看情况
E: Asta is not in the base zone, and Herta seems to have been attacked yet again. You decide to head back to Herta's office to find out what's up

C: 阿德勒的见解让你终于回想起黑塔委托的全貌，再次确认一下委托的内容吧
E: Adler's insights finally made you recall the entirety of Herta's commission. Let's double-check the content of that commission again.

C: 黑塔、阮•梅、螺丝咕姆——史无前例的天才集会！这场面可不多见！\n你很好奇他们之间会发生怎样的有趣博弈……
E: Herta, Ruan Mei, and Screwllum: A gathering of geniuses never seen across the span of history! Scenes like this don't happen every day!\nYou are curious as to what games or contests take place between such individuals...

C: 姬子有事找你，邀你回列车一叙，此事似乎和无名客有关……
E: Himeko needs to see you and has asked you to return to the Astral Express for a talk. It seems to be something about the Nameless...

C:
{NICKNAME}的开拓日报：
发现一个怪地方，以前没来过。托帕就在这里。
不管她在计划什么，必须阻止。
帕姆注：「怪地方」是什么地方？好歹描述一下啊帕！
E:
{NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:
Found a weird place, never been here before. Topaz is here.
Need to stop her no matter what she is planning.
Pom-Pom's Notes: What kinda place is "weird place"? At least describe it!

C: 你在裂界中发现了一个神态异常的小女孩。\n她在这里做什么？你尝试着和她沟通，但结果毫无头绪。\n小女孩正在被一个神秘的「谜题」困扰…或许你能帮助她离开这个危险的地方？
E: You find a strange little girl in the Fragmentum.\nWhat's she doing in here? You try to communicate with her, but failed to learn anything useful.\nThe girl is being haunted by a mysterious "puzzle"... Perhaps you can help her escape this dangerous place?

C: 你凭自己的聪明才智，很快便解决了矿车工老师傅布置的矿车难题。\n去问问他有何奖励吧——这种环节通常都会有奖励，不是吗？
E: With your ingenuity, you quickly solve the mine cart puzzle set up by the senior mine cart operator.\nGo ask him about the reward — there is usually a reward for this kind of task, isn't there?

C: 裁缝是四位嫌疑人中的一位，没有不在场证据，需要仔细盘问，才能听出破绽。\n据斯薇塔介绍说这几位嫌疑人曾经都十分信任费斯曼老爹，一定是发生过什么，才会在彼此之间出现了裂隙。
E: The tailor is one of the four suspects. They have no alibi, and you need to question them in detail to see if they're hiding the truth.\nAccording to Swetta, these suspects used to trust Fersman with all their hearts. Something must have caused a rift between them.

C: 拍卖会上人来人往，坏家伙们专门选在这个时候做坏事，鼹鼠党岂能坐视不管。\n你倒要看看这些坏人做了什么伤天害理的事情…嗯？抢劫乳臭未干小孩子，真亏他们能干得出来。住手！
E: It's crowded at the auction, and criminals might seize this opportunity to wreak havoc. Of course, the Moles will not stand by idly.\nWhat have these bad guys done? ...Robbing a kid? Hey, stop!

C: 有传闻说：铁卫禁区的某位队长正满世界寻找这样一群「外来者」——他们衣着光鲜、气宇非凡，还一度使驻扎在禁区内超半数士兵陷入昏迷…当然，这位队长也包括在内。\n他是来找你寻仇的吗？还是见过你的武艺后竟想拜你为师？直觉告诉你，后者发生的概率微乎其微…但也不是没有这种可能。\n总之，不妨亲自去拜访一下这位队长吧——只是应当记得：这次下手千万要轻点。
E: Word has it that a certain Captain of the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone is looking up and down for a group of outsiders, who are said to be well-dressed with a lordly bearing. They knocked out half of the soldiers in the Restricted Zone... including the Captain himself.\nDoes he want payback? Or is he so impressed by how good of a fighter you are and decided to become a student of yours? The latter, however unlikely it seems, may as well be plausible.\nIn any event, perhaps you should pay a visit to this Captain. Just try not to beat the snot out of everyone this time around.

C: 暂时无家可归的茉莉很快与朗道家的大小姐打成一片。当你找到两人时，发现她们简直像是合作多年的老搭档，正一起埋头研究茉莉的传家宝机关盒。\n毫无头绪的二人最终决定寻求佩拉的帮助。和她们一起前往书商处寻找佩拉吧。
E: Molly, who is currently homeless, has become a friend of Serval. When you find them, they are working on Molly's family treasure, the mechanism box, as if they had been partners for years.\nThe two decide to ask for Pela's help because they find nothing. Go to the Book Merchant's place with them to find Pela.

C: 根据铁卫的指示，击败盘踞在矿山硐室的裂界生物
E: Under the Silvermane Guard's command, defeat the Fragmentum creatures occupying the mining chambers

C: 佩拉和玲可抵达了露营地，却发现营地中迎来了一位不速之客。两人需要在不打草惊蛇的情况下确认营地中的异样。\n但你非常清楚，那位「不速之客」不过是一只人畜无害的次元扑满——眼下还不到出手相助的时候，就让两位女孩自行解决眼前的「危机」吧。
E: Pela and Lynx reach the camping ground, but discover an unexpected guest in the camp. They need to confirm what is happening in the camp without alarming the intruder.\nHowever, you are well aware that the "intruder" is just a harmless Warp Trotter. Now is not the time to step out and help, though. Let the two girls deal with this "crisis" on their own.

C: 卢卡将他的「修炼计划」告知了你和希儿，并且希望你们能够全程陪同，见证他的成长。\n试炼的第一个目标是…帮忙打杂。\n你打败了窃贼，找回了机械师卡西迪的两个机械伙伴。把这个好消息告诉他吧。
E: Luka tells you and Seele about his "trial plans" and wants you to accompany him the whole way to witness his improvement.\nThe first goal of the trial is to... help with chores.\nYou defeat the thief and recover Cassidy the mechanic's two robot friends. It's time to tell Cassidy the good news.

C: 佩拉对你经营博物馆达成的成果表示了满意。\n接下来她想要开放的是工业展区，但这个展区有一件关键的展品失窃了——去看看情况如何吧。
E: Pela was satisfied with the results you achieved while operating the museum.\nShe wants to open up the Industrial Exhibit next, but a key exhibit in this area was stolen. Go and see what the situation is.

C: 用于投影展示的「微缩胶卷」失窃了，没有了这带胶卷，历史区将无法顺利开放。\n布洛妮娅已经表态，她会全力支持案件的后续搜查工作。\n到行政区的广场上调查一下行人，看看有没有谁掌握了相关的线索吧。
E: The microfilm used to display projections was stolen. Without this film, the History Exhibit cannot open to the public.\nBronya had stated that she will wholeheartedly support further investigation of these cases.\nHead to the Administrative District Plaza to assess the passers-by, and see whether some of them have relevant clues.

C: 你不得不按照那位「绿芙蓉」的要求，抄写《千手慈怀药王救世品》。但五百遍确实太多了…也许有其他办法？
E: You have to copy the Thousand-Handed Merciful Medicus' Salvation according to Green Hibiscus's demands, but 500 times is just too much... Maybe there's another way?

C: 陶德意在研究持明族的历史，但传闻中能见证持明族历史变迁的「鳞渊境」他却进不了。无奈之下陶德拜托你去往鳞渊境，为他拍摄几张照片，以供他完成研究。
E: Todd intends to study the history of the Vidyadhara. However, he couldn't enter Scalegorge Waterscape, where rumors say the history of the Vidyadhara race can be viewed. With no other alternative, Todd asks you to go to Scalegorge Waterscape and take some photos for him to complete his research.

C: 没想到就连十王司的判官也扑了个空，陶德现在下落不明，你决定等他来主动联系你……
E: Unexpectedly, even the Ten-Lords Commission judge failed to find him. Todd's whereabouts are currently unknown, so you decide to wait for him to contact you...

C: 你收到了温符瑞的信息，他找到了线下工作人员的确切地点，希望你赶紧去核实身份，拿到物流识别码。堪比间谍接头的获取方式，去晚了就没有了。尽管觉得可疑，你还是决定抓紧时间赶过去。
E: You receive a message from Wen Furui. He found the exact location of the in-person operative and hopes you will quickly verify your identity and get the logistics identifier code. Like something out of a spy movie, it'll be gone if you're too late. Despite your suspicions, you decide to pick up the pace.

C: 彦卿呀彦卿，你怎地如此不开窍。若人犯想要的是一艘船，那直接找到渡口的舵航仪，追查星槎航行的记录便可。至于他在流云渡做了什么，又有什么干系？
E: O Yanqing, you had not considered one thing. If the wanted man wants a starskiff, he needs only to find the navigator array at the dock to check records of starskiffs. As for what he did at Cloudford, what does it matter?

C: 完成这一趟星槎诞生之旅后，铖杰师傅大受鼓舞。他主动提出和星槎合影，希望你能帮他拍一张。\n铖杰师傅不太擅长拍照，你看他的动作就知道了。
E: After this trip to witness the birth of a starskiff, Chengjie is very inspired. He wants to have his photo taken with a starskiff, and he wants you to be the photographer.\nChengjie is not adept at taking photos, you know that just by looking at him.

C: 在浮烟的指引下，你在幻境中找到一篇怪异的话本残篇。其中讲述了许久之前罗浮将军与岁阳的故事，而其中行文似有所指，暗含着你勘破幻境的方法。
E: Through Cirrus' guidance, you discover a ripped page from a bizarre story recounting events surrounding the heliobi and the Luofu's general from centuries ago. Its writing style seems to hint at a way to see through the illusory maze.

C: 黑天鹅解开了这个不算谜题的谜题…而游戏，却显然还未结束。黑天鹅再次依照花火的指引，赶往下一个案发现场。你似乎察觉到了又一股短暂的情绪波动——黑天鹅有些玩腻了。
E: Black Swan has solved the puzzle that isn't a puzzle... Clearly, the game is still not over. Once again, Black Swan follows Sparkle's instructions and rushes to the next crime scene. You feel as if you sense another brief burst of emotion... Black Swan is getting a little tired of these games.

C: 谜题解开了，游戏却并未结束。「捕头」告诉黑天鹅，花火即将再次行凶，而黑天鹅一定赶不及去阻止她。你感受到这段梦境中闪过了一段短暂但剧烈的情绪波动，大概因为黑天鹅并不享受这种被人牵着鼻子走的感觉吧。
E: You have solved the puzzle, but the game is not over. The "constable" has told Black Swan that Sparkle is about to commit another murder, and Black Swan definitely would not have enough time to stop her. You feel a brief but intense surge of emotion flash across the Dreamscape, likely because Black Swan dislikes this feeling of being led on a wild goose chase by others.

C: 三月七逃课了。不知道这是否符合你对三月七的预期，但事实便是如此。她的授业恩师现在要请你（作为三月七的家长代表）去金人巷。\n云璃打算请你吃点好吃的，嗯？等等，讨伐三月七的事就没了？
E: March 7th has skipped practice. Did you see this coming? Oh well, it happened anyway. You receive an invitation from her mentor to drop by Aurum Alley (as March 7th's guardian).\nYunli intends to treat you to a delicious meal... Hey, what happened to wanting to punish March 7th?

C: 事实是没有人偷走了孤云，是孤云自己偷走了孤云。无论是作为犯人还是受害者，孤云应该向你们解释清楚。\n和孤云好好聊聊吧。
E: The mystery's solved: Nobody stole Guyun. It just made itself "gone with the wind." Culprit or victim, Guyun owes everyone an explanation for what happened.\nHave a chat with Guyun.

C: 于司辰宫顶端，天击将军一击定鼎。而此时此刻，在金人巷中，你和貊泽从大战的余波中起身搜寻幸存者……以及椒丘的下落。
E: Atop the Palace of Astrum, the Merlin's Claw brings the battle to an end with a single attack. Meanwhile, Moze and you emerge from the battle's aftermath in Aurum Alley and begin the search for survivors... as well as for news about Jiaoqiu's whereabouts.

C: 眼前的芙洛拉竟然是莱斯利•迪恩生前的演员助理。\n追随她留下的影子，见证她和莱斯利之间的故事吧。
E: It turns out that the lady named Flora was Lesley Dean's former assistant during his lifetime.\nFollow her shadow and witness the stories between her and Lesley.

C: 柯柯娜的好朋友就在前方，与她一起聊聊吧。
E: Cocona's good friend is right ahead. Talk to her.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 你通过钟表把戏进入了查德威克的心绪空间。\n跟随旧日的影子，见证这位天才的一段段过去。
E: You have entered Chadwick's Emoscape through your Clockwork.\nFollow the shadows of his past and witness a fragment of this genius's life.

C: 虚数脉冲起爆后，为了逃离公司的魔掌，查德威克开始了流亡。\n他希望能找到螺丝咕姆，并从后者身上找到救赎。
E: Following the Imaginary Pulse's detonation, Chadwick went into hiding to evade the IPC's clutches.\nNow, he wants to meet up with Screwllum and find his redemption from the latter.

C: 母亲，你憎恨她吗？若不是她将你交给那些贪婪的祭司，你又怎会承受如此苦痛的命运？
E: Mother, do you hate her? If she had not handed you over to those greedy priests, you would never have to bear such a painful destiny?

C: 法政科的创始人古恩有事找你，他想让你来教导一名特殊的学生，授课的内容令你咂舌……
E: Gunn, the founder of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, comes to you. He wants you to teach a special student, and you're going to teach her some unique lessons...

C: 你的学生希拉竟是一名仿生人，你答应要教导她的也并非什么寻常知识，而是教她如何做人。
E: Your student, Sheila, is an android, and you're going to teach her how to act like a human.

C: 找到「防盗门怪谈」的亲历者，并向对方打听这则「怪谈」背后的真相。或者凭借自己对空间站的认识，直接寻找这扇不得了的防盗门。
E: Track down the one who experienced the Security Door Anecdote and find out the truth from them. Alternatively, find the security door in question based on your knowledge of the space station.

C: 出于一些原因，罗希并不想和华劳斯做朋友。\n真是糟糕的消息…回去和华劳斯说明情况吧。
E: Rossy does not want to be Wallace's friend due to reasons.\nWhat a piece of bad news... Go back to Wallace to explain the situation.

C: 亚诺想了解更多「垃圾大王」的事，也许你可以在某些地方找到线索……
E: Amo wants to learn more about the Garbage King. Maybe you can find some clues somewhere...

C: 配音演员塞琳对音乐剧明星塔米拉小姐的处世之道十分感兴趣。\n你听到了塔米拉的自言自语，快去把你的发现告诉塞琳吧。
E: The voice actress, Celine, is very interested in the musical star Tamila's way of life.\nYou heard Tamila talking to herself, so go and tell Celine right away.

C: 这面镜子原来是一个模因：来自「流光忆庭」的信使悄悄来到列车，并希望与你达成某个交易。她说：你的记忆非常珍贵，忆庭愿意用珍贵的物资换取你的记忆。为此，你必须进入忘却之庭中诱发回忆，好让忆庭将它们取走。\n从来没见过这么复杂的系统包装，对吧？
E: This mirror turns out to be a memetic entity. A messenger from the Garden of Recollection had quietly boarded the Express in the hope of making some kind of deal with you. She says your memory is very precious, and that the Garden is willing to exchange precious materials for it. Doing so requires inducement of memories inside the Forgotten Hall, so that they can be extracted.\nYou've never seen such a complex system packaging as this.

C: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
E: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

C: 「贼灵」巴特鲁斯讲述起了自己的英雄事迹，究竟它是如何巧妙地化险为夷。
E: Spirithief Bartholos recounts their heroic deeds, telling how they cleverly turned danger into triumph.

C: 一个自称「仲裁官」的生物为你安排了一项试炼。根据它模棱两可却言之凿凿的说法：如果通过试炼，在今后的旅程中你会遇到更强大的敌人，但也会获得更好的奖励。两者好像都不是坏事？
E: A creature calling himself the Arbitrator gave you a trial. According to its vague but convinced declaration, you will meet stronger foes but receive better rewards in the future by passing the trial. This doesn't seem to be a bad thing?

C: 「仲裁官」的试炼再度到来。它的内容、形式、好处和损害你已经很清楚了，不是吗？去吧，为了「均衡」……
E: The Arbitrator's trial is here once again. You are already well aware of its content, format, pros, and cons, aren't you? Go then. For the sake of Equilibrium...

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 万万没想到，你居然会在黄金的时刻里遇到活生生的动画形象钟表小子。\n还记得那座以它为原型建造的雕像吗？那里说不定有什么有趣的事发生。
E: You never thought you'd come across a living and breathing Clockie, the cartoon character, in the Golden Hour.\nDo you remember the statue shaped after it? There might be something fun happening over there.

C: 你通过了第一次的禁区演练。\n和「副官」聊聊，领取你的奖励吧。
E: You passed the first restricted zone training.\nTalk to the aide and collect your reward.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 危难时刻，朋友会出手！厄琉斯决定问问市集热心的老板们，或许拼凑的碎片能引出线索。
E: Times of trouble are what friends are for! Aelius decides to ask the helpful shopkeepers in the market, in the hopes of piecing together a clue from the fragmentary information they can offer.

C: 控诉创世神明安排了不公平的命运，于是他愤怒地冲了出去，他要干啥？
E: Accusing the creator gods of arranging an unfair fate, he stormed out in anger. What is he planning to do?

C: 和祭司的一番对话让希瑞雅产生了情绪波动，也许和她聊两句能让希瑞雅好些。
E: The conversation with the priest has stirred up emotions in Serena. Perhaps talking with her will help her feel better.

C: 司祭呼唤来海洋的权柄，但似乎并未按预期生效。踩到祭台上再做一瓶看看吧。
E: The priest beckons the ocean's authority, but it doesn't quite work as expected. Try standing on the altar and making another bottle.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你前往城郊雪原为冰封的反物质军团虚卒拍摄照片，以便博物馆制作复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan needs your help to take a picture of a frozen Antimatter Legion Voidranger at the Outlying Snow Plains to help the museum make a replica.

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是列车中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something aboard the Express...

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是支援舱段中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from the Supply Zone...

C: 在西衍先生的故事当中，「龙尊大人」带着你辗转于罗浮各处，寻找锻造神兵利器的诸多材料…这下彻底变成喜闻乐见的寻宝故事了。
E: In Mr. Xiyan's story, the "high elder" takes you to many places in the Luofu to look for the various materials needed to forge the divine weapon... Now this is truly a stereotypical treasure-seeking adventure story.

C: 一位名叫维尔德的公司员工向你强烈推荐一款名叫《以太战线》的游戏，并对你发出参加「星际决胜庆典」的邀请。\n在决定去线下体验游戏之后，你们首先需要找到这个叫维尔德的人。
E: An IPC worker named Wilder is passionately promoting a game named Aetherium Wars to you, and sent you an invitation for the Interastral Tournament Festival.\nAfter deciding to experience this game in person, you firstly need to find this person named Wilder.

C: 经历了毫无波澜的冒险后，你们终于得到了挑战「魔王」的资格。但黑塔似乎没把对决的事放在心上，难不成只有你们在认真玩游戏吗？\n无论如何，你们都已经完成了全部试炼，是时候让「天才」见识下「凡人」的实力了！
E: After experiencing that uneventful adventure, you finally earned the right to challenge the "Demon Lord." But Herta doesn't seem to care much about the matches at all. Are you the only ones treating this game seriously?\nRegardless, you have already completed all the trials. Now, it is time for a "genius" to stand witness before the true strength of those deemed "mundane."

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 幽灵星槎出现了，赶紧追上去看看到底是什么情况。
E: The phantom starskiff has appeared. Follow it to see what is going on.

C: 自从你们到达流云渡之后，就一直有人在悄悄跟随你们。\n「十三号货柜」固然可疑，但是没有这人可疑，赶紧去问问吧。
E: Someone has been quietly following you ever since you arrived at Cloudford.\nLocker No. <unbreak>13</unbreak> is suspicious, but this person is even more so. Hurry and question them.

C: 既然帖子指向了金人巷的「某家神秘当铺」就去调查看看吧。\n不过，总感觉事情并非如此简单。\n这不是跟上次一样吗？
E: Since the post points to a mysterious pawnshop in Aurum Alley, go investigate it.\nHowever, you keep feeling things aren't as simple.\nIsn't it the same as before?

C: 在这一次的模拟宇宙更新中，阮•梅培育了模拟「博识尊」，并把时空锁定在了#27 帝皇鲁珀特陨落前！然而，一些不同寻常的情况发生了——公司联系到了黑塔，他们似乎对模拟宇宙项目很感兴趣……
E: In this Simulated Universe update, Ruan Mei has nurtured a simulated Nous and set the time before the demise of #27 Emperor Rubert. However, something unusual has happened. IPC has reached out to Herta, showing their interest in the Simulated Universe project...

C: 新培育出来的造物有些社恐，吓得从你眼前逃窜了出去。保姆机器人说外面并不安全，还是赶紧去找找它吧。\n但话说回来了，这种喜欢在地上扒着垃圾的行为…你感觉膝盖有点疼。
E: The newly nurtured creation is a little shy and fearfully bolts out of your sight. The Helper Robot tells you it's not safe outside, so you should rush after it quickly.\nBut then again, this kind of sifting around through trash like this... Your knees and back are not going to thank you.

C: 保姆机器人有事找你，看来又是和造物有关的事，赶紧去问问究竟发生了什么吧。
E: The Helper Robot is looking for you, apparently for something related to the creations — again. Quickly go and find out what's happened.

C: 监狱的狱警们破坏了球笼航道，你必须手动调整路线将它们修复，不然就永远没法跟伙伴们汇合了。
E: The prison wardens have destroyed the Spheroid lane. You have to manually reroute the course to repair the lanes, or you'll never be able to reunite with your companions.

C: 暂时击退了猎犬家系成员，但怪物们的情绪也开始变得不稳定，现在最重要的，是帮舒翁重新获得它们的信任。
E: You have deterred the Bloodhound Family for now, but the monsters are also showing signs of emotional instability. The most important thing now is to help Siobhan regain their trust.

C: 铁皮人希望向你展示它理想中的酒吧，就去看看究竟是什么模样吧。\n舒翁在那杯饮料里加了特殊材料，这次肯定能好好教训铁皮人一顿！
E: Tin Man wants to show you its dream lounge. Go and take a look at the lounge.\nSiobhan had added special ingredients to that beverage. It will definitely teach Tin Man a good lesson this time!

C: 究竟是什么人，能想出把报表一分为二的设计？总之还是再回办公室一趟吧。
E: Who exactly was it who thought of splitting this report into two? In any case, better return to the office.

C: 《哈努兄弟大劫案》的广告拍摄完成了，去找甲方交差吧！
E: Filming for the advertisement Brother Hanu's Great Heist is finished. Go show it to the client!

C: 《爱汽水的钟表小子》的广告拍摄完成了，去找甲方交差吧！
E: Filming for Bubbly Clockie has concluded. Go show it to the client!

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•动作派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「动作」的考验……\n你可太熟悉「动作」了——但在这样一个人人都无法欢跳的世界里，你真的能够施展真正的「动作」吗？
E: The first choice! Firefly and you arrive at the stage for Dreamplay Fantasia: Action Challenge. According to the guide, you'll face the trial of "action" here...\nYou can't possibly be more familiar with "action" — However, in a world where no one can jump, can you really perform real "action"?

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 三月七竟然给你搞来了演武仪典的内场通行证？ 这不去看看可就亏大了。\n话说总感觉在这短短几周时间里，她已经迅速混成了罗浮的大人物…也不知道去餐馆报她的名字有没有优惠。
E: March 7th actually managed to get a backstage pass for the Wardance? That'd be a huge loss if you don't go and check it out.\nIt feels like she has rapidly become a powerful figure on the Luofu in just a few short weeks... Would you get a discount in a restaurant if you tell the owner you know her?

C: 卡美丽很害怕波提欧，因为他是公司的通缉犯。\n你肯定不怕波提欧——你们甚至一起经历过不少事。\n卢卡不知道你们谁对波提欧的描述更准确，只在潜意识中留下了一个朴素的认知——和公司对着干的人，应该不会是坏人。
E: Carmella is very scared of Boothill as he is a criminal wanted by the IPC.\nYou're definitely not scared of Boothill — You've even gone through a lot together.\nLuka doesn't know which version of your descriptions of Boothill is more accurate. He only walks away with a simple understanding in his subconsciousness — Those who go against the IPC probably aren't bad guys.

C: 重压之下，卢卡决定出门透透气，但周围却尽是些灼人的视线和刺耳的低语……
E: Luka decides to go outside and get some fresh air under this intense stress, but the burning glances and sharp whispers from other people surround him...

C: 完成「枘凿六合•Remake」困难模式III
E: Complete Hexanexus: Remake Hard Mode III

C: 「想睡觉就来枕头」这句俗语，竟然可以如此具象化地展现出来！三月七，你好温柔。
E: The saying "If you want to sleep, just find a pillow" has been so vividly brought to life! March 7th, you're so gentle.

C: 为了完成每日课题、角逐最终奖项，你作为摄影助理，陪同三月七踏上了摄影之旅。\n依据摄影灵感进行拍摄吧。
E: To complete the daily tasks and compete for the final prize, you, as a photography assistant, accompanied March 7th on a photography journey.\nTake a photo based on the photography inspiration.

C: 据那只领队奇美拉所说，近期团队里出现了些异样的声音。或许你该好好考察下那些奇美拉的表现了。
E: The Alpha Chimera mentioned some doubts circulating within the team lately. It might be time to look into the daily routines of those chimeras.

C: 去找刻律德菈开始今天的经营吧，别让那些饿肚子的妖精们等急啦。
E: Go find Cerydra and start managing today's business. Better not keep those hungry fairies waiting.

C: 你为托帕调制了名为「放松」的配方，想必可以给她死气沉沉的上班生活带来别样的精彩吧。\n这份配方还有另一种功效尚未调制…回到临时吧台准备接待下一位客人，或者按照配方为托帕再调制一杯调饮吧。
E: You've crafted a recipe called "Relaxation" for Topaz, which will surely bring some excitement to her dull work life.\nThis recipe has another effect yet to be mixed... Return to the makeshift bar to serve the next guest, or mix another drink for Topaz according to the recipe.

C: 那刻夏把这颗大地兽蛋托付给了你照顾，并表示他要去研究使其孵化的方法，可谁知曾想，当晚它就自个孵了出来…？事已至此，只好求助风堇医师了！
E: Anaxa entrusted you with this dromas egg and said he would research ways to hatch it, but who would've thought it would hatch on its own that very night...? At this point, you have no choice but to seek Miss Hyacine's help!

C: 找人聊聊，并告诉姬子自己的决定
E: Find someone to talk to and tell Himeko your decision

C: 去找丹恒
E: Find Dan Heng

C: 开启通向史瓦罗基地的大门
E: Open the gate to Svarog's base

C: 开启通向史瓦罗基地的大门
E: Open the gate to Svarog's base

C: 调查仙舟港口的异常状况
E: Investigate the bizarre situation at the Xianzhou port

C: 前往长乐天广场
E: Head to the Exalting Sanctum Plaza

C: 通过工造司的捷径，前往丹鼎司
E: Pass through the Artisanship Commission's shortcut and head to the Alchemy Commission

C: 前往司辰宫，将受托之物送还驭空
E: Head to the Palace of Astrum and give Yukong the item that has been entrusted to you

C: 抵达星槎海，参与仪式
E: Head to Starskiff Haven and participate in the soul-soothing ceremony

C: 返回列车，向姬子回报情况
E: Return to the Express and report back to Himeko

C: 想办法击落吊灯制造通路
E: Find a way to shoot down the chandelier to clear a path
C██ck th█ l█st thi███ and m█m█ries

C: 前往第二道关卡的入口
E: Go to the second stage entrance

C: 通过第一道「动作派」考验
E: Pass the first "School of Action" test

C: 在「巨星巅峰战」中胜出
E: Take victory in the "Superstar Showdown"

C: 跟随米沙继续前进
E: Follow Misha and continue ahead

C: 跟随米沙，帮助米沙拾回记忆
E: Follow Misha and help him recover his memories

C: 在大剧院中探索
E: Search the Grand Theater

C: 踏上命途交锋的舞台
E: Take to the stage for the fated battle

C: 乘坐电梯前往下层
E: Take the elevator to the lower level

C: （可选）和列车组的伙伴们聊聊
E: (Optional) Chat with your fellow members of the Crew

C: 开始创作筑梦涂鸦
E: Start creating your own Dreamweaving graffiti

C: 弃置迷惘！得忍者之名！
E: Dispel your doubts! Embrace the mantle of the ninja!

C: 继续清扫助蕉…如果还有的话
E: Keep dealing with those pesky Assistananas... if there are any left

C: 寻找扭曲的余音
E: Find the distorted Afterecho

C: 唤醒昏迷的丹恒
E: Wake up the unconscious Dan Heng

C: 跟随白厄
E: Follow Phainon

C: 继续前进，寻找其它可交流的眷属
E: Continue to search for and talk with other Titankin

C: 尝试获取栅栏门后的砝码
E: Try to retrieve the weight behind the fence

C: 快逃！快逃！快逃！快逃！快逃！
E: Run! Run! Run! Run! Run!

C: 向阿格莱雅复命
E: Report back to Aglaea

C: 与遐蝶和阿格莱雅对话
E: Speak to Castorice and Aglaea

C: 与凯妮斯交谈，促成盟友关系
E: Speak with Caenis and form an alliance

C: 找到黄金短矛，探明赛飞儿下落
E: Find the Golden Short Spear and discover Cipher's whereabouts

C: 与斯缇科西亚的亡魂交谈
E: Speak with the Styxian Spirit of the Dead

C: 前往创世涡心，继续冒险
E: Head to the Vortex of Genesis and continue your adventure

C: 前往「龙骸古城」斯缇科西亚，继续冒险
E: Head to the "Dragonbone City" Styxia and continue your adventure

C: （可选）看看白厄在看什么
E: (Optional) See what Phainon's reading

C: 前往「呓语密林」神悟树庭，继续冒险
E: Head to the "Murmuring Woods" Grove of Epiphany and continue your adventure

C: 使用神龛增幅祷言
E: Use the shrine to enhance prayers

C: 击败「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，夺回火种
E: Defeat Spirithief Bartholos to take back the Coreflame

C: 见证卡厄斯兰那的结局
E: Witness the end of Khaslana

C: 追上逃跑的斯科特
E: Chase down the fleeing Skott

C: 调查尽头的显示器
E: Investigate the display monitor at the end

C: 继续「开拓」之旅
E: Continue the Trailblazing Expedition

C: 前往观景车厢
E: Head to the Parlor Car

C: 收集此空间的泰坦符文
E: Collect Titan Runes in This Area

C: 与谜之山之民对话
E: Talk with the mysterious Mountain Dweller

C: 揭露隐秘的记忆，了解德谬歌的过往
E: Unveil the hidden memories and discover the Demiurge's past

C: 揭露隐秘的记忆，了解德谬歌的过往
E: Unveil the hidden memories and discover the Demiurge's past

C: 据监控影像指认幕后黑手
E: Identify the mastermind according to the surveillance footage

C: 前往希拉记忆中的房间
E: Head to the room from Sheila's memory

C: 将得到的线索交给艾丝妲
E: Pass on all the clues you learned to Asta

C: 听真理医生盘点调查结果
E: Listen to Dr. Ratio collate the findings

C: 在城里转转，感受节日氛围
E: Stroll through the city and take in the festive atmosphere

C: 开拓奇遇
E: Trailblaze an adventure

C: 寻找银鬃铁卫队长邓恩
E: Find Silvermane Captain Dunn

C: 去「机械屋」看看茉莉状况如何
E: Go to the Workshop to check on Molly

C: 向「残响回廊」深处前进
E: Enter the innermost part of the Corridor of Fading Echoes

C: 开拓奇遇
E: Trailblaze an adventure

C: 询问佩拉是否可以修好暖炉
E: Ask whether Pela can fix the heater

E: Search for Bailu, who is missing
