C: 了解「赛博僵尸」真相后，三月七放弃了走捷径的想法。
E: After discovering the fact behind the "Cyberzombie," March 7th gave up on the idea of using shortcuts.

C: 那些世界的人不懂得自救吗？
E: Why can't the people in the worlds affected save themselves?

C: 记挂那两个孩子的安全吗？有瓦尔特在呢，你可以放松一点啦。
E: Are you worried about those two? Welt is with them. They should be fine.

C: 与此同时……
E: In the meantime...

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ的开拓暂时告一段落，星穹列车也该启航前往下一颗星球了。
E: The trailblazing of Jarilo-VI has drawn to a close, and the Astral Express must depart for the next planet.

C: 你信我，她肯定搞民主投票。你一票，我一票，丹恒一票，这就三票了。去哪儿还不是咱们一句话的事儿。
E: Trust me, she'll hold a democratic vote. One for you, one for me, one for Dan Heng — three altogether. We never go anywhere without a consensus.

C: 欢迎抵达…「罗浮」空港…星槎海……
E: Welcome to... Luofu skyport... Starskiff Haven...

C: 噢噢噢！
E: Yeahhhh~!

C: 不认识，俱乐部的人？
E: No idea. A Society member?

C: …我知道这个人，她是「寂静领主」，波尔卡•卡卡目。你看，她的面部是空的，这人曾经在全宇宙范围内销毁了自己的画像和雕塑……
E: ...I know this person. She's the Lord of Silence, Polka Kakamond. See? Her face is all blank. She had destroyed all of her own portraits and sculptures in the entire universe...

C: 我走另一条路，从上面一层绕过来的，正好在监控室看见你们。
E: I took another route to the upper level, and I saw you guys from up there.

C: 关心用错地方了吧！
E: Aren't you a nice kid!

C: 准备好了么？三，二，一……
E: Are you ready? Three, two, one...

C: 乖乖呆在这里。
E: Please, just stay here.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着椒丘：「5分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Jiaoqiu: "5 points!" it announces.

C: 哈，跟我比，你不就是小家伙？你才几岁啊？
E: Hah! Compared to me, you are. How old are you even?

C: 不知道啊，我正摩拳擦掌，要解开这个谜呢。
E: Ha... That I don't know. Which is why I'm gearing up to solve this mystery.

C: 我应该登上列车吗？
E: So I should board the Express?

C: {NICKNAME}，我等你哦。
E: I'll be waiting for you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我的态度很简单：无所谓。建议你也不用考虑我的想法，做你自己想要的选择。
E: My position is simple: It doesn't matter to me. I suggest you ignore my opinions and make your own choice.

C: 「星核」对你而言或许还是未知，但在你身体内这件事已是既定事实，你得牢牢地抓住这一点，才能走向更遥远的未来。
E: The Stellaron might still be an enigma, but the fact of the matter is — it's a part of you. And you have to embrace this before you can move forward into the future.

C: 强如末日兽，也不过手下败…
E: Even the Doomsday Beast, is no match...

C: 咦？可是黑塔……
E: Stay? But Herta...

C: 随意，这里对列车上的所有人开放。
E: Feel free. This is open to everyone on the Express.

C: 即便阿基维利的旅途大多已不可考，至少作为列车现在的乘客，将我们的见闻记录下来是有其意义的。
E: While many of the roads that Akivili traveled along no longer exist, I think it's still meaningful to record our adventures as current passengers of the Express.

C: （这么大的玩偶放在床上，晚上睡觉真的不会觉得拥挤吗？）
E: (With such a huge doll on the bed, wouldn't it feel really cramped at night?)

C: 关于「探索」…
E: About Exploration...

C: 三月七的床，不是很整洁。
E: March 7th's bed. It's not very tidy.

C: 这热度就别蹭了。
E: Seriously? Don't ride that hype train.

C: 请让我们助您一臂之力。
E: Please let us help you.

C: 早点睡吧，保存精力，能预见未来几天都会很辛苦。
E: Let's get to bed early and save our energy. I sense the next few days could be tiring.

C: 你们…想要什么？
E: What do you want...?

C: 他想通风报信，阻止他！
E: He's gonna raise the alarm, stop him!

C: 好吧，我还挺担心她的…她不见之后，佩拉说自己的工作量翻了一倍，连出门都没空了。
E: Well, I was sure worried about her... After she disappeared, Pela's workload doubled — she said she barely had time to go out.

C: …先不说这是什么奇怪的理由——你真的清理过屋子吗？不会又在搞什么被禁止的研究吧……
E: ...Seems like a strange reason not to take a look... plus, am I supposed to believe you were spring cleaning? You must be up to more forbidden research...

C: 那就好。谢谢你，菲丝，我身为情报官的威严保住了……
E: Oh, good. Thank you, Fizz. My dignity as an intelligence officer has been saved...

C: 「改变世界的力量」……
E: "The Power to Change the World"...

C: 我坚定不移地相信，在你我共同的努力下，我们的世界——被「开拓者」们称之为「雅利洛-Ⅵ」的这个世界——必将重新投身星辰的怀抱。
E: I firmly believe that with the determination of everyone, our world, the world the Trailblazers call "Jarilo-VI," will no longer be alone among the stars.

C: 布洛妮娅说，愿意为了我们再等上七百年……
E: Bronya said she's willing to wait <unbreak>700</unbreak> years for us...

C: 精神满满！
E: I'm full of energy myself!

C: 来拍张照留作纪念吧！
E: Let's take a photo together!

C: 嘿嘿，喜欢吧？拿去拿去，就当是姐姐送你的临别礼物啦！
E: Hee-hee, you like it? It's yours. A farewell gift from us.

C: 她原本希望我能站在她身边，但我觉得这样更好。更何况…我也不太习惯被那么多双眼睛盯着。
E: She wanted me to stand next to her, but I'm glad I stuck to my guns. Besides, I'm not sure I could handle that many people staring at me.

C: 对，土生土长的。
E: That's right, born and raised.

C: 噢，原来我没开消息提醒……
E: Oops, forgot to check my messages...

C: 「打扫卫生」出卖了你。
E: This is the price you pay for cleaning.

C: …确切地说，它曾经属于我和可可利亚两个人，是我们共有的财产。你不介意的话，布洛妮娅…我能把它带回机械屋吗？
E: ...In fact, it once belonged to me and Cocolia. It was our shared treasure. If you don't mind, Bronya... could I take it back to the workshop?

C: 高大的书架，要是没书就更好了。
E: A tall bookshelf. It would be better if there were no books in it.

C: 一位银鬃铁卫把守着向下的道路。
E: A Silvermane Guard is keeping watch on the downhill road.

C: 你脑补了这位银鬃铁卫毕业，分配，立功，少年得志，得罪小人，发配，流放的全过程。
E: You begin to fill in the life of this Silvermane Guard for yourself: Their graduation, deployments, meritorious contributions, youthful brilliance... how they offended some loser, got demoted, thrown out in the cold...

C: 几个罐头，标签写着「贝洛伯格红肠」；
E: A few tins labeled "Belobog Sausage."

C: 你感到一种至高无上的满足，就像某个童话故事里睡在九层床垫上的公主。烦恼、疲惫、使命都离你而去……
E: You feel a great sense of satisfaction — like that of some fairy tale princess who's just woken up from a night's sleep on nine mattresses stacked on top of each other. All concern, exhaustion, and sense of duty fly away...

C: 地下的民间组织，你就当成是地底的银鬃铁卫吧——只是比他们更有人情味些。
E: It's a grassroots organization. Think of it as the Silvermane Guards of the underground, but less stone-hearted.

C: （得找到三月七跟丹恒…从哪里找起呢？）
E: (I gotta find March 7th and Dan Heng... but where should I start?)

C: 回来回来，他们不会藏那么远的啦！
E: Come back, come back, they won't be hiding that far away!

C: 你的幽默感去哪儿了？
E: ...Dark sense of humor you got there.

C: 对了，还有你——等见到了首领，得让他决定该怎么处置你。
E: Oh, as for you... the Chief will decide your fate when we see him.

C: 你在这里做什么？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 他们才不想声张呢。大部分矿区都被裂界污染了，很多人都丢了工作。这消息要是传出去，怕不是矿工都要挤破头了。
E: Well, they weren't in a hurry to make it known. Most of the mines have been contaminated by the Fragmentum — many people are out of work. They were afraid of being overwhelmed if they let the word out.

C: 新发现的巨大矿脉…那儿应该就是冲突的中心吧？
E: The giant ore vein — the one they discovered... That must be where the clashes are centered?

C: 应该是往深处去了吧？矿脉那边早就被全副武装的地痞流氓占领了，咱们这些手无寸铁的良民完全不是对手啊！
E: Further in, I guess. Those thugs took control of the vein ages ago — and they're fully armed. We poor, defenseless, good folks were no match for them.

C: 哼哼，是哦，矿脉是指望不上了…但你可别忘了，上了膛的家伙现在在谁手里呢？
E: Hehe, right, right... we can't rely on the vein anymore... But don't forget which side brought loaded guns to the party.

C: 还没找到「地火」的人。
E: We haven't found Wildfire yet.

C: 又来了——什么计算结果，生存策略，我可没空听你长篇大论。赶紧把你手下的杂鱼撤走，不然别怪我不客气！
E: *sigh* This again... Calculation results, survival strategies... I haven't got time for your thesis. Withdraw your forces, or I'll lose my temper!

C: 嚯！这还真新鲜，「地火」连地下都快顾不过来了，没想到还有外来者找咱们帮忙。
E: Ho-ho, well this is new. Wildfire can barely take care of the Underworld, and now outsiders are looking for assistance from us.

C: …好家伙，下次别这样了，我可是吓得不轻。
E: ...My fine fellow, please don't do that again. You scared the daylights outta me.

C: 哎，那边怎么闹哄哄的，好像有好多人在吵架……
E: Hey, what's that commotion? It sounds like there's a big argument happening...

C: 那好吧，咱还以为你很感兴趣呢。
E: No worries, just thought you might be interested.

C: …我奉大守护者的谕令，要将你们捉拿逮捕，这点还没有变。
E: ...I will arrest you under the supreme guardian's decree. Nothing has changed.

C: 自从和你们相遇，意外就接连发生，甚至来到了被封锁的地下……
E: Since encountering you, the unexpected seems to have arrived in waves. I never thought I'd enter the Underworld that has been sealed away for so long...

C: 我打算整理一下目前的情报，你要听吗？
E: I'm about to summarize the intel we've gathered so far. Did you want to listen?

C: 现在还不好说，她的反应过于激进了，说明我们的言语中一定有什么触碰到了她严防死守的秘密。
E: It's too early to say, but it was a radical move. It means that we must have broached a highly sensitive subject... a secret that she's sparing no effort to protect.

C: 我不发表意见。
E: No comment.

C: 是谁！谁在那？
E: Who goes there? Show yourself!

C: 你当「大守护者」就行了。
E: You should become the supreme guardian.

C: …别这么激动，希儿，这对身体不好。
E: ...Easy now, Seele. Anger isn't good for one's health.

C: 现有的线索还没法完整地拼凑起来……
E: We still haven't put all of the pieces together...

C: 将前几次在睡梦中听到的低语告诉丹恒和三月七……
E: Telling Dan Heng and March 7th about the voices you heard in your recent dreams...

C: {NICKNAME}，你昨晚又做梦了吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, did you have a dream again last night?

C: ——大英雄…丹恒和三月七！
E: And the other big heroes, Dan Heng and March 7th!

C: 希儿小姐，我还在这儿呢……
E: Miss Seele, I'm still here, you know...

C: 把你看到的东西告诉我吧，你到底在隐藏些什么…为什么要把铁卫派到裂界里去送死，为什么要放弃下层区的人民——为什么要在那个关头转变心意？
E: Tell me what you have seen. What exactly it is you are hiding... Why do you send the Silvermane Guards to die in the Fragmentum? Why have you abandoned the people of the Underworld? And why... why did you have that sudden change of mind?

C: …是{NICKNAME}帮我一起，从铆钉镇的孤儿院找出来的。
E: ...{NICKNAME} helped me find him in the Rivet Town orphanage.

C: 拳手们还在休息，看比赛或者想打挑战赛的请稍后再来排队。
E: The boxers are still resting. If you are watching the match or want to play in a challenge match, please come back later to wait in line.

C: 算了吧，虽然「怪物盔甲」上一场打得很不错，但也别瞎吹什么未来可期。
E: Come on, just because he did alright in the last game, that doesn't make him a future rock star.

C: 你什么意思？「怪物盔甲」什么实力大家都有目共睹，比以前那几个又菜又装的家伙可强太多了。
E: What do you mean? Monster Armor obviously has what it takes. He's far better than those pretentious and useless old farts from before.

C: 谢谢你的好意，不过我…咳…我身体好得很…咳…没什么大问题。
E: Thank you for your kindness, but I... *cough*... I'm fine... *cough*... It's no biggie.

C: 你看这里，这几处都是旧伤，按理说早该痊愈了，但伤口不仅没愈合，表面还有像结晶一样的东西析出。
E: Look here, these are all old wounds which should have healed long ago, but not only did the wounds not heal, there are crystal-like things on the surface.

C: 没搬出铆钉镇的时候…我们总是找当地裁缝，把布料柔软的幼儿衣物改成她能穿的贴身衣裳。
E: Before we moved out of Rivet Town, we always went to a local tailor to convert the soft fabrics of toddler clothes into bodysuits that she could wear.

C: 再说了，他连比赛都赢不了。「怪物盔甲」被五冠王收拾得体无完肤，场面惨烈得很。
E: Besides, he can't even win anymore. He was beaten so badly by the five-time champ. It was such a one-sided fiasco.

C: 休息？有这个闲工夫，还不如想想如何挽救自己的人气。
E: A break!? He should first try to take a break from being such a loser!

C: 你真的当我没见过裂界怪物吗？我看过有些更大更可怕的怪物，要是能搞到这样的，我得花重金请他回来打拳。
E: You think I know nothing about Fragmentum monsters, huh? I've seen some bigger and scarier ones, and if he can get his hands on one of those, then I'm willing to pay more to rehire him.

C: 您稍等片刻——我这就去通知各部门，赛季揭幕战提前开始！
E: Just a moment, I'm going to inform all departments that the season opener is starting early!

C: 我要参加最后一场比赛。
E: I'm ready for the last round.

C: 守护者牺牲自己封印了星核。
E: The guardian sacrificed herself to seal the Stellaron.

C: 说起来…守护者发生的变故，不知道史瓦罗和克拉拉有没有受到影响呢？
E: Huh... do you think Svarog and Clara felt the effects of our battle with the guardian?

C: 哈哈哈，是少了些铁锈和地髓粉尘的味道吧？大口呼吸吧孩子们，这就是自由的气息啊。
E: Hahaha, less rust and Geomarrow particles floating around. Take a deep breath, children — this is what freedom tastes like.

C: 说、说的也是……
E: I g—guess...

C: 救人性命不需要回报。
E: Saving lives doesn't need repayment.

C: 尤利安，我这里有你的东西。
E: Julian, I've got your stuff here.

C: 听上去很有意思，但是完全不对！你一定要去看《冒险鼹鼠队》，书里全是有趣的大冒险。
E: Hmm, interesting, but you're totally wrong! You should do better and read The Adventurous Moles. It is full of fun adventures.

C: 我收集齐了《冒险鼹鼠队》…
E: I collected all of The Adventurous Moles...

C: 你离开这座垃圾箱，将它抛之脑后，不再理睬。
E: You leave this dumpster and forget all about it.

C: 目前，公司方面已派出相关人员前往调查雅利洛-Ⅵ现状。让我们祝愿幸存者们尽快回归「存护」的命途！
E: The IPC has sent out investigators to assess the situation on Jarilo-VI. Let us hope that the survivors can return to the Path of Preservation as soon as possible!

C: 断联已久的工业行星巴兰扎熔炉确认遭到绝灭大君「铁墓」入侵，陷入全面瘫痪状态。
E: After a prolonged silence, it has been verified that the industrial world Baranza Forge has been invaded by the Lord Ravager Irontomb, plunging it into a state of complete paralysis.

C: 我们也没得选。
E: We don't really have a choice.

C: 为何不让「我们」调查星核？
E: Why would he stop us from investigating the Stellaron?

C: 这个景元，他到底掌握了哪些信息，哪些又是故意隐藏起来的呢？
E: This Jing Yuan... how much does he know, and how much is he hiding from us?

C: 是啊，想来太卜司一日也不可缺了符大人。
E: It's true — the Divination Commission really can't go a single day without Lady Fu.

C: 啧，真是屋漏偏逢连夜雨。工造司那厢也出了问题，还是个大麻烦！你去通知云骑军，看看能不能……
E: Tsk, when it rains, it pours. The Artisanship Commission has its own issues — sounds serious too! Go and inform the Cloud Knights — see if you can...

C: 莫非您有朋友留在那儿，还没能出来？您要是实在担心，可以去找个逃出来的卜者来问问。
E: Do you have friends trapped in the delve? If you're worried about them, find a diviner and see if they can tell you what happened.

C: 有事请教…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 我？我没什么可说的呀……
E: Me? There's not much to talk about...

C: 好在我作为注册行商，在仙舟吃穿住行都有优惠的政策。待久一点也没关系，哈哈。
E: Thankfully, as a registered merchant on the Xianzhou, I get a discount on all my expenses. In that regard, it makes sense for me to stay a little longer, haha.

C: 不会呀，其它功能还能用，瞧？
E: Doesn't seem like it, everything else is working fine — see?

C: （展示停云的照片）
E: (Show Tingyun's photo.)

C: 这些云骑没有堕入魔阴身…你对他们做了什么？
E: These Cloud Knights aren't mara-struck... What did you do to them?

C: 列车团的诸位，初次见面，不，应该说我已在预见中与各位会晤过了。本座是仙舟「六御」之一，太卜司太卜，符玄。
E: Greetings, crew of the Astral Express. This is our first encounter... though given that I have encountered you in foresight, perhaps I should say the second. I am Fu Xuan, master diviner at the Divination Commission and one of the Six Charioteers.

C: 看来我们在工造司耽搁时，太卜大人已先行开拔出征啦。
E: The master diviner must have launched the campaign while we were delayed in the Artisanship Commission.

C: 恩公说哪里话，这也算不得什么场面……
E: I'm afraid this is nothing, benefactor...

C: 没、没有吗？
E: W—We're not?

C: 罢了，看来要从内部崩裂仙舟，还得用别的法子……
E: Never mind. It would seem the time has come for other means of dismantling the Xianzhou from within...

C: 她的目标一定是建木！染指建木，有如夺走罗浮的根源，如此一来，覆灭仙舟轻而易举。事不宜迟，必须阻止她！
E: Phantylia is aiming for the Ambrosial Arbor! If she succeeds, the Luofu will be deprived of its roots, making its destruction all too easy. We must stop her!

C: 我要做的事已经完了。
E: My task is complete.

C: 魁首大人败了？怎么可能…怎么可能怎么可能！
E: The master was defeated? No... N—No that cannot be!

C: 说来话长，三月。是我。
E: It's a long story, March. It's me.

C: 仔细瞧瞧，这些石灯的底座与底座之间，好像有差别呢…
E: Hey, check it out. The bases of these stone lanterns are different...

C: 以为自己胜券在握了吗，幻胧？
E: Did you think it was over, Phantylia?

C: 关于星核猎手，我们知道的一样少。但在穷观阵里，我看见了卡芙卡从{RUBY_B#艾利欧}「命运的奴隶」{RUBY_E#}那里领受到的预言。艾利欧预见了罗浮的种种可能……
E: The Stellaron Hunters? We know just as little. But in the Matrix of Prescience, I saw a prophecy that Kafka received from {RUBY_B#Elio}Destiny's Slave{RUBY_E#}. Elio foresaw all manner of possibilities for the Luofu...

C: {NICKNAME}，你的话听起来不怎么高兴啊。
E: {NICKNAME}, you don't sound very happy.

C: 若能从她口中得知些过去的事情，多了解一点丹枫的所作所为，想必也能为弥补旧日宿业做些什么。
E: If she can tell me more about Dan Feng's actions, then perhaps I can do something to make up for his sins.

C: 我们能做些什么？
E: How can we help?

C: 理解理解，懂得懂得。
E: Yup, got it. Say no more. Sure thing.

C: 无论长生、短生，这将是所有人的归途。
E: Long-life or short-life, everyone sails towards the same destination.

C: 匹诺康尼正在举办一场宴会，我已接受了「家族」的邀请，打算去那儿看看。
E: Penacony is throwing a banquet — I've received an invitation from The Family.

C: （离跃迁还有段时间…找大家聊聊天吧。）
E: (There's still some time before the jump... I should talk to everyone.)

C: 要带点小说或者漫画吗？这样在酒店房间里待着的时候也不至于无聊了，但是这些书都好重啊……
E: Maybe I should bring some novels or comic books? At least then I won't be too bored while staying in the hotel room. But these books are so heavy...

C: 这倒有意思。那这些朋友能为我带来什么？
E: Well, this is interesting. And how will my new friends benefit me?

C: 瓦尔特，我们先喝一杯？匹诺康尼的「苏乐达」很有名哦。
E: Welt, how about a drink first? Penacony's SoulGlad is very famous.

C: 是的！白日梦酒店不仅为大家提供客房，还连接着匹诺康尼的现实与梦境。来自银河各地的客人在这里沉入梦境，开启美梦之旅。
E: Yeah, it is! The Reverie does not only provide accommodation for its guests, it is also connected to both Penacony's reality and dreamscape. Guests from all over the cosmos come here to immerse themselves in a marvelous, dreamy journey.

C: 关于「钟表匠」…
E: About the Watchmaker...

C: 不过，他为何会与邀请函扯上关系，又为何会出现在疑似无名客发出的密文里…我暂时也没有头绪。
E: But how and why he's involved with that invite, and why his name popped up in the encrypted message allegedly sent by a Nameless... I've got no leads for now.

C: 关于盛会…
E: About the event...

C: 梦境██ █ ██酒店█ ██修缮中，请您██ █酒█ 服务██ █员指引，从指定█ █ ██进入███ █……
E: The dreamscape ██ █ ██ hotel █ ██ under construction. Please ██ █ receive instructions from ho█ service ██ █aff and enter the ███ █ through the designated █ █ ██...

C: （这是…一张纸条？）
E: (A... note?)

C: 对不起…我真是世界上最糟糕的无名客。
E: Sorry... I am indeed the worst Nameless in the universe.

C: …我承认。
E: ...Yes, I plead guilty.

C: （…复现完成！现在您可以更好地享用梦境了。）
E: (...The replication is complete! Now, you can enjoy an enhanced Dreamscape experience.)

C: 购物中心外边就是广场，来这里——我请你吃好吃的～
E: Just outside the mall is the plaza. Follow me! I'll buy you a nice meal!

C: 这边这边！
E: Over here!

C: 我们所在的地方，正是黄金时刻中最好的观景地点！你看，这里还专门设置了望远镜呢！这一纪的谐乐大典马上要开幕啦，记得提前来这里占位哦。
E: And here we are! The best viewing spot in all of Golden Hour! Look, there's even a telescope here! When the Charmony Festival arrives, remember to be here early if you wanna get a seat.

C: …看来他很擅长战斗——隐秘的那种。他手掌宽大，但手指细长、灵活。我猜他习惯用刀。短刀，匕首……
E: ...He looks like a skilled fighter, the covert kind. He has large palms, yet his fingers are slender and nimble. I reckon he has experience using knives, like a short sword or dagger...

C: 我讨厌你那毛茸茸的脑瓜——它实在是太聪明了！
E: I hate your furry head! It has such a clever brain!

C: 难道…你真能看得到我？
E: Can you really see me?

C: 可聪明的人从一开始就不会入局。你瞧，我是不是更聪明一点？
E: But the smarter ones wouldn't have joined the game in the first place. See? I'm smarter.

C: 呜…小的们，都给我散了…让我一个人静静……
E: *sob*... Gang, you are dismissed... I need to be alone for a while...

C: 可否通融一下。
E: Could you let us through just this time?

C: 对了——你在列车上有很多朋友。你们平时遇到这种状况，是怎么做的？
E: I mean, don't you have lots of friends on the Astral Express? What would you guys do if something like this happened?

C: …好了！开始吧。
E: I'm good. Let's do this.

C: 我明白了…是要玩捉迷藏，对吗？
E: I see... Are we playing hide-and-seek?

C: 所以，你也要保护好自己…
E: So, you need to keep yourself safe, too...

C: 救救我
E: Help me

C: 快回来吧
E: Come back here

C: 也许是「巡猎」…「毁灭」…甚至可能是「终末」，无所谓了，这些命途的其中一面——都指向同一种结果。
E: Perhaps The Hunt... or Destruction... or even Finality. It doesn't matter, these Paths all point to the same outcome.

C: 我有这个权利…对吧……
E: I have this right... Don't I...

C: 在背后也这么称呼，看来你们的关系确实不错呀。
E: Thinking of you even in your absence, seems like you two were pretty close.

C: 我们到了——这里有座电梯，和大堂的一模一样，乘坐它应该就能到目的地。
E: We've arrived. There's an elevator here, just like in the lobby. We should be able to reach our destination with it.

C: 这里竟然有路……
E: There's actually a path here...

C: 手机彻底消散了，化为梦泡消逝而去。
E: The cell phone has completely dissipated into a dream bubble.

C: 你的同伴似乎不这么想，他们为你争取了活命的机会。
E: Your companions don't seem to think so. They fight for your chance at survival.

C: 为什么？
E: Why?

C: 愿死亡结束你漫长的梦……
E: May death be the end of your boundless dream...

C: 我时常会忘记一些事，因此比起回忆，更习惯用「感受」去捕捉些什么。所以——
E: I tend to forget things — which is why, rather than memories, I'm accustomed to using my emotions to capture what I normally wouldn't otherwise. So...

C: 一段时间前 忆域深处
E: Some time ago — Deep in Memory Zone

C: 唉，看到那座大剧院，就会忍不住胡思乱想……
E: Whenever I see the grand theater, I just can't stop all these thoughts from flooding my head...

C: ——很遗憾，你猜对了。
E: Unfortunately, your guess is correct.

C: 这大哥心态也太沉重了…吧。
E: He doesn't have to be so melodramatic, does he?

C: 我们奉家族之命来调查此事。
E: That's exactly what The Family has ordered us to investigate.

C: 想必黄泉小姐此行收获不小，愿意同我分享一下吗？
E: I'm sure you've gained a lot from this trip, Miss Acheron. Are you willing to share your findings with me?

C: 这么危险啊…我猜家族根本没把你的话当真吧？要不你是怎么把它夹带进来的？
E: A deadly button, huh?... I guess The Family didn't take your threats seriously at all? Otherwise, how on earth did you manage to bring it in here?

C: …哇，纸条上的字变了！
E: ...Whoa, the words on the note are changing!

C: 她是个幽灵？！
E: Is she a ghost!?

C: …我听说他死在了无人在意的角落里，一个没有人能发现的地方。我明白，从这一刻起，曾经的匹诺康尼再也回不来了。
E: ...I heard he died in obscurity, in a place where no one could find him. That's when I realized that the Penacony I once knew would never return.

C: 这就把我忘了？你被伊伊玛尼喀的军阀绑在电刑椅上的时候，是谁给你出的主意？
E: Forgotten me already? When you were strapped to that electric chair by Iymanikan warlords, who was it that gave you the idea?

C: 他们都在这座游乐园里，爸爸妈妈先进去了。我正要去找他们。
E: They're in that amusement park. Papa and Mama went in first. I'm just about to go look for them.

C: 但人们不这么想，毕竟美梦糖浆的味道实在诱人。你在匹诺康尼孤立无援，只能凭一己之力扳倒高墙…怎么可能？
E: However, people don't see it like that, especially since the flavor of the dream syrup is so alluring. You will receive no charity on Penacony, and relying on your own strength alone to topple high walls...? Not a likely feat.

C: 究竟是前者还是后者？哈，我们很快就能见真章了。
E: But will it be the former, or the latter? Hah, we'll find out soon enough.

C: 嗯，我该回家了。天色开始阴沉，要下雨了，我不能让大家担心。
E: Yes, I should go home. The day's getting dark, and it's going to rain. I don't want to worry the others.

C: …死而无憾。
E: It's best to die without regrets.

C: 你一定会比我更好、更厉害。
E: You'll be better, and stronger than me.

C: 而在你的布局里，公司永远是赢家，即便最后你赌输了…对于家族而言，一位使节的性命也足够昂贵。
E: And in your plans, the IPC always wins. Even if you lose the bet... To The Family, the life of an ambassador is still invaluable.

C: 哈哈哈哈哈哈！你有种，厉害！可以啊，是我太低估你了……
E: Hahahaha! You have guts. I'll give you that! Not bad. I severely underestimated you...

C: 这场盛会聚集了太多不应被邀请的客人。纵使「同谐」包容万象，为了匹诺康尼的和平，我也不得不对其中的一些人下达逐客令……
E: Many guests who weren't supposed to be invited have gathered at this banquet. Even if the Harmony is all-embracing, I have no choice but to show some of them the door... for the sake of Penacony, and the peace.

C: 开玩笑的啦。
E: Hey, don't take everything so seriously.

C: 今天过后，耶佩拉的名字就会从银河历史中消失，而永火官邸将取而代之，在不远的未来收到一封邀请函……
E: After today, Jepella's name will disappear from cosmic history, and the Ever-Flame Mansion will take its place. In the not-too-distant future, you'll receive an invitation...

C: 祝你在那里找到想要的答案…或者，解脱。
E: I hope you find whatever you seek there, be it answers... or salvation.

C: 这里的氛围和美梦截然不同，人们生活得极其松散，不存在家族那样的管理者，精神状态也有些微妙的恍惚。
E: The atmosphere here is starkly different from the beautiful dream. There are no regulators here like The Family, and they all look like they're mildly dazed.

C: 算了，这不重要。还是先跟着米沙吧。
E: Forget it. It's not important. We'd better just follow Misha.

C: 我还打听到一种说法：据说流梦礁初具规模的时候，这里才是匹诺康尼梦境的中心呢！
E: I also heard that when Dreamflux Reef took shape, it was the center of all Dreamscapes in Penacony.

C: 原来是位大家长啊。
E: So, a guardian of sorts!

C: 之后公司的使节暗中投来密信，更让我确信匹诺康尼的光芒下潜伏着某种不可告人的秘密。最后，我通过橡木家系卷宗中的几条线索，找到了这里……
E: Later, I discovered the secret letters from the IPC ambassador, which further convinced me that there are hidden secrets beneath the surface of Penacony. So, following the clues in the Oak Family's dossiers, I found my way here...

C: 可附近不是谐乐鸽的栖息地，为什么它会孤零零地在这里？是被父母遗弃了吗？
E: But Charmony Doves don't live here. So how did this little bird get here? Maybe its parents abandoned it?

C: 他们的名字被刻在碑面上，这也就意味着……
E: If their names are inscribed here, then that means...

C: 求您降福，希佩尊贵的代言人。
E: I humbly request your blessings, esteemed advocate of Xipe.

C: 嗯，这样啊…可在我看来，这反倒是常人该有的活法。
E: I suppose you have a point... but in my opinion, that's how most people live their lives.

C: 后来，祂陨落了。这位星神所行的道路与「同谐」产生碰撞，为后者吞纳、同化。那响彻寰宇的合唱一度沉默，再奏响时，已成了谐乐的颂歌……
E: Later, THEY fell. The route traversed by this Aeon clashed with the Harmony, ultimately being absorbed and fused into it. The chorus that once reverberated across worlds fell silent, and when it echoed anew, it was transformed into the hymn of Harmony...

C: 我们从来不是「同谐」的孩子，你我理想中的乐园…也不应由希佩创造。万众的幸福，只能由立于万众之上的「一人」来承诺。
E: We were never children of the Harmony. Our ideal paradise... could not have been crafted by Xipe. True bliss can only be guaranteed by the "one" who transcends the many.

C: 呼哈！这浓郁的黑火药烤肉蘸双氧水味，真是…绝了！真不愧是全银河最好的雪莉桶熟成麦芽果汁。
E: Ahh! This flavor... Dynamite Barbecue with Rocket Fuel... It really hits the spot! Truly the finest sherry cask-aged malt juice in the cosmos.

C: 只能？什么只能？
E: No other options? What do you mean?

C: 很简单，咱们要悄无声息地绑上几个人质，后面就什么都好办了，既可以拿来和家族交涉，也可以拿走他们的身份——
E: It's simple. We just grab some hostages and use them as bargaining chips with The Family. Or maybe we can even take their identities...

C: 曾经，我也和你一样期待它会在某一天停息，就这么过去了几年、几十年…最后，「希望」比这场雨更早迎来终点。
E: I used to believe, just like you, that it would eventually stop. Years and decades passed... and in the end, such hope faded away before the rain did.

C: 咦…是在说我们吗？
E: Uh... Is he talking about us?

C: 希望这样的考验不会持续太久……
E: I hope these tests won't take too long...

C: 你转过身，决绝地离开了，嘴里还念念有词——「英雄背井离家乡，来到美梦去开荒，美梦要是不留我，{F#老娘}{M#老子}投奔泯灭帮……」
E: You turn around, leaving resolutely, muttering under your breath — "The hero's quest started with a bang. For this dream I've toiled and sang. If the dream repays me in pang, then I, the {M#man}{F#woman}, will join the Annihilation Gang...."

C: 在焕然一新的匹诺康尼，你们看着对方，再见的欣喜与离别的悲伤，形同陌路的尴尬与久别重逢的羞怯，此刻一起涌上心头。
E: Against the backdrop of a revitalized Penacony, the joy of reunion mixes with the sorrow of past separation, the awkwardness of being strangers, and the shyness of a long-awaited encounter, all converging at this very moment.

C: 是的，虽然听起来很难以置信，但匹诺康尼现在很危险…我们必须去立刻阻止才行。
E: I know that this may sound like an exaggeration, but Penacony is actually in danger right now... We have to prevent it at all costs, sooner rather than later.

C: 我们已经集齐全部零件了…快回去吧，别让那位迷钟等急了。
E: We've gathered all the missing parts... Let's hurry back, we don't want to keep Big Ticker waiting.

C: ——我和橡木家系全体，无法同意各位的要求。
E: Both I and the Oak Family cannot acquiesce to your request.

C: 许多演员靠煽情感动他人，但你们却表演出了欲语泪先流的悲伤，甚至让我想起了从前……
E: Many actors depend on emotions to move people, but your performance depicted a grief so profound it brings tears to one's eyes... and even reminds me of my past...

C: 耐心是一种美德。不过我不会责备你。相反，我正要表明来意。
E: Patience is a virtue. However, I won't hold it against you. On the contrary, I'm here to make my intentions clear.

C: 再想想看。
E: Think it over some more.

C: 这一坠彻底摔断了它的翅膀。它在我的怀中苦苦挣扎，却无济于事，最终迎来痛苦的死亡。而我们的悉心照料、寄予的关爱和厚望，在这一瞬间都成了葬送它的推手。
E: The fall shattered its wings. It writhed helplessly in my embrace, but it was all for naught, finally succumbing to a painful demise. And in that instant, our tender care, our given love and hopes... they all became the inevitable push that sent it to its death.

C: 「若手术成功，现在应该在野战医院里休养吧。」
E: "If the operation was successful, she should probably be recovering in the field hospital."

C: 你和折纸小鸟也是朋友吗？
E: You and Origami Bird are friends?

C: 难道这是什么比喻？「大海」指的是忆域？
E: Could this be some sort of metaphor? Perhaps the "sea" refers to the Memory Zone?

C: 对不起，我也不知道。但记忆就像喷泉里的水一样不受控制地涌上来……
E: I'm sorry. I don't know, but my memories keep pouring out uncontrollably, like water flowing from a fountain...

C: 可是你知道吗？直到爷爷把它交给我的那天，我才恍然大悟，那其实不是什么怀表……
E: But you know what? It wasn't until the day my grandpa gave it to me that I realized... it wasn't a pocket watch at all...

C: 最后，它会引领我跨越「存在的地平线」，在彼岸的尽头…斩断「虚无」。
E: In the end, it will lead me beyond the Horizon of Existence, and on the other side, I will... cut off Nihility.

C: 所以我们便找到你们，协助列车组的各位一起拯救世界了。
E: Which is why we sought you out, to help the Astral Express save the world together.

C: 应该的，应该的。
E: I do what I can.

C: 看来我可以帮你把这个答案排除掉了。那么，这<color=#dbc291ff>致命的破绽</color>到底出现在哪里呢？
E: I'll go ahead and eliminate that incorrect answer for you. So, what is <color=#dbc291ff>the fatal flaw</color>?

C: 露莎卡星三票，江户星两票……
E: Three votes for Lushaka, two for Edo...

C: 虽然那种演出不太吸引我…但依你们吧。
E: That type of performance isn't really my cup of tea, but... I'll let you all decide.

C: 唔…剧团演出什么的我是很感兴趣啦，但江户星听起来遭遇了危险。身为无名客，我们更应该向他们伸出援手吧？
E: Hmm... I'm really interested to check out this troupe's performance, but it really sounds like the Edo Star is in a lot of trouble. As Nameless, should we not extend a helping hand?

C: 终于，你们来了。
E: Finally, you've arrived.

C: 这也是我们最后的希望。太一之梦建立在「齐响诗班」——「同愿」的化身之上。只有当匹诺康尼众生的愿望合而为一，它才得以显现。
E: And this is our final hope. Ena's Dream is founded upon the Harmonious Choir, namely everyone's shared wishes. It will only materialize once the aspirations of all beings in Penacony merge as one.

C: 每个人的幸福和道路应当由他自己开创。虽然我不是无名客，但也愿意将飞上天空的勇气传递给每一个需要它的人。
E: Their path of happiness should be forged by themselves. While I may not be a Nameless, I'm willing to instill courage in all those who need it.

C: 既解决了家族的燃眉之急，又趁机给自己造了一波势，一举两得。不愧是那位传说中的大亨。
E: Well, that would meet The Family's needs and also create momentum for Mr. Alfalfa himself. Quite fitting for a legendary tycoon like him.

C: …这是家族的说辞，至于他们是否真的从头到尾一无所知，便是另一个微妙的问题了。
E: ...That's the claim The Family makes. Whether they were truly unaware of all this is a delicate matter.

C: 没什么要问的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 而终有一日，我们将魂归同处。
E: And one day, our souls will return to the same place.

C: 届时，一切星球的发展将归纳于帐，条目了然；所有的概念都可以被定义、估值、交换、流通，而它的中心，即是克里珀的「信用」。
E: By then, all planetary developments will be recorded in accounts with well-defined values and the ability for exchange and circulation. And the heart of everything will be Qlipoth's "credit."

C: 毕竟这种机会可不多见。看看这船上的客人吧，从他们身上肯定能得到不少有价值的宝物。
E: Opportunities like this don't come around often. Just look at the guests on this ship. They're surely holding a wealth of valuable treasures.

C: 戴尔是个富家子弟，一路追求心仪的女孩多萝西而不得。为了俘获对方的芳心，他与我做了交易：抵押自己全部的财产，换取一样必定能打动多萝西的礼物。
E: Dell was from a wealthy family. He was head over heels for Dorothy and wanted to win her heart, so he made a deal with me. He put up his entire fortune in exchange for a gift that would impress Dorothy.

C: 那你干什么去了？
E: Then why did you go there?

C: …谁说我要和你赌了？
E: ...Who said I was betting with you?

C: 牛仔，感谢你们在决战里出手。
E: I'd like to thank you for all your help in the battle, cowboy.

C: 别和那个赌徒一样总想耍小聪明。这次我就睁一只眼闭一只眼，下不为例。
E: Do not try to emulate that gambler's penchant for attempting to be overly clever. I'll let it go this time, but this won't happen again.

C: 所以，我会格外关注「能让我活下去」的线索，这次的匹诺康尼之旅也一样。
E: So, I'll pay extra attention to any leads that will let me live on. This trip to Penacony is no different.

C: （看来不用担心她，安心等开幕式吧……）
E: (Looks like I don't have to worry about her. Let's wait for the opening ceremony to start...)

C: 在盛会之星最为迷茫的岁月里，是他携伙伴从天而降，用「开拓」教会了我们自由在何方；也是他们为梦境的拓荒事业身先士众，才换来如今「同谐」的乐园。
E: In the most bewildering times of the Planet of Festivities, it was he who descended from the sky with his companions, who taught us through Trailblazing where freedom lies. It was also they who led the vanguard in the pioneering of the Dreamscape, in exchange for what is now known as the paradise of Harmony.

C: 虫子。
E: Bugs.

C: <size=28>「花斯卡，火斯卡，小花火——！花斯卡，火斯卡，小～花～火～！」</size>
E: <size=28>Bloomska, boomska, little sparkleeesss!!! Bloomska, boomska, little sparkleeesss!!!</size>

C: 你现在又是折纸小鸟了？
E: So you're the Origami Bird now then?

C: （还算是有点进展…继续努力吧。）
E: (At least I made some progress... Gotta keep working at it.)

C: 这事不能交给星核猎手解决。
E: This matter can't just be left to the Stellaron Hunters.

C: 举杯。
E: A toast.

C: 原来列车长也一直在默默为我们付出啊……
E: Turns out, Pom-Pom's been silently putting in a lot of work for us, wow...

C: 一个被三重命途缠裹绑缚，命运未卜的世界……
E: A world fettered by three Paths, its destiny hanging in the balance...

C: 别啊，同一种套路别来第二遍了！
E: Please don't! We don't need to go through that again!

C: …真是太棒了！青春活泼的美少女在校园里挥洒人生，这种情节简直是为本姑娘量身定制的嘛！
E: ...That's great! A young cute girl full of energy living her best life on campus? That experience is practically made for me!

C: 睡少了，太困。
E: I'm tired. Not enough sleep.

C: 什么？！我的神主，你早说啊！
E: What!? For the love of... Couldn't you have said that earlier!?

C: 那个…您一定要在梦中注意安全，务必小心……
E: Um... Please stay safe, and be careful in the dream...
Bana...

C: 几位同学，请留步！
E: You there, please wait a moment!

C: 嗯？
E: Huh?

C: 还在等什么，奉行武士，出招吧！
E: What are you waiting for, warriors? Fight us!

C: 酱？
E: Why chan?

C: 当我没问。
E: Forget I asked.

C: 什么香蕉玩意儿？
E: What the banana sundae are you talking about?

C: 入社考核该找谁
E: Who do I look for to take the entrance test?

C: 抱歉，波提欧先生，我以后还是少用些修辞吧。
E: My apologies, I'll cut back on figures of speech in the future, Mr. Boothill.

C: 不能放着她不管！我等下再去找你会合，不是临阵脱逃哈。
E: We can't leave her alone! I'll meet up with you later. This isn't me running away from a fight, okay?

C: 恰丽卡紧闭双眼，紧皱眉头，应该是正在认真作画。出于礼貌，还是不要打扰她吧。
E: Chaletka has her eyes tightly closed, and her brows furrowed, seemingly focused on her painting. Out of courtesy, it's best not to disturb her.

C: 蕉师的要求是睡蕉小猴，但你真的要完全照做吗？
E: The BananAdvisor demands a Slumbernana Monkey, but do you really have to follow it to the letter?

C: 睡蕉小猴，睡蕉小猴……
E: Slumbernana Monkey, Slumbernana Monkey...

C: 好耶！那等我和他俩道个别，就带我去办理入社吧。
E: Great! Let me say goodbye to those two, and then you can show me where to sign up.

C: 在你还未消化这些情感之时，小猴欢快地跑了远方……
E: Before you could process these emotions, the little monkey happily dashed off into the distance...

C: 蕉！蕉蕉！
E: Bana, bana~!

C: 蕉蕉蕉，你比想象中通情达理得多嘛。
E: Bana geez! I didn't count on you being this reasonable.

C: 等等，这位同学，你在念些什么蕉？
E: Stop! What bananonsense are you reciting!?

C: 蕉，蕉蕉！
E: Bana, bana!

C: 下课时间…到了……
E: Class... d—dismissed...

C: 赶上了！你没有被变成那样！
E: Phew, I made it in time! Thank goodness you didn't end up like that!

C: 没时间解释了，快来帮忙！
E: No time to explain. Hurry, I need your help!

C: 证明…什么？
E: Prove... what?

C: 这群邪祟是御猿屋的叛•猿众，它们每日都会与在下切磋忍法，磨砺在下的忍•空手道。
E: These fiendlings are Rebel Apes of Osaru's clan. They would spar with me every day, improving my ninja skills and refining my ninja martial prowess.

C: 燃烧！燃烧！燃烧！
E: Burn! Burn! Burn!

C: 还问为什么？那可是耗尽研究所心血，用<color=#dbc291ff>返祖实验筛选出的基因</color>培育而成的新人类，可你却把她变成了一个疯子。研究猿已经决定了，以后培育由我来主导。
E: As for what this is? That specimen is the new human that our laboratory painstakingly bred with <color=#dbc291ff>genes filtered from the atavistic experiments</color>, but you made her a lunatic. The Research Apes have decided that I will take over her nurturing from here on out.

C: 请问…在下是否已经称得上「忍侠」之名？
E: Pray tell... Have I proven myself worthy of the title of "Ninja Hero"?

C: 嗨，蒙塔娜，你还好吗？
E: Hi Montana, are you feeling alright?

C: 流梦礁，那是哪？
E: Dreamflux Reef? Where is that?

C: 当然没问题…喏，拿去吧！
E: Of course... Here, take it!

C: 酬谢就不必了，在下行侠只为心中忍道，从不贪慕财物。
E: A reward won't be necessary. I'm only acting according to my way of the ninja. Riches are not what I desire.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>现代，能人，猿</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Human, Denisovans, Apes</color>

C: 「芮克先生」
E: "Mr. Reca"

C: 该死的，身体如此沉重…！
E: Curses! My body feels so heavy...!

C: 随我一同踏入试炼，找到那家伙，阿格莱雅的金丝会指引我们回到现实……
E: Join me in the trial to look for Phainon. And when we do, Aglaea's golden threads will guide us back out...

C: 野蛮人！告诉我你的名字，好让你那可悲的命运作我酒宴上的谈资！
E: Tell me your name, brute! Your demise shall be a tale I boast about at the feast table!

C: 那位战士，之前见过…
E: I've met that warrior before...

C: 把宝石和羊毛毡缝在一起，比我想得要难一点啊……
E: It's harder than I thought to sew gemstones onto wool felt...

C: 毕竟这小家伙很可爱呀。
E: It's hard not to like Mem when they're so adorable.

C: 大家想呀，这世界上到处都留下了许多回忆，里面肯定也有小缇安妈妈的身影。
E: Think about it: There are so many memories scattered all over this world! Surely at least one contains an image of Trianne's mama?

C: 人家试试看。迷…迷迷……
E: Let me try. Mem... memem...

C: 不，都不是……
E: No, it's neither of those...

C: 嗯。那…还要告诉小风堇么？
E: Alright. Should I... inform Hyacine about this?

C: <size=36>哇——谁——？！</size>
E: <size=36>Whoa... Who's there!?</size>

C: …我来验验她吧。
E: ...Let me test her.

C: 「开拓」，是「开拓」！你记得自己每每陷入困难时，只要心怀「开拓」便总能逢凶化吉——你们甚至还用它撞落过险些新生的星神，一轮小小水车何足挂齿？
E: "Trailblaze," it's "Trailblaze!" You remember whenever in trouble, keeping "Trailblaze" in mind has always guided you through adversity. You once even toppled an almost nascent Aeon with it. A mere waterwheel is trivial by comparison.

C: 看来只凭我们几个是没法灌满它了……
E: It seems like it won't be possible to fill it up with just the few of us...

C: 你的真实身份是？
E: What is your true identity?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>方才已告说过了，吾乃神悟树庭七贤人之一。若觉着这答案不够利落，再附赠一条：吾实为七贤人之首。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>As I've previously mentioned, I'm one of the Seven Sages of the Grove of Epiphany. If you think that this answer is insufficient, then I'll add to it. I'm the leader of the Seven Sages.</color>

C: 是吗？即便如此，吾也不会更改方才的回答哟？
E: Is that so? Regardless, I still stand by my previous response.

C: 没有，缇安飞得高高的，怪物根本够不到缇安。
E: No, Trianne flew high up into the air so the monsters couldn't reach us.

C: 大家…快逃！只有我们…只有我们是赢不了它的……
E: Quick... run! It's just us... We won't be able to defeat them...

C: 给我些时间，让我和族人对话…不会花上太久。
E: Give me some time to speak with my people... It won't take long, I promise.

C: 可还有人…提出异议？若有，就拿上铜枪，上前来证明自己！
E: ...Does anyone else have any objections? If so, come forward with your spear and prove your mettle!
Five...

C: （不介意的话，我们聊聊。）
E: (If you're up for it, let's have a talk.)

C: 小敌——大事不妙、不妙啦！
E: De! We've got a big problem! Big problem!!!

C: 出大事了…
E: This is really bad...

C: 缇安大人自从醒来，状态就一直很不好…自己回去真的没关系吗？
E: Lady Trianne, you haven't been well since you woke up... Are you sure you can make it back on your own?

C: 至于我…我在它身上探到了浓厚的死亡气息——并非是它与{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}有什么关联，恐怕…单单只因它无数次手握他人的死亡吧。
E: As for me... I detected a strong stench of death from that entity, but it wasn't because he had a connection with {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}... I'm afraid it's purely because he has sent countless others to their deaths.

C: 这几日，圣城没什么突发状况，也不用和人打交道。独处的感觉还不坏。
E: Nothing out of the ordinary happened in the holy city in the past few days. I didn't have to talk to anyone either. It was kind of nice spending time alone.

C: 你要维护这女人吗，迈德漠斯？过去的千年里，围绕她——还有她们宣扬的神谕，多少战火燃起，多少城邦自相残杀？
E: Are you defending this woman, Mydeimos? How many wars did people start because of her and her so-called prophecy? How many cities fell in the past millennium, their people massacring each other?

C: 我理应接过「纷争」的权柄。如此一来，所有人都会满意：黄金裔、元老院、悬锋族人，还有谱写诗歌的吟游诗人……
E: By all rights, I should accept Strife's authority. It would make everyone happy: the Chrysos Heirs, the Council of Elders, the Kremnoans, even the bards who will write it all into song...

C: 海风把我们送往一座小岛，那里的风有花朵的味道。还有绵羊咩咩，小鸟啾啾，欢迎我们去作客。岛上有好多动物，但大家从来不争吵！
E: The ocean wind blew us onto an island where the wind tasted like flowers. There were bleating sheep and chirping birds inviting us to be their guests. There were so many animals on the island, but none of them ever fought!

C: 好孩子，睡糊涂了吗？这可是你的发明呀。
E: Sweetheart, are you still groggy from your nap? You invented it!

C: 走不到最后也没事…*我们*已经下定决心！
E: It's fine if we can't reach the end... Our minds are made up!

C: …或许吧。明明*我们*已经好久没做过梦了。
E: ...Maybe. But it's been a long time since we had any dreams.

C: 番红蕊？哦…那是三相殿祭祀仪式的必需品，你是觉得不能空手去见{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}？
E: Saffron? Ah, it's an essential offering for rituals in the Temple of the Three Fates. You think we shouldn't go to {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} empty-handed?

C: 不过，我猜奥赫玛不会是首选。{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的火种有元老院的秘法管控，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的水幕应该也足以隔断外界的感应。
E: But I suspect Okhema won't be their first target. {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame is guarded by the Council of Elders' arcane power, and {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa's{RUBY_E#} water curtain should be able to block out any external perceptions.

C: 感谢阁下慷慨相助，也再次感谢各位。立刻开拔，围猎敌人吧——
E: We are grateful to you for your aid, and to the rest of you as well. Now, let us be off to begin the hunt.

C: 拿上它，召集失去了身份的人们。告诉他们，登上神阶的迈德漠斯昭告天下——
E: Take it and rally those who have lost their identities. Convey the words of Mydeimos, now ascended to divinity:

C: 嗯…她找着缇安了。
E: Yes... She has found Trianne.

C: 可悲的屠夫…你又怎会明白它的重量？
E: A pathetic killer like you could never understand the weight it bears.

C: 自己过去的样子，*我们*也记不太清了。
E: We don't quite recall how we used to look.

C: 一块红玻璃？
E: A red glass fragment?

C: 这样啊。不过很可惜，这是一场秘密仪式，只有妈妈才能主持。
E: Ah, I see. Unfortunately, it's a secret ritual, and only I can preside over it.

C: 翁法罗斯没有你们的位置！
E: There's no place for you in Amphoreus!

C: 不过我这人最讲规矩，既然你没召唤出从者，那我也不用从者来揍你…兄弟们！上！
E: But hey, I'm a fair guy. Since you failed to summon a Servant... I won't use mine to beat you either. Boys, go get 'em!

C: 哥们儿，就让你探查个情报而已，怎么能累成这样？
E: Man, all I asked you to do was a little recon. How'd you end up looking this beat?

C: 当然可以…不过恐怕这里不是什么让人平静用餐的地方。我们面前，有个扎眼的从者。
E: Of course... but I'm afraid this isn't exactly a quiet spot to dine. We have a rather... noticeable Servant in front of us.

C: Saber小姐，我不记得匹诺康尼的历史上有你这样的人物。
E: Miss Saber, I don't remember anyone like you in the history of Penacony.

C: 不急，老朋友。你想要的一切根本用不着魔术和奇迹，用钱就能办到——所谓圣杯，也不过是用黄金浇铸的容器。
E: There's no rush, my old friend. Everything you desire can be obtained without magecraft or miracles — money is all it takes. The so-called Holy Grail is nothing more than a vessel crafted from gold.

C: 我们现在所身处的…应当是我拔出宝剑的前一刻。
E: We've returned to the moment right before I drew the sword from the stone.

C: 这个木雕是你的玩具吗？
E: Was this wooden toy yours?

C: 我上车了啊！
E: But I DID board the Express!

C: 完成普通的工作。
E: Complete the basic tasks.

C: 花了好几天的时间，你终于完成了漫长的整理工作。
E: Days pass. After long hours of sorting, you're finally done with the work.

C: 我在等待一个即将登台演出的人，也在骑马穿越荒野。梦就要结束了，御主，无论是对我，还是对你。
E: I'm waiting for someone who's about to take the stage. I'm also riding through the wilderness. The dream is nearing its end, Master, for me and you.

C: 不太好。
E: Not so well.

C: 你知道我不会这么做的，音符小姐！…我们来打个赌吧，虽然我这辈子从未和别人赌过什么。
E: You know I won't do that, Miss Note! ...Let's make a wager, though I've never once gambled in my life.

C: 是被我资助的落魄导演？还是被我买走了名字的传奇明星？不不，这些统统都不够格……
E: Should I get the washed-up director I sponsored? Or the legendary star whose name I purchased? No. No. No. They are not worthy of being my Servant...

C: 那就，一言为定帕！
E: It's a promise!

C: ███，方才看到您在战斗时的背影，即使您没法说出自己的名字，我也已经猜到了。您是个伟大的人，我可以如此断言。
E: ██████, I saw you covering me in that fight. Even if you can't say your name... I know you must be someone great. I believe in that wholeheartedly.

C: 还是说得保守了。
E: Actually, I think that was being generous.

C: …连沟通的理性也失去了？要不直接丢下{F#她}{M#他}算了，反正这家伙也派不上多大用场。
E: ...They even lost the ability to speak rationally? Maybe I should just leave {F#her}{M#him} — it's not like {F#she}{M#he} was all that helpful anyway.

C: 受死吧，小宝贝！
E: Die, you son of a fork!

C: 让你潜入敌人内部，在剧情高潮的时候给他们当头一棒。再看看你都做了什么？连最基本的起承转合都没有，傻子都能看出你是演的！
E: I sent you undercover to deliver a crushing blow at the story's climax. Instead? You couldn't even manage basic narrative structure. Even a child could tell you were putting on an act!

C: 御主，你给了我参加圣杯战争的机会，我也救了你一次。现在，我们两清了。
E: Master, you gave me the chance to join the Holy Grail War, and I saved you once in return. We're now square.

C: 他宝了个贝的，你该不会——
E: Fork me, you're not seriously—

C: Great！我就喜欢你这种懂得变通的演员。那么我也该展现合作的诚意了——让我们进入下一幕吧，以你的咖位，值得一个更大的舞台。
E: Great! I love flexible actors like you. Now let me show my goodwill — let's move to the next scene. Your caliber deserves a much bigger stage.

C: 《金色通行魔》
E: The Golden Gatekeeper

C: 换言之，我们还要在匹诺康尼停留一段时间。
E: In other words, we won't be leaving Penacony anytime soon.

C: 守护每一位宾客的美梦，家族会为此竭尽全力。
E: Please rest assured that The Family will do everything in our power to protect the sweet dreams of every guest.

C: 我说过，这是一份交易，而且不需要你立刻回应。收获不在一朝一夕，我最擅长的事情就是等待。美梦还在继续，夜晚还长，你有的是时间慢慢考虑。
E: As I mentioned earlier: It's a trade, and you don't have to give me an answer right now. Rewards are not reaped in a day, and if there's one thing I'm best at, it's waiting. The sweet dream still continues, and the night is still long — you have plenty of time to contemplate your answer.

C: 欠公司人情的多半没好下场。
E: But nothing good ever comes out of being in the IPC's debt.

C: 这位先生，您在说什么呢，我……
E: Huh? What are you talking about? I—

C: 我提醒过你的。
E: I tried to warn you.

C: 这，不应该……
E: This... How...

C: 可真要细究，心思是最不可忽视的，越是繁复，越能让人感到情谊呢。
E: If we really want to do this right though, it's the thought behind the gift that truly matters. The more thought goes into the gift, the better the recipient feels it.

C: …麻烦啊，活着总是如此。
E: ...How troublesome, but I suppose that's part of living.

C: 「生存和毁灭，于你而言不再是选择，它们生长在同一条路上。」
E: "Survival or Destruction is no longer a choice for you. They both now grow along the same path."

C: 这副身躯被「毁灭」浸染，遭受了最严重的破坏，我说过，这种创伤会一直跟随着你。
E: Your body was contaminated by the Destruction and suffered severe damage. As I said before, these wounds will stay with you for the rest of your life.

C: 我这是晕过去了？
E: Did I pass out?

C: 放在仙舟怕是没什么销路……
E: Placing this on the Xianzhou won't net any sales...

C: 天环族羽饰。
E: Halovian wings accessory.

C: 你将停云赠予的梦泡交给了对方。
E: You handed over the dream bubble gifted by Tingyun.

C: 然而，这场梦你却非常熟悉，那几乎就是你曾经历过的罗浮之行。
E: However, you're very familiar with this dream. It's almost the same as your travels on the Luofu.

C: 但你还是决定留下这场梦。
E: But you decide to keep this dream.

C: 想来是停云在不知不觉间成了他人对弈的棋子吧。
E: It seems as if I've become a pawn in someone else's game.

C: 这里也有「秩序」的影响？
E: Is this place also affected by the Order?

C: …请便。
E: ...As you wish.

C: 谢谢你的支持，我会继续加油的。
E: Thank you for your support. I'll keep doing my best.

C: 抱憾终身……
E: Live with regret...

C: 但就算是这样，也别让自己太辛苦啊。总有人会伤心难过的。
E: Well, despite everything, try not to be too hard on yourself. There will always be people who are sad.

C: 嗯，但在出发前，我还想尝试联络下黑塔女士。此前请她帮忙调查翁法罗斯，即便没有结果，也不能不打招呼就一走了之。
E: Yeah, but let me try contacting Madam Herta again before we set off. She helped us look into Amphoreus, even though nothing new came up... I should at least let her know we're leaving.

C: 但幸运似乎绝不会垂青于每一个人——
E: But luck never seems to favor everyone...

C: 你会用这个词形容他，倒是在我的意料之外了。
E: Laid-back? That's... not exactly a word I associate with him.

C: 你为什么要去翁法罗斯？
E: Why do you want to go to Amphoreus?

C: 以防万一，我在出发前准备了一个「后备方案」，没想到这么快就到了揭秘的时候。
E: I prepared a backup plan before our departure, but I didn't count on having to reveal it so soon.

C: 哎，看来有些人没有用心听呢。
E: Someone hasn't been paying attention.

C: …您的计划？
E: ...Your plan?

C: 请原谅，情急之下我竟忘记了最基本的礼仪——我叫星期日，只是一个普通的搭车客。
E: Please pardon my manners. It is unbecoming of me to forget the most basic of courtesies amid all that has happened... My name is Sunday, and I'm just a passenger of the Express.

C: …对不住了，丹恒。
E: ...Sorry, Dan Heng.

C: 我叫丹恒。这位是——
E: I'm Dan Heng. This is—

C: 当然，请来这边。
E: Of course. Please come this way.

C: 如果武器还在就更好了。
E: It would be better if I still had my weapon.

C: 那他们似乎也符合「外敌」的定义。
E: They seem to fit the definition of "invaders."

C: 听见你的脚步声时，我还以为自己的英雄史诗尚未开启，就要被死神写下「终章」二字了……
E: When I heard your footsteps, I thought Death was already writing my final chapter before my heroic journey had even begun...

C: 这里交给遐蝶小姐，我们赶紧动身吧。
E: We'll leave this place to Miss Castorice then. Let's get a move on.

C: 那么，我们该从何说起？
E: Now then, where should we begin?

C: 它好像把我当成小孩了…
E: They're treating me like a child...

C: 这是什么仪式？
E: Wha... Is this some kind of ritual?

C: 你能答应我的请求吗？
E: Can you promise me that?

C: 顺道，也多拍几张照片留作记录。
E: We can also take some photos for our records.

C: 原来如此，他以为我们也会召唤「神迹」。
E: Oh... He thought we could summon miracles.

C: 两位也可随意使用自己带来的货币，{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的天秤会衡量万物的价值，不用担心身无分文，没法在圣城生活。
E: You can also use any currency you have on you. {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton's{RUBY_E#} scales will determine the value of all items, so there's no need to worry about being penniless in the holy city!

C: 我吗？我还在寻找那个答案。
E: Me? I'm still seeking that answer myself.

C: 趁着天色正好，两位不如多走走看看吧。不打扰你们，回头见了。
E: Since the weather is great, why don't you two look around some more? I won't take up more of your time. See you later.

C: 他知道了不该知道的事，只能交由阿格莱雅大人裁断了。
E: He learned something that he should never have learned. We can only hand him over to Lady Aglaea for judgment.

C: 好沉重的职责。
E: Sounds like quite a responsibility.

C: 留在翁法罗斯。
E: Stay on Amphoreus.

C: （我这是…在做梦吗？）
E: (Am I... dreaming?)

C: （脑海中有个声音，感觉持续了一晚上……）
E: (Feels like there's been a voice talking in my head all night...)

C: 我会拍下决定性的一刻！
E: I'll capture all the decisive moments!

C: 这和你没有关系。
E: No thanks to you.

C: 遐蝶
E: Castorice

C: 你尽管试试。
E: I'd like to see you try.

C: 你们其实关系很好嘛。
E: So, you two are actually really close.

C: 肯定不是我的问题！
E: It's definitely not my fault!

C: 让它休息吧，它应该已经累了。
E: Let him rest. He must be exhausted.

C: 等等，这是先前提到的石板，只凭我们无法解读。
E: Hold on. This is the slate that I mentioned earlier. We couldn't decipher it.

C: 壮哉，战争之魂不朽。
E: Immortal soul of war, ever by my side.

C: 「战争之魂不朽」……
E: "Immortal soul of war"...

C: 但若它所言属实，对阵{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}注定是一场苦战。
E: But if the Titankin's words are true, going up against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} is destined to be a bitter fight.

C: 城中的公民还和平日一样在寻欢作乐…你认为这算不上一次危机？
E: The city's citizens are enjoying themselves like it's any other day... Do you not see this as a crisis?

C: 上次经过这里时，缇宝老师向我们展示了该如何应对…现在，该轮到我们复现「神迹」了。
E: Tribbie gave us a demonstration when we had to pass through here the last time... It's up to us to recreate these miracles now.

C: 这也是哪位泰坦的象征物吗？
E: Is this also a symbol of a Titan?

C: 请再等我片刻…
E: Please give me a moment...

C: 我讨厌内脏的腥气。
E: I dislike the gamey taste of offal.

C: 「剧本」是什么…
E: What "script"...

C: 我终于找到了…宝贵的记忆。我终于…吸引了祂的目光。
E: I've finally found it... Precious memory. At long last... I've caught THEIR gaze.

C: 起舞吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: Let's dance, {NICKNAME}.

C: 强大，伙伴！
E: Mighty, companions!

C: 嗯…不必说什么，你的眼睛已经给了我答案。
E: Hmm... There's no need to say anything. Your eyes have already given me an answer.

C: 记忆，完整。交给我，碎片。
E: Memory, complete. Give me, fragments.

C: 就知道你在开玩笑…你安慰人的办法也太不同寻常了吧！
E: I knew you were joking... You certainly have an unorthodox way of cheering people up!

C: 该从哪里找起呢？
E: Where should we start searching?

C: …何事？
E: ...What is it?

C: 商人阁下，介意让我看看你手上的武器吗？
E: Mister, can I please have a look at the weapon you're holding on to?

C: {NICKNAME}。
E: {NICKNAME}.

C: 腐蚀大概会将我吞没吧？但为了终结疯狂，这一步无可避免。
E: In all likelihood, I will also be consumed by corruption. An inevitable course of action if we hope to end this madness.

C: 我从未怀疑过你的决心。
E: I never once doubted your resolve.

C: …啊，对哦！人家竟然能蹦出完整的句子了！
E: ...Hmm? You're right! I am speaking in full sentences now!

C: 我们是个群像剧。
E: We're an ensemble cast.

C: 「你的力量与品格均已经受了考验……」
E: "Your strength and character have been thoroughly tested..."

C: 恐怕只有他自己知晓答案…不，或许连他自己都摇摆不定。
E: I'm afraid only he knows... No, perhaps he himself is still struggling to get to an answer.

C: 一段时间以前。
E: Some time ago.

C: 好黑暗的故事…
E: What a dark story...

C: 而且，听——泰坦的话语也变得更清晰了。
E: Also, listen... The words of the Titan are becoming clearer.

C: 什么…这、这怎么可能？！
E: What... H—How is that possible!?

C: 长话短说，你成功了。{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}托付了它的神权，现在的你已经和翁法罗斯的「半神」无异。只是……
E: I'll keep it simple. You succeeded. {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} has entrusted you with their divinity. Now, you're no different from a demigod of Amphoreus. However...

C: …这不是重点。
E: ...That's beside the point.

C: 视线逐渐模糊下去，取代冰冷现实的是一片紫色的海洋……
E: Your vision blurs, and cold reality fades into a purple ocean...
...Huh.

C: *嘶哑的呢喃*
但等到{RUBY_B#万敌}那位王子{RUBY_E#}登神，阻退黑潮，她又马上调转枪头，声称奥赫玛以外大势已定，唯一的威胁只剩阿格莱雅及其党羽。大概下一次公民大会，她们就该发难了吧。
E: Yet, when {RUBY_B#Mydei}the crown prince{RUBY_E#} ascended to godhood and repelled the black tide, she immediately altered her tune, declaring that all was resolved beyond Okhema, with the only remaining menace now being Aglaea and her adherents. They might well make their move at the upcoming citizens' assembly.

C: 啊呀，大名鼎鼎的七贤人竟非得抱着大地兽玩偶入睡哪？有趣……
E: Oh my, even a member of the preeminent Seven Sages must hug his dromas doll to sleep? How interesting...

C: 不过，或许是风俗不同？在我的家乡，有一种名为「主宾」的礼仪：主人待客应热情盈怀，赐以美酒清水、温床安睡……
E: But then again, perhaps the customs are different here? Back in my hometown, there is a form of etiquette known as "honoring guests": The host will welcome their guests with warm hospitality by treating them to fine wine and a cozy bed...

C: 她忌惮我，我得博取她的信任。方才那场辩论非常必要。
E: She's wary of me, so naturally, I had to gain her trust. I would say that debate was not at all pointless.

C: 就像往常那样，迷迷以一种神乎其技的方式，回到了它不为人知的…小窝中。
E: As was their custom, Mem, with astonishing dexterity, slipped back into their secret... little hideaway.

C: 啊，不是的……
E: Huh? No. No...

C: 从这里出发，应该用不了多久。我们…走吧？
E: It isn't a long way from here. Shall we?

C: 你现在还没习惯吗？
E: Shouldn't you have gotten used to it by now?

C: 黑紫色的淡斑如同花瓣，在死囚的脸上舒展，随后又仿佛泉水淹没身体。他的震颤停止了，方才止不住求饶的呼喊声逐渐变为似叹息的呜咽，兀自咕哝着。
E: The dark purple mottles spread like petals across the death row inmate's face, then seemed to be submerged by springwater, flooding his body. His trembling ceased, and the cries that had once begged for mercy slowly turned into a sigh-like whimper, as he murmurs to himself.

C: 话可别说的太死。时间让你我建起了城府，而她始终纯净得像朵花蕾……
E: Don't be so sure. Time has hardened the likes of you and I, but Castorice remains pure as driven snow.

C: 不过，计划有变：明天别去浴场，来奥赫玛城门口找我。
E: A minor change in plans, though. Don't go to the bath tomorrow. Come look for me at Okhema's city gates instead.

C: ——回见，蜗居公主、灰子！
E: ...So long, Princess Homebody! So long, Gray Mystery!

C: 如果万敌阁下此时也在浅滩上，那他一定能成为我们的道标。因为，他和那些离群的亡魂不同…即便在死者的世界，他也一定能找到方向。
E: If Lord Mydei is also somewhere along the river shoals right now, then he will certainly become our signpost. After all, he's different from those wandering souls... He will find his way even in the realm of the dead.

C: 啊…怎么这也有小黑怪，它们还能在冥河里游泳？
E: Ah! Why are the black tide monsters here too? Can they swim in the River of Souls?

C: 从这些痕迹来看，冒犯「死亡」…想必要付出沉重的代价。
E: These traces seem to suggest that anybody who trespasses upon "Death"... will pay a heavy price.

C: 在那凶险之地，他说自己窥到了恶龙的魔影。它张开巨口吞噬眼前的一切，将那名为「死亡」之物，带给斯缇科西亚。
E: He said that he witnessed the demonic specter of an evil dragon at that treacherous land. The apparition opened its giant maw and devoured everything in sight, and thus brought Styxia that thing called "Death."

C: 阁下，我是女王大人派来的「督战圣女」。若你接受我的赐福，今日战事必能顺遂。
E: Sir, I am the Maiden of War sent here by the queen herself. If you accept my blessing, then today's battle will be smooth sailing.

C: 小小蝶，小小灰！还有…小小敌，和粉色小狗！
E: It's Little Cas, and Little Gray! There's also... Little De and the pink puppy!

C: 所以，缇安一直站在这里，离人间最近的地方，等着小小蝶！
E: So Trianne has been standing here, at this spot closest to the world of the living, and waiting for Little Cas!

C: 万敌阁下…还有一件事，或许你应该知晓。
E: There is one more thing you should know, Lord Mydei.

C: 以「纷争」之名…愿你死得其所。
E: In the name of "Strife"... may you meet a fitting end.

C: …也罢，那我就此展开吧。
E: ...Well, in that case, let me begin.

C: 带我去往那「死亡」火种的长眠之地，好吗？
E: Please take me to where the Coreflame of "Death" rests.

C: 然后，用它在预言许诺的新世界里，{RUBY_B#带去生命}播下第一枚花蕾{RUBY_E#}吧。
E: After that, use it to {RUBY_B#bring life}plant the first bud{RUBY_E#} in the prophesied new world.

C: …我们命中注定的时刻，再次到来了。
E: ...Our fated moment has arrived once again.

C: 啊…为何没有一位神明在远方高喊……
E: Ah... Why isn't there a god yelling in the distance...

C: 对此，我深表赞同。
E: I couldn't agree more.

C: 好，现在带路吧。
E: Lead the way.

C: 谨遵您吩咐。
E: As you command.

C: 这是在干嘛？
E: What are you trying to do?

C: ——基于眼下状况，根据奥赫玛法典，在座诸位中只有身为「半神」的您享有该权利。
E: ...Considering the circumstances, and in accordance with Okhema's Codex, as the only demigod among us, you shall rightfully wield this authority.

C: 代价是什么？
E: But at what cost?

C: 「这一切，就是你曾经活过的证明。」
E: "All of this is proof that you once lived."

C: 我不敢肯定。至少，他们能做到。
E: I cannot be certain, but at the very least, they are capable of doing so.

C: 情况…有变？
E: Has something changed?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>由凡人熔合泰坦的灵魂，取而代之…并非天方夜谭。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Fusing a mortal's soul with that of a Titan to replace said Titan... is not a ludicrous idea after all.</color>

C: 最后一条方法是…「实在不行，付诸武力」。
E: The last resort is... "When all else fails, employ brute force."

C: 「至于泰坦，它们真的符合凡人对神的认知？神造的世界必定是完美的，可翁法罗斯却遍布愚钝和丑陋！」
E: "Are the Titans truly an accurate reflection of what humans think gods should be? Worlds created by gods are indubitably perfect, but what of Amphoreus? Only foolishness and insensitivity everywhere you turn!"

C: 没错。可如果…那刻夏老师与「理性」火种的结合，并不是一场「意外」呢？
E: That's right... but what if Professor Anaxa's fusion with the Coreflame of Reason wasn't an accident?

C: 「应掌握造物的原理，令万物诞生时即为完美的状态」…如今那刻夏身在奥赫玛，他的目标……
E: "To conceive an entity of perfection, one must first understand the principles of creation"... If Anaxa is in Okhema now, then that means...

C: 这只是尽兴而已。
E: I am just enjoying what remains of my life to the fullest.

C: 「你觉得，我们就这样死在路边，像两条野狗，会更好吗？」
E: "Do you think that it'd be better if we just died on the roadside like a couple of stray dogs?"

C: 不…我宁愿就此死去，也不会屈服于你们这群假称信仰、恣意妄为的卑鄙狗鼠……
E: No... I'd rather die than give in to hypocrites like you, hiding behind empty faith and wielding power as you please!

C: 她究竟…为我们编织了怎样的命运…？
E: What kind of fate has she woven for us...?

C: 塞涅俄丝，你想如何处置自己的同胞？
E: Seliose, what will you do with one of your own?

C: 那在末世之下亦能被治愈、守护的「昏光」…就是我们选择背负不完美的人性的理由！
E: That "twilight," still capable of being healed and protected in the end times... is the reason we choose to bear the weight of humanity's flaws.

C: 请助我一臂之力吧。因为我已经下定决心，<color=#dbc291ff>我们</color>已经下定决心——
E: Give me your strength. I've made my decision, and <color=#dbc291ff>we</color> stand resolved.

C: 这天气合你心意吗，泰坦的化身？
E: Does this weather please you, Titan incarnate?

C: 平台…在疾速坠落！
E: The platform is plummeting fast!

C: 啊…感谢你。若无你照顾，我早就咽下最后一口气，被{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}收归冥河了……
E: Ah... thank you. Without your care, I would've long been claimed by {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} and carried to the River of Souls...

C: 它说：<color=#dbc291ff>神谕已然降世，吾之使命将终，从此归于沉寂——</color>
E: They announced: <color=#dbc291ff>The prophecy has arrived, my mission has concluded, and I shall return to silence...</color>

C: 你果真就像一条饿坏了的鬣狗…循着火种的气味追来了哪！
E: Look at you, sniffing around like a starving hyena... chasing the scent of the Coreflames!

C: 什么啊，居然还没到，扫兴。
E: What? Still not here? Well, that's disappointing.

C: 希望下次，你踏着它奔跑时…不再是为了逃脱他人的追捕。
E: I hope you're not running from someone the next time you wear them...

C: 我想，你已经完成了自己应尽的一切…风堇姑娘。
E: I think you've already done everything you were meant to, Miss Hyacine.

C: 我…恳求…原谅……
E: I... beg for forgiveness...

C: 先祖们的精神同我产生了共鸣。你将我们一族的流放，或许他们也无法轻易原谅。但……
E: The spirits of my ancestors resonated with me. You exiled our people, and they may never forgive you for that, but...

C: 如今，其中十尊已然殒落，火种被还归于创世的起点。星座在你头顶闪烁，璀璨的光芒对应着泰坦长眠的息声。
E: Now, ten among them have fallen, their Coreflames returned to the origin of genesis. Above you, constellations shimmer, their brilliance echoing the faint slumber of each Titan.

C: 「岁月」…
E: "Time"...

C: …斯缇科西亚的月光，真美呀。
E: ...Styxia's moonlight is so beautiful.

C: 这人素质太差，走了——
E: What a terrible person. Let's leave.

C: 裁缝女那么信任你，自有她的道理。像你这样的老实人，想坑也坑不到本姑娘，所以——告诉你也无妨。
E: The seamstress trusts you for a reason. Someone as honest as you couldn't trick me even if you wanted to, so there's no harm in telling you.

C: 当着你们的面？那我也太不小心了~
E: In front of you all? That would be pretty careless.

C: 那是因为我字字实话，压根就没骗人。
E: That's because I'm not lying. I've been telling the truth from the start.

C: 大姐头威武！我已经定位到下一处宝藏了，即刻开始导航…桀桀桀……
E: Cipher rules! I've already pinpointed the next trove of treasure. Starting navigation... hehehe...

C: 小谜题跟小把戏，都在我的舒适区！交给小的我，您尽管放心~
E: Puzzles and tricks are right up my alley! Just leave it to little ol' me.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>海瑟音……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Hysilens...</color>

C: 那…赛飞儿大姐头，你是怎么发现异常的？我有点好奇，那小虫到底操纵着我说了什么怪话？
E: Boss, how did you realize something was wrong? I'm curious — what exactly did that nymph make me say?

C: …是，那又怎么样？
E: ...Yes, what about it?

C: 过来了！把这大射灯关了吧？还怪刺眼的。
E: We're here! Can we turn off this spotlight now? It's really blinding.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>因为阿格莱雅死了——而在圣城公民眼里，你们就是杀害她的凶手！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Because Aglaea is dead, and in the eyes of the holy city's citizens, her blood is on your hands!</color>

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you okay?

C: 克拉特鲁斯阁下，事发时你在城里？究竟发生了什么……
E: Lord Krateros, were you in the city when it happened? What exactly went down...

C: 那陷阱大概是辩手卡勒克提斯设下的。他预先准备好了剪断的金线，在凯妮斯辩论陷入下风时突然将它示于众人面前。
E: The trap was likely set by the debater Callictis. He had prepared a severed golden thread in advance, revealing it to the public when Caenis was faltering in the debate.

C: 白厄——
E: Phainon —

C: 嘿嘿…小时候的小白，很可爱，很善良！
E: Hehe... Snowy was so cute and kind when he was little!

C: 果然还是被我说中了吧？最后的最后，你还是成为了这个故事里的救世主呀。
E: I was right. In the end, you did become the Deliverer in this story.

C: 我明白，赛法利娅…我明白。
E: I know, Cifera... I know.

C: 哪怕我知道那是假话，但只要相信的人足够多…谎言是不是就能成真…？
E: Would that lie become reality if enough people believed in it? ...Even though it's a lie?

C: 感激不尽。那盗火者实力莫测，请务必小心。
E: You have my deepest gratitude. That Flame Reaver's power is truly unfathomable. Please be careful.

C: 用秘术临时创造的灵水之门远不如祭仪水盆那般稳定，<color=#dbc291ff>恐怕只能允许一人通过。</color>
E: The spirit water gate formed with this technique isn't as stable as a ritual basin. It'll <color=#dbc291ff>likely only let one person through.</color>

C: 嘟…嘟嘟！
E: Doot... Doot-Doot!

C: 他此前还以惊雷捎来消息，要我们提防盗火行者的行动。
E: He sent a message earlier, carried by thunder, warning us to watch out for the Flame Reaver's actions.

C: …我将和神谕中的英雄们一道重返天空，取回火种。
E: ...I will join the heroes of the prophecy to return to the sky and retrieve the Coreflame.

C: …而在逐火之旅即将步入尾声的这一刻，眼前满目疮痍的世界正急切地呼求着疗愈。
E: ...And now, as the Flame-Chase Journey nears its end, this broken world is crying out for something else — healing.

C: 黄金战争百年，诸邦混乱衰疲。
E: A century of the Chrysos War plunged the nations into chaos and decay.

C: 泰坦的神躯轰然倒下…与此同时，苍穹撕挦如同裂帛，天空即将与神明一同陨落。
E: The Titan's divine body crashed to the ground, and with it, the sky tore apart like fabric, about to fall with its god.

C: 他们愿意将跨越千年的使命相托，由我去取回{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的火种。
E: They have agreed to bestow the thousand-year mission to me and to have me claim the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}.

C: 先祖们啊——
E: Ancestors!

C: 千年过去，英雄塞涅俄丝的血脉恐怕已经无比纤薄。但天空一族的决心从未被岁月冲蚀，我此行正是为了完成她的遗愿。
E: It's been a thousand years. Seliose's blood may have thinned in my veins, but the resolve of the Sky people has never been eroded by time. I've journeyed here to fulfill her dying wish.

C: 我知道…她为了支撑破碎的天空，与泰坦的神躯融为了一体。
E: I know that... in order to support the shattered sky, she merged herself with the divine body of the Titan.

C: 岁月无情，也许是装置老化损坏了。
E: Perhaps the device has been damaged during these long merciless years.

C: 迷宝，灰宝，能拜托你们吗？我想给在彼岸等待的先祖们一个交代。
E: Memmie, Grayie, could I please ask you for this favor? I want to show the truth to my ancestors waiting on the other side.

C: 灰宝，离开之前……
E: Grayie, before we go...

C: 「神罚」？
E: "Divine retribution"?

C: 我不是神——我只是身处这座牢笼之中，唯一一个有勇气反抗典狱者的凡人。
E: I am not a god, but the only mortal in this cage who is brave enough to defy the warden.

C: 这应该叫…概括的艺术？
E: Perhaps this could be called... concept art?

C: 你的直觉一向很准。附近找找吧，看看有没有什么机关……
E: Your intuition has always been good. Let's look around and see if there are any mechanisms...

C: 沿着彩虹桥继续前进吧，英雄们。
E: Continue forward along the Rainbow Bridge, heroes.

C: …不对劲。
E: ...Something's off.

C: 像塞涅俄丝那样强大的英雄…与她结合并传承血脉的另一半，传说中却完全没有记录。
E: Seliose is such a mighty hero... Yet her partner, who must have walked with her to pass on her bloodline, was completely unrecorded in legend.

C: 必须把它取走，带回创世涡心。
E: We must retrieve it and bring it back to the Vortex of Genesis.

C: 丹恒是对的。我很想一剑了结你可憎的性命……
E: Dan Heng is right. My sword yearns to end your pathetic life...

C: 缇宝没有跟来…她是打算留在上层帮助万敌么？
E: Tribbie didn't follow us... Does she intend to stay above to help Mydei?

C: 尼莫西妮——有几位公民被困在了生命花园，暂时躲在风堇的壁障下。你能调派些人手去疏散他们么？
E: Mnemosyne... Several citizens are trapped in the Garden of Life, and are temporarily seeking refuge under Hyacine's barrier. Can you dispatch some people to evacuate them?

C: 前一个故事告诉我，一个世界的命运应当由它的子民来左右。而你们——哪怕甘愿为了陌生的世界出生入死——最后还是要踏上旅程，前往下一个有待拯救的世界。
E: The first story taught me that the fate of a world should be in the hands of its people. And... even if the Nameless are willing to risk everything for an unfamiliar world, in the end you still have to embark on a new journey and go to the next world that needs saving.

C: 纷争。死亡。诡计……
E: Strife. Death. Trickery...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>而我们所有人…都一定会在「明天」再度相见。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And all of us... will see each other again "tomorrow."</color>

C: 浴场的水体，在用我难以理解的方式传达悲恸和绝望……
E: The baths' waters are conveying sorrow and despair in ways I can barely comprehend...

C: 面对身后一线生机，却还是毅然选择向前。
E: With one last chance to turn back, you still step forward.

C: 呃…当年放在哪了来着？
E: Um... now where did we hide those...

C: …哎？盒子底下盖着的，这是什么？
E: Huh? What's this underneath?

C: …没错。
E: ...Yes.

C: 看看别的牌。
E: Check the other cards.

C: 然后，阿雅，我想看到你真正放下金丝纺成的心茧，像从前雅努萨波利斯的神庙前，那个身穿白裙、眼眸明亮的少女一样，再对*我们*笑一次。
E: And Agy, I want to see you shed that golden-thread cocoon around your heart. Just once more, smile at us again like that bright-eyed girl in white who stood before the Janusopolis temple.

C: 小点声，他以后是你的老师。
E: Careful — that's your future teacher you're talking about.

C: 在阿格莱雅的斡旋下，白厄作为代表接受了迈德漠斯的挑战。这场「角斗」将改变逐火的进程……
E: After Aglaea's mediation, Phainon met Mydeimos's challenge as the elders' representative. This duel was to change the course of the Flame-Chase Journey itself...

C: 仇恨是能让人长大，让男孩成为坚不可摧的战士。
E: Even though hatred can help people grow, and turn a boy into an unbreakable warrior...

C: 以三相圣女之名：现在，我请你垂落秤盘，称量命运，为我们揭示你的宣判！
E: In the name of the Holy Maiden of the Three Fates, lower your scales, weigh destiny, and reveal unto us your verdict!

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 而是一种愿望，它属于我、你、在场的每个人。压落秤盘的并非白厄的决心，而是这张神谕牌承载的，世人对「救世主」的呼唤——
E: It's about a wish, one which we all share — you, me, everyone here. What tipped the scales wasn't Phainon's conviction alone, but the collective hopes carried by this oracle card — humanity's desperate call for a Deliverer.

C: 为搅扰您的沉眠向您致歉，欧洛尼斯。
E: Please forgive us for disturbing your sleep, Oronyx.

C: 而后，您就能理解，那名为「白厄」的凡人是如何背负世界的重量。而那重量又是如何将他压迫，并且证明……
E: Then you'll understand how the mortal called "Phainon" shouldered the world's weight. How that same burden crushed him, proving...

C: 可到头来，指引我们的神谕，吞没世界的黑潮……
E: But in the end... the prophecy that led us... this black tide swallowing everything...

C: 这是最后通牒。
E: This is the final warning.

C: 只要这样，过去、现在，还有未来……
E: But this way, the past, present, and future...

C: 你还记得它吗？
E: Do you still remember it?
>>> Eternal Recurrence #108642:

C: 呼…说出这些话，人家终于可以安心消失，成为{NICKNAME}的一部分啦。
E: ... Saying all that, I can finally fade away in peace... and become a part of {NICKNAME}.

C: 没有你的旅行，会很无趣。
E: Traveling's no fun without you around.

C: 噫，你好会说话…但似乎也没错！
E: Wow, you're quite the smooth talker... but I can't disagree!

C: 「昔涟」会不会也一样呢…听着很奇怪吧？明明是自己的事，语气却像个旁观者。
E: Is that also why "Cyrene" did what she did? It sounds weird, doesn't it? It's something that happened to me, but I'm talking as if I'm an observer.

C: 该用识刻锚联系螺丝咕姆了…
E: Time to call Screwllum with the Chronocognitive Anchor...

C: 逻辑：「权杖」有着极其严密的自主协议，管理员也必须接受限制。在翁法罗斯，这道终极协议有另一重命名——
E: Deduction: The Scepter has an extremely strict autonomous protocol, restricting even its Administrator. In Amphoreus, this Ultimate Protocol goes by another name...

C: 日用品该准备几人份的？要不要再准备一点惊喜？
E: How many sets of toiletries should I prepare...? Should I pack something for a surprise...?

C: （但，总觉得没到绝望的时候…是因为丹恒和三月七还在这里吗？或者…昔涟？）
E: (But I keep feeling that it's not the time to despair just yet... Is it because Dan Heng and March 7th are still here? Or is it because of... Cyrene?)

C: 一起…这个词听起来真好呀。
E: "Stand with me"... That does sound very nice.

C: 这是早已注定的结局，所以我不会粉饰这一令人遗憾的结论。
E: That outcome was predetermined long ago, so I will not embellish such a regrettable conclusion.

C: 这…怎么可能……
E: But... how is that possible...

C: 神谕提到了「天外」…？
E: The prophecy mentions "beyond the sky"...?

C: 不是刻法勒吗？
E: Wasn't it Kephale?

C: 呵，你这位跟班着实懂得如何讨人欢喜啊。
E: Hah, your attendant certainly knows how to curry favor.

C: 伟大的凯撒。
E: Great Imperator.

C: 正常。凯撒一手遮天，哪次不是闹得鸡飞狗跳？
E: As expected. The Imperator is always hiding things from everyone. When has it not caused a ruckus?

C: 我们要面对的敌人，恐怕不止一位呢。
E: We may have to face more than one enemy.

C: 我的直觉吗……
E: My gut feeling, huh...

C: 但这反而会成为我们的「捷径」，对吧？
E: But that's actually gonna be our "shortcut," right?

C: 是呀。虽然早有预感，但没想到会这么直接……
E: True. I had a feeling it would come to this, but I didn't expect such a direct demand...

C: 两位？
E: Guests?

C: 可笑。凯撒不需要愚忠之人，只需证明自己尚有价值，我便愿意网开一面。
E: You jest. The Imperator does not need blind loyalty. As long as one can prove they have value, I am willing to be lenient towards them.

C: 诸如此类，不胜枚举。但待到绝灭大君席卷寰宇，他们都将臣服于您的「毁灭」帝国。
E: There are countless other organizations besides, but when the Lord Ravager sweeps across the cosmos, they will certainly all bow before your empire of Destruction.

C: 可以！我倒要看看，天外的修辞学能有多少重量——是否比三条人命更加沉重？
E: I'll have it! Show me the weight of rhetoric from beyond the sky! Will it weigh heavier than three human lives?

C: 为了和「再创世」的谎言抗争，让翁法罗斯免于「毁灭」的结局…他遍历三千多万次历史，只为在徒劳中找到突破口。
E: In order to combat the lies of the "Era Nova" and deliver Amphoreus from the ending of the Destruction... He lived through history more than thirty million times, hoping futilely to find a breakthrough.

C: 你不是「智识」令使吗？
E: Aren't you an Emanator of Erudition?

C: 保险起见：我们会持续进行旁道攻击，给你创造逃生机会；而你得抓住机会，动起来，自己想办法来个漂亮的越狱。
E: To be safe, we'll continue to launch side-channel attacks on the system to give you opportunities to escape. You need to seize these opportunities. Now, start moving and find a way to pull off a magnificent jailbreak.

C: 用命途的力量…让它感知到……
E: Use the Path's power... Make it detect you...

C: 别这么伤感嘛，我们这不是再见了吗？
E: Don't be so sad. Aren't we seeing each other right now?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>——她管我叫可爱的小姐哎带我成为高级社员吧就算未来会充满痛苦我们也绝不逃避——</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>...Did you hear that! She just called me "my lovely lady"...! Help me become a high-ranking member. Even if the future is full of pain... we won't escape from it!</color>

C: 翁法罗斯需要「救世主」。
E: Amphoreus needs the "Deliverer."

C: 这里交给我，阿格莱雅女士，快离开……
E: Leave this to me, Lady Aglaea. You must get away now...

C: 多亏那小皇冠开放了终极协议的权限，你不在的时候，我和螺丝对「再创世」的进程进行了…改写。
E: Thanks to that little empress granting access to the Ultimate Protocol, Screwy and I... rewrote the progress of "Era Nova" while you were away.

C: 沉溺于过往，只会堵塞前路——何不用「岁月」架起未来的桥梁？
E: Clinging to the past only blocks the road forward. Why not let Time build a bridge to the future?

C: 有一封信…一直没能交给你…让我念给你听吧……
E: There's a letter... I never got to give you... Let me read it to you...

C: 多么凄惨的死相。
E: What a wretched way to die.

C: 我的理智虽然遭受折磨，但我的剑刃依旧锋利，这双手依旧敏捷，只要能捍卫最后的战场，清醒与否又何妨？
E: Even though madness claws at my mind, my sword stays sharp, my hands agile. If I can uphold this last battlefield, clarity is but an afterthought.

C: 光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年 凯撒遇刺后
E: Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>, after the Imperator was assassinated

C: 我，海列屈拉，曾为凯撒的臣子，如今是救世主的锋刃——都将与命运战至最后一刻。
E: We will all fight against fate till our last breath. That includes me, Helektra, once the Imperator's subject, now the Deliverer's blade!

C: 再灵敏和坚固的灵感回路，也无法抵御数据洪流的饱和式攻击。当信息量远超其思维过滤能力，他就不得不专注于思考这段记忆。
E: Even the most flexible and sturdy Inspiration Circuit cannot withstand the traffic of a full-on information flood. When the amount of information exceeds his cognition filter's capacities, he will have no choice but to focus on processing this memory.

C: 但人家不同，只是个普普通通的神秘女孩，所以这一千年，我一直在等待{NICKNAME}。
E: But that's not who I am. I'm just an average girl with some secrets. So... I've been waiting for {NICKNAME} for a thousand years.

C: 在走上舞台前，请允许我再小小任性一次吧♪
E: Can I please do something before we go on stage? ♪

C: 有点惊慌…
E: I'm a bit nervous...

C: 优雅的构思，精妙的执行。可惜，被时间掣肘的并非我，而是你。
E: An elegant idea and an exquisite execution. Regrettably, it is you who are restrained by time, not me.

C: 呵，我洗耳恭听。全力以赴吧：倘若讲得太过无趣，又或失言，你们就要和「律法」失之交臂了。
E: Heh. I'm all ears. Go on then. Do your best. But if your chatter gets too boring or if I deem it offensive, then Law will become forever beyond your reach.

C: 这也是{NICKNAME}的上一站——那时候，他们经历了一番危险却也激动人心的冒险。
E: It's also {NICKNAME}'s previous stop, where they went through a risky but exciting adventure.

C: 吕枯耳戈斯口蜜腹剑，我再清楚不过。已经看得够多了，带我回去吧。
E: I am indeed very aware of Lycurgus's honeyed words of deceit. I have seen enough. Take me back.

C: 所以现在，听好我的遗言：历史总有一天会遗忘刻律德菈，但绝不会忘记凯撒的人民——和由她开启的逐火时代！
E: So, now, harken to my final words: History will eventually forget Cerydra, but it will never forget the Imperator's people or the Flame-Chase Era she began!

C: 所以，像往常一样，我会亲自出马。但，这次我将孤军深入，用一场秘密谈判让命运站在我们这边。
E: Which means I will be heading to the battlefield myself, just as I have always done. This time, however, I will go alone. I will conduct secret negotiations to ensure fate is on our side.

C: 要和平，还是要战争？要反抗暴政，还是成为下一个凯撒？我不在乎，后人自会做主。
E: Will they demand peace or war? Will they resist tyranny, or become the next Imperator? I do not care. The children of the future will decide for themselves.

C: 呵，还真是美得奇异……
E: Heh. They are strangely beautiful...

C: 与此同时……
E: In the meantime...

C: 旅途的下一站……
E: This next stop on the journey...

C: 和翁法罗斯有不少相似之处呢。
E: Has a lot of similarities to Amphoreus.

C: 远处那貌似{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的，是兵器？
E: The object in the distance resembles {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}. Is it a weapon?

C: 光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年 法吉娜战役之末
E: Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>, at the end of the campaign against Phagousa

E: The Memokeepers covet Amphoreus's secrets, just as they covet the knowledge of every genius. In the war between the Aeons, the Remembrance is never the Erudition's ally.

C: 你藏在我的记忆里，从来不肯现身。只在我陷入危机时才愿意出现……
E: You always hid in my memories... never wanted to come out. The only times you showed yourself were when I got into serious trouble.

C: 起点？
E: The beginning?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>正在访问：回归#33550337——</color>

C: 而我们的故事，会静静地躺在花丛中，一如「记忆」的每一道涟漪……
E: And our stories will be lying silently among the flowers like every ripple of "remembrance"...

C: 跨越三千万世，为了将所有被遗忘的轮回保存下来，她倾尽了一切。
E: She gave everything to record all the forgotten recurrences across thirty million cycles.

C: 你口中的「解脱」，无异于「毁灭」。这个世界的一切将彻底从演算中消失，再也无处寻得。
E: The "freedom" you speak of is no different from Destruction. Everything this world ever was will disappear from the extrapolations, never to be regained.

C: 反抗也是徒劳，我的小鸟。我会亲手把自己植入你的内心。等到安抚好{NICKNAME}和丹恒……
E: Resistance is pointless, my darling birdie. I will personally plant myself into your heart. And once I've calmed down {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng...

C: 别被感性裹挟了，亲爱的{NICKNAME}。这个世界的英雄之旅，只是「记忆」美化过后的叙事。
E: Don't get caught up in your emotions, my dear {NICKNAME}. The Hero's Journey in this world is just a narrative embellished with "memories."

C: 对、对好焦再拍！
E: M-Make sure you get the focus right!

C: 所以，前因后果你都知道，对吗？
E: So, you know what led up to this and what followed, right?

C: 细究的话，现在它才算是我的本体。
E: If you want to seriously think about it, this thing actually counts as my body right now.

C: 走吧，去找到她们。
E: Let's go find them.

C: 找到她了吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Did you find her, {NICKNAME}?

C: 所以，在聆听这段话前……
E: So... before you hear these words...

C: 「对忆质的理解很深刻嘛，出乎意料。但这场闹剧要结束了。」
E: "Your grasp of memoria is unexpectedly profound. But playtime's over."

C: 「高举双手，{NICKNAME}。拥抱这无数光——」
E: "Raise your hands high, {NICKNAME}, and embrace this boundless light!"

C: 我一时不知该如何形容。

C: 死地求生，你选错路了，半神。

C: 不知道荒笛那边能不能成功呀……
E: Who knows if Terravox will be able to succeed...

C: 和我故乡的洋流相比，翁法罗斯的水体要更…不羁。驯服它的过程有些艰难，还好我已大概摸清了其中的门路。
E: Compared to the currents of my home, the waters of Amphoreus are... rather untamed. Subduing the waters wasn't easy, but I've gotten the hang of it now.

C: 我记得你，鱼儿，还有你卑劣的主人。
E: I remember you, little fish, and your despicable master.

C: …断绝它至深的妄念。
E: ...And sever its deepest delusion.

C: 无论如何，我都会试着以身入局，成为「再创世」的一部分。
E: Regardless, I will attempt to join this game and become a part of the Era Nova.

C: 生来第一次，我感到如此轻松。
E: For the first time in my life, I feel at ease.

C: 别了，丹枫……
E: Farewell, Dan Feng...

C: 水位的问题已经完美解决了！要继续前进，就去搭那边的电梯吧！

C: 整个树庭，都在震颤……

C: 此身从不为「救世」而伫立。

C: 那就向着罪恶怒吼，为后世「开拓」黎明！

C: 第十三位泰坦从未存在，但权杖必须相信「它」存在。

C: <color=#dbc291ff>没错。铁墓是一尊无首的巨人，要成为完整的生命，本能将驱使它夺取另一颗头颅——</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Yes. Irontomb is a headless giant, and to become whole, instinct will drive it to seize another head.</color>

C: 若非将同伴的夙愿刻骨铭心，白厄早已被火种焚烧殆尽；如果逐火的信念产生动摇，昔涟的旅途也无从谈起……

C: 一同抵达鲜花芬芳的西风尽头——明天见！

C: <color=#dbc291ff>名为「德谬歌」的生命形态，正是权杖原本的演算目标。</color>

C: 我很荣幸。识刻锚已就位，请。

C: 那么，我也该和各位一道启程了。

C: 也许，在三千万世「徒劳」过后，你也意识到了——自己同样是命运的囚徒。

C: 「铁墓的第一道封印，是白厄以尸骨垒砌的沙场。」

E: Fuli the Remembrance?

C: 我会…抵达明天。
E: I... will reach tomorrow.

C: 咕嘟咕嘟……

C: 那本不属于剧中，却帮助写下了浪漫结局的人儿…{F#她}{M#他}同朋友们纷纷告别，回到属于{F#她}{M#他}故事之外的家园。
E: The one who wasn't part of the story, yet helped write its romantic ending... {M#He}{F#She} bid farewell to {M#his}{F#her} friends and returned to {M#his}{F#her} home beyond the tale.

C: 答应我最后一件事吧，{NICKNAME}……
E: Promise me one last thing, {NICKNAME}...

C: 你睡着的时候，人家一直在思考这件事。现在，我终于有了答案……
E: I've been pondering this while you were sleeping. Now, I finally have the answer...

C: 哈哈哈…原来如此。要我说，就尽情发挥吧？没人会责怪你的。

C: 快点，你藏这里！

C: 所以祂才那么不近人情，那水晶身子只是一具空壳。我不知道忆庭怎么能把这件事瞒到现在——他们有理由这么做——但这些都不重要。
E: That is why THEY feel so distant, so cold. That crystalline form is just an empty shell. I do not know how the Garden of Recollection managed to hide this until now. They must have their reasons. But none of that matters now.

C: 可惜，德谬歌是谁，答案已经呼之欲出。

E: Peach's words, I don't understand. Is it because I, still don't understand "love"?

E: I shall welcome my own decay, becoming nourishment for the next flower's bud.

C: 命硬，天生的。说来还得和姬子小姐说声抱歉，先前没能接上列车的联络。

C: 我只想帮助每一个需要帮助的人。
E: I just want to help all who needed help.

C: 整个空间站都在监控画面里了…但我没看见「星核」。

E: Wait, don't just leave. You're now the only one who can prove that I am really me. I am the real Wen Mingde, who just spoke with you earlier. Remember?

C: 不要垂死挣扎了咕，连{NICKNAME}都说你是假的咕噜噜……

C: 处理这种事情并不困难。群众关心的是戏剧性而并非事实，不用揭开真相，只要阻止谣言发酵就好了。比起辛辛苦苦地辟谣，不如直接找出谣言的制造者。
E: Solving a matter like this won't be difficult. Predictably, the crowd cares more about the drama than the facts. Stopping the rumors from brewing is more important right now than laying out the truth... and it's better to unearth the source of the rumors directly than to painstakingly try to refute them one by one.

C: 照片到手，你直接发消息给我就好。一物换一物，我做生意一向公平。
E: Send the picture over when you have it. I'm always fair when it comes to haggling.

C: 你、你怎么来了？
E: Wh—What brings you here?

C: 你这样乱花钱可不行……
E: You can't waste money like this...

C: 不过原来是他在造谣…嗯，倒也符合他人设。

C: 艾丝妲小姐。

E: The red log contains Lesley's real reply, including the truth about the starquake. To be honest, even I can't imagine what Rocky will do after finding out the truth, given how impulsive he is.

C: 嘿，还不如不让你去修呢，让你看笑话了不是。
E: I shouldn't have asked you to fix this. It's so embarrassing.

C: 都怪我太自信。也对，地概科的小科员，黑塔鄙视链的底层，怎么配得上密卷科的明星学者？
E: I shouldn't have been so confident. I am only a small potato in the Department of Cosmic Geography, the bottom of the space station's food chain. I must be stupid to think that I'm good enough for a prominent researcher from the Department of Insight.

C: 防卫科负责人阿兰，向你报…啊，原来是{NICKNAME}。不好意思，没有第一时间认出你来。
E: Arlan, head of security, reporting to... Oh, it's you, {NICKNAME}. Sorry, I didn't recognize you at first.

C: 在场所有科员都给我听好了——我们空间站「黑塔」，正处于艰难的复兴时期。
E: All staff present, attention please — Herta Space Station is undergoing a difficult period of revival.

C: 有人觊觎它的奇物，有人嫉妒它的中立与自由。
E: Some covet its Curios, while others envy its neutrality and freedom.

C: 倒也不必笑得如此夸张。
E: You don't have to laugh like that.

C: 「不瞑的…的…」
E: Woeful...

C: 说好了！
E: Agreed!

C: 还好我对秘密不感兴趣。

C: 这些问题的答案与录像带不符…

E: Joanne steps forward quickly to check on Sheila.

C: 可是小姐……
E: But, my lady...

C: 嘿嘿，好像阴差阳错，做了最正确的决定呢。
E: Hehe, guess I made the right decision after all.

C: 我知道啦，包在我的身上。
E: I know, just leave it to me.

C: 没错没错，我们和呜呜熟得很，它们绝对不会故意害人，充其量只会到处捣蛋……
