E: That's right, that's right! We're very familiar with Wubbie! They won't harm people on purpose. At most, they just pull some pranks at places...

C: 呜。
E: Woo.

C: {NICKNAME}说得对，在把东西交给你们之前，我们可以先看看吧？
E: {NICKNAME} is right. Before handing them over to you, may we go through the items first?

C: 但实现这一切又谈何容易？学会接受这其中的期望落差，也是空间站科员的必修一课。
E: But to achieve all that wouldn't be easy at all. Learning to accept the disparity between expectations and reality is a lesson that everyone here will eventually learn.

C: 快乐的…
E: Happy...

C: 嗯，你说得对。它们不仅不凶，甚至还有点可爱。
E: Yes, you're right. They are indeed not feral. Come to think of it, they even seem a bit cute.

C: 我来咯！
E: I'm here!

C: 不必如此拘谨，艾丝妲，用「你」就好。「黑塔」是知识汇聚的地方，在这里，我们赞美思想的平等。
E: No need for formalities, Asta. Herta Space Station is where knowledge converges. Here, we celebrate the equality of thought.

C: 你应该知道吧？前不久，这里遭到了「反物质军团」的袭击，在那场骚乱中，各舱段的主控系统也瘫痪了。
E: You probably know that this place was recently attacked by the Antimatter Legion. In the chaos, the master control system for each zone was paralyzed.

C: 呃，这是……
E: Uh... what exactly are—

C: 她篡改了记录？
E: She altered the records?

C: 不过…如果这伙人的目的是星核，那又为什么要把你留在这里呢？以她的实力，带着星核逃脱不就是多打个信标的事情吗？
E: Hmm... Why would they leave you here if their objective was the Stellaron? With her capabilities, all she would've needed to do was make another beacon — she would've been able to escape with the Stellaron no problem.

C: 嗯，你也有印象吧？事实上，它也在下落不明的奇物清单里。
E: You remember it, right? It's actually on the list of missing curios.

C: 唉，你说的对。还是不要沉浸在过去的失败中了，谢谢你，{NICKNAME}！
E: You're right, it doesn't help to dwell on past failures. Thank you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 原来我是鲸鱼啊。
E: So, I'm actually a whale.

C: 竟然有声音？
E: There's sound?

C: 那可是公司总部，就你一个人？
E: You're going alone? That's the IPC's headquarters.

C: 看，感应门打开了。清除对应的涂鸦后，受影响的设备就能恢复正常。
E: Look, the sensor door is open. Remove the corresponding graffiti to restore the affected devices.

C: 精彩！宛如教科书一般的表现。
E: Wonderful! A textbook performance.

C: 怎么回事？{NICKNAME}！你看到没，刚刚那个巨大的黑影？！
E: What's happening? {NICKNAME}, did you see that huge shadow!?

C: 很高兴认识二位！失礼了，方才我正在向这株盆栽阐释「美」的意义。
E: An honor! I was just explaining the significance of "beauty" to this foliage.

C: 我了解你的过去。你想看见、触及、知道的……
E: I know your past. The things you want to see, to touch, to know...

C: 哈？
E: Huh?

C: 噫…我可不想看到一堆三月七在车厢里四处晃悠呀！有我一个就够乱的了。
E: Ugh... I don't wanna see a bunch of Marches roaming around the Express! One of me is enough!

C: 不会，这是很纯粹的愿望，是非常珍贵的东西。
E: That's not how it works. The desire to know your past embodies purity itself — a thing of immense value.

C: 我合理怀疑，银枝听到的<color=#dbc291ff>「霸主」</color>指的就是这样一只巨虫，而我们……
E: I believe the <color=#dbc291ff>"overlord"</color> Argenti mentioned could be referring to this colossal being, and we're...

C: 跃迁所需的准备繁多，过程中难保会引起虫群注意。
E: Warp jumping requires a lot of preparation, and it might alert the Swarm.

C: 我们的交手只到一半…尚武者不善言辞，我还有另一半未传达给你。
E: We were interrupted halfway through our battle. As a warrior, articulation has never been my forte, yet I still needed to impart the remaining half to you.

C: 维利特，你特地前来，是有话想对我说？
E: Velite, have you something to say?

C: 你们冷静点呀……
E: Everyone, just calm down...

C: …这是他执意坚守的职责。
E: ...He insisted on doing his duty.

C: 幻觉，依托于主观感受、经验，是为看到的一种…个人所求…
E: Hallucinations draw on people's feelings and experiences... and can come to represent what we seek the most.

C: …如果两起事件确是同一人所为，那你的嫌疑会下降许多。但前提是系统中有你主张存在的记录。
E: ...If these two incidents were caused by the same person, then the suspicion put on you would decrease... provided that this fire-suppression record does exist in the system.

C: 别装了，请你闭嘴。
E: That's enough pretending. Please be quiet.

C: 但这显然与我们在讨论的人偶遇袭没有关系。
E: Clearly, though, it bears no connection to Herta's puppet being attacked.

C: 谁要他回来了！
E: Who said I want him back!?

C: 你想要根除的，是科员对「天才」的盲信。
E: You wish to uproot the researchers' blind worship of geniuses.

C: {NICKNAME}，你回来啦？
E: You're back, {NICKNAME}?

C: 不记得了，我只喜欢研究马桶的小故事。
E: No. My research area is short stories about toilets.

C: 你可以尝试信任我的。
E: You can try trusting me, you know.

C: 阮•梅喜欢听新式的戏曲。
E: Ruan Mei likes to listen to new-style opera.

C: 第二，自我赋能，提高行动力，走在芝士流心的极致信念上。
E: Two: Energize yourself, increase your capacity for action, and walk on the path of Molten Cheese Tart's absolute conviction.

C: 嗨，阮•梅，等你好久了。哦，你也来了？看来你们相处得挺愉快。
E: Hi, Ruan Mei, I've been waiting for you. Oh, you're here too? Looks like you two have become quite friendly.

C: 对，第五位天才。
E: Yes. A fifth genius.

C: 嗯，我知道。
E: Thank you.

C: 不知道下一次天才聚会是什么时候。{NICKNAME}，还有什么想对我说的吗？
E: Who knows when the next gathering of geniuses will be? Do you have anything else you want to say to me, {NICKNAME}?

C: 哼哼，你不知道吧，芝士流心和豆沙灰灰，后来联合起阮•梅培育的各种生物，给她写了一封信！
E: Hmm, did you know that Molten Cheese Tart and Gray Bean Paste later teamed up with various creatures cultivated by Ruan Mei, and wrote her a letter!

C: 怎么会这么想？要说流放的话，我们可是把列车组最小的成员从帕姆手上挖过来送你了。
E: Why would you think that? If anyone is being exiled, we've taken the Express Crew's tiniest member, wrenched them from Pom-Pom's arms and gifted them to you.

C: 什么公司…什么试唱。
E: The IPC...? An audition?

C: 塞琳，其实你也应该找到属于自己的舞台。
E: Celine, you should also go and find your own stage.

C: 检索到您的相关行动记录。数据显示您在协助期间表现优异，获得了鼹鼠党成员的赞赏。
E: Records regarding your personal involvement have been found. Data shows that your performance while assisting was outstanding, and you received great praise from The Moles' members.

C: 弹药…食物…还有医疗用品，我们已经弹尽粮绝了，什么都缺。
E: Ammunition... food... medical supplies... everything. We're out of everything.

C: 太难听了，别贬低自己。
E: They're horrible names! Don't put yourself down like that.

C: 停，{NICKNAME}！你看那边站着的人，穿的好像不是银鬃铁卫的军服？
E: Wait a sec, {NICKNAME}! That person over there. That doesn't look like a Silvermane Guard uniform...

C: 哦，是吗？请尽管开口，莫非两位已经打算和我聊聊潜在的业务合作了？
E: Oh? A collaboration between our two sides, perhaps?

C: 可恶，刚才还在说什么「会考虑贝洛伯格人民的福祉」——这帮公司资本家的话，真是一个字都不能信！
E: Ugh, seriously? Topaz was just talking about "taking the welfare of the people of Belobog into consideration," and now they're pulling this stunt? You really can't trust these money-hungry IPC suits for a minute!

C: 毕竟之前对付可可利亚的时候，你可是帮了大忙呀——布洛妮娅肯定也很想跟你这位大救星见上一面~
E: I mean, considering how you helped us out with Cocolia, I'm sure Bronya would be happy to see you!

C: 软硬不吃…欠揍是吧！
E: Seriously, get some lunch bro.

C: 真遗憾，本来还想美美地度过这几天…这下我的小礼服又只能在箱底吃灰了。
E: Just when I thought I could catch a break, things go haywire! Guess my nice dress will have to wait for a while...

C: 哼…呼噜，哼唧？
E: Oink... Grunt, oink?

C: 但首先，我需要一位向导，告诉我那些兵器被埋在了什么地方。
E: But first, I need a guide to show me where these automatons are buried.

C: 看来你的计算还是偏向保守了点~
E: Your calculations are slightly on the conservative side.

C: 我需要花些时间动员城里的所有居民…然后还必须再和托帕见一次面。
E: I need some time to rally all the residents in the city... and then I'll meet with Topaz again.

C: 各位，一路平安。
E: Stay safe, everyone.

C: 收到。那…还有人想说点什么吗？
E: Understood. Is there anything else anyone would like to add?

C: …什么？
E: ...What?

C: 让我决定的话…我可能会同意公司开出的条件。
E: If it were up to me... I'd probably agree to the IPC's conditions.

C: …我已经想好了。如果我是布洛妮娅，就不会签署这份合同。
E: I've thought about it, and... Well, if I were Bronya, I wouldn't sign it.

C: 克拉拉也不清楚…但是史瓦罗先生答应我，他很快就会回来的……
E: I'm not sure... but Mr. Svarog promised he'd be back soon...

C: 原来如此…每个人都有自己看问题的角度，这个结果倒也正常。
E: I see... I suppose everyone has their own way of seeing things. I can't say I'm surprised.

C: 妈妈！妈妈！
E: Mommy! Mommy!

C: 记得一定要趁热吃啊，凉了就没那个风味了——不好意思啊，后面的客人还在等着呢，下次有机会我再好好招待你俩……
E: Well, don't wait for them to get cold now. I'm sorry sweethearts, I'd best see to these other customers before their hunger gets the better of them. Thanks for stopping by!

C: 好饿哦…好想吃夕红鱼刺身……
E: Soooo hungry... I wish I could have a Redsunset Salmon right now...

C: 哦，那诺尔伯特少爷…
E: Oh, and you, Master Norbert?

C: 没问题，包在我身上。
E: No problem, leave it with me.

C: 这话是说给年轻人听的吧？我现在的状况，早就不奢求什么身体健康了……
E: Not for youngsters like yourself. When you get to my time of life, good health is a bit of a luxury I'm afraid.

C: 「互助会」！
E: Mutual aid society!

C: 我是来买药的。
E: I'm here to buy.

C: ——走了！
E: I'm out of here!

C: 但当时我还太年轻，还不知道长期的挫败会如何压垮一个人，给他带去可怕的影响……
E: But I was too young to know what long-term frustration could do to a person. It changed him in a terrible way...

C: 这些试剂并不能治愈一切重疾——世界上不存在那种万能药。瓦赫制作出它们，只是为了在短期内稳定受研究者的症状…以便观察他们的体征变化。
E: Those reagents of his aren't cure-alls for critical illness — that doesn't exist. Vache made the reagents to mitigate the suffering of his patients in the short term — a convenient way for him to observe changes in his test subjects.

C: 而{M#他}{F#她}将要面对的是——搏击俱乐部中素有「新人克星」之称的自动机兵双子——
E: The opponent {M#he}{F#she} will be facing is none other than... the twin automatons known in the Fight Club as Rookie Busters...

C: <size=36>「尊者」，和它那同样强悍的徒弟「多蒙」！</size>
E: <size=36>Master! And its equally formidable disciple — Domon!</size>

C: 在这大势所趋的关头，就让复兴计划在你我手中画上句点吧。
E: At this critical juncture, it is up to us to finally finish Project Revival.

C: 看样子它是不会再回来了，咱们继续找找其他地方吧。
E: Looks like it won't be coming back. Let's keep looking elsewhere.

C: 让我想想，把你干掉，绕过卡波特先生，交给艾丝妲小姐，这样的话，我就不用再当流水工了……
E: Let me see, I can just take care of you, bypass Mr. Capote and hand you over to Miss Asta, so I don't have to be a slave anymore...

C: 你才是水魈。
E: You're the Xenohydro.

C: 是吗？也许吧。当人被逼到绝路上时，急智是会显得冷酷绝情。但那只是出于生存的本能。
E: Is it? Maybe. When a person is pushed to a dead-end, wit might appear cold and heartless. But it's just survival instinct.

C: 「戚戚与之同谋，不如皎皎独立。他日纵然回首，自有星辉拂路。」
E: "Better off alone than to be an accomplice. One day, as they turn around, a path will be lit by the radiance of the stars."

C: 不是我叫他们过来的。我只是把你的粉丝回信都是由我代笔的事实告诉了她们。
E: I didn't invite them here. I just told them the fact that I was the one who replied to all your fans.

C: …守护者大人调查了你们的背景。
E: ...The Madam Guardian investigated your backgrounds.

C: 裂界…？不对，这里是商店街。他说过，这里是贝洛伯格最热闹的地方。
E: Fragmentum...? No, this is our shopping street. He said this is the busiest spot in all of Belobog.

C: 好吧，给你。
E: Okay, here you are.

C: 来时我已经确认过了，那条道路上堆满了路障和杂物，怪物是不会靠近那里的。
E: On the way here, I checked and found that that road is full of roadblocks and debris. Monsters wouldn't get close to where I'm going.

C: （似乎听到了佩拉的呼喊……）
E: (I seem to hear Pela's voice...)

C: 我…娜塔莎小姐，我也不知道自己的选择对不对。我只是不想看到老爷和夫人被思念之苦折磨……
E: I... I'm not sure if I did the right thing, Miss Natasha. I just didn't want your parents to feel that their son was so close and yet so far away...

C: 我了解哥哥，他对医学实验的态度严谨得可怕。他绝对不会漏记任何一次实验结果。
E: I know my brother he's — meticulous when it comes to medical experiments. There's no way he wouldn't document his results.

C: 啊，我差点忘了…擅自离开贝洛伯格是违法行为——看来我们有得解释了，{NICKNAME}。
E: Ah, I'd almost forgotten... No one can leave Belobog without authorization. Looks like we need to talk our way out of this, {NICKNAME}.

C: 就像是默默注视着自作主张的举动，灯具的坐台悄悄地移开了位置，珍贵的宝物猝不及防地出现在你的眼前。
E: The base of the lamp quietly moved aside to suddenly reveal the precious treasure before your eyes, as if it was silently gazing at your actions.

C: 只是？
E: Just what?

C: 这里原本陈列的是<color=#dbc291ff>「流星碎片」</color>，它是综合馆的展品里历史最悠久、也可以说是最具非凡意义的一件。
E: It was one of the oldest and most precious items in the General Hall collection — the <color=#dbc291ff>Meteor Fragment</color>.

C: 造个模型不好吗？
E: Can't we just use a replica?

C: 很多——怕你不知道，小姑娘，凡是能赚钱的小道消息，在下层区的传播速度都特别快。
E: A lot... I don't know if you're aware, miss, but any intel that makes money spreads like wildfire in the Underworld.

C: 可以的话，能拜托你去外面调查一圈吗？等你回来，我们再把碎片拼在一起——麻烦你了。
E: In the meantime, do you think you could head out and look for more clues? We can compare notes when you're done – I'm counting on you!

C: 感谢您配合调查，女士。
E: Thank you for your cooperation, madam.

C: 还有这种巧事？
E: Wow, what a coincidence.

C: 我们来给它做个检查吧，{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}。
E: Let's go give him a checkup, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我取出来了这些零件…给你，佩拉姐姐。
E: Miss Pela, here's all the sculpture pieces I found.

C: 你们从哪里弄来的？
E: Where did you guys find the parts?

C: …哇，好的，那我就放心了。您不用这么激动……
E: Oh, wow, that's a relief to hear. I didn't realize you were so passionate...

C: 等等，我记得口令！「不烤面包烤红肠」，是这个吧？
E: Wait, I remember! Roast the sausage, not the bread. That's the password, right?

C: 不是，我是银鬃铁卫。
E: No, it's a Silvermane Guard.

C: 很明显，你回答错了。寒腿叔叔这下不做声了…糟糕。
E: You obviously answered wrong. Not a peep can be heard from Mr. Cold Feet. Uh-oh....

C: 嘿嘿，我就知道你是个识时务的角色！
E: Hehe, I knew you were a reasonable person.

C: 阅读便笺上的内容。
E: Read the content on the message.

C: 嗯…你还记得「风雪免疫」事件吗？那时我曾和你说过自己的身世。
E: Hmm... Do you remember that whole "Blizzard Immunity" thing? I told you about my personal experiences back then.

C: 在那之前，你要填一份申请表。
E: Before we get going, you have to fill out an application form.

C: 请再稍等我一会儿。
E: Please give me a moment.

C: 嗯，那就麻烦你再确认一下了。
E: Sure. Thanks for your help.

C: <size=36>你不觉得很摇滚吗？！</size>
E: <size=36>Don't you think it's very rock 'n' roll?</size>

C: 咳咳！这个名字…不是，是这个称号……
E: Ahem! This name... no, this title...

C: …我字不好看嘛。怎么，你有意见啊。
E: ...My handwriting is awful. Do you have a problem with that?

C: 放松点，像和朋友一样交流。
E: You gotta loosen up, people! Just talk to each other like friends would.

C: 这些流浪者就算是无家可归，但也是有尊严的，不可能一直接受别人的救济过活。
E: Even if those vagrants have no home to return to, they still have their dignity. They won't accept charity forever.

C: 不然呢？下层区干什么都得自食其力，你们也学着点。
E: Why wouldn't I? You've gotta be self-reliant down here. Watch, you might learn something.

C: 矿车部件
E: Mine Cart Part

C: 救人是我的爱好。
E: Saving lives is my passion.

C: 不过是件工具而已，丢了就丢了吧。回诊所，回诊所。
E: It's just a tool, I guess I should let it go. Let's head to the clinic.

C: 你一定靠矿脉的情报赚了不少。
E: You must have made a lot of money selling that intel about the vein.

C: 没辙，那我只能继续行使沉默权了。你们看着办吧！
E: Well, looks like I can only continue exercising my right to remain silent. It's up to you.

C: 唉…就这么干等着，只会越来越焦虑啊……
E: Oh dear... All this waiting around is enough to make me even more anxious...

C: 你这鉴定靠谱吗？
E: Can we trust your appraisal?

C: 可是，老爹的宝贝…呜呜——
E: But, daddy's treasure... Waaaah...

C: 之前我和你说的矿具租赁生意，那都是确有其事。我打听了好久才知道，原来大矿区还有个一周只出工一天的匹克老弟——
E: The mining equipment rental business I told you about before is real. I've asked many people and I realized Peak worked only one day a week in the Great Mine.

C: 突然有种不知道怎么面对大家的感觉。
E: There I was getting excited to tell everyone the good news...

C: （似乎不能从这里前往战场……）
E: (It doesn't seem like we can go to the battlefield through here...)

C: （还是听从杰帕德的指令，不要擅自行动为好……）
E: (I should take Gepard's order and not act on my own...)

C: 我们出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 等一下，这不是我刚才的台词吗？
E: Hold on, isn't that what I just said?

C: 放心吧，不会的。我能感受到佩拉真实的心情。
E: It's okay. I won't be sad. I understand what Pela really feels.

C: 这个…给你。
E: This... is for you.

C: 听说那时的佩妮娅女士不顾自己的身孕，坚持驻扎在雪原营地里。虽然不能上一线，但是还可以留在后方做些文书工作。
E: They say that despite her pregnancy, Madam Penya insisted on staying at the Snow Plains camp. She couldn't go to the front lines, but she was able to handle administrative duties.

C: 我命休矣——
E: I'm a goner—

C: 这秋千上全是灰…喂，别坐，太脏了！
E: This swing is covered in dust... Hey, don't sit on it! It's filthy!

C: 找那个叔叔帮你如何？
E: How about we ask the guy who gave you the gift for help?

C: 这…能卖几个钱？
E: How much... can you get for him?

C: 唔…虎克还没学会缝纫活呢，看来只有去找老巫婆帮忙了。
E: *sigh* I haven't learned to sew yet — I'll have to ask the old witch for help.

C: 虎克之前一直吵着闹着要去铆钉镇探险…这可不妙。
E: Hook does always talk about wanting to go on a Rivet Town adventure... this could be bad.

C: 三、三月大姐？！你、你们不是回上层区了吗？
E: M—Miss March!? D—Didn't you go back to the surface...?

C: 帕斯卡！你怎么伤成这个样子了……？
E: Pascal! Who did this to you?

C: 这里往下继续走…好像是废弃餐厅？
E: Up ahead... Is that an abandoned restaurant?

C: 不过，克拉拉一直在好奇一件事……
E: However, I've always wondered...

C: …{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}说得对。虽然帕斯卡是出于好意才……
E: ...Right. Pascal is doing this out of good will, but still...

C: 操作制动模块
E: Operating brake module.

C: 谢、谢谢大家，我没事，一点小擦伤而已。
E: Th—Thanks, everyone. I'm fine. Just a few scratches.

C: 我不想惊动史瓦罗先生，因为设备是被两个流浪者叔叔…不小心弄坏的。如果被史瓦罗先生知道了，他肯定会很生气……
E: I don't want to disturb him. This installation was... accidentally damaged by two of the vagrants. If Mr. Svarog finds out, they'll get in big trouble...

C: …别问了，赶快过来搭把手。
E: ...Less asking, more helping.

C: 现在的情况已经改变了，一位铁卫来到了地下，这件事在史瓦罗的计算中吗？更何况我们——
E: Circumstances have changed since then — there's a Silvermane Guard down here now! Is that part of Svarog's calculation? Not to mention, we're—

C: 把地髓探针的消息告诉虎克吧…她说不定想帮费斯曼把宝贝淘回来。
E: I should tell Hook about the Geomarrow Probe... She might want to help Fersman get his treasure back.

C: 哼，看你们两个一脸正直的样子…这玩偶熊里肯定有诈！
E: Hmph, you two with your poker faces... You've got a trick up your sleeves with that bear?

C: 等待拍卖会开始。
E: Let's wait for the auction to begin.

C: 住嘴！问你这么多了吗？
E: Hey! Did we give you permission to speak?

C: 五百二十！
E: <unbreak>520</unbreak>!

C: 虎克，交给你了。
E: Over to you, Hook.

C: 赌上我们的全部吧！
E: Let's go all in!
█Human███! Parts██Rivet██need████repair██need██! Town.

C: …{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}能理解克拉拉的想法…真是太好了。
E: It's great that you understand what I'm saying...

C: 该机体报废原因为——指令解析错误后狂奔<unbreak>7.1</unbreak>公里，导致电机结构起火，引发核心模组熔毁。
E: This machine was scrapped because it accelerated erratically for <unbreak>7.1</unbreak> kilometers after it incorrectly interpreted a command, causing the engine to catch fire and the core module to melt down.

C: （装甲内部因高热熔合得乱七八糟。看来没办法带走，可惜了。）
E: (The inside of the armor is a total mess due to being melted by the heat. Unfortunately, it appears to be useless.)

C: 当前故障已排除。风险等级评估：低。允许解除警戒。
E: The current issue has been resolved. Risk level: Low. Alert lifted.

C: 是的！为了给它起个合适的名字，克拉拉和史瓦罗先生一起找了很久很久……
E: Yes! Mr. Svarog and I spent a long time coming up with a suitable name...

C: 净化…净化！
E: Eliminate... Eliminate!

C: …看来线索又断了。
E: It appears that the trail has gone cold yet again.

C: 或许我们还有机会能查清楚……
E: Maybe there's still a chance...

C: …请让克拉拉亲手解决这件事。可以吗，史瓦罗先生？
E: Please let me handle this myself. Please, Mr. Svarog!

C: 但是…克拉拉觉得还不能放弃修复帕斯卡的希望。
E: But I don't think I'm ready to give up on Pascal just yet.

C: …尽管如此，临场经验已经证实：「克拉拉的决心」往往能够化解各类纷争或困境。
E: Nonetheless, real experience has demonstrated that Clara's determination can often overcome all challenges.

C: 程序已成功植入。该个体需要进行一段时间的断电维护，暂时无法交流。我们可以稍后再来查看状况。
E: The programs were successfully installed. The robot will require offline maintenance and will be unable to communicate for some time. We can return to it later.

C: 就是它！那个像大铁丸子一样的东西。
E: That's it! The thing shaped like a giant iron ball.

C: 你要求「密钥」对吧？我该去找哪位「队长」？
E: You need the encryption key, right? Which captain should I bother then?

C: 和守门的弗朗兹确认过了，确实有这档事。
E: Yes, I confirmed it with Franz.

C: 给我几分钟时间，只要几分钟，我会解释清楚——
E: Give me a few minutes, just a few. I'll explain every—

C: 禁忌之所以为禁忌，正是因为真相隐藏其中。
E: The forbidden is only forbidden to conceal the truth within.

C: 朗道家世代从军，很多人都英年早逝了，不大有时间留给兄弟姐妹。每个人只是努力过好自己的一生。
E: In our family we have a strong military tradition going back generations — many a Landau has died in their prime. There's not a lot of "brother and sister time." Everyone just does their best to get on with their life.

C: 我好像已经听到风暴的声音了，从这城墙外传来的…让人平静不下来。
E: I think I can already hear the storm on the other side of the city walls... Not a reassuring sound.

C: 我、我不知道该说什么好…太谢谢你们了！
E: I... um... I don't know what to say... Thank you so much!

C: 嗯，已经找到了！而且完好无损，真是万幸……
E: Indeed, and I found it! And luckily it's still in good condition...

C: 我想试着帮你理清思绪。
E: I want to try and help you clear your mind.

C: 谢谢你。我…不常接受陌生人的帮助，所以不知道该怎么表达。但我真的很感谢你。
E: Thank you. I... don't usually accept help from strangers, so I don't really know how to show my thanks. But I really am grateful to you.

C: 对不起…我知道你为了帮助我付出了很多时间。你值得一个答案……
E: I'm sorry... I know you put a lot of time into helping me, and you deserve an answer...

C: 对了！刚才那片空地上，是不是有个像「能源中枢」的大家伙？回去看看吧，说不定跟这扇大门有什么联系呢？
E: Wait! Wasn't there some big energy hub-looking thing back in that empty area? Let's go back and take a look, maybe it's linked to this gate.

C: 声音变得清晰了…
E: The voice is getting clearer...

C: 当着敌人的面操作也太危险了——先把这片区域清理干净再说！
E: Hey, it's too dangerous to operate the mechanism with them here... We better clean this place up first!

C: …跟城里那些一板一眼的建筑完全不同。
E: ...very different from the uniform style of the buildings we saw in the city.

C: 母亲大人，我还是不明白…
E: Mother... I still don't understand.

C: 可可利亚大人…感谢你把我抚养成人，感谢你把选择的权利留给了我。
E: Madam Cocolia... I am grateful to you for raising me, and for allowing me the privilege of choice.

C: 你们…不过是旧世界崩溃前的垂死挣扎！
E: You are but cinders of the Old World soon to become ashes!

C: …抱歉，我太激动了。我只是很难接受，难道这一切都是白费力气……
E: ...Sorry, I got a bit worked up. It just upsets me to think that all of this was for nothing...

C: 再也！
E: will no longer...

C: 但你帮我解除了所有疑惑——我终于能正视自己的命运了。
E: But you helped remove any element of confusion — and I can finally face my destiny.

C: …我明白了。
E: ...I understand what you mean.

C: 这个嘛——站长也感到很好奇。不过，我是说如果啊……
E: Hmmm. I find it strange, too. Then again, if...

C: …你没有通讯设备吗？
E: ...Don't you have a communication device?

C: 散页上密密麻麻地写着食品市场的开放结束时间、不同菜品的价格、不同食品忌口等等。
E: Detailed notes about the business hours of grocery stores, the prices of different grocery items, dietary restrictions, and more are densely packed in the scattered pages.

C: 两页笔记拼在一起，你得到了一个联系方式。
E: Combining the two pages, you obtain a contact number.

C: 东北口的机巧鸟。
E: Cycrane at the northeast entrance.

C: 梅姐…我想这件事已经想了很久了。这次雇佣合同到期了之后，我不想再续签了，希望你可以理解。
E: Mei... I've been thinking about this for a long time. After your current employment contract expires, I'm afraid I won't extend it. I hope you can understand.

C: 芦慧姑娘自己忙得过来，对吧？
E: Ms. Luhui can finish them alone, right?

C: …诶，没错，我自己能处理得过来。
E: Ahh... That's right. I'll be fine.

C: 梅姐的笔记
E: Mei's Notes

C: 具体要帮你做些什么呢？
E: What exactly do I need to do?

C: 我有一个喜欢的女孩儿叫静斋，她拒绝了我的表白。听说，她深爱着一位诗人，那位诗人出了一本诗集，而我却憋不出半截诗句。
E: I have my eye on a girl named Jingzhai, but she shot me down. I heard that she was in love with a poet and that this poet has a whole book of poetry published — but me, I could barely put together a rhyming couplet.

C: 嚯哈哈哈哈！
E: Hohoho!

C: 你给我回来！
E: Come back here!

C: 听好了，我的上一句是：「山中月影桃前槛」，平平仄仄平平仄。
E: Listen carefully. My line is, "Speech is silver."

C: 在我离开主人流浪的这段时间里，我下载了《长生种浪漫关系一千问》之类的情感类著作…然而我并没有恋爱的需求，噢，这真的太可悲了。
E: When I was wandering outside, I downloaded books about romantic relationships such as The Key to a Good Long-Life Species Relationship... Yet, I don't have the need for love. Oh, this is depressing.

C: 她的容貌或许年轻，但是心态早就垂垂老矣，对谁都不会再爱了。
E: She might have a youthful look, but her soul has aged. Her heart will not flutter for anyone again.

C: 我只是不会再喜欢谁了，这与小聪无关……
E: I just won't fall in love with anybody anymore. This isn't Cong's fault...

C: 我、我和她约在星槎海见面，她好像也有话要对我说。这一次表白我一定要成功。
E: I—I've asked her to meet me at the Starskiff Haven. She seems to have something to tell me too. I must succeed this time.

C: 没想到小聪也忧郁了。
E: Who would've thought that Cong was gloomy, too?

C: 要是没有猫腻的话，我也许会考虑和对方谈谈合作，连温符瑞这样的都能搞定，那我们员工的心理健康也不在话下。
E: If they're legit, I will consider talking to them about a collaboration. If they could handle someone like Wen Furui, our staff members' mental health could then be easily ensured.

C: 银河中竟然有这么多美好的可人儿，我的前半生算是彻底虚度了。
E: I didn't think there would be such a fantastic person in the universe. I almost regret not meeting her earlier in life.

C: 你会和一个只活五年的小孩子说「这辈子都要在一起」吗？
E: Would you say "I want to be with you forever" to a child who only lives for five years?

C: 你再想想。
E: Give it another thought.

C: 我对「美丽狐仙聊天」不感兴趣。
E: I'm not interested in the Foxian Beauty Chat.

C: 这是设计好的陷阱。
E: This is a calculated trap.

C: 这不是我来决定的。
E: This is not something I can decide.

C: 我的牌友们为了你在向{F#她}{M#他}求情，不希望你被地衡司抓走。
E: My game mates are begging {F#her}{M#him} on your behalf. They don't want you to be taken into custody by the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 是啊，网络上有很多大叔装成美少女的，大家心知肚明，这很常见。
E: That's right, there are so many middle-aged men pretending to be young and pretty girls online. This is so common that people don't think much of it anymore.

C: 我也没有会员，我们俩是追着别人的物流跟过来的。
E: I don't have a membership either. We both got here by following someone else's delivery.

C: 这种事情让那个「狐仙」开口，比我们俩在旁边苦口婆心有用多了。
E: I think a message from the Foxian Beauty will do much more good than our talking and explaining.

C: 我其实不太会聊天…
E: I'm not such a great conversationalist myself...

C: 嘻嘻，这土到令人颤抖的发言，得亏你能忍住和她聊下去。
E: Ah! Her messages are so cringy! Can't believe that you managed to endure them to the end.

C: 我就待在这里，跑不了的。
E: I've nowhere to run, so I'll just stay put.

C: 卖古董啊卖异星科技啊，还有「你现在幸福吗？」之类的，我不需要。
E: I don't need any of your antiques, technology from other worlds, or any of that "Are you happy right now?" nonsense.

C: 让我瞧瞧，你在建筑上拍到了一个复杂的图形？还是通过拼接形式识别出来的？
E: Let me take a look. Did you find this complex shape on a building, or was it pieced together by the plug-in?

C: 而这个，一个浑身抽枝发芽的人形…显然这是在描绘魔阴身的形象。最近咱们应该都有见识过它带来的恐怖。这恐怕也是仙舟人逃离死亡后支付的代价……
E: And this, a figure covered in sprouts... This is obviously a drawing of someone stricken with mara. I believe all of us have witnessed how scary the disease is recently. I'm afraid that's the price the Xianzhou people must pay for escaping death.

C: 拒绝？为什么？
E: No? Why not?

C: 若由你去见她，她多半就不会一溜烟跑了。
E: If you go see her, I'm sure she won't run away.

C: 你头一回抵达仙舟吧？那解释起来可麻烦了。持明族是创建仙舟联盟的三大种族之一。
E: This must be your first time on the Xianzhou... It's a long story. The Vidyadhara is one of the three races that established the Xianzhou Alliance.

C: 那些医士都是派驻在其他洞天的医馆里。我已询问过情况了，他们对发生的事情一无所知。
E: Those doctors came from apothecaries in other delves. I've asked them, and they don't have the slightest clue what's going on.

C: 我刚从丹鼎司过来。
E: I just came from the Alchemy Commission.

C: 那你还要治疗魔阴身？
E: Then, why are you still treating the mara-struck?

C: 关于你的心上人…？
E: Who is your beloved...?

C: 少啰嗦，我就问你是可以走、还是不可以走？
E: Just cut to the chase. Can we take the ship or not?

C: 还真是噩梦重现呀，让人一丁点儿玩耍的心情也没有了。
E: It's a real nightmare. Man did it seriously kill my mood for playtime.

C: 我知道，可那时我对「药王秘传」的内幕一无所知，只知道丹鼎司内部，有些人在复现古老的秘药。
E: Yes... but I knew nothing about the treachery of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus back then. I only knew that people in the Alchemy Commission were involved in ancient, clandestine medicines.

C: 怎么样，本小姐拜托你找的线索呢？
E: Any clues have you found?

C: 是真的，为了见你，她不得不乔装打扮。
E: It's true. She had to disguise herself in order to meet you.

C: 有了这份名单的话，我既可以威胁药王秘传，拿到长生不老药；也可以上交云骑军，算是戴罪立功，不必被驱逐出仙舟了。
E: With that list I'd be able to blackmail the Disciples into giving me the elixir of immortality... or I could submit the list to the Cloud Knights to avoid banishment from the Xianzhou.

C: 很生气，很想发泄一下！
E: Ugh! I'm so furious!

C: 早知道就不去救他了。
E: We wouldn't have helped him if we'd known.

C: 做选择，好难。
E: It's hard to decide sometimes.

C: 之前半夏问我喜不喜欢治病救人，说实话，原本这对我就像是吃饭睡觉，没啥难度，也就无所谓喜不喜欢了。
E: Banxia asked me if I liked treating people... Like I said, it's as easy as eating and drinking for me — I don't like or dislike it...

C: 看来，我来得不是时候。
E: Seems I came at a bad time.

C: 将军也是来劝我放弃谒见龙尊的吗？
E: Even you came to dissuade me from visiting the high elder, General?

C: 路上所有人都想和丹恒聊天。
E: Everyone on the way here wanted to chat with Dan Heng.

C: 龙尊是持明族中最接近「不朽」的存在。
E: Among the Vidyadhara, the high elder is the existence closest to the Permanence.

C: 「为止若木苏生，寿瘟遗祸。」
E: "Shun the tree's growth, the residual plague."

C: 看来所有的蜃影都没法察觉到自己已经蜕生的事实啊……
E: Seems like none of the Mirage Echoes realize that they've already been reborn...

C: 这位小哥，你是不是在帮三余书肆的那个小店长看店啊？
E: Hey mister, are you manning the counter for the young shopkeeper of Spare Time Book Shop?

C: 你就是三余书肆的小店长隐书吧？我们有些事要找你。
E: Are you Yinshu, the shopkeeper at Spare Time Book Shop? There's something we want to talk to you about.

C: （接下来…杨叔，借我看一下现场地图。嗯…嗯…他肯定穿过了前面的那扇门，不可能在这么小的地方晃悠了两小时。）
E: (Next up... I need to have a look at the map, Mr. Yang. Hmm... He must have gone through that gate up ahead. No way he would've stayed put in such a small area for two hours.)

C: …这种档次的锁，能挡得住谁？
E: ...Such a rudimentary lock. Easy pickings.

C: 什么「黑衣人」？…哦，我明白了。您可别提那倒霉「黑衣人」了。哪儿来的什么「黑衣人」。
E: Dark clothing? ...Ah! I know what you're talking about. What a pair of clowns we are... Dark clothing, hmph.

C: 当然可以，我们抓药时已经拆开过了。
E: Of course. We'd already opened it when we showed it to the pharmacy.

C: 感觉和景元也没那么熟…
E: Do we really know Jing Yuan that well?

C: 并不是什么特别要紧的事，只是…想了解一下驭空司舵。
E: It's nothing urgent. We were hoping to... understand Helm Master Yukong a little better.

C: 我听说驭空司舵曾是个了不起的飞行士，但却拒绝了她女儿步上同样的道路……
E: ...We heard that Helm Master Yukong was an outstanding pilot, but that she refuses to let her daughter embark on the same career...

C: 岩明先生一板一眼的，可不好惹，咱们还是换一台术算机好了。
E: Mr. Yanming is a stickler for rules — I don't wanna annoy him. Let's go to a different device.

C: 我也不该看…
E: I shouldn't look either...

C: 还是问点别的吧，问点我能回答的。
E: Just ask some other questions. Ones I can answer.

C: 难怪小时候我问妈妈，爸爸在哪儿时，她回答我，我是从迴星港的星槎流水线上种出来的……
E: When I was little, I asked my Mom where my dad was... She said I was grown from the starskiff assembly line at Stargazer Navalia...

C: 大脑是个奇怪的器官。活了两百多年，我早已忘记了大多数闲谈…但惟有那段无聊的闲谈，我清楚地记得每一句。
E: The mind is mysterious... I've lived for more than two hundred years, forgotten nearly every conversation I've ever had... but I still remember us shooting the breeze that day — it's crystal clear.

C: 我把它们都解决了，我赢了。
E: I eliminated all the monsters.

C: 我怎么知道你会不会骗我？
E: How do I know you won't cheat?

C: ——不过，「真心话游戏」要暂停了，{NICKNAME}。
E: ...I'm afraid we'll have to put our game of truth and lies on pause, {NICKNAME}.

C: 所以教导你的重任就落在我的头上，把我整得焦头烂额，一逮到机会就立刻把你甩给列车啦。
E: ...so the burden of mentoring you fell on me. It was a stressful job, and I dumped you on the train as soon as I got the chance.

C: 失去了信仰的我，被艾利欧招揽，就这么加入了「星核猎手」。
E: I lost my faith and was recruited by Elio... that's how I joined the Stellaron Hunters.

C: 你变得很厉害了，{NICKNAME}…也很陌生。
E: You've become very impressive, {NICKNAME}... and unfamiliar.

C: 他是一个长生种，据说以前是仙舟的剑首。
E: He's a long-life species, apparently he was Sword Champion of the Xianzhou at some point.

C: 你到底想说什么…
E: What exactly are you getting at...?

C: 我、我是变量——
E: I—I'm a variable...

C: 实不相瞒，我是地衡司的卧底。
E: Truth is, I work undercover for the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 闷葫芦先生，你这是要跑哪儿去啊？
E: Hey, silent but deadly, where are you going?

C: 我只记得一些碎片…
E: I only remember fragments...

C: 但让这些机枢动起来倒也不复杂。
E: ...but getting these machines to work shouldn't be too hard.

C: 对不起，直到最近，我才找回了它。也只有把它送回你身边，我的梦魇才能平息片刻。
E: I'm sorry it took so long for me to find it. Only by bringing it to you will my nightmares be calmed.

C: 事发突然，听说许多匠人学徒仓促逃命，只剩一位老师傅坚守在此，等来了外援，才救下这造化洪炉。
E: The crisis happened too suddenly — all the craftsmen and apprentices fled. Only a single master craftsman was left to hold the line, until reinforcements arrived. That's how the Creation Furnace was saved.

C: 丹恒先生…将军希望我忘掉今天看到的一切。
E: Dan Heng... the general wants me to forget about everything I saw today.

C: …我认得你，但记不起更多了。
E: ...I recognize you... but I can't remember anything.

C: 如今的你，竟会承认自己棋差一着。
E: The man I knew would never have admitted he was bested.

C: 你也是…为了「刃」来的？
E: The one you're looking for... is it Blade?

C: （放下小说）
E: (Put the novel down)

C: 这一回是被什么事耽搁了？
E: What kept you this time?

C: 所以，你怀疑背后有阴谋？
E: Do you think there might be a hidden agenda at play?

C: 你认错人了…
E: I think you've got the wrong person...

C: 稍安勿躁，稍安勿躁…入门试炼分为两步，你和那位云骑已经完成了第一步。现在…还剩下最后一步。
E: Calm yourself... The initiation is divided into two steps — you and the Cloud Knight have completed the first. Now... only the second remains.

C: 怎么会呢！咱们药王秘传绝对是用人不疑的。
E: Not at all! As I said earlier — disciples never suspect who we accept.

C: 你刚才还真打算对我下死手吗？
E: Wait, y—you weren't holding back?

C: 但无论是蛰伏至今，还是死灰复燃…他们这次突然堂而皇之地冒出头来，那定然是在酝酿着什么阴谋……
E: Whatever the case, this sudden re-emergence hints at a hidden conspiracy...

C: 好的…我了解了，给我看看这方子吧…但我才疏学浅，很可能看不出什么所以然……
E: Right... I see. Let me take a look at the prescription. I'm afraid I'm not the most talented alchemist — I probably won't be able to make much sense of it...

C: 丹枢大人向来以思路奇诡而著称。她配出来的有些方子啊，她自己不解释，连我们都看不懂药理。
E: Lady Dan Shu is renowned for her unique line of reasoning. She's proposed several prescriptions that would have been incomprehensible to us if she hadn't explained the pharmacology...

C: 嗯
E: Hmm... Maybe.

C: 还好还好，没什么大问题……
E: I'm good, everything seems normal...

C: 三月，那可不见得哦？
E: ...You sure about that, March?

C: 太卜大人真可靠！
E: You're the best, Master Diviner!

C: 看来这就是「异物」了。接下来回溯的经历，应该是我第一次遇见{NICKNAME}的「黑塔」空间站。
E: Seems like this must be the foreign object. The next experience should be meeting {NICKNAME} for the first time — Herta Space Station.

C: 既然云璃姑娘洗清了嫌疑，宝剑也被找到了，现在也该是将它归还入库的时候了？
E: Now that we've proven Miss Yunli's innocence and found the sword, should we now return it to the arsenal?

C: 爷爷，我熔掉了演武仪典的奖品。你该怎么向罗浮交代啊？
E: Grandpa, I melted down the prize for the Wardance. How are you going to explain this to the Luofu?

C: 只是一些「记忆」层面的暗示。如果一件事出现在所有人的记忆中…那么它就是「事实」。
E: Just some suggestions at the memory level. If something happens in everybody's memory... then that something becomes a fact.

C: 没听说过啊，随口编的吧。我看「花火」也不像什么真名。
E: Never heard of it. Sounds made up. Sparkle doesn't sound like a real name, either.

C: 与此同时，花火大人也持有一个相同的按钮。一旦她按下，您就会立刻和整个匹诺康尼一起灰飞烟灭！
E: Miss Sparkle also has her own button. The second she pushes hit, you and the entirety of Penacony will instantaneously go up in smoke!

C: 然后是富商佐罗。他想加入匹诺康尼的商事集团，同花火大人是竞争关系。也许这就是他的杀人动机。
E: Next up, you have the merchant Lefton. He wants to join up with the Penacony trading guild, and is in direct competition with Miss Sparkle. That could be a motive for killing her.

C: 不多，也就四五位吧，毕竟我更喜欢沐浴在阳光下的，令人温暖幸福的「记忆」，它们通常属于更善良的人。
E: No, only a handful. After all, I prefer warm memories baked in sunshine. They're the ones that usually belong to kind people.

C: 应该没别的了，咱们出去吧。
E: That should be it. Let's head out.

C: 呃…是不是不太对？这也太简单了吧。虽然第一案也不难，但这个……
E: Err... Is something wrong here? This is too easy. The first case wasn't hard, but this one...

C: 吓、吓死我了！这家伙怎么回事，怎么还突然动手了呢！
E: H—Holy smokes! What's up with this guy? He just came out swinging from nowhere!

C: 匹诺康尼的美梦中不存在死亡，这是家族的允诺，也是「同谐」的庇佑。就算是忆者也无法打破这道屏障。
E: There is no death inside Penacony's dreamscape. That's the promise of The Family and the blessing of the Harmony. Not even a Memokeeper can break this barrier.

C: 哎…等等…等等！
E: Wait up... wait up!

C: 不用谢，二位想知道什么尽管开口。
E: You're welcome. If there's anything you'd like to know, please ask away.

C: 当然不会。请多信任我一点。
E: No way. Please put more trust in me.

C: 赌徒钟珊穷困潦倒，怎会来到这样高档的服装店？因为他是来盗窃的啊！
E: What would a penniless wretch of a gambler like Zhongshan be doing at such a fancy fashion store as this? Because he was planning on robbing it!

C: 先给各位打个招呼，待会儿进了里边可别乱跑。
E: Just a heads up — please don't go running off once we're inside.

C: 本座镇守在这「穷观阵」的中心，一旦三座阵基重启，卡芙卡的审问就可以开始。
E: I will guard the Matrix core. Once we've restarted the three terminals, Kafka's interrogation can commence.

C: 卡芙卡会给你怎样的答案呢？我也很好奇。
E: What will Kafka have to say to you? I'm curious to find out myself.

C: 你的目的是什么？
E: What is your objective?

C: 交代了啊。她在路上瞧见我，让我去书库里翻阅「建木」相关的记载。
E: She did — she saw me on her way over. She told me to go to the repository and read up on anything related to the Ambrosial Arbor.

C: {NICKNAME}，你要去哪儿？星槎就在前面，跟上我的脚步。
E: {NICKNAME}, where are you going? The starskiff is ahead of us — follow my lead.

C: 物性守恒，有所长者必有所短嘛。嗐，但拿来治治这不开眼钻进工造司的木精，绝对是够了。
E: *sigh* Every light has its shadow. But this is more than enough to deal with the tree demon.

C: 行了，事不宜迟，趁现在穿过「换境画屏」到对面去！我怕时间一长，枝条又长出来了。
E: Alright, there's no time to lose. Hurry through the Shifting Screen to the opposite side before the branches grow back.

C: 为何如此在意这具「洪炉」？
E: Why do you care so much about this furnace?

C: 从足踵的擦地声，我能辨识出人的步态与步幅。就像气息反映着躯体的健康一样，步伐反映的是你的力量与心情。
E: A persons's footfall reveals a lot about their strength and emotions — much like how a person's breath may serve as an indication of their overall health.

C: 小屁孩这么嚣张？
E: So cocky, huh?

C: 听说最近出了许多乱子，她一定很忙吧。谢谢{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，也请你帮我谢谢丹枢大人。
E: Things are bad on the Luofu recently — Dan Shu must be very busy. Thank you, {F#miss}{M#mister}, remember to thank her for me.

C: 你走进神策府，突然开始挥舞武器。
E: You came into the Seat of Divine Foresight and started brandishing your weapon.

C: 事情当真是如此吗？你不了解慈怀药王，也不了解妖弓祸祖，但你了解在下。在你眼里，在下是这样的人吗？
E: Do you really think that is the case? You don't understand Merciful Medicus, nor the Devilish Archer Author, but you understand me — do you see me as such? A heretic?

C: 你好，我叫贝娜，平时工作之余会和几个化外民朋友一起放生一些小生命。
E: Greetings, my name is Benna. I like to set animals free with some of my outworlder friends when I have the time.

C: 我说了，是狼先动手…爪的。
E: I already told you that wolves attacked first.

C: 钟珊和「四大善人」激烈地交流着各自的意见，你一时插不上话。
E: As Zhongshan and the Four Benevolent Ones hold an animated discussion, you find it hard to chip in.

C: 正是如此。
E: Indeed.

C: 光合作用、好养活、无排泄物…那便是完美的放生对象，「植物」。
E: Capable of photosynthesis, easy to cultivate, and has no excretion... that would be a "plant," the perfect creature to be released.

C: 但想通过这样的行为取悦星神，累积功德…真是很有自信的想法呢。人类的行为对星神很重要么？
E: However, the idea of pleasing the Aeon through such actions is quite bold. Does it matter to Aeons how humans behave?

C: 我同意。
E: I agree.

C: 这你就有所不知了…这些弱小、可怜、无助的无机宝宝们都来自一颗濒临毁灭的星球，它的名字叫，呃…雅萝莉八号！
E: Well, you don't know everything about these creatures. These weak and helpless mechanical creatures come from a planet verging on destruction named, um, Yaloli-8!

C: 我来取钟珊的信…
E: I'm here to collect a letter from her...

C: 往后如果有空，记得回来看看，参加参加咱们的活动…现在咱们这里是我们微观派的天下，再也不搞什么放生猛兽的狠活了。
E: Please feel free to swing by and take part in our activities... Now that the Microscopic Faction is at the helm, there won't be anymore dangerous activities like releasing beasts.

C: 他们是去绥园捉鬼了。
E: They went to Fyxestroll Garden to catch ghosts...

C: 我能理解，我也很害怕，不过我相信勇气迟早会回到你身上的。我在这儿等你！
E: I understand — I'm scared too! I'm sure you'll find your courage sooner or later. I'll be here waiting for you when you do!

C: 桂乃芬，化外民，无业…于前日和云骑士卒素裳进入绥园。
E: Guinaifen, an Outworlder, unemployed... You entered Fyxestroll Garden with Sushang, a Cloud Knight, the day before yesterday.

C: 我没问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 「岁阳尚未全部收复」…也就是说仙舟上别处的灵异事件也有可能和岁阳有关？大人，我消息灵通得很，也许可以帮到你们！
E: "Not all the escaped heliobi have been recovered..." So that means the other supernatural stuff that's been happening on the Luofu might be related? Your Honor! I have loads of info sources! Maybe I can help you!

C: 不帮就不帮嘛，这么凶啊。
E: Okay, fine! No need to be so blunt about it.

C: 既然你被我附身，我能让你看到原本看不到的东西。
E: Now that I'm possessing you, I can make you see things that you couldn't see before.

C: 不错，你果然是有些见识。
E: Good. I'm glad we understand each other.

C: 理由？一定需要什么理由吗？
E: Why? Does there have to be a reason?

C: 降服妖物…我似乎也降不住尾巴啊？我和尾巴，其实算是…朋友？
E: Suppress the monster... B—But I don't think I've ever had to suppress Tail! I guess we're more like... friends?

C: 嘻嘻，尾巴大爷，像咱们这等小小碎片，早已没有「燎原」的力量了，就算是小姑娘也能轻松制伏，你就别嘴硬了。
E: Hehe, "Mr. Tail," puny fragments like us were deprived of Ignamar's power long ago... If a little girl can subdue us, then perhaps it's time for some humility.

C: 我已将园林化为阵地，教十王司的走狗成了傀儡！只等将军一来，便可重开当年那一战。为什么要在此时和同族对垒？
E: I've turned this garden into my territory and made the dogs of the Ten Lords my puppets! As soon as the general arrives, the heliobi will have our rematch. Why should I fight my own at this crucial moment?

C: 只要我一天被困在此处，我就不会离开他的肉身。判官们尽可以给这具身体贴上神咒，涂抹符水，没关系，只要十王司还想保住属僚的性命，我就有讨价还价的余地。
E: For as long as I'm sealed in the matrix, I will inhabit this body. The judges can stick as many talismans and pour as much enchanted water on this flesh as they like — I don't care. As long as they want to save their own, I still have a bargaining chip.

C: 她的尾巴里寄宿着强大的岁阳…那是吾梦寐以求的力量。
E: A powerful heliobus possessed her tail... It is a power that I dream of having for myself.

C: 寒鸦…是谁？
E: Who is Hanya...?

C: …我有一样东西要交给你们两位，请到这边来。
E: ...Please come over here. I need to give you something.

C: 是您啊…刚才给您带来了不好的体验。十分抱歉。
E: Ooh, it's you... My sincere apologies for the subpar experience just now.

C: 我们补上了柯柯娜缺失的情绪，让她的记忆变得清楚了些…但没想到，这下她变得更悲伤了！我有种感觉，她好像是在被某种可怕的东西折磨！
E: We patched up Cocona's lost emotion and made her memories somewhat more lucid... But it just made her sadder! I've got a feeling she's being tortured by something horrific!

C: 柯柯娜，太棒了！无论是音准、律动还是情感，你的演唱水准都远超同龄人。你对音乐的理解力尤其高，能够迅速捕捉到歌曲想传达的精神…真是难得！
E: Cocona, that's amazing! Be it pitch, rhythm, or emotion, your vocal performance far surpasses those in your age group. You have a superb understanding of music, and can quickly capture the spirit that's being conveyed in a song... You are a rare talent!

C: 娜娜…妈妈知道你喜欢唱歌，但很多时候爱好就是爱好，爱好是没法变成饭碗的。你该认清楚现实，然后好好下决定。
E: Cocona... Mom knows that you love singing, but hobbies are just that — hobbies. They aren't meant to be a means of living. You should face reality and then make a proper decision.

C: 去奢侈品店工作。
E: Work at the luxury goods store.

C: 您知道…您正在与之对抗的，并不是一个真实的人吗？那是一种疾患，一片梦魇…一个看不见也摸不着的敌人。
E: Do you know that... this thing you're fighting against... it isn't a real person? It's a disease, a nightmare... and an unseen enemy that can't be touched.

C: 请问…柯柯娜去哪了？
E: May I ask... where Cocona is?

C: 您也是柯柯娜的老客户吗？很抱歉，柯柯娜因为一些…个人原因…已经离开这家店了。
E: Are you an old customer of Cocona's? I'm really sorry. It's because of... personal reasons... that Cocona has left this store.

C: 我和你说了多少次了，别放这种让人心烦的丧歌！你还嫌我们家的客人不够少吗？！
E: How many times have I told you, don't play these soppy songs that annoy people! What, you think our business is booming right now!?

C: 您不必激动——银河如此广阔，每个人的生活环境不尽相同，所能接触到的事物也有极大差异；我只是一位普通的演员，远非能够普照世间的巨星……
E: There is no need to get carried away... The cosmos is vast, and we all come from different environments. We will all be exposed to different things in life. I am merely a regular actor, far from the level of a superstar that can illuminate the entire universe...

C: 「…这和公司开出的价码无关。第六舰队不会因为一份报价就改变立场，这违反我们的原则。」
E: "...This has nothing to do with the price IPC have offered. The Sixth Fleet's position on this matter cannot be changed by price, for it goes against our values."

C: 我们进去吧，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。我准备好面见我的创造者了。
E: Let's go inside, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. I am prepared to face my creator.

C: 这是一张双人合影，画幅中的两人分别是罗伯特和莱斯利•迪恩。
E: A picture of two people together, Robert and Lesley Dean.

C: …他永远只属于我！
E: ...He is mine forever!

C: 梦快醒了。
E: The dream is over.

C: 我该感谢那些用梦境构建出「我」的人。他们耗费热情和生命塑造了「我」，我也理应以爱回报他们，帮助他们释怀。
E: I should be grateful to those people that used the dreamscape to create "me." They gave their passion and their lives to create "me," so it was my duty to repay them and help them move on.

C: 非常感谢您的支持，船长。请稍等——
E: Thank you for your support, captain. Please hold on for a moment...

C: 您以后要是想换涂装，随时跟我说就好。
E: If you want to change the design in the future, just let me know.

C: 有什么可以为您效劳的吗，{F#小姐}{M#先生}？
E: How can I help you, {F#miss}{M#sir}?

C: ——我给你们放一天假！
E: ...I'll give you the day off!

C: 继续工作。
E: Keep working.

C: …啊？！这、这怎么可能？
E: ...Huh!? But how is that possible?

C: 你情商真高，我的朋友。
E: You have a high EQ, my friend.

C: ——结果呢？第二天刚开盘，大艾直接跌破了<unbreak>2800</unbreak>万点…<size=28><unbreak>2800</unbreak>万，那可是史低，史低！</size>
E: ...But guess what? Just after markets opened the next day, the Epsilon Index went below <unbreak>28</unbreak> million points... <size=28><unbreak>28</unbreak> million — the lowest in its recorded history!</size>

C: 哼，这时候就不提你那百战百胜的「运气」了？标准很灵活嘛，砂金总监~
E: Hmph, any reason why you're not bringing up your undefeated "luck" in this case? Your standards sure are flexible, Director Aventurine~

C: 受邀？受谁的邀？
E: Invited? By whom?

C: 暴戾！蛮横！看啊，邪恶的巨人终于藏不住{F#她}{M#他}的獠牙了！
E: Ruthless! Brutal! Look, the evil giant can barely hide {F#her}{M#his} fangs!

C: <size=28>关门，放惊梦剧团！</size>
E: <size=28>Close the door and release the Dreamjolt Troupe!</size>

C: 恕我直言，青雀女士，即便那所谓矲主有意倾吐他的苦衷，我和波提欧兄弟也会就地将他打断。
E: With all due respect, Miss Qingque, even if that so-called master had intended to confide his troubles, Boothill and I would have cut him off right there and then.

C: 对吧对吧！咱就猜你也是这样想的，没等你来就决定了！
E: Right! We knew you'd feel this way, so we went ahead and decided for you!

C: 符太卜，我们在这等你很久了。
E: Diviner Fu, we have been waiting a long time.

C: 有去参加演武仪典的比赛吗？
E: Did you take part in the Wardance competition?

C: {F#姐}{M#哥}，先别忙着嚎了。过世的是莱恩先生，是我最早加入工造司时带着我研究的匠人老师，不是现在的公输师傅。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Sir}, please get hold of yourself. The one who passed away is Master Ryan, a craftsman who used to be my mentor when I first joined the Artisanship Commission. It's not my current teacher, Master Gongshu.

C: 我进去找，你来看着入口。
E: I'll go in and find the manuscript. You keep watch at the door.

C: 你还在惦记着手稿吗？
E: Are you still thinking about the manuscript?

C: 大部分留学生学成后都会离开。因为短生种的经验始终不如积累多年的长生种。工造司的匠人们还隐然有瞧不上短生种的氛围。
E: Most students leave after finishing their studies. It's because short-life species simply cannot rack up the centuries of experience that long-life species can. The artisans at the Artisanship Commission also seem to have a bit of a bias against the short-life species.

C: 我、我怕有一天想起莱恩时，心里再也没有一丝波动。那对我来说就意味着师傅真正、永远离开了我的生活。我该怎么回报他对我付出的时间呢？
E: I—I'm afraid that one day, I'll think of Master Ryan, and there won't be that stirring in my heart anymore. That'll mean to me that my master has truly left my life, forever. How on earth could I ever hope to repay the time he has spent with me?

C: 看来星槎就快要完成了。
E: Looks like the starskiff is almost ready.

C: 我已经没有不安了。
E: No, I'm better now.

C: 杰出的作品！
E: A masterpiece!

C: 伟大的思想！
E: A world-changing idea!

C: 师傅为了教导我、为了点燃我的梦想，付出了心血和时间…他把「时间」这个对短生种最吝啬的宝物倾注在了我身上，现在是我用「时间」回报他了。
E: My master spent so much time and effort on teaching me, on igniting my passions... He gave me all his time, the most precious thing for a short-lived being. So I have to repay him in kind.

C: …我明明就只是一个看管书库的司库。
E: ...Seriously, I'm just a lowly custodian who looks after the repository.

C: 那么，咱们出发吧？
E: Alright. Now, should we hit the road?

C: 离魂阴灵，长眠入冥，长梦觉迷，托体赋形！
E: The wandering soul in a deep slumber, please wake up and possess the body!

C: 铖杰将剩下的手稿递给了高大的金人，期待着金人指出问题所在。就像是一百多年前，师徒二人在工造司中的旧时光一样。
E: Chengjie hands the manuscript over to the enormous aurumaton, waiting to be enlightened. The two are reliving their good old times at the Artisanship Commission.

C: …我不喜欢抱着玩闹的心态和人动手，你还是别指望了。
E: ...I don't fight for fun. Stop getting your hopes up.

C: 对——准确的说，是我个人的修炼计划。
E: Yes — more accurately, my personal training plan.

C: 这也怪我…我就该直接拒绝你的。我从一开始就有种不好的预感。
E: That's on me too... I should've refused him straightaway. I had a bad feeling from the start.

C: 这个数量…确定裂界怪物是最近才涌进来的吗？
E: There are so many of them... Are you sure the fissure only recently opened up?

C: …太久没好好活动筋骨了，今天正好拿这家伙热热身！
E: ...It's been too long since I had a good workout. This will be a nice warm-up!

C: 喂，醒醒！别倒下，快站起来啊！
E: Hey, wake up! On your feet!

C: 真破败…我可不想住在这儿啊。
E: Man, this is area is so run-down... I wouldn't wanna live here.

C: 咱也一样！
E: Yeah, me too!

C: 是啊，不知{NICKNAME}是否听过它「千星锻炉」的名头，云骑军的军器技术十之五六都由它提供。
E: Yeah, I wonder if you've heard of it, {NICKNAME}. It's known as the "Starforge" and is responsible for providing more than half of the Cloud Knights' armaments.

C: 一谈到自己感兴趣的事物，这小大人就露出了孩子气的一面，嘿嘿。
E: Hehe, it's funny how he tries to act all mature, but whenever it comes to something he's interested in, you can really see his childish side.

C: 哈哈哈哈，人家应该也不是故意的啦！
E: Hahaha, I doubt she did it on purpose!

C: 丹恒，{NICKNAME}到底什么时候和将军混得这么熟了？两人说起话来谈笑风生的。
E: Since when did {NICKNAME} and General Jing Yuan become such good buddies, Dan Heng? They seem to be having a great time.

C: 公司的麻烦？该说是天舶司给我们造成的麻烦才对！
E: Trouble caused by the IPC? I'd say it's caused by the Sky-Faring Commission!

C: 这位，就是运输船的负责人，斯科特先生。
E: And this is Mr. Skott, the person in charge of this transport ship.

C: 但眼前这位云骑骁卫代表了罗浮将军的意志，不会被你几句话唬住。
E: But this time, the Cloud Knight lieutenant standing before you represents the will of Luofu's general and won't be intimidated by your words.

C: 斯科特先生，也许在你看来，你是在捍卫自己身为公司雇员的底线，值得敬佩。可是你不明白，你同时也透支着公司在仙舟的形象。
E: I understand that you're trying to stick to the IPC regulations, and that's commendable, Mr. Skott. But what you fail to see is that this argument is tarnishing the IPC's reputation on the Xianzhou.

C: 这样吧，兄弟，咱们也算是老相识了…你今天给我们行个方便，我们日后少不了你的好处。如何？
E: How about this, pal? We go way back... so, if you make things easy for us today, we'll make it worth your while. What do you say?

C: 哪有这么明目张胆行贿的？我要是当着这么多公司兄弟的面，给你行了个方便，这不是等着风纪人员找我麻烦吗！
E: Are you seriously trying to bribe me right in front of everyone? If I show you any favoritism, the disciplinary officers will come down on me!

C: 「惯例」？快算了吧。说的就像罗浮丹鼎司「一直以来的惯例」是什么好东西似的。
E: Practices? Come on, you make it sound like the "long-standing practices" in this Alchemy Commission are something great.

C: 你严肃的样子好靓女。
E: You look so pretty when you're serious.

C: 妾身有幸得到联盟委派，要来清扫这丹鼎司中的积年尘垢。
E: I was lucky enough to be chosen by the Alliance to come in and clean up all the old grime in the Alchemy Commission.

C: 而当时负责仲裁此事，允可放逐令的…正是景元将军本人。
E: And guess who arbitrated that case and handed down the sentence...? None other than General Jing Yuan himself.

C: 什、什么？
E: Wh—What!?

C: 不过嘛，随演武仪典所涌入的人群可是不安和流言最大的传声筒。一着棋错，乱象迭起。
E: But, the influx of people attending the Wardance is like a breeding ground for disorder and rumors. One wrong move, and the Luofu could be in a world of chaos.

C: 挥舞大剑举重若轻，真不能小看了她。
E: She wields her sword with ease. I shouldn't underestimate her.

C: 但老朽见证过太多失败了，我更愿意去相信，相信你的忠诚从未改变。
E: But I've seen enough failures in my time. And I want to believe that your loyalty has never wavered.

C: 炎老这想法着实有趣。传徒授艺，方显合作精神。如此一来，胜者有所斩获，败者也不至于空手而归。只是，他们二人该收谁为徒呢？
E: Well, Elder Huaiyan's idea is quite interesting. Imparting swordplay skills requires teamwork, and both the winner and the loser will learn a valuable lesson regardless of the outcome. The question is, whom should the two of them take as an apprentice?

C: 炎老再稍留片刻
E: Please, stay a little longer, Elder Huaiyan.

C: 不过正手不精，反手乏力，挥剑时各种动作太过潦草…这也是初学者的通病了。无妨，只要习练朱明剑法，一切就会好起来的。
E: However, she lacks strength, and her strikes were a bit unfocused... but don't worry, that's totally normal for beginners. Once she starts practicing Zhuming swordplay, she'll make heaps of progress.

C: 啊，你是…那个…呃，那个…对了！曜青来的粉毛狐狸！
E: Ah, you're... um, you're... That's right! You're the pink-haired fox from the Yaoqing!

C: Adugusu！受死吧，贱畜！
E: Adusa! Die, you lowly beasts!

C: 那岂不是意味着……
E: Wait, that means...

C: 让我看看这个冒牌云骑的腰牌，或许能有些眉目。
E: Let me check this fake Cloud Knight's tag. Maybe it'll give us some clues.

C: 还有更多步离人潜伏在仙舟内。他们的阴谋恐怕不是窃取情报这般小打小闹的事情。
E: There are more borisin hiding on the Xianzhou. I bet their plan is much bigger than just stealing information.

C: 这场建木灾异造成的损害远比预想中低，可以说是不幸中的万幸。但反过来看…也和烬灭军团所到之处荼毒生灵的风格大相径庭。
E: The damage caused by the Ambrosial Arbor crisis was far less severe than expected, which is good news for us. However... it was quite different from the Ruin Legion's usual style of destroying life wherever they go.

C: 谈谈艾利欧的预言
E: Talk about Elio's prophecy.

C: 实在抱歉，{NICKNAME}。幽囚狱中的笔录不会占用你们太长时间。
E: I'm really sorry about all this, {NICKNAME}, but the testimony in the Shackling Prison won't take up much of your time.

C: 是椒丘冒犯了…请大人继续。
E: I apologize for any offense caused... Please continue, your honor.

C: 明白了。
E: I understand.

C: 怎么是你？
E: It's you!?

C: 真的吗，丹恒？
E: Is that true, Dan Heng?

C: 赛博幽灵！
E: A cyber specter!

C: 我是貊泽，我的{RUBY_B#椒丘}朋友{RUBY_E#}落在了{RUBY_B#呼雷}头狼{RUBY_E#}的手里。我本打算离开这里尽快报信，但现在看起来……
E: I'm Moze. {RUBY_B#Jiaoqiu}My friend{RUBY_E#} fell into the clutches of {RUBY_B#Hoolay}that wolf{RUBY_E#}. I was planning to escape and report back as quickly as possible, but now it seems...

C: 貊泽先生，我们会尽可能保证你朋友的生命安全。
E: Thank you for your help, Mr. Moze. We'll do our best to ensure your friend's safety.

C: 我是曜青将军的卫士，不是他的。我见过那头巨狼战斗，我有足够的判断力。要救人，等于送死。
E: Look, I'm the Yaoqing General's guard, not his. I've seen how that giant wolf fights, and there is no way. Trying to save my friend will only get us killed.

C: 将军大人熟悉的伪装潜入手法…
E: An infiltration technique the general is familiar with...

C: 那么令师有没有告诉你…她为了自己一厢情愿的善念，借探视的便利，为彼时才刚刚蜕生完毕的丹恒施展了能回忆前生知识的医术？
E: But did your mentor tell you... her "good intentions" led her to perform certain healing arts on Dan Heng, who had just finished his hatching rebirth, so that he would regain the memories of his past life?

C: 她以为龙尊恢复前世神智，便能重续持明族守望建木的职责，能让蠢蠢欲动的势力蛰伏，也能让族中一切纷争平息重回正轨。
E: She believed that restoring the High Elder's knowledge of his past life would allow the Vidyadhara to resume their duty as the guardians of the Ambrosial Arbor, quelling the strife within their clan and bringing everything back on the right path.

C: 何以见得？
E: How can you tell?

C: 事儿真多。
E: Can't you just stop asking?

C: 我被步离人挟持来到了这儿。请务必把消息报上去。
E: I was brought here by the borisin. Please make sure to report this news.

C: 令人作呕的骨裂声在小院中响起。没有惨叫，你甚至没能听到挣扎的声音。
E: A sickening crack of bones echoed through the small courtyard. There was no scream, not even the sound of a struggle.

C: 你要向我证明…这里所有人的性命统统握在你手里，对吧，呼雷？！
E: You want to prove to me that... you hold everyone's lives in your hands, right, Hoolay!?

C: 别拿神话来糊弄我！
E: I'm not buying your absurd myth!

C: 这可太奇怪了，演武仪典之前生产的星槎都应该做好规划了啊。
E: This is just weird. I thought all the pending starskiffs from before the Wardance had been scheduled already.

C: 曾经身为战奴的你，应该很熟悉我们这些都蓝子裔……
E: You were our war slave, so you should know us descendants of Duran...

C: 可怜的小三月，被机器的评分玩弄于股掌之间。别看了，快走吧！
E: Poor little March, being bullied by a mechanical scoring system... Don't pay them any mind, let's go!

C: 两位请先沿着这条路上去，选手大厅就在前方。
E: Please follow this path. The contestant hall is just up ahead.

C: 谢谢你，夕葵姐姐。
E: Thank you, Miss Xikui.

C: 你见过我挥动我那把{RUBY_B#大剑}「老铁」{RUBY_E#}的样子吧？说说看，你观察到什么了？
E: You've seen me wield {RUBY_B#greatsword}Old Mettle{RUBY_E#} before, haven't you? Tell me, what did you observe from that?

C: 狼首人身的怪物仰面朝天，身上布满了悚人的刀伤。
E: The wolf-head monster was facing the sky, its body covered in terrifying knife wounds.

C: 受了那样一击，竟然还活着…
E: The fact that you still draw breath after an attack like that...

C: 难道就没有人质疑过你的血统吗？还是因为你显赫的功绩让所有人暂时闭上了嘴？
E: Has no one ever questioned that lineage of yours? Or could it be that your grand achievements were enough to convince everyone to keep their lips sealed?

C: 演武仪典「猎狼守擂」 开始
E: The Wardance "Wolfhunt Showdown" starts now!

C: 这么说来，在你眼中，我已经是一头毫无秘密可言、随时待死的猎物了？
E: What you're saying is, in your eyes, I am no more than prey that has exhausted all of its secrets and is simply awaiting its death?

C: 久候你多时了，呼雷！
E: I've been waiting a long time for this, Hoolay!

C: 呼雷…真的是被咱们打败的吗？我怎么觉得，在战斗中他不知为何突然落了下风……
E: Was it... really us who defeated Hoolay? Why do I feel like he suddenly started to flag during our battle?

C: …但我愿意接受它。
E: ...But, I accept it.

C: 你义无反顾地投身于新主人的军队，你以为自己得到了自由、尊重和认可。
E: You ran into the arms of your new masters' army without hesitation. You thought that you had found freedom, respect, and recognition.

C: 什…什么？！我们脑袋上可没有耳朵！
E: Wh—What!? We clearly don't have wolf ears!

C: 灵砂忝任司鼎一职，丹鼎司里百废待兴，直到今天才能与您相谈，长老见谅。
E: As the newly appointed Cauldron Master, there's been much to take care of within the Alchemy Commission. It's only now that I've had the chance to speak with you. Please forgive the delay, Elder.

C: 很意外吗？两位受神策府的指派，作为使者前来，不就是想听我俯首自白吗？
E: Are you surprised? After all, both of you were sent here by the Seat of Divine Foresight as messengers, to hear my confession, weren't you?

C: 我谢谢你哦！
E: Thanks a lot for that!

C: 戎韬将军是念叨我们几人，还是「念叨」我们几人的命数走向啊？
E: Was the Seer Strategist thinking of us, or thinking of the fates we're destined for?

C: 算了，没什么。
E: Never mind. It's nothing.

C: 我来帮你。
E: Let me help.

C: 朕请求「家族」封存了自己过去的记忆，因为那些记忆总令朕恐惧。
E: I asked The Family to seal my past memories, for they brought me nothing but fear.

C: 是是是…朕知道她是个暴君，朕知道她杀了很多人。
E: Yes yes yes... I know she was a tyrant, and many have died by her hand.

C: 好的～如果遇到什么烦心事，记得随时来找朕！为臣民排忧解难，是最幸福的事～
E: Sure! If you encounter any troubles, remember to come to me anytime! It gives me untold happiness to dispel any troubles for my subjects!

C: 你是来找茬的？
E: Are you looking for trouble?

C: 没有那个必要，艾丽。
E: That won't be necessary, Alley.

C: 我同意，{F#女士}{M#先生}。
E: I agree, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}.

C: 那些装置能够暂时维持忆泡的活性。只要关上它们，查德威克博士就能安静地睡去。
E: Those devices are used to maintain the vitality of the Memory Bubble temporarily. By turning them off, Dr. Chadwick will be able to enter a peaceful slumber.

C: 黑塔女士，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}——我们靠近些吧。
E: Madam Herta, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}, let's get closer.

C: 黑塔…女士……
E: Madam... Herta...

C: …了不起，太了不起了。上万条公式和方程此刻正在我脑海里闪现…我从没想过还有这种剖析问题的方式。
E: ...Remarkable, truly remarkable. Tens of thousands of formulas and equations are flashing through my mind right now... I never imagined there could be such a way to analyze the problem.

C: 很遗憾，我不能告诉你这颗星球的具体坐标——上面的命令。这是为了防止你们…唔…半途而废，希望你能理解，查。
E: Forgive me, but I cannot tell you the exact coordinates of this planet — orders from up top. It's to prevent you all from... err, abandoning the task beforehand. I hope you'll understand, Chad.

C: 螺丝先生，请告诉我…俱乐部的各位是怎么看待我的？
E: Mr. Screwllum, please tell me... How do the members of the Society view me?

C: …只可惜，这片梦境只铭记了他们的作品，而他们的名字却被慢慢遗忘。
E: ...Alas, it's a shame that this Dreamscape only has their works engraved, but left their names long forgotten.

C: 「该工程将由隐夜鸫家系全权负责。根据洽谈结果，家主格拉克斯表示没有加入『家族』的意向，但愿意支持家族提出的梦境开发计划……」
E: "The Nightingale Family is fully responsible for this project. According to negotiations, their head, Glaux, has expressed no intention to join The Family, but is willing to support the Dreamscape development plan that The Family has suggested..."

C: 但总有一天，这里将会成为一片真正的美梦——
E: But one day, this place will become a real Dreamjoy...

C: 我没事，是男人就得在关键时刻顶上来。
E: I'm fine, we have to step up at crucial moments.

C: …我都想起来了。
E: ...I remember now.

C: 哼哼，吓傻了？快来试试我新做的「冯恩四世」，全面改进升级——就差你来测试了！
E: Heh-heh, are you shocked? Come try my new Vaughn IV, fully improved and upgraded — you're the only one who hasn't tried it!

C: 不过…我的恩师费歇尔先生曾赠给我一句话，希望它也能为你提供几分宽慰。
E: But... my mentor Mr. Fischer once told me this. I hope it can bring you some sort of comfort.

C: …有种不详的预感。你想干嘛？
E: ...Something doesn't feel right. What are you thinking?

C: 我很想答应您——但很遗憾，我的立场要求我的行为必须谨慎。那些影响家系稳定的部分或许无法公开，但我保证，梦境会记住这些筑梦师的名字。
E: I'd really like to say yes, but alas, my political stance requires that I be prudent about my actions. I may not be able to publicize the parts that affect The Family's stability, but I promise that the Dreamscape will remember the names of those Dreamweavers.

C: 很可惜，即使身处梦境，匹诺康尼也无法满足所有人的心愿。
E: A pity that, even in the Dreamscape, Penacony is unable to fulfill everyone's wishes.

C: 没错，来自圣城之外、觊觎我们财富的家伙——可不能对他们手软。
E: That's right, for these scoundrels from outside the holy city who covet our wealth, their punishment must be swift and just.

C: 少吃一个苹果。对，就苹果吧，我爱吃苹果。「每天一苹果，医生远离我」。
E: ...One fewer bite of an apple, for example. I like apples. "An apple a day keeps the doctor away."

C: 好消息是，食物还没有受到管控。在<color=#dbc291ff>云石市集</color>随便就能买到足够这些人吃一周的粮食。
E: The good news is, food isn't strictly regulated. You can easily get enough food to feed these people for a week at the <color=#dbc291ff>Marmoreal Market</color>.

C: 这一箱价钱也不贵，<unbreak>2000</unbreak>利衡币。想要的话就给钱。
E: It's not expensive either, only <unbreak>2,000</unbreak> Balance Coins. Cough up the coin if you want it.

C: 「一箱」食物？那只好把我的备餐拿出来秀一秀了……
E: A "crate" of food? That means I'll just have to flaunt my reserve stock then...

C: （这家店的质量相当高，但是价钱也很贵。如果我想给外邦人吃顿好的，它会是不错的选择。）
E: (This shop's quality is top-notch, and its price reflects that. If I want to give the outlanders something sumptuous, this would be a fine choice.)

C: 女孩抓起篮子里最大最新鲜的苹果，笑着塞到你的怀里。
E: The girl grabs the biggest and freshest apple in the basket and shoves it into your hands with a grin.

C: 在那之前，介意我补充几句吗？
E: Before that, may I add a few words?

C: 异邦的英雄，请不要假定事实。这个话题就先过去，控方代表可以继续发言。
E: Outlander hero, please do not make any assumptions. We shall pass on this subject for now. Will the prosecution representative continue his argument.

C: 苏克提瑞斯的罪行不是救人，而是偷窃。他本可以用更合法的手段提供帮助，比如捐出自己的财产……
E: The crime of Soctires is not saving others, but theft. He could have used legal methods to offer aid, such as donating his own property...

C: 真是可惜，拜拜。
E: What a shame. Bye bye!

C: 旅游…我只在史书里听过这个词。这黑潮和疯狂眷属乱跑的年代没有旅游，只有以身探险的冒险者和商队。
E: Travel... I have only encountered that word in historical texts. There is no travel in this era, with the black tide and Titankin running rampant. We have only adventurers and merchants who roam the land at the risk of their own lives.

C: 阿卡迪亚…这还真是个值得怀念的名字。
E: Arcadia... Now that is a name that stirs memories.

C: 这里是纷争浇灌出的河口，这河用了敌人流淌的鲜血，而不是天上来的雨点，去湿润无休止的战场。
E: This is the river mouth irrigated by strife. It is not raindrops that flow from this river, but the blood of enemies that dampens the field of unceasing wars.

C: 呵呵，人们常说悬锋城是个粗野的地方，但看来并非如此——他们不仅为战俘带来了一位朋友，这位朋友还是个美丽的姑娘！
E: Hehe. They all say that Castrum Kremnos is a rough and boorish land, but I see that is not the case... Not only did they bring a friend for us prisoners of war, this friend happens to be a beautiful young girl!

C: 伙伴，一起继续探索往世吧，雕像小姐和伊阿宋还等着我们呢。
E: Partner, let's keep exploring the past! The statue lady and Iason are still waiting for us!

C: 专门骂泰坦的脏话？太酷了，教教我！
E: A specific slur against Titans? That's so cool! Teach me!

C: 不，我已放下了我的弓箭，现在我是奥赫玛城中一位普通的妇人了。
E: No, I hung up my bow long ago. I am now an ordinary woman of Okhema.

C: 姑娘，这个城中我在乎的只有你一人，其他人都无所谓…你愿意跟我走吗？
E: Girl, you are the only person that I care about in this entire city. No one else matters... Will you go with me?

C: 泰坦眷属口中吐出破碎的词语，夹杂着残存不多的生气。
E: The Titankin can only muster fractions of words, carried on the little life force she has left.

C: 你耍我！
E: You were pulling my leg!

C: 所以你们到底有没有见过她？
E: Have you even seen her before?

C: 可能另有隐情吧…
E: There may be another hidden reason...

C: 去做个工匠。
E: Go be a craftsman.

C: 故事里说翁法罗斯有过六个月亮，那他们晚上岂不是不用点灯？
E: The story says Amphoreus had six moons. Guess they didn't need to turn on the lights at night, huh?

C: 前所未有的回忆。
E: An unprecedented memory.

C: 是嘛，这么美好的回忆，都令我有些羡慕了呢。
E: Is that so? Such wonderful memories... I'm actually getting a bit envious.

C: 那遮天蔽日的巨木、停于半空的悬锋、流淌金血的英雄浴池…终有一日，此番盛景将重现宇宙；可惜，即便你我寿数绵长，恐怕也只能留待后人瞻仰了。
E: That sky-shrouding giant tree, the suspended peak of Kremnos, the hero's bath flowing with golden blood... One day, this splendid vision shall reappear in the universe. But, though our lifespans be long, I fear it shall be left for later generations to behold.

C: 你知道：在匹诺康尼，没有什么是严肃的。即便英雄的血泪史，也不过是茶余饭后的谈资。
E: As you know, nothing is taken seriously in Penacony. Even heroes' tales of blood and tears are just casual gossip over dinner.

C: （先听到这里）
E: (Stop listening for now)

C: 《如我所书》的事就包在我们身上吧。等有了消息，我会再联络你的。
E: Leave As I've Written to us. I'll contact you again when we have news.

C: 少女停顿了一下，眨了眨眼。
E: The girl paused for a moment, blinking her eyes.

C: 让封闭的世界拥抱了群星。
E: Let the closed world embrace the stars.

C: 「开拓」向来如此。探索、了解、建立、连结；但旅程总有下一站。当启程的笛声响起，列车就会离去，带着所有的回忆。
E: Such is the way of the Trailblaze. Explore, understand, build, and connect. But there's always a next stop on this journey. When the whistle of departure sounds, the Express will leave, carrying all memories with it.

C: 遇到了什么困难？
E: Is there any trouble?

C: 老师，这几本讲银河历史的教科书，相关大事年表与笔记我已经全部记牢，请问是否需要额外笔试？
E: {M#Mister}{F#Miss}, I have memorized all these textbooks about the cosmos's history, the chronology of relevant events, and notes. Do I need an additional written examination?

C: 之前我说话的语气是从古恩先生提供的资料中汇总生成，经过部分空间站人员的小规模语言训练，他们好像觉得问题不大？
E: The tone of my speech is generated from the data provided by Mr. Gunn. Some of the staff here have trained my natural language processing capabilities using small-scale samples of their speech. They don't seem to have a problem with the way I speak.

C: 怎么会有这么下头的外星生物啊，看完我真的会谢，丑到我想要用脚指头抠出整座空间站了！
E: Yikes, it's a SIN that such an ugly alien creature exists! It's soooo ugly that I had to pop my eyes out and rinse them with holy water!

C: 那个…一会儿要是遇到什么问题，麻烦你远程指导指导我吧！拜托了！
E: Um... If I have any issues later, can you help me remotely? Please?

C: …没装东西就不能启动吗？感觉哪里不对。
E: ...They can't run unless they're carrying something? That doesn't sound right.

C: 更新？可这就是最新版了呀！
E: Not updated? But this is the latest version!

C: 老实说我也很想知道后续是什么…所以我找到了投稿人。
E: Honestly, I also wanted to know what happens next... so I found the person who submitted it.

C: 现在流行哪款隐形眼镜？
E: Which type of contact lenses is in fashion these days?

C: 现在流行哪款隐形眼镜？
E: Which type of contact lenses is in fashion these days?

C: 这样吧，拜托你帮我把符合这种色系的东西拍下来，然后带给我瞅瞅，让我也长长眼！
E: In that case, please help me take pictures of items in these colors and bring the photos to me, so I can learn about them as well!

C: 哎，你说得对。不过我现在感觉…一时半会儿还有点消化不了。
E: You're right. But I feel... I can't digest all this information at once.

C: 那我就直说了。你也知道，人活到我这个程度，简单的物质已经很难刺激神经，生活的空虚必须依靠其它方式填满。
E: Well, then I'll just get to the point. As you know, when you're well-off to a certain degree, simple material possessions aren't as stimulating anymore. I need to fill the void in my life by other means.

C: 年轻人，请正面回答我，你的拍照技术如何？
E: {F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, please answer me honestly, how are your photography skills?

C: 总体来说还算过得去，就这样吧。好了，年轻人——赶紧带上这张照片，去帮我找朋友吧。
E: This one is fine. Alright, {M#young man}{F#young lady}, take these pictures with you and help me make friends.

C: 不错，不错…你抓住了精髓。我的目的就是要让人们看到，华劳斯•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀并非不谙世事的阔少爷——相反，我很有亲和力，很受孩子们欢迎。
E: Good... This is a great photo. My purpose is to show people that I am not just some ignorant rich man. On the contrary, I am very friendly and popular with children.

C: 莱姆士汀…哦，是那个有名的贵族世家？我好像隐约听说过那位公子哥的事迹。
E: Limestein... Oh, that famous noble family? I think I've heard quite a bit about his deeds.

C: 我已经没心思想其他事了。如果你知道任何有关这位「垃圾之王」的事，请告诉我吧。
E: Now I can't focus on anything else. If you know anything about this "Garbage King," please let me know.

C: 下次任务再见啦，荣誉队员——鼹鼠党，解散！
E: I'll see you at our next mission, honorary member. The Moles, dismiss!

C: 我的纸和笔呢…啊，这儿呢，找到了——行了，等你准备好了我们就开始……
E: Where's my paper and pen... ah, here, found it — okay, we can start when you're ready...

C: 哎，现在的年轻人，对老一辈真是一点都不尊重…不过话说回来，要是没有你提供的思路，我这封信怕是等到明年也下不去笔。
E: *sigh* Young people nowadays really have no respect for the elders at all... But then again, without the ideas you mentioned, I'm afraid I won't be able to write this letter until next year.

C: {NICKNAME}，年轻人！终于等到你了，我还怕你以后都不会来禁区了……
E: {NICKNAME}! I've been waiting for you, youngster. I was afraid that you might never come to the restricted zone...

C: 那我推荐您买上一束「球牡丹」——这种花一年只会盛开一次，每次开花的时间都不超过一个月。
E: Then I recommend the Ball Peonies — they only bloom once a year, and each bloom lasts for less than a month.

C: 况且，你刚刚打断了我的思路。往小了说，这是断送了又一个伟大理论的诞生，往大了说，你就是断送了时空科学的未来啊！难道你不该赎罪吗？
E: Besides, it was you who interrupted my train of thought, potentially ruining the birth of a groundbreaking scientific theory or even jeopardizing the very future of space science itself! Don't you think it's only fair that you make amends by helping me now?

C: 啥是质数啊？
E: What are prime numbers?

C: 哦…是这事儿啊，怎么样？论文成功递交上去了吗？
E: Oh yes... that's right. And what of it? Has the paper been submitted yet?

C: 同舟共济？
E: You mean we're in the same boat together?

C: 当然，也请您不要气馁，继续加强学习。到那时再来挑战吧。
E: Of course, you shouldn't be discouraged! Keep working on your studies, and then come back to try again.

C: 不过这样也好，从今天开始，我们可就算是同病相怜了，我——一个科学家，这些年吞下了多少委屈，你也能感同身受了吧？
E: But that's alright. Misery loves company. As a scientist, I've had to swallow many a bitter pill over the years. I'm guessing you're the same?

C: 请解释一下你的解题思路…
E: Please explain how you arrived at your solution...

C: 不行，没时间解释了！快，你赶紧回去，把正确答案告诉那个出题的家伙！
E: No, there's no time to explain! Hurry, go back and tell that examiner the correct answer to the question!

C: 这家伙…出的题确实有点水平！虽然还是属于脑筋急转弯的范畴…不过这两道题，我一时还真想不出答案。
E: This guy! Now that's a thorny question! It's a real mind-bender... I can't think up answers for these two questions yet.

C: 您今天特地前来，是有什么事务需要教育部协助吗？
E: For what purpose have you come today? What task requires the support of the Ministry of Education?

C: 您是不是漏读了题面的信息？这嘈杂的环境确实不适合深度思考。我相信以您的聪明才智，只要有足够的时间，一定能给出正确答案……
E: Did you miss all the info in the question? It really is too noisy in here for cognitive testing. I'm sure with your wits, it's only a matter of time before you come up with the right answer...

C: 那我当然不能让您失望。正好，我这边准备了一些进阶的测验题目，您要不要试试？
E: Then I absolutely cannot let you down. I just so happen to have some advanced quiz questions right here with me. Would you like to give them a try?

C: 第二十九天。
E: Day twenty-nine.

C: 不过她的使用习惯…对不起啦，这可是用户的隐私。就算是对{NICKNAME}也不能说哦~
E: But I'm sorry, as for her heater usage and habits, that's personal info. Even if you were the one asking, {NICKNAME}...

C: 我最近在想，自己遇到的瓶颈，是不是因为，歌剧的发声法本身对我而言是有局限性的……
E: Recently, I've been wondering whether or not this bottleneck I seem to have reached is due to being limited by my singing style...

C: 简单来说，就是让每个人都能暂时逃离家庭和责任的束缚，自由自在地发展自己的兴趣爱好、或者只是单纯地休息一下……
E: In short, we can get everyone to temporarily escape from the bindings of family and duty, to freely develop their hobbies and preferences, or simply to rest...

C: 你不会是想趁机推销吧？
E: Are you trying to sell me something?

C: 我要「歌德经典手冲咖啡」！
E: I want a Goethe Classic Hand-Made Coffee.

C: 嚯嚯，我知道了……
E: Hahaha, I see...

C: 你将漂流瓶扔了回去，谁爱帮忙谁帮。
E: You throw the drift bottle back, someone else can deal with that.

C: 等等！不要扔！
E: Stop! Don't throw that!

C: 什么？！你要抓我作甚！
E: What!? Why do you want to catch me!?

C: 你拿起书本，你的手稍微颤动了一下——因为它远比你想象中更重。你知道精装本通常会有硬纸板、织物，甚至是小牛皮革等材料，但是它还是*太重了*。
E: You pick up the book, and your hand trembles slightly — it is far heavier than you imagined. Though you understand hardcover book bindings can come in cardboard, fabric, or even leather, this is still TOO heavy for any of them.

C: *有什么掉进海里的声音*
E: *Something splashes into the ocean*

C: 杜老板为你亲自斟茶，倒了满满一杯茶。
E: Boss Du personally pours a cup of tea for you.

C: 怎么样，这「忘情茶」口感如何？可还有哪些地方需要改进？
E: How does this Unsen-tea-mental Tea taste? Is there any room for improvement?
*burp*

C: 用于指引雕像巡逻、站岗的徽记，如今已失去效力。
E: Once used to guide statue patrols and guard posts, this emblem is now defunct.

C: 据说很多人小时候都有被父母高高举过头顶的惬意体验。如果那些家庭拥有像大地兽这样的坐骑，那孩子们应该会开心到爆吧。
E: It's said that many in their childhoods have experienced the exhilaration of being lifted high above their heads by their parents. If those families had a steed like the dromas, those children would've been bursting with excitement.

C: 休息区的长桌上散落着各式各样的卷轴，你抽出最底下的一份细看起来——是张欠条，内容是「借走圣水一瓶，日后十倍奉还。」落款却是几十年前的日期，看来法吉娜的信徒记性有点差。
E: Various scrolls are strewn across the rest area's long table. You pull out one from the bottom of the pile and scrutinize it — it is a debt receipt that reads: "Borrowed a vial of sacred water, will repay tenfold in the future." It's dated dozens of years ago, though. You guess that Phagousa's disciples don't have the best memory.

C: 改天骗…循循善诱，让丹恒一起来试试。
E: Next time, I'll trick... persuade Dan Heng into trying it out with me.

C: 试温池
E: Test Bath

C: 这实在是个好位置，整场宴会一览无余。一种成为焦点的冲动怂恿着你。
E: This is indeed a good spot to oversee the entire banquet. An impulse to become the center of attention prods at you.

C: 倾听水漫琴
E: Listen to the water lyre

C: 破碎的雕塑恢复如初，金属框架流畅优雅，像是某种古老机械的一部分。这种设计让你联想到「黎明机器」，或许这就是建造者的用意？
E: The broken sculpture is now as good as new, with its smooth metal frame seeming like a part of some ancient elegant machine. It's a design that reminds you of the Dawn Device — perhaps that was the intention of its creator?

C: 他错过了最后的机会，塞纳托斯的迷魇罩住了他，使他丧失理智。
E: Having missed his last chance, the nightmares of Thanatos enveloped him and drove away his sanity.

C: 溺亡者沉浮的水面，仍将漫天星斗倒映。
E: And the drowned still drift, their faces mirrored in the stars above.

C: …谢谢你。
E: ...Thank you.

C: 想要更具幻想色彩的世界，很好。你背负着巨剑与两瓶石榴汁，只身来到了决战平台，挡在你身前的是那位熟悉的盗火行者。
E: You want a more fantastical world. Great choice. You shoulder a giant sword and carry two bottles of pomegranate juices as you approach the final battle platform alone. Standing in your way is the familiar Flame Reaver.

C: …《禁忌之恋：树与蝶》？气煞我了，哪个渎神的混账放的？
E: ...Forbidden Love: The Tree and the Butterfly? Damnations, which blasphemous fool put this here?

C: 看不起谁也不能看不起泰坦…你可以大方问出一些有重量的问题。
E: One can't look down on Titans... So go ahead and ask the heavy questions.

C: 呼呼。你发现我啦！没错，我正在这里打一份兼职零工——作为火盆中的一团火苗。
E: Phew. You caught me! Yep, I'm working a part-time gig here — just a little flame in the fire pit.

C: 答错了吼！大地兽可以轻易将石块踩碎，本狮不敢咬它们吼！
E: Wrong answer! The dromas crushes rocks with ease, and I wouldn't dare bite one!

C: 你拍了拍它的外壳，暗淡的纹路便重新焕发出光芒。
E: You pat its shell, and dim patterns begin to glow once more.

C: 找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I have gathered all the nymphs here.

C: o((-'ω´• )o「不信，你也和豹豹一样说说叠词词看看~」)∋
E: o((-'ω´• )o "Don't bewieve me? Twwy it yourswelf~" )∋

C: 你注意到底座一侧似乎有可以触碰的机关。
E: You notice that there seems to be an interactive mechanism on the side of the base.

C: 「开拓」的时间到了！
E: It's time for "trailblazing"!

C: 再创世？啊，那个预言！怪不得刚刚有怪物在，原来是变天了啊。我还让一个奥赫玛人在神驹里面躲了躲呢。
E: Era Nova? Oh, that prophecy! No wonder the monsters were acting up, I guess we're in for a ride. I even let an Okheman hide inside the divine foal for a bit.

C: 据说葡萄蜜酿的风味取决于葡萄的产地与品种。譬如斯缇科西亚的红葡萄蜜酿口感颇为干涩醇厚，而麦迪特瑞恩的白葡萄蜜酿则更加清爽酸甜。
E: They say the taste of grape honey brew depends on the origin and variety of the grapes. Styxia's red grapes brew up robust and dry, while Mediterrana's whites lean crisp, tangy, and refreshingly light.

C: 至于你…白厄，你给了我白卷。
E: And you, Phainon... You handed me a blank sheet.

C: 宁战死，毋荣归。吾儿迈德漠斯，你不肯战死，执意回归现世，也配自称悬锋人么？
E: Valorous death before glorious return. My son, you refused to fall in combat and insisted on returning to the mortal world. Do you still dare call yourself a Kremnoan?

C: 你还有颜面安坐于被你亲手终结之伟大王朝的王座上么？你不配。
E: Think you still have the right to sit upon the throne of the great kingdom that you destroyed? I don't think so.

C: 欸不对，不是来抓我的安保虫……
E: Wait, this is not the security nymphs here to catch me...

C: 姬子让他们去别的车厢了，这里有我们就足够啦。
E: Himeko had them go to a different coach. We can take care of what's going on here.

C: 那当然不一样啦，我没有肉体，因此算不上偷渡。
E: There's a big difference, of course. I don't have a material body, so it doesn't count as smuggling.

C: 对不起…
E: Sorry...

C: 关于浮黎和流光忆庭…
E: About Fuli and the Garden of Recollection...

C: 演习什么时候开始？
E: When are we starting drills?

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: 总有机会的。
E: I hope you get that chance.

C: 你口齿好像变清楚了。
E: Your articulation sounds a lot better.

C: 是狗在说话！
E: You're... talking!

C: （救命呀！）
E: (Help!)

C: （收到！线索加一！）
E: (Got it! One more clue!)

C: （还是老规矩……）
E: (Same old rules...)

C: 佩佩号！出击！
E: Peppy! Attack!

C: 就是！
E: Yeah!

C: （这是我的工牌，我要求打开自动门！）
E: (This is my name card. I demand you open the door!)

C: 太对了，就是这样。
E: Exactly, that's exactly it!

C: 不会吧！你怎么这么肯定呀！
E: No way! And how are you so sure about that?

C: 金色的美梦开始躁动了？
E: Has the golden dream started to stir?

C: 我在试着背下来。
E: I'm trying to memorize the book.

C: 我正打算做武器测试呢，说来上次让你大破建木缠结的「匣里流光」你可还记得？
E: I'm planning to do a weapon test. Do you remember the Luminflux Pyxis that helped you destroy the Ambrosial Arbor coil last time?

C: 很好，比我那些不成器的弟子们能干多了。
E: Well done. You're much more capable than my incompetent disciples.

C: 行，那等你有空再来。
E: That's fine. Come back when you have time.

C: 要是我那些蠢货徒弟能有你这样的干劲儿就好了。
E: If only my blockheaded apprentices have your drive.

C: 了解了，如果你还想接着占算，我会在授事厅等着你。
E: Understood. If you want to run some more divinations again, I'll be in the Conclave Hall.

C: 那是一种融合了竞速与对抗的运动比赛，运动员佩戴着护甲与武器在复杂的立体赛道上争夺比分，还有自己的性命。
E: It's a sport that combines racing with combat. Players wear body armor and use weapons to fight for points — and their lives — on this complicated 3D track.

C: 是是，您批评的是…不过既然是例行占算，校准阵法，算算球赛也无伤大雅嘛。
E: Yeah, what you're criticizing is... It's just routine divination that helps calibrate the matrix. We're not harming anyone.

C: 今日的检查到此为止了。
E: Today's inspection is over.

C: 可恶。
E: Damnation!

C: 我哪也去不了，就在这里等你的好消息了。
E: I'm not going anywhere. I'll wait here for your good news.

C: 您放心，我已经给秘密结社的其他成员通过气了。我们「枘凿六合•Remake」即将登录竞锋舰平台，成为跨平台开发游戏！保证是全新的版本，全新的体验。
E: Fret not. I've discussed this with the other members of the Hex Club. Our "Hexanexus: Remake" will soon be accessible on the Skysplitter platform as a cross-platform game! It's set to be a completely revamped version, promising gamers an entirely fresh experience.

C: 总之，欢迎回来。试试其他难度吗？
E: In any case, welcome back. Care to try other difficulties?

C: 没问题，上吧。
E: No problem. Go.

C: …你没坏？
E: ...You're not broken?

C: 你是不是写错字了？
E: Did you get a word wrong?

C: …你的占卜结果就是这样了，对运势不满意的话，还有重来的机会哦？
E: ...That's it for your divination result. If you're not happy with your fortune, would you like another chance?

C: 交互行为已确认，即将播放预置语音……
E: Interaction confirmed. Pre-set voice lines are playing...

C: 风儿顺着金丝捎来了你的消息。贵客，可有什么进展吗？
E: The winds riding on golden threads bring tidings of your situation. Esteemed guest, has there been any progress?

C: 当茧褪去时，一句金色文字组成的话在空中转瞬即逝：「蝴蝶知道一切」。
E: As the cocoon falls away, a phrase in shimmering golden letters briefly appears in the air before fading: "Butterflies know everything."

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: 这可不是寻常账本！里边夹着一张旧地契，签署时间是泰坦纷争前更早的年岁，当时奥赫玛还是一片野地呢。
E: This is no simple accounting book! There is an old land deed stashed in there that was signed even before the war of the Titans, back when Okhema was no more than wilderness.

C: 我俩确实很像，你把我认成它也情有可原。
E: We do indeed look similar. I can understand how you could mistake us...

C: 当年我是个游荡荒野的孤魂野鬼，是元老们收留了我。他们看我手脚麻利，便让我担负起了「搬运工」的职责。
E: Back then, I was a lonely shade that roamed the wilderness. It was the elders that took me in. Seeing that I was fast of foot and deft with my hands, they allowed me to take on the duty of "porter."

C: 扎格列斯还说过什么？
E: What else did Zagreus say?

C: 我于是变成一只钢爪兽，在地里倒腾了无数个日夜，终于吃掉了那颗果实。说实话，味道一般。
E: So I turned into a Steelclaw Beast and dug into the earth for countless days, my journey ending with the fruit in my belly. Honestly, it didn't taste like much.

C: 来点日常妙招？
E: Got any sayings for life hacks?

C: 放开！放开！
E: Let go! Let go!

C: 嗯？你啥意思，巴特鲁斯不就是巴特鲁斯吗？
E: What do you mean, my true identity? I'm Bartholos!

C: 吾是巴特鲁斯大人的书袋，是它在历史长河中吞下的无用知识，是面目可憎的一块胃结石。换言之——
E: I am Lord Bartholos' book collection, the pointless knowledge it accumulated through ages, a grotesque gallstone in its belly. That is to say—

C: 您好，我是巴特鲁斯的一个分身，我现在有些悲伤。
E: Hello there, I'm a Bartholos projection, and I'm feeling quite melancholic.

C: 真巴特鲁斯在哪？
E: Where's the real Bartholos?

C: 咱知道错了！求求您，看在老巴特鲁斯的薄面上，大人有大量，放过咱吧！
E: I admit my mistake! Please, for old Bartholos' sake, show mercy and spare me!

C: 结束宝箱暴政！
E: Down with chest tyranny!

C: 怎么样，是不是感觉它背后似乎有一些…神神秘秘的东西？比如，屠龙者终将成为恶龙，传火者终将成为灰烬……
E: Well? Feels like there's something... enigmatic behind it, right? For example... The dragonslayer inevitably becomes the evil dragon, and the torchbearer inevitably becomes ashes...

C: 「拾起一根羽毛，就能想象出鸟的声音；所以一根羽毛就是一只唱歌的鸟。」
E: "Pick up a feather, and you can imagine a bird's song. Therefore, a single feather is a singing bird."

C: 我来交付雅努斯的神谕。
E: I've come to deliver Janus's prophecy.

C: 迷津隆隆作响……
E: The Maze groans deeply...

C: 准备好看到答案了吗？
E: Are you ready to see the answer?

C: …对同一个问题的推演，三次便是极限，无论如何，我们已经尽力了。
E: Three attempts are the limit for a single question. No matter what, we've done our best.

C: 我不是欧洛尼斯祭司，没法控制它具体回到哪一个委托的状态。若是腻了，不妨再来找我换一个——这方法是我偷偷跟岁月祭司学来的，你可别往外说啊。
E: I am no priest of Oronyx, so I can't precisely control which state of a request we return to. If you tire of it, feel free to come back and ask me to change it. This trick? I secretly learned it from the Priest of Time, so don't go spreading it around, okay?

C: 啊呀，祷言断掉了耶。看来<color=#dbc291ff>不能让球和球撞到一起</color>呢，哗啦。
E: Ah, the prayer broke off. It seems like <color=#dbc291ff>the balls can't collide with each other</color>. *whoosh*

C: 天父曾将火种的余温赐予我们，当黑潮倾覆世界，它能庇佑人子一夕安存…这份「余火」，被元老们封存在了某个火种匣中。
