E: The sky father once granted us the Coreflame's lingering warmth. When the black tide swallows the world, it will be the only thing that can give the children of humanity a brief respite... This "ember" is sealed inside one of these Caskets.

C: 可惜，只有凯妮斯女士和她的那帮「清洗者」心腹，才清楚每个火种匣里究竟是什么。
E: Unfortunately, only Lady Caenis and her inner circle of "Cleaners" know what's inside each Coreflame Casket.

C: 从树庭「绳结学派」结业时，大家都以为我会成为一位工程兵…但在本该去应征的那天，我却选择对它宣誓，成为了一名祭司。
E: When I graduated from Nodism in the Grove, everyone assumed I'd become an engineer. But on the day I was supposed to enlist... I swore my oath instead. I became a priest.

C: 我？我这是在…我是……
E: I... what am I...? I am...?

C: 是撤退的时候了。
E: It's time to go.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，请您原谅，这可能只是一个胆小鬼将死前的胡话——
E: {NICKNAME}, forgive me. These are just the ramblings of a coward at death's door—

C: 天父曾将火种的余温赐予我们，当黑潮倾覆世界，它能庇佑人子一夕安存…这份「余火」，被元老们封存在了某个火种匣中。
E: The sky father once granted us the Coreflame's lingering warmth. When the black tide swallows the world, it will be the only thing that can give the children of humanity a brief respite... This "ember" is sealed inside one of these Caskets.

C: 拜托您先解锁下个火种匣…这段时间里，我会继续筛查。
E: Please, unlock the next Coreflame Casket. I'll keep sorting through the records in the meantime.

C: 遗体尚有余温，身上可见与黑潮怪物搏斗留下的伤痕。
E: The body is still warm, bearing the scars of battle against the creatures of the black tide.

C: 那…呃，恋人？
E: So, uh... a sweetheart?

C: 与此同时……
E: In the meantime...

C: {NICKNAME}，我要加快流程了：接下来你要连打三场——模拟宇宙不是这么运行的，但我没什么耐心。
E: {NICKNAME}, I'm going to speed up the process. Now you're going to fight three times in a row. This is not how the Simulated Universe should operate, but I'm running out of patience.

C: 我不信任你们的「有趣」…
E: I don't trust the definition of "interesting" around here...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「很好，总算回来了，是Ⅸ影响了你。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Very good. You're finally back. IX was influencing you."</color>

C: 我还有别的问题…
E: I still have some questions...

C: 有什么疑惑？
E: Got some questions?

C: 「我们的计算成功了，『存护』的星神克里珀真的现身了。」黑塔的声音突然响起，她发出意义不明的吃吃笑声，「『开拓』的星神阿基维利死而复现，引来老朋友了。」
E: "Our calculations are correct. Qlipoth, the Aeon of Preservation, has really appeared." Herta's voice suddenly sounded, and she let out an ambiguous giggle, "The Aeon of Trailblaze, Akivili's revival has attracted an old friend."

C: 你发现自己无法动弹——不知何时，祂已将你钉于无形的墙，你甚至没有察觉祂在何时出手。你奋力挣扎，念起祂的名字，开口——
E: You find yourself unable to move at all — it's like THEY have nailed you to an invisible wall, and you don't even know when THEY made the move. You struggle, say THEIR name, and...

C: 继续…
E: Continue...

C: 我还是有很多困惑。
E: I'm still very confused.

C: 这…都是祂的罪。
E: These... are THEIR sins.

C: 于蓝绿色的月亮下——辉光渐褪。<color=#dbc291ff>祂仿佛…正在陨落</color>。
E: The glow wanes beneath the bluish-green moon. <color=#dbc291ff>THEY seem to be... falling</color>.

C: 你无事可做，面前的荒地上只有一团奇怪的火焰。你将彩色的火焰用海水扑灭，一个被烧得有些焦黑的相框摊在你的面前…旁边还有一把溺水小刀。
E: You have nothing to do, and there is only an odd-looking flame on the wasteland before you. You put out the colorful flame with seawater, and a rather charred photo frame emerges... There is a drowned knife next to it.

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 寰宇蝗灾？
E: Swarm Disaster?

C: 「不出意料，就该在这。『繁育』命途从古至今，自宇宙诞生以来最盛的时期——珍惜吧，在祂陨落后，这一切都不会再来了。」黑塔依旧轻声。
E: "As expected, it's here. This is the most prosperous period of the Path of Propagation since the creation of the universe. Cherish it, as these will be gone for good after the Aeon falls." Herta speaks softly.

C: 唷，你居然一下子就摸到门路了。这次我们特意为你做了觐见星神的空间——先测试一下。
E: Oh! You got the hang of it immediately! This time, we specially made a space for you to have an audience with the Aeons. Let's do a test first.

C: 「我们知道此行会非常困难。」阮•梅接话，她冰冷地说道，「因为我们的每一步都会…走入祂的『计算』之中。」
E: "We know that this trip will be arduous." Ruan Mei finishes her sentence. She coldly adds. "Because our every step... treads right into THEIR calculations."

C: 「嗯，嗯。」黑塔嘟囔着敷衍，「那我们要等到什么时候？」
E: "Yes, yes." Herta mutters perfunctorily. "How long do we have to wait then?"

C: 嘘，你闭上了眼睛。你知道…你的「认知」再次扩张了，因此你才会走到这里。你的大脑过度运作，智慧化作火树银花的王国在脑内炸开，你觉得自己可以*认知*一切！现在，你只想要知道更多、更多的……
E: Shh, you close your eyes. You know... your cognition has expanded once more, which is why you have come this far. Your mind is overworked, and your intellect has turned into a kingdom of fireworks and dancing lanterns exploding in your head. You think that you have *cognition* over all! Now, you just want to know more, much more...

C: 你看到了…当「神秘」笼罩宇宙，星光洒满大地。祂画出星星点点的隐秘痕迹：那是一串「行迹」，一串有机生命的脚印。渺小的他们走在「开拓」的道路上，成群结队、佝偻地钻进了机械城。
E: You can see it... when the Enigmata shrouds the universe, starlight scatters across the land. THEY draw hidden traces in the stars: That is a string of "Traces," a string of footprints of organic life. Tiny as they are, they walk on the Path of the "Trailblaze," forming groups and embedding themselves into the Mechanical City.

C: 接着，一切突如其来——祂的一瞥投向了你。你的「认知」再度拓宽。你可以向祂发问；祂计算、解惑，但祂会以何种语言回答？无从得知。
E: Then, everything happens in a flash — THEY turn THEIR gaze toward you. Your perception is widened again, and you can ask THEM questions. THEY can calculate and give you answers, but it is uncertain what kind of language THEY will use.

C: 没有。
E: No.

C: 顷刻间，你看世间一切作鸟兽散。看它苏醒、沉睡、复苏、又轰然倒塌，一切有如命运轮转，滚滚而去，不可追回，当最后一粒烟尘飘落在地时，第三个时刻结束了。
E: In an instant, you see everything in the world dissipate. The world awakens, sleeps, revives, and then collapses. Everything occurs as if fated and cannot be reversed. When the last speckle of dust falls on the ground, it signals the end of the third moment.

C: 破碎的肢体在虚无的海面静静漂泊，分不清是铁甲还是鞘翅，在支援到来以前，你决定带着骑士们进行最后一搏。
E: The broken torsos drift off silently on the surface of nihility's sea, and you can't tell whether it's armor or a wing sheath. Before support arrives, you decide to bring the knight for one last fight.

C: 夏天的虫儿不曾见过冬日的积雪，恍惚间，你看到一只发光的小虫，它落在你的手背上，似乎已经在这里等了许久。
E: The summer bugs have never seen snow before. In a daze, you see a glowing bug landing on the back of your hand, as though it had been waiting here a long time.

C: 把他们赶下船。
E: Get them off the ship.

C: 向观众道别。
E: Bid the audience farewell.

C: 你曾是那么自由，亿万颗头颅，亿万台设备，任你穿梭其中。而现在，你却被关在里面，死无葬身之地。
E: You were once so free, with billions of heads and devices through which to move. Now, you are locked in here, ready for death with no resting place.

C: 数据库里堆满了冗余的信息，纵使拥有如此之多的分形，你的思维仍不可逆转地遁入……
E: The database is overflowing with redundant information. Though your mind has so many copies, your thoughts irreversibly revert...

C: 「白痴的手里可能掌握着真理，医生。」
E: "It is possible that the real truth lies in the hands of the fool, Doctor."

C: 「对！也许命途行者都有编号，是独一无二的，只要把本体消除掉……」
E: "That's right! It could be that all Pathstriders have serial numbers! That they're all unique! If we just eliminate the original..."

C: 「你的学术立场对社会有害。」政府停止了你的津贴。
E: "Your academic allegiances are harmful to society." The government halts your educational stipend.

C: 这是技术研发部最高级别项目——「永动工程」的一部分。通过制造卫星尺度的超纳米巨帆，配合权杖赐予的技术，捕捉宇宙间流溢的虚数能量。至少齐奥尔科夫学士是这样解释的。
E: This is part of the Technology Department's highest-level project... The "Perpetual Motion Project." By creating ultra-nano sails the size of satellites, as well as the technology granted by the Scepter, we will be able to capture imaginary energy that courses throughout the universe. At least, that's how Scholar Cholkov explains it.

C: 那些试图抵抗公司的星球，不得不优先调集资源，去消灭头顶的巨帆，这为公司大部队的登陆创造了契机。
E: Those planets that dared stand up against the IPC had to prioritize their resources in destroying the sails above their heads, giving the IPC's forces a chance to land and invade.

C: 应该分给所有人！
E: It should be shared among all!

C: 「我们就像是一群鬣狗，啃食他们留下的渣滓，还洋洋得意。」帕提维娅无奈地低下头，你听到她苦闷的叹息。
E: "We are just like a pack of hyenas, devouring the dross left by others and still acting all smug." Patavia lowers her head in frustration, and you hear her weary sigh.

C: 连续失败的实验，使课题失去了最后的投资者。你看见一个落寞的背影，帕提维娅学士，她正在与「权杖管理委员会」签署协议，让渡出万分之一的使用权。
E: A string of failed experiments causes the research topic to lose its last investor. You see the downcast back of a figure — Scholar Patavia is signing an agreement with the Scepters Administrative Committee to relinquish the authority to use the one ten-thousandth.

C: 「认知被影响了么？像只喝醉的鸟儿。」她讪笑，看不清面容。
E: "Has your cognition been affected? Like a drunken birdie." She smirks, her face a blur.

C: 公司和博识学会狼狈为奸！
E: The IPC and the Intelligentsia Guild are wolves colluding with each other!

C: 他将创造全新的生命。
E: He would have created a new form of life.

C: 「帕提维娅博士刻苦钻研，与好友通力合作，最终提出了孤波算法难题。人们盛赞提出问题的她，也惋惜不能解开难题的她……至少我读过的书是这样写的。」
E: "Doctor Patavia dedicated herself to grueling research, collaborated with friends and finally proposed the solitary waves theory. People both praised her for being the one to have posed the question and pitied her for being unable to solve it... At least, that's what it said in the books I read."

C: 「你是学士吗？还是…被祂所注视的天才？」请务必要是学士，生平第一次，帕提维娅向看不见的存在反复祈祷。
E: "Are you a scholar? Or... Have THEY looked upon you as a genius?" Please be a scholar... For the first time in her life, Patavia prays over and over to some unseen entity.

C: 好吧，这非常黑塔。
E: Alright, this is classic Herta.

C: 能合个影吗？
E: Can I get a selfie?

C: 宇宙停止了暴胀，那抹糖果色的身影溃散在空无中，把巨大的沉默抛给了你和黑塔。你迟疑半晌，决定开口。
E: The universe stops its expansion, and that candy-colored figure dissolves into emptiness, leaving a profound silence hanging over you and Herta. After a moment of hesitation, you decide to break the silence.

C: 毫无疑问，这样的事已经历了千遍万遍。
E: Without question, I have experienced this a million times already.

C: 她的双手捧着流光碎银的矿物质，里面是木料和黄金。一瞬间你看到她的眼睛，像是银河，闪亮的小玩意倾泻下来。
E: She is holding a heap of gleaming minerals with wood and gold mixed inside. You briefly catch sight of her eyes, from which sparkles pour down like galaxies.

C: 你要了一杯酒，马里亚香橙和棕榈肉桂调成的。你观察人群，他们戴着面具，身材体格各异——「假面愚者」聚集的酒馆。
E: You order a cocktail concocted with Marian oranges and palm cinnamon. Then, you observe the crowd. Everyone is wearing a mask and has different body sizes. From this, you know it is a tavern where the Masked Fools gather.

C: 这是你获得升职的第二天！你望着高耸入云的星际和平分部大楼，决心成为一名出色的「公司高级员工」。
E: This is your second day after being promoted! Staring at the towering IPC branch building, you are determined to become an excellent senior IPC staff.

C: 现在你已没有任何别的办法渡过面前的湍急流水。你的面前有三朵巨大的*食人鱼*！你只能赌一只其中看上去最*友善*的食人鱼跳进它的胃里，来助你渡过这片河…当然，如果你选错，也很可能葬身鱼腹。
E: Now, you have no other means to cross the rapid stream, and there are three massive piranhas before you! You can only bet your life on a piranha that appears the friendliest and jump into its stomach to let it carry you across the river... Of course, you might perish in its belly if you make the wrong choice.

C: 「记得，如果有天遇到真理医生——」他留下遗言，「先告诉他谁才是*白痴*！」
E: "Remember, if you ever meet Dr. Ratio... you must first tell him who is the true *idiot*!" He speaks his last word.

C: 星际和平投资机器打开它的*肚子*…你成功了！
E: The Interastral Peace Investment Device opens its *belly*... You have succeeded!

C: 总有一天，你要它求着你买它的东西。
E: One day, you'll make it beg you to buy its goods.

C: 你下载了新的点餐软件，极简风的设计，来自本地居民的诸多好评，已让你确信，这个软件必然有它的过人之处。
E: You download the new ordering app. Its minimalist design and many positive reviews from the locals assure you that this software must have something special about it.

C: 你奄奄一息地走进阿莉达星的宾馆，不知道为什么，这里的居民在做事时，个个都显得慢条斯理又心不在焉。
E: You enter a hotel on the Alda Star System on the brink of death. You have no idea why, but it seems that all of the residents here seem extremely slow and absent-minded with everything they do.

C: 你置身于一座精密的地下工坊，螺旋状的长廊中，铁锤与金属敲击的呼啸此起彼伏。
E: You find yourself amidst a finely wrought underground forge. Howling clangs of hammer on steel echo through the spiraling corridor.

C: 随着骰子停下，你的最后一搏也落下帷幕。
E: As the dice come to a stop, your final gamble draws to a close.

C: 神明掷出投枪，划破夜空的光辉会指引悬锋城的子民，沿着光的轨迹，践踏沿途的每一座城邦，直到抵达已被焚毁的废墟。
E: As the god cast their spear, trails of light across the night sky would guide the people of Kremnos. Following the trail of light, they trample every city-state in their path, until they reach the burnt ruins.

C: 它必须承受众神的惩罚。
E: They had to endure divine punishment.

C: 至于扎格列斯？无可奈何的众神在它身上绑了一颗星星。
E: As for Zagreus? The gods, in their helplessness, bound a star to them.

C: 所以大地的风排斥海洋。
E: Thus, the earth's winds repel the ocean.

C: 再随海潮歌唱吧，反正大海不喜沉寂。
E: Sing with the tides once more, for the sea despises silence.

C: 但少女常胜不败，有只虫儿总会飞在她的身边，在出征前亲吻她的盔甲和武器。
E: Yet, the undefeated maiden is never truly alone. A tiny insect always flutters around her, kissing her armor and weapons before each campaign.

C: 有了这座强大知识库的助力，再凭借你那聪明过人的头脑，假以时日成为「七贤人」之一也未尝不可能。
E: With this formidable library at your disposal, and your own brilliant intellect to guide you, who's to say that one day you won't rise to the ranks of the Seven Sages?

C: 塔兰顿的愤怒令众神担忧，连法吉娜都收敛了笑声，大海平静得像是一面镜子。
E: Talanton's wrath alarmed even the gods — Phagousa themself stifled their laughter, and the sea lay still as polished glass.

C: 这诅咒挺狠的。
E: That's a pretty harsh curse.

C: 种子在空中绽放出瑟希斯的祝福，年轻人身后的枯木，也变成了参天的圣树。
E: The seeds blossomed with Cerces's blessing in the air, and the withered tree behind the young man transformed into a towering Sacred Tree.

C: 扎格列斯挺会捡漏。
E: Zagreus is such an opportunist.

C: 恭喜啊，年轻人，你是迄今为止唯一一个通过我们科室特聘测试的！
E: Congratulations, youngster — you are so far the only interviewer who has ever passed the special appointment test for our department.

C: 我坦白…都不是。
E: To be honest... none of them.

C: 您好，订餐机器人「炒饭天才<unbreak>123</unbreak>号」竭诚为您服务。
E: Hello, Food Order Robot Cooking Genius No. <unbreak>123</unbreak> at your service!

C: （闭着眼乱输）
E: (Choosing numbers randomly with eyes closed)

C: 还以为会出事呢。
E: I thought something had gone wrong.

C: 「你被指控领导叛乱，亵渎司美之神——那赐予我等头脑与感官的无上存在，恩•德芮，」那就于高座的男人趾高气昂，「对此， 你是否有任何异议？」
E: "You are accused of leading a rebellion and desecrating the god of beauty, Anne Duray, who bestowed our minds and senses upon us as blessings." The man sitting on a high seat haughtily states. "Do you have any objections?"

C: …啊！您是在问我吗？
E: ...agh! Are you asking me?

C: ——不要靠近我！
E: ...Get away from me!

C: 真的可以做到吗？我很怀疑喀！
E: Is that really possible, though? I seriously doubt it!

C: 吭哧吭哧！
E: Toil, toil away!

C: 我猜猜…有的人还不死心，还想再找我借一次装备，是吧？
E: Let me guess... Someone isn't going to take no for an answer and wants me to lend them equipment again. Is that right?

C: <unbreak>3000</unbreak>信用点。
E: <unbreak>3000</unbreak> credits.

C: {NICKNAME}——记住这个名字，短短几十秒过后，{F#她}{M#他}可能就会成为万人景仰的磐岩镇大胃王！
E: {NICKNAME} — remember this name. In just a moment, {F#she}{M#he} could very well be Boulder Town's Competitive Eater Champion worthy of our admiration!

C: 咱这是做生意，又不是搞慈善，是吧？还望您见谅……
E: We're a business, not a charity, right? Hope you can forgive us...

C: 记住…不要轻视自己的选择。任何选择。
E: Remember... never forget the importance of your decisions. Any decision.

C: 喔——看来大家都到齐啦！
E: Oh, it looks like everyone's here!

C: 又或者——身材魁梧、浑身漆黑、佩戴面具、身披黑色硬质斗篷，操着一口像被热地髓矿熏过的低沉嗓音，在磐岩镇的昏暗街巷中惩恶扬善的私法制裁者……
E: Or perhaps the alley would contain a burly figure wearing black from head to toe, with a mask and a solid black cape. Their voice would be deep, as if it was smoked by hot Geomarrow mines, and they would dispense justice in the dark streets of Boulder Town as a vigilante...

C: 当然，这也有可能是他们引蛇出洞的诡计…毕竟，能得到虎克大人首肯、进入鼹鼠党的小朋友，肯定个个都不容小觑。
E: Of course, this could just be a ploy to lure you out... kids who manage to get recognition from Boss Hook and join The Moles are definitely anything but ordinary.

C: 那个，这是我的一点心意…还请铁卫{M#大哥}{F#大姐}笑纳！
E: Umm. This is just a small token... Please kindly accept it, {M#Sir}{F#Miss}!

C: 房间里充斥着击锤敲打辊筒的脆响。声音起初清脆悦耳，错落有致。然而，一段时间后，那声音愈发嘈杂浑浊——打字机的使用者显然遇到了创作瓶颈。
E: The crisp sound of hammers' striking against the roller of a typewriter fills the room. The sound is pleasant at first, plunking away irregularly. Then after a while, the sound becomes increasingly noisy and chaotic. The person in front of the typewriter clearly is experiencing some writer's block.

C: 我也不知道这东西能不能帮上你的忙…总之你就拿去随便用吧。
E: I don't know if this will be of any help to you... Anyway, just give it a try.

C: 你真是太善良了。
E: You really are a good person.

C: 我只得庆幸此刻还活着！只因我能有幸看到如此完美的事物！
E: I'm so lucky to be alive now! I've had the opportunity to see something so perfect!

C: 既然我拥有翅膀，那就理应向天空发起挑战。我要把苍穹之眼摘下来喀！
E: Seeing as I have wings, I should be issuing a challenge to the sky: I vow to pluck out the eye of the heavens above!

C: 我、我看见了一幅可怕的景象：黑暗吞噬了太阳，辉煌的宫殿变成了废墟，一切都在不可避免地滑入深渊……
E: I... I have seen a terrifying image: Darkness engulfing the sun. A glorious palace reduced to ruins. Everything sliding inexorably towards this void...

C: 吾日三省吾身…
E: Thrice daily I reflect on myself...

C: <size=36>回家睡大觉咯！</size>
E: <size=36>Go home and get some sleep!</size>

C: 不错，传统且高效。于是，你伛着身子偷偷摸摸地钻进灰尘横飞的板条箱堆中……
E: Not bad. Traditional yet effective. And so, you bend down and stealthily move in between the crates as dust flies everywhere...

C: 好多人甚至在背后偷偷说圣女大人的坏话！是不是特别过分！你说是不是，喀！
E: Some of them are actually spreading rumors about Lady Holy Maiden! Can you believe how awful that is? Can you? Crrrk!

C: 真美啊…
E: So beautiful...

C: 真是不解风情呀，欣赏这样一场绝唱的机会，我愿意用生命交换嗡。
E: Such a lack of appreciation... I'd trade my life for the chance to witness an unprecedented performance like this.

C: 你凑近了一些，以便能够观察到常人难以察觉到的机械震动。似乎是感受到来自你的压力——这只机巧鸟忍不住往后撤了一步，没错，这只机巧鸟能动。
E: You draw close enough to observe the mechanical hummings, which are usually imperceptible to passersby. It seems to feel some pressure coming from you — this cycrane cannot help but step back a pace. That's right — this little cycrane can move.

C: <unbreak>49</unbreak>。
E: Forty nine.

C: 你说「罗浮四大恶人」？今天傅啵乐没来，那家伙拉肚子了。
E: Are you talking about the Luofu Infamous Four? Fuporo isn't here today — he has the runs.

C: 假如那帮狂热的家伙还在，一定会这么抱怨喀。
E: If those fanatics were still around, they'd surely be ranting about that right now.

C: 啊…此生得这样一个落地窗足矣。
E: Ah... to have just one such window in this life would be enough.

C: 直到我踩断了翁瓦克圣林的新芽细枝。按大森林的律法，一根幼枝需要打断两根肋骨抵赔。
E: Until one day, I trod on some twigs sprouting from the sacred Vonwacq forest. The laws of the forest dictate that any broken twig must be repaid in kind — with two broken ribs.

C: 来人啊！快叫丹鼎司的医士来！！！
E: Help! Somebody call the Alchemy Commission and get a healer here!

C: …但其他两位选手也同时表示身体不适，立即退出了比赛！世上竟会有这样碰巧的事吗？
E: ...The other two contestants also pulled out right at the same time due to their physical discomfort. Have you ever heard of anything like it?

C: 我找到了所有的机巧鸟…
E: I found all the cycranes...

C: 我猜，仙舟上还有很多这样足不出户的人…这么想来，要不是鹤运物流支撑着他们，他们肯定会更加不容易吧。
E: I guess the Xianzhou has lots of homebodies who never leave the house... In this case, there're many people whose lives would be far more difficult without the help of Heron Express.

C: 老朽受吾主之命前来探查，却被困于此。千年的等待如同一梦，如今，老朽的使命结束了。英雄们，你们也要踏上归途了吗？
E: By my master's decree, I came to investigate... only to be trapped here for eons. A thousand years passed like a fleeting dream, but now, my mission is finally over. Heroes, are you too setting out on your journey home?

C: 话又说回来了…
E: But then again...

C: 奇怪，为什么里面没有路径？难道和那些创生若虫有关？
E: Weird, why is there no path inside? Could it have something to do with those Creation Nymphs?

C: 我投降！求求你，不要再打了喀！
E: I surrender! Please, don't hit me anymore!

C: 咦，是你？你找我有什么事吗？你该不会…知道那家伙在哪儿了吧？快说快说，急死我了！
E: Oh, it's you? Are you looking for me for something? Could it be... did you find out that oaf's location? Tell me, tell me, I can't wait!

C: 《黑衣哈努》，全年不间断放映中。
E: Hanu in Black is screening all year round.

C: ——从这鲜红的颜料中可以看出，这片在流梦礁的评分不会太高。
E: ...Judging from this bright-red paint, it does not seem that it scored a particularly good reception at Dreamflux Reef...

C: 算了，还是别爬了。
E: Never mind. Better not climb up there.

C: 我泡太久了，站一会。
E: I soaked for too long. Better stand for a while.

C: 我好想成为圣女…
E: If only I could become the Holy Maiden...

C: 全是诡辩，听不下去。
E: It's full of sophistry. I can stand it no more.

C: （向右跑。）
E: (Run right.)

C: {NICKNAME}乘客想得很周到嘛，和丹恒乘客想到一起去了。
E: Good idea, {NICKNAME}, exactly what Dan Heng would say.

C: 有话直说。
E: Go ahead.

C: 请你摸着良心打分！
E: Please give me a kind rating!

C: 哎，还是看看三月乘客留给帕姆的「莓莓果汁」配方表吧！
E: Hey, let's check out the Berry Juice recipe that March 7th made for me!

C: 没有没有，你不用担心，星穹列车上可是有列车长在照看呢！
E: No, there's nothing to worry about. It's just your friendly Astral Express conductor checking in on you!

C: 但是目前列车上的乘客都有自己的事情要忙，没有人可以帮我处理它…难道要这样抛弃它了吗？
E: But right now all the passengers on the Express have their own business to attend to. Nobody can help me deal with this... Don't tell me I'll have to just throw it away?

C: 你回来了？{NICKNAME}乘客！
E: Nice to see you again, Passenger {NICKNAME}.

C: 嘿嘿，忧郁的配色可是很难界定的，帕姆读了很多首诗歌才想到这个思路的哦！
E: Hehe, it's hard to define the color of melancholy. I only had the inspiration after reading countless poems!

C: 看来帕姆的列车灯光配色方案待调优的空间还很大啊…哎。
E: Seems like there's a lot of room for improvement in my lighting plans... *sigh*

C: 摇滚啊，帕姆对摇滚了解的不多，你要是有什么精于此道的朋友，可以问问他们能不能给你搞到几张经典专辑？
E: Rock... Pom-Pom doesn't know much about rock. If you have any friends who love rock music, you can ask them if they can get you some classic albums?

C: 诶？有吗！我一直闷着头写准则，自己还没来得及仔细看看呢！
E: Really? I have been writing these guidelines, and I haven't had time to take a closer look at them!

C: 计算，需要按照既定的规则，将一切可能与概率演算出来，执行风险最低与成功率最高的结果。
E: Calculations require consideration of all possibilities and probabilities according to the established rules, and executing the result with the lowest risk and the highest success rate.

C: 有些事想请教下你…
E: I wanna ask you something...

C: 这次你是话事人？
E: So you're the one calling the shots this time?

C: …不过裂界的影响可没这么容易根除，离那些家伙卷土重来也只是时间问题。到时候我可能还要麻烦你来帮忙。
E: ...Yet, the effects of Fragmentum are here to stay. It's only a matter of time before they make a comeback. I might need your help again when the time comes.

C: （或许能利用这点来清理裂界怪物？试试看吧。）
E: (Perhaps we can use this to clear out all the Fragmentum monsters? Let's give it a try.)

C: 痛苦和恐惧不是失败，哈努兄弟还有挽回的余地……
E: Being in agony and fear doesn't mean he's a loser. Hanu can still salvage the situation...

C: 您说。
E: What can we do for you?

C: 什么？！你居然出布……
E: What, you're choosing paper?

C: 您…难道抛下我了吗…？
E: Have you... abandoned me...?
Ah...

C: 你这家伙——终于让我抓到你了！
E: I got you now!

C: 没错…你要进去了！
E: Yes... you are about to go in!

C: 你成功了——祝贺你，你现在已经与全宇宙最完美的衣柜融为一体了！
E: Congratulations! You've now been merged with the universe's most perfect closet as one single entity.

C: 带劲的事要来了？
E: The real deal is coming?

C: 没天分就不要学人画画了…
E: If you don't have the natural talent for it, don't learn how to paint...

C: 作为她的朋友，我此时的回复应该是？
E: As her friend, what should my reply be at this time?

C: 咱、咱俩见过？
E: H—Have we met before?

C: 你注意到最上方有一行大字，字体周围着炫酷的光效：「退伍云骑，深夜倾情，专属热线——用最坚硬的盔甲，点燃你的心。」
E: You notice a line of large characters at the top, glowing with a cool sparkly font: "Retired Cloud Knight for late-night romance; your exclusive hotline — Let only the hardest armor ignite your passions."

C: 你将手探进罐底，很快就找到了另一份「谢礼」。它不会动，这很好。
E: Reaching your hand to the bottom of the vase, you soon find another "thank-you gift." It doesn't move, which is a good start.

C: 此处没有发生过任何事。就这样吧，这样最好。
E: Nothing happened here. That's it. It's best like this.

C: 唉，当务之急还是尽快修理栖木，恢复物流系统。
E: *sigh* The top priority right now is still to repair the roost and restore the logistics system as soon as possible.

C: 我非常理解您的想法。不过…在此之前……
E: I feel you. But before that...

C: 放心好啦，倒也不至于每个栖木都发生了故障…应该…不至于吧……
E: Don't worry, not every roost will be malfunctioning... I hope...

C: 另外，那些地方现在算不上安全，所以途中可能会遇到一些危险，也请你最好准备。
E: Side note, these places are not entirely safe, so there might be some dangers along the way. Please be prepared.

C: 最近应该没有丢失货物吧？
E: No items have gone missing recently, right?

C: 我要去干什么来着？
E: What do I have to do?

C: 这是什么铁盒？
E: What's in the box?

C: 恰巧路过的英雄。
E: Just a hero who happens to be passing by.

C: 因为这是到付邮件，所以拒收退件是不能选择到付的…不然如果对方选择赖账，我们就要承担损失了。
E: This parcel is cash-on-delivery, so returns can't be cash-on-return, I'm afraid... Otherwise, we'd be on the hook for any losses if the debt's reneged on.

C: 那可真是太好了啊，新版本的「枘凿六合」肯定大受欢迎。
E: That's great. This new Hexanexus model is gonna be a hit.

C: 真香，是吧。
E: Ironic.

C: 不能给人带来快乐的游戏，存在有什么意义？设计这些游艺项目的家伙脑子里都是浆糊吗？
E: What point is there in a game that doesn't bring joy to its players? Do the designers of these entertainment titles have jam for brains?

C: 怎么说，能帮哥们一把吗？我在<color=#f29e38ff>艾迪恩公园</color>等你好消息，你回来之后咱们可以一起喝杯好的！
E: How about it? Can you do me a solid? I'll be at the <color=#f29e38ff>Aideen Park</color> waiting for the good news. And once you're back, we can grab a drink together!

C: 有个叫姆利斯的人在找你…
E: Someone called Mullich is looking for you...

C: 我？我能怎么办…我之前已经向家族申请过庇护了，也因此过了几天安稳日子。
E: Me? I'm doing what I can... I applied to be put under protection before with The Family, so at least I've had a few days of relative calmness.

C: 在梦境世界里，人们的情绪会被无止境地放大。一些危险的负面情绪如果没有及时得到处理，很可能就会像瘟疫一样扩散，带来巨大的危害。
E: In the Dreamscape, people's emotions are amplified endlessly. Dangerous negative emotions can spread like a plague if left untreated, and cause massive harm.

C: 我曾与星夜大奖擦肩而过——彼时我还以为那是会是我人生中最难忘的记忆。
E: I once rubbed shoulders with the stars at the Starcademy Awards... Back then, I thought it would be the most unforgettable memory I ever had.

C: 细说怼人。
E: Tell me more about this dissing.

C: 哎——不用一天到晚挂着个假笑、对宾客点头哈腰的感觉可真好！
E: Hey — it feels great not having to wear this fake smile and grovel for guests all day!

C: 说到底，这宇宙中还有多少人配得上「无名客」的称呼呢？
E: After all, how many people in this universe are worthy of the "Nameless" title?

C: …真令人感慨，没想到这么多琥珀纪过去了，居然还有人行走在正统的「开拓」命途上。
E: ...That's really touching. I didn't expect that after so many Amber Eras there would still be people walking the Path of Trailblaze.

C: …好在信标的前进方向上有不少金属碎片。我可以从船上发射一个东西，与那些碎片碰撞、反弹，从而给信标施加一个往回来的力……
E: ...Luckily there were lots of metal scraps in the beacon's path. I could launch something from the ship to collide with the scraps and ricochet, thereby exerting a returning force onto the beacon...

C: 太酷了！
E: Awesome!

C: 我仔细一看，才发现那家伙已经死了。它长得像是有手脚的鱼，外表似乎很适合在宇宙中生存。
E: Upon closer look, I realized that this guy was dead. It looked like a fish with arms and legs, and its exterior seemed as though it would have no problem surviving out in the universe.

C: 我挨个检查那些住房，见到了更多外星人的尸体。房间内完全没有生存物资，除了简单的石镐外也几乎没有工具。
E: I checked over the houses but only found more alien corpses. There were no supplies in any of the buildings, and almost no tools at all save for a crude pickax.

C: 这位贼人年轻时几乎把自己身上的全部零件都换成了义体，在星区内兴风作乱，犯罪无数，头上顶着的悬赏足以买下一整颗星球——很难说其中有没有我的功劳。
E: When this pirate was young, he switched out almost all of his body parts with prosthetics, wreaking havoc throughout star zones and committing countless crimes. The bounty on his head was enough to buy a whole planet of your own — it's hard to say whether that included my contributions.

C: 不，那样就没有教育意义了。
E: No, that isn't really very educational.

C: 当时我们也很疑惑。本以为会有一场惊世大战，没想到一弹未发就跳到了收尸阶段。
E: We were puzzled at the time too. We thought there would be this ferocious battle, but it shifted straight to the cleanup stage without a shot being fired.

C: 很讽刺的结局。
E: What an ironic ending.

C: 相比之下，我还是更欣赏有肉时的他。
E: By comparison, I enjoyed him much more in the flesh.

C: 不过我没有赶上列车开拓银轨的时代，只好加入了一个自负盈亏的民间组织。
E: However, I wasn't around for the dawn of the trailblazing star rail era, so I had to join a civil organization that was responsible for its own finances.

C: 贿赂花的钱能报销一下吗？
E: Can you reimburse money spent on bribes?

C: 我呢，之前是一个无名客，后来脱离团队单干，这些你都已经知道了——但我隐瞒了单干的内容。
E: You know, I used to be a Nameless as well, before leaving to strike out on my own. You know all of this — but I omitted the contents of my solo journey.

C: 因为我感到愤怒，也可以说是我的矫情心在作祟。
E: Because I was enraged. You could also say my impetuous nature played a role.

C: 我突然想起了在新伦蒂尼恩的经历…正好心情不错，把它当个乐子讲给你听吧。
E: I suddenly recalled the New Londinium experience... Since I'm in a good mood, let me share it with you.

C: 看不出来。
E: I can't.

C: 你居然不生气？现在的无名客真好说话。
E: I'm surprised you didn't flip out right away. The Nameless nowadays are so easygoing.

C: 你在说什么呢，朋友？
E: What are you talking about, my friend?

C: 对自己的工作这么没自信？
E: Why do you have so little confidence in your work?

C: 来，说给我听听吧，让我看看家族的人到底是怎么想的。
E: Now, tell me everything. Let me see what they think of my project.

C: 您看这梦…它这——么大！这——么金碧辉煌！
E: Look at this dream... It's SOOOO big! It's SOOOO grand!

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you okay?

C: 家族承诺将进一步加强治安管理，全面保障宾客们的人身与财产安全……
E: The Family pledged to further strengthen the security management to ensure the safety of the guests.

C: 不过这也不是长久之计，得找个机会自立门户才行。
E: But staying here isn't the way to go. I must try to set up my own enterprise as soon as possible.

C: 长双眼睛吧，{F#小姐}{M#小哥}！好好看看周围的人都是怎么打扮自己的，你在这座城市里就是个妥妥的异类！
E: Come on, {F#miss}{M#mister}! Take a good look at how everyone around you dresses up. You stick out like a sore thumb in this city!

C: 后面做事还是得小心点。还是先拿逐梦客开刀比较好……
E: I should be more careful about my next step. Maybe it's better to target those Dreamchasers...

C: 艾默里奇冷静了下来…皮皮西人眼里通常带着一种默认的贪婪，这一特质在他身上更为凸显，毫无掩饰。
E: Emmrich has calmed down... While the Pepeshi people are known for the unmistakable greed in their eyes, his is on a whole other level.

C: 如果凭一张照片就能缓解莫里斯先生的惆怅，那就把这当作家族回馈宾客的一种「服务」吧。
E: If my photo can make Mr. Morris feel better, consider it a "service" we offer to our guests.

C: 看啊，她那双眼睛…如猎犬般明亮、狡黠……
E: Look at her eyes... as bright and clever as a Bloodhound's...

C: 唉，年轻就是好啊。
E: Oh it's good to be young!

C: 不许碰他！
E: Don't touch him!

C: 多谢夸奖，尊重人才正是我们星际和平公司的总要准则。
E: Thanks for your compliment. Respecting talents is our fundamental value at the IPC.

C: 只要他还能继续追逐梦想就好，如果真的因为我的错误就让一个孩子放弃梦想，我的绒球得永远装满愧疚了。
E: I'm happy as long as he keeps pursuing his dream. If he gave up because of me, my fluff ball would be filled with guilt forever.

C: 虽说我要让这些年轻人实现梦想，但不知道他们能否背负起梦想的重量。
E: As much as I want to help these youngsters achieve their dreams, I'm not sure whether they're ready to pay the price.

C: 我会把之前给他们制定的方向全都丢掉，然后告诉他们——去成为你们所憧憬的样子吧，我会帮助你们的！
E: I'll set aside all the plans I've previously made for them. I'll encourage them to be whatever they want to be and reassure them that they'll have my help!

C: 这也能夸？她要不告诉我这是首歌，我就要跟猎犬家系汇报说有人在大街上发病了。
E: Come on! If she hadn't told me that she would sing a song, I might have reported to the Bloodhound Family that someone was making a scene on the street.

C: 我曾是星际和平公司「传统项目部」的刑事案件调查员，但…我犯下了巨大的错误。
E: I was once a criminal case investigator for IPC's Traditional Project Department, but... I made a huge blunder.

C: 这是你自己发明的谚语？
E: Did you come up with that saying yourself?

C: 但两大组织的战争改变了一切。不知出于什么原因，双方开始拿出压箱底的武器相互攻击……
E: Yet, the war between two major factions changed everything. For some unknown reasons, the two sides started attacking each other using their most formidable weapons...

C: 那改造所需的技术十分精妙…无名客真能做到吗？
E: The technology required to pull off that transformation is... intricate... Would a Nameless be able to do that?

C: 我从小就能看到常人看不见的东西。有人认为那是一种天赋…有人说我装神弄鬼，也有人说我有妄想症。
E: Since young, I've been able to see things that others can't. Some think it a gift... Others think I'm just fooling around, or that I'm delusional.

C: 眼前的忆域迷因轻轻地接过了你手中的软糖，然后背过身去……
E: This Memory Zone Meme gently takes the soft candy from your hand and then turns away from you...

C: 可我不是企业家。
E: I'm no philanthropist.

C: 我要的货，带来了吗？
E: Did you bring the stuff?

C: 她不愿告诉你真相，恐怕是不希望做的好事被太多人知道吧。但我不这么想，好人就应该得到赞扬，善举就应当接受美誉。
E: She probably didn't tell you because she doesn't want too many people knowing about her charity. But I'm not having that: Good people should be praised, and good deeds should be lauded.

C: 我奥科萨娜最喜欢你这种识相的孩子。
E: Sensible kids like you are my favorite.

C: 我知道，模因病毒，对吧？
E: So I've heard. You're referring to the memetic virus, right?

C: 他的经历固然可惜，但人总是要向前看的。让他去找个工作，然后培养新的爱好吧。他的人生已经不剩多少可以浪费了。
E: While he has had some truly regrettable experiences, one must always look forward. Convince him to look for a job and nurture a new hobby. After all, there's little of his life left to waste.

C: …兴许在庇尔波因特升任P<unbreak>40</unbreak>、把家人接去享福之后，我会给他寄点星际特产回来吧，哈哈！
E: Maybe I'll have some interstellar specialties delivered to him once I've been promoted to P<unbreak>40</unbreak> and I can move my family to live comfortably together with me in Pier Point. Haha!

C: 为学生解惑是老师的责任，看来老鸟必须站出来说几句话、提点提点他才行。
E: It's a teacher's responsibility to help students through difficult problems, so it seems I must step forward to say a few words and point him in the right direction.

C: 唯一的麻烦是公司那帮家伙。自从上次的事结束后，这里的黑衣人越来越多，其中有些干脆住下来不走了。
E: The only trouble is those IPC guys. Ever since the Eternal Freeze let up, there have been more and more of those people in black around here. Some of them have simply settled in and not left!

C: 你懂什么，跟挠痒痒一样。
E: Don't be silly. It just tickles.

C: 接下来是最后一个议题：动力核心的燃料应该采用哪种能源？
E: Next, we have our final item: What fuel source should be used for the power cores?

C: 之后去找大守护者问问吧......
E: Let's go and ask the Supreme Guardian later...

C: 啾~你也是来欣赏本鸟的作品的啾？
E: Tweet~ Are you here to appreciate my work too, tweet?

C: 哼！
E: Hmph!

C: 咳咳，面生的客官，欢迎您来到「小镇宾馆」啾~
E: *Ahem* You don't look familiar, dear customer. Welcome to the Town Hotel, tweet~

C: 啾？客官想要跟人家聊天吗？随时奉陪啾！
E: Tweet? Do you want to chat with me? You're welcome any time, tweet!
...Ahhhh!!!

C: 偶尔钟表小子出门时会叫我来看门…但这次他出门的时间有点太久了啾！
E: Sometimes Clockie gets me to watch the house when he goes out... But he's been gone for too long this time, tweet!

C: 嘿呀，硬派鸟即使没有帮助也能出色完成任务——啾啾！
E: Hi-yah, real hardcore birds are able to complete the task perfectly without help, tweet tweet!

C: 其实今天有几个孩子跑到筑巢区里玩了啾…明明都拜托哈努兄弟每天在附近巡逻了啾……
E: Today, some kids ran off to the nesting zone to play, tweet... Even though we've asked Brother Hanu to keep watch in the area every day, tweet...

C: 啾啾——太好了，捉迷藏的孩子们都安全回来了啾！
E: Tweet, that's great. The children playing hide-and-seek are all back safely!

C: 哼哼~请尽情欣赏本公子的杰作吧！
E: Heheh! Enjoy my work to your heart's content!

C: 看来，你也被墙上的图案迷住了啾…心动不如行动，快来加入折纸小鸟吧！
E: I see that you, too, have been mesmerized by this pattern on the wall, tweet... But why just be moved when you can get moving? You should join the origami birds!

C: 再见了客人，我要回去复命了——啾——
E: Goodbye, dear guest! I must report back on my work... Tweet...

C: 不愧是哈努兄弟，咱甘拜下风啾……
E: I would expect no less from you, Brother Hanu... I admit defeat, tweet...

C: 据说，只要摁下这枚扳机就有烟花看，而且比烟花好看多了！
E: Rumor has it that if you pull this trigger, you see fireworks. And, they're even better than normal fireworks!

C: 太麻烦了啾，这是在下的一点点心意——请务必收下啾！
E: Thank you for everything you've done. Here's a little token of gratitude. Please accept it, tweet!

C: 啾啾…如果要在美梦小镇中选出最优秀的鸟，那一定就是猫头鹰教授了啾。
E: Tweet tweet... If I were to choose the most excellent and outstanding bird in all of Dreamville, that would undoubtedly be Professor Owl, tweet.

C: 若说金叶广场是大树上最耀眼的一片树叶——那么钟表公园就是大树上最甜美的果实啾！
E: If the Great Tree is the most dazzling tree in Goldleaf Plaza... Then Clock Garden is the sweetest fruit the Great Tree has ever borne, tweet!

C: 以后再说吧。
E: Catch you next time.

C: 呼呼，在未来的舞台上，我一定会带给你更耀眼的记忆啾。
E: Ho-ho, I'll be giving you even more blinding memories on the podium in the future, tweet.

C: 也就那样。
E: Just so-so.

C: 什么鸟界戏精。
E: You're such a drama bird.

C: 有你在，冠军是谁都不用猜了啾。
E: If you're around, you're a shoo-in for the champion, tweet.

E: No one's here at all. It's so awkward being the only lonesome birdie here. Better just head back to the Great Tree, tweet.

C: 舔一口。
E: Lick it.

C: 虎克，救我啊！
E: Hook, help me!

C: 呜呜，居然连自己的巢都守不住…我真是最最没用的小鸟了啾……
E: Boohoo, I couldn't even defend my own nest... I'm really the most useless birdie alive, tweet...

C: 噗噗噗噗噗…
E: Fufufufufu...

C: 有水果一起吃！
E: Eat fruits together!

C: 醒目的霓虹路牌总能指出前进之路啾……
E: The striking neon signs will always point the way forward, tweet...

C: 哎！我怎么成这样了！还是回去请教下猫头鹰老师吧啾。
E: Aish! Why am I like this! I'd better seek advice from Professor Owl when I get back, tweet.

C: 啾——翅膀被水泡烂啦！要吹干吹干啾——
E: Tweet!!! My wings are waterlogged! Time to dry them, dry them, tweet...

C: 我给1分。
E: I'll give it one point.

C: 你话题转换的好生硬...
E: You really know how to change a topic...

C: 我会一直注视着你的，{NICKNAME}大人！
E: I am always watching you, great {NICKNAME}!

C: 有什么我能帮的忙吗？
E: Is there anything I can help with?

C: 有些人阅读了「治疗失眠」的医书长梦不起；相对的，有些人阅读了「不眠不休」的医书之后，再也没能入睡……
E: For example, some patients who read the "Cure for Insomnia" fall asleep for a long time, while others who read "Fight Sleepiness" never fall asleep again...

C: 《瘈狂之卷》？
E: The Manuscript of Delirium?

C: 等我找到了，再来找你吧。
E: I see. I'll come back to you once I find them all.

C: 小鱼也知道，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}来到这里，也是来回收这块石板的吧？
E: And I know you're here to retrieve this tablet, right?

C: 青镞大人果然慧眼识英才。若不是有你在，这三本书我真不知道要找到什么时候去……
E: Madam Qingzu was right to have faith in you. Without your help, it would have taken me forever to find these lost manuscripts...

C: 唉…其实我呢，一直觉得人的命运绝非天注定。人如果能用更好的心态来面对未来，自然就会面对更好的未来。
E: To be honest... I've always believed that one's fate is not necessarily predestined. If one can stay optimistic about their future, then they will have a brighter future ahead of them.

C: 为啥要等我去叫他？
E: Why do you need me to call him?

C: 阿幸站在玉兆前，低下头，大概是在默念自己想要卜算的事情。玉兆开始转动…可转了几圈，玉兆便停转了。
E: A-Xing stands in front of the jade abacus and lowers his head, deep in thought about what he wants to divine. The jade abacus starts to turn... but it stops abruptly after only a short while.

C: 那个……
E: A-Xing...

C: 你也说不清这是基于一种什么心理，是亲密好友之间的惯性揶揄，又或者是出门在外的警惕感迫使你想向他求证，你最终决定将匿名短信转发给丹恒本人。
E: You can't tell what this behavior is based on — is it habitual teasing between close friends, or the vigilance of being on the road that forces you to ask him for confirmation? Ultimately, you decide to forward the anonymous message on to Dan Heng himself.

C: 你迅速品鉴完这份神秘的「拳谱」，这一招一式的步骤详细且简明易懂，属实是新手入门的不二之选，你试着演练了几招，耍起来虎虎生风，瞬间明白了它的含金量。
E: You quickly go over this mysterious "boxing manual." Each move is detailed and easy to understand, making it great for beginners. You give several of them a try, putting together several powerful moves as you instantly understand their value.

C: 你努力回想，但脑海里却只留下一片惨淡的空白，和大部分不幸的人一样，机会摆在他们面前，他们也无法把握，这或许就是太卜司所推崇的某种「命数」吧。
E: Casting your mind back, you're trying recalling but your mind is completely blank. Like most people, an opportunity has fallen right into your lap that you're unable to capitalize on. Perhaps that's what they mean at the Divination Commission when they talk about "Fate."

C: 还是别碰了。
E: Don't touch it.

C: 好啊，咱们就学你刚听的这首《合巹记》。
E: Alright, let's learn that song you just heard, Wedding Wine.

C: 我直接用手机拍下来当小抄！
E: I took a pic and made a cheatsheet with my phone!

C: 当然不能了！传统朱明花鼓戏，就是这样传授的。我唱一遍，你跟我合唱，唱不出来，我就揍你。
E: Of course not! This is how Zhuming flower-drum opera is traditionally taught. I sing it once, then you sing it with me. And if you can't sing it, I'll beat you.

C: 可怜我来日独守空房。
E: Come tomorrow, I'll guard the night.

C: 哎呀！
E: Ow!

C: 如果你当时在场，并且能说清发生了什么，家族愿意提供信用点作为奖励。
E: If you were on the scene and can tell us clearly what happened, The Family is willing to offer you some credits as a reward.

C: 肯定没错。「绘梦的夏洛特」——这个名字第一次传到我耳朵里的时候，我就知道她一定会在这里……
E: She must be. Ever since I heard the name "Charlotte the Dream Artist," I had known that this is where she must be...

C: （好紧张的样子，还是先在旁边围观吧。）
E: (It looks pretty tense over here, maybe I should just watch from the sidelines for now.)

C: 让这群宾客尝尝苦头！
E: Give these visitors a taste of suffering!

C: 就是演个戏嘛。情景和台词都有不少欠打磨的地方，别太较真哈。
E: It's just an act. There are still a few scenes and lines that need polishing, so don't take it too seriously.

C: 哎呀，我记得您。您就是上次游玩「救助情境体验卡（免费版）」的客人吧！
E: Ah, I remember you. You must be the customer who played the free version of the Rescue Simulation Experience Card!

C: 取款机被球棒砸出一处巨大的凹陷，几声急促的警报后彻底停摆了。路过的行人对你投以谴责的视线。
E: The baseball bat leaves a huge dent in the machine. The alarm siren blares out for a while before the machine comes to a total halt. The passing pedestrians glance at you disapprovingly.

C: 那瓶绿色的朗姆愿意默默做你的守护者，它应该能给你幸福。
E: That bottle of rum is willing to protect you for nothing in return. It should be able to give you happiness.

C: 那个有些浑厚的声音再次在你脑中响起，眼前的绿色酒瓶似乎在极力压抑着自己的情绪。
E: Its thick, rich voice rings in your head again. The bottle of rum seems to be suppressing its emotions with great effort.

C: 离间红酒瓶。
E: Set Red against the others.

C: 这么多年了，我一直自甘屈身老三的位置，还不是因为我信任它们。
E: After all these years, I have always allowed myself to take on the role of the youngest because I trusted them!

C: 这可是最香醇的酒——小心点，别喝那么急！
E: This is truly the finest of wines... Careful, do not drink it too quickly!

C: 眼前的东西是什么？你愣在原地，大脑飞速处理起信息。
E: Just what is happening in front of your eyes? You stay stupefied on the spot as your brain rushes to try and make sense of the information.

C: 噢，真可惜…那你快去多交点朋友吧。
E: Ah, that's a shame... Better go and make some more friends, then!

C: 在桶王的福音下，我已经洗心革面，再也不会欺骗他人了。
E: With the teachings of the King of Cans, I've changed my ways and will never cheat others again.

C: 难道你也是无家可归的流浪者？唔…按我们帮派的规矩，应该给你个机会。
E: You're a homeless vagrant, too? Uhh... The gang's rules say we gotta give you a chance.

C: 呵，梦泡电影看多了，真以为你一个人能打过我们？
E: You've been watchin' too many dream bubble movies! Ya really think ya can beat us alone?

C: 双手叉腰。
E: Put your hands on your hips.

C: 双手叉腰、摊手、抱胸。
E: Hands on hips, arms spread, cross arms.

C: 你喜欢什么口味？
E: What flavor do you like the most?

C: 在你的注视下，这瓶上进苏乐达以一种诡异的姿态飞走了，希望它能如愿以偿吧。
E: Under your watchful gaze, the SoulGlad bottle flies off in a bizarre stance. Let's hope they get what they wish for.

C: 趁我们还能聊天，让你沾沾喜气。等我进到那边的展柜，以后你就只有瞻仰的份了！
E: I shall allow you to bathe in my success while we are still able to talk. Once I enter that display cabinet, you will only be able to look up at me in admiration!

C: 这是…「盛会之星」系列收藏卡牌，不过是限量版。{RUBY_B#梦星娱乐}发行商{RUBY_E#}当年赠给我以示纪念，但我想它或许对哥哥更有纪念意义，就写上祝福语转赠给他了……
E: This is... a Planet of Festivities collectible card, but it's a limited edition. The {RUBY_B#Dreamstar Entertainment}distributor{RUBY_E#} gave it to me as a commemorative souvenir, but I thought it would mean more to my brother, so I wrote some kind words on it and gave it to him...

C: 咦，你们看…那个倒卖贩的包落在地面上……
E: Tsk, check it out... That scalper dropped his bag on the ground...

C: 算了，看你们也是诚心热爱。实在想要的话，给你们也不是不行，但得按市场价付钱，我们会转交给鸢尾花家系，就当是讨回货款了。
E: Whatever, I can tell that you're truly passionate about her. If you really want it, I suppose I could let you have it — but you'll have to pay the market price. We'll pass on the funds to the Iris Family and consider the bill paid.

C: …我…*深呼吸声*…非常荣幸能够登上这个舞台，接下来我将为大家带来一首歌曲，它的名字叫做「想象一朵未来的玫瑰」……
E: ... I...*deep breath*... I'm very honored to be able to stand on this stage. Next up, I have a song for everyone, and it's called "Envision a Rose Forthcoming"...

C: 难得看到小三月露出这副表情，挺凝重的。
E: It's rare to see March with such a serious expression.

C: {NICKNAME}大人，您怎么会在这里？您不是在勘录舍里指导…工作吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, why are you here? Aren't you supposed to be at the Domain of Collations supervising... their work?

C: 书你可以带走……
E: Yes, you may take the book with you...

C: 看来您已经得到了一个足够简洁的答案，我知道您为此事跑前跑后并不容易，我会作为司狱给你一些跑腿的辛苦费用，对您的求知精神表示赞扬！辛苦了！
E: It appears you've obtained a sufficiently straightforward answer. I understand the effort involved in pursuing this matter. As a jailer, I will reward you for your effort and dedication to knowledge! Thank you for your hard work!

C: 具体来说？
E: Please elaborate.

C: 极低。
E: Extremely low.

C: 你是逃犯，我能有什么来意？
E: You're an escapee, what else could I possibly be here for?

C: 我见你既不是冥差，也不是狱卒，与在下往日无冤，近日无仇…不如行在下一个方便，权当此处无事发生，算是你我结交朋友，日后必定盟助。
E: I see that you are neither a spiritfarer nor a prison guard. You have no past grievances nor recent enmity with me... How about allowing me a convenience and pretending that nothing happened between us? Let us become friends this day, and I will surely aid you in the future.

C: 有道理，我们皮皮西人向来尊重其他族人，不惹麻烦。
E: You have a point. We Pepeshi always respect the people of other races and don't cause trouble for them.

C: 真的会有人需要这样的梦境吗？
E: Will there really be anyone that requires such a Dreamscape?

C: 你先原路返回吧，下次再来。
E: Retrace your steps for now. We'll try again next time.

C: 什么情况？这也是一件行李吗？
E: Huh? Is that supposed to be luggage?

C: *沉默*
E: *keep quiet*

C: 哈哈，不管怎么说，这点奖励算是我们的心意，还请您收下吧。我先带嫌犯和相关证人回去了。有缘再见。
E: Haha, be that as it may, please accept this reward as a token of our gratitude. I'll be taking the criminal and witnesses back with me. May we meet again.

C: 各位演员都熟读过设定了，我们就直接开始。我来担任旁白，导演注意把控情节的走向，在必要的时候做出决定。
E: Now that the actors are familiar with their settings, we'll start right now. I'll be in charge of the narration. The director will control the plot's direction, and make decisions when the need arises.

C: 毫无疑问，阿红是所有选手中综合实力最为强劲的，按常规来看，她理应成为舞台的焦点。剧情会不会如所有人预料的这般发展呢……
E: Without a doubt, Reddie is the most capable among all the candidates. For all intents and purposes, she should be the highlight of the stage. Will any unforeseen twists occur in the script though...?

C: 相当有魄力的选择！尽管小金选手满怀对舞台的憧憬，可她的演艺经验尚浅，这份热情能否支撑她击败所有对手，走到聚光灯的中心呢……
E: A choice very bold! Even with Goldie's unbridled passion for the stage, her acting experience remains lacking. Will this enthusiasm prop her up in defeating her competitors, and guide her toward the light of the center stage...?

C: 拍摄结束了，感觉还不错吧？哎呀，没想到这位特邀演员的表现能这么出色。
E: The shoot's over. Not bad, eh? Ah, I never thought this specially invited actor would do so brilliantly.

C: 耳边隐约传来某道声音，似乎是小孩子的声音，清脆而调皮：「愿欧洛尼斯保佑你～」。
E: A sound passes next to your ears, ever so faintly. It is the voice of a child, saying: "May Oronyx bless you."

C: 按下试试。
E: Try pressing it.

C: 放马过来吧！
E: Bring it on!

C: 哦，亲爱的无名客，你沉默的样子真迷人。
E: Oh, dear Nameless, you're so charming when you're silent.

C: 别乱编医学知识，会误导别人。
E: Don't make up medical knowledge. It's misleading.

C: （把手伸进狮子嘴里）
E: (Put your hand into the lion's mouth)

C: 在「纷争世」的战场上，我曾目睹许多惨烈的画面，无数战争的起因都是城邦与城邦、人与人之间的恨意和复仇。
E: In the battlefields of Era Bellica, I once witnessed many tragic scenes, and countless wars were caused by hatred and vengeance between cities and people.

C: 冤冤相报何时了，不错，本狮决定放过你的手，这不过是一次「友好」的问答交流，吼吼吼。
E: Vengeance only begets more vengeance. Fine, I have decided to free your hand. This is but a friendly exchange of answers, ho-ho-ho.

C: 试着自己想想。
E: Try thinking about it yourself.

C: 是啊，或许只有在下班回到居所拿起手机时，脑子才会长回他们的身体上吧。
E: That's right. Maybe only after they get off work, go home, and begin scrolling through their phones, will their heads return to them.

C: 人们起床时，对枕头而言，它就失去了一个放在上面的脑袋，到晚上才能找回来。而且，蓬松的枕头人见人爱——虽说大家只是喜欢睡觉。
E: When people wake up, a pillow would have lost the head that laid on it, and only recover it at night. Also, a fluffy pillow is everyone's favorite, even if it's people's love for sleep that makes it so important.

C: 问问缇宝她们的意见。
E: How about asking Tribbie, Trinnon, and Trianne?

C: 好久没笑到嘴疼了…吼，那个——白厄大人，虽然您没答对，但我可以不咬您，这件事您千万别跟万敌大人提，我怕他把本狮给轰杀至渣呀！
E: It's been a long time since my jaws have hurt from laughing... Lord Phainon, you may have gotten it wrong, but I won't bite you. Please don't mention this to Lord Mydei, or I fear he'll pound me to dust!

C: 这狮子的说法…不知为何带着一股老学究的气息，说不定它想要的答案意外单纯。
E: This lion's tone... It's got an inexplicable scholarly air — the answer it wants might just be ironically simple.

C: 答案就是——
E: The answer is...

C: 吼？确实是很符合万敌阁下风格的回答，虽说与标准答案有差距，但既然您亲自来答题，本狮当然要给您开个后门，这口就不咬了吼！
E: Ho? An answer that fits Lord Mydei's character indeed. It may differ from the standard answer, but since you answered in person, I will show you some respect and dispense with the biting!

C: 祭司阿努说：「此事简单明了，乃是雅努斯的制裁——对神明不敬会招来毁灭。」
E: The priest Anu said: "This accident is simple. It was the judgment of Janus — blasphemy against the gods will only invite destruction."

C: 吼吼，听完本狮的解析，是否有种头部受到重击的感觉？这是本狮压箱底的究极谜题，其他同类可想不出这种妙题！很不错吼？
E: Ho-ho, do you feel like your head has been pummeled with my explanation? This is one of my most brilliant riddles — the rest of my kind would never be able to conjure something so amazing! Not bad, eh?

C: 请不要问「星际时代怎么还有杀毒软件」这种问题。计算机病毒阴魂不散数千载，大家都不想的。
E: Please don't ask questions like "Why is there antivirus software here in the Interastral Age?" Computer viruses have been lingering around for thousands of years, and it's the last thing that anyone wants.

C: 查杀快完成了，求你早点回来！
E: The check is almost finished. Please come back soon!

C: 一猜就是这样…
E: That's what I thought...

C: 你将杯子放到了冷冻室中。希望成品能好吃。
E: You moved the cup into the freezer. Let's hope it tastes good when it's done!

C: 呼呼。活了…我的火焰重新燃烧起来了！瞧啊，多么生机勃勃，多么耀眼！
E: *crackle* It's alive. My fire is burning again! Look at the brilliant vitality within!

C: 高尚的回答——但对垃圾桶而言，正确答案是垃圾袋！
E: A noble answer, but for a trashcan, the correct answer is a trash bag!

C: 可…如果我好起来了，那不就意味着我不再是废桶、不再是垃圾了吗？我作为垃圾的价值，也会跟着一起消失……
E: However... if I'm feeling better, wouldn't that mean I'm no longer a basket case? My value as trash would vanish...

C: 等于7。
E: It equals 7.

C: 逃走。
E: He would run away.

C: 发出一声很酷的*哼*。
E: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*

C: 塔塔洛夫？你还有脸提那个暴君！看打！
E: Tatalov? How dare you bring up that diabolical tyrant! Take my punch!

C: …哥哥，这家伙怕不是要杀人夺宝！
E: ...Brother, I think this person's going to kill us and claim the goods!

C: 啧，能不能想点好的？我们垃圾帮是正义的伙伴，可不是地痞流氓。
E: Tsk, can you think of something less criminal? The Trash Gang is a righteous clan, not a bunch of lowly hoodlums.

C: 这个桶盖会扣我头上吗？
E: So I'll have to wear this trashcan cover?

C: 唉，即使贤明如塔塔洛夫，校园中时常可见的霸凌行为也让他头疼不已。
E: *sigh* Even the wise Tatalov is troubled by the common occurrence of bullying in school.

C: 这封信竟然来自<color=#dbc291ff>白厄年幼时的笔友。</color>
E: It's a letter from <color=#dbc291ff>Phainon's childhood pen pal.</color>

C: 当然必须升华一下！
E: Gotta end with a flourish!

C: 不必咪发迷在信里赘言，你就知道它的修理计划获得了成功。真叫人倍感欣慰。
E: Even without Mifamem spelling it out, you can tell: The repair project was a success. That warm sense of satisfaction washes over you.
Me...

C: 所以我正在纳闷，是不是哪儿坏了迷？
E: So I'm wondering maybe something's broken, memi?

C: 我一直在想，他是不是还没有准备好，或者临行前也害怕啦，所以偷偷躲进树屋，用大叶子遮住窗，钻进被窝，一觉睡到现在还没有醒？
E: I kept wondering... Maybe he just wasn't ready. Or maybe, right before he left, he got scared, and quietly sneaked into the treehouse, pulled the big leaves over the window, tucked himself into bed, and fell asleep, so deeply he still hasn't woken up.

C: 迷…每次想破脑袋也想不出这些问题的答案，最后只好夹着尾巴灰溜溜地回去了。
E: Me... I rack my brain and never find answers. In the end, I always slink back home, tail tucked low.

C: 惺惺相惜的两只海豹，每只都有排山倒海之力…至少它们自己是这么说的。
E: Two kindred seals, each claiming world-ending power... or at least that's what they said.

C: 风铃发出了悦耳的声音。除此之外，什么都没发生——昔涟留在风铃上的魔法用完了。
E: The wind chime sings a lovely tune. Nothing happens other than that. Looks like Cyrene's magic has finally run dry.

C: 原来是你熟悉的麦田守望者 / 神圣呜呜伯 / 好好奇美拉 / 黄豆粉糍粑 / 奇美啦迷！也许它在这附近玩耍，听见风铃声便跳出来和你打招呼呢。
E: Oh! It's your good ol' Guardian of the Wheat Field / Holy Wubbaboo / Curious Chimera / Soy-Dusted Mochi Cake / Chimeramem! Maybe it was just playing around when it heard the chime and popped out to say hi!

C: 再见呜嗷！
E: See you, awooo!

C: 前者好办。我在防火墙见到过他俩的残像，用作参照系正合适。至于后者……
E: The first is easy. I've seen their residual memoria in the firewall, which work perfectly as reference points. As for the latter...

C: 真的能钓上鱼？
E: Think we'll actually catch some fish?

C: 你比了比泳圈的大小和你的腰围…完全不合身。该不会是哪只小海豹落在这儿的吧？
E: You compare the size of that swim ring to your waist... definitely not a match. Did some baby seal leave this behind?

C: 就像现在这样。你会怎么做呢？
E: Just like now. What would you do?

C: 也许当我们再度踏上旅途，和{NICKNAME}玩捉迷藏的就不是我，而是那触不可及的命运了。不过我相信，无论多少次，{NICKNAME}一定都能……
E: Maybe next time we head out on a journey, it won't be me playing Hide-and-Seek with {NICKNAME}, it'll be fate, just out of reach. But I believe, no matter how many times, {NICKNAME}'ll always...

C: 鳞渊境？很美妙的名字呢，真叫人浮想联翩。要是能有艘船在码头靠岸，载着我们去那里冒险就好啦……
E: Scalegorge Waterscape? That's a beautiful name that fuels the imagination. If only we had a ship to sail over to the docks and take us on an adventure...

C: 这么说，我们旅途中经历的一切，一定也能亲手让那些沉重的过去，焕发出新的意义吧？
E: In a sense, everything we experienced in our journey together will personally give the solemn past new meaning, right?

C: 但幸运的是，作为迷迷，与你初见的这一世所积攒的记忆，能够成为了一点星光——照亮三千万世那灰黯的遗忘。
E: But fortunately, as Mem, the memories accumulated from this first encounter with you can become a guiding starlight — illuminating the dull oblivion of thirty million lifetimes.

C: {F#她}{M#他}的头发是灰色的，穿着长外套，看起来就特别厉害，从未输给过任何人，手里还经常提着一根球棒……
E: {F#She}{M#He} has gray hair, wears a long jacket and looks extremely strong. {F#She}{M#He} has never lost to anyone and is often seen with a baseball bat in {F#her}{M#his} hands...

C: 希望吧。雅努斯指引前路，但归途如何始终是个未知数。
E: We can only hope. While Janus may light the path ahead, the journey home always remains uncertain.

C: 「美好的东西」
E: Things of beauty

C: 嗯？
E: Huh?

C: 你是什么东西？
E: What are you?

C: 烦了，不聊了吧。
E: Enough. That's it for today.

C: 汪呜…汪汪汪？汪汪汪~
E: Woof ooo... Woof woof woof? Woof woof woof~

C: 你决定训练 佩佩——
E: You decide to train Peppy—

C: 它并不愿搭理你，只是静静地看着你，嘴角向上勾勒出一个奇怪的弧度。
E: It doesn't pay your commands any attention and just looks at you in silence with a puzzling expression drawing up one side of its mouth.

C: 我该怎么称呼你？
E: What should I call you?

C: ……如此奇物，四件缺了三件，何时才能。
E: ...Three out of the four Curios are missing. When will we...

C: 只要你也跟我一样不甘平庸，我们就是异父异母的亲{F#姐妹}{M#姐弟}。
E: If you are like me and are unwilling to surrender to mediocrity, then we are siblings of a different mother.

C: 那我就继续了，如果我有打扰到你，请和我讲哦。
E: I should get back to work. Please let me know if I've interrupted you.

C: 在空间站的无数奇物藏品中，生命其实不止存在于人类这个载体。
E: Among the countless Curio collections of the space station, life does not only exist in the human receptacle.

C: 啧，又得回去看看记录，好麻烦。
E: Hmph. I have to go back and check my record again. What a pain in the neck.

C: 退休之后就不能说自己在忙什么了，一般都说是：最近在玩儿着什么呢。
E: I'm retired, so that might not be an accurate question. We normally just say what we've been playing with.

C: 准确来说还在摸索当中。之前总是关注各类品牌的最新款，现在要把这个毛病改过来，还是挺费劲的。
E: To be honest, I'm still looking. It's a bit difficult to fix my bad habit of only paying attention to the latest products.

C: 你猜～
E: Take a guess~

C: 萍萍姐说这里很无聊，我也这么觉得，她说我们可以「上去」空间站看看，不过我们还没找着路。
E: Wenfry said it was boring here. That's how I feel too. She also said we could go up to take a look at the space station, but we haven't found the route.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 你怎么这么急躁…
E: Why are you so impatient?

C: 你到底在守望些什么？
E: What exactly are you watching for?

C: 冰冷的电子音提醒你：「已转接至自动应答系统，请按下通讯键进行选择。」
E: A cold electronic voice notifies you, "You have been transferred to the automated response system. Please press the communication key to make your selection."

C: 通讯似乎幸运地接通了。
E: Luckily, the call goes through.

C: 你会在这个阶段品尝到它的尾调。它甘美、甜蜜，对吗？那是我希望你感受到的东西。
E: At this stage, you'll get to savor its base note. It's smooth and sweet, isn't it? That's what I'm hoping for you to experience.

C: 别担心，不好的东西会睡去。接着，我们可以创造新的「故事」。不用感到遗憾…不用感到不舍。
E: Don't worry. The bad stuff will fall into slumber, and then we can create a new story. There's no need to feel regret or sorry...

C: 研究还在继续，如有需要可以给我留言。
E: The research is still ongoing. Drop me a line if you need anything.

C: 但在掏出钱包，将这两件传世之作收入囊中前，有个问题困扰着你——
E: But when you take out your purse and are about to purchase these two legendary masterpieces, a lingering question persists in your mind...

C: 都说商品的价值在于它背后的故事，相比于「吉奥里亚的指甲」，「尼卡多利的战矛」要合理得多。你相信这柄出身不凡的长矛能击破盾牌的防御。
E: An item's value lies in its provenance. Compared to Georios' Nail, Nikador's Lance sounds much more plausible. You're sure that this extraordinary lance will shatter the shield's defenses.

C: 大工匠亲自仲裁，我们自然无话可说……
E: For the Grand Craftsman to personally preside over this, we are at a loss for words...

C: 没错，刚才矛和盾相撞的时候，你们是不是感到眼前发黑，甚至无法直视碰撞的画面？那就是残存的泰坦力量爆发出的威能。
E: That's right. When the lance met the shield, did you feel like your eyes were shrouded, perhaps not even able to see the actual clash? That's the explosive remnant power of the Titans.

C: 树干上刻着瑟希斯的标记，因为年代久远的缘故，标记只剩下浅浅一层，一眼望去实在很难发现。
E: The tree trunk is engraved with the mark of Cerces. As so many years have passed, only a thin layer of the original engraving remains, making it hard to notice at first sight.

C: 将祭品埋入树根。
E: Bury the offerings by the tree roots.

C: 认为这样的讨论毫无意义，不过是思维的惰性。但实际上，整个翁法罗斯无不与之相关。
E: To think that such an argument lacks meaning is no more than mental laziness. In fact, this relates to everything we see in Amphoreus.

C: 我们双方都阐述了各自的立场。那么，这位智者，你要选择为哪方辩护？
E: We have both stated our view points. So, wise one, which side would you like to debate for?

C: 就算在覆灭前，城邦的面积与人口也在不断发生变化，你童年时见到的城邦，和青年时见到的必然不同。既然如此，你凭什么断定它就是阿卡索斯？
E: Even before its destruction, the area and population of the city were undergoing constant change. The city that you saw as a child was undoubtedly different to the one you saw as a youth. If that is the case, how can you conclude that it was indeed Icatus?

C: 哎，辩论才是获取真理的方式。不经由讨论便得到的知识，与盲信有什么区别？
E: Ah, but debate is the only method to obtain the truth. Is there any difference between knowledge that has not undergone discussion and blind faith?

C: （质疑：大前提有误。）
E: (Question: The main premise is flawed.)

C: 但谁能保证我们的想法，不是扎格列斯开的某个玩笑呢？
E: But who can ensure that our thoughts and beliefs are not simply just a trick played on us by Zagreus?

C: 讨论一下「传信石版」。
E: Talk about the "teleslate."

C: 辛苦了，{NICKNAME}，谢谢你。这是报酬，请收好。
E: Great work, {NICKNAME}. Thank you so much. Here's your reward, there you go.

C: 还愣着干啥，追啊！
E: What are you just standing there for? Go after her!

C: 宁芙，我很抱歉。动静很大，她很难过。
E: Nympha, I'm so sorry. There was a lot, going on, and she was really upset.

C: 她不想给你压力。
E: She never wanted to put any pressure on you.

C: 她将怀里的东西抛向你——是你丢失的钱袋，里面一分都没少。
E: She throws the thing she's holding in her arms at you — your lost money pouch. Not a single penny is missing.

C: 至于我们，外邦人——未知的威胁愈发迫近，时刻保持警惕吧。
E: As for us, the outlanders — the unknown threat is getting closer. Let's stay vigilant at all times.

C: 只可惜这里既没有什么好用的防御设施，黑潮的推进方式也远非普通军事力量可比。
E: Unfortunately, there are no useful defensive facilities here, and the black tide's method of advance is far beyond what ordinary military forces can handle.

C: 啊…？你…唉，谢谢你，朋友。不过别担心，我是跟着探险队过来的，那帮人虽然贵得要死，但保证我的安全还是没什么问题的。
E: Huh...? You... *sigh* I appreciate it, my friend, but I'm okay — got an expedition team with me. They cost an arm and a leg, but they'll keep me safe.

C: 千万别推辞，你要是不收下，我也没法安心，真的。
E: Please, I insist. I won't feel right if you don't take it, really.

C: 你是不知道啊，我前两天买了个二手设备，预算直接爆掉了，总感觉买贵了。
E: I didn't tell you but I bought a second-hand device a couple of days ago and it blew out my budget. I feel like I paid too much.

C: 哎，快忙晕了。
E: *Sigh* I'm crazy busy right now.

C: 公告说必须回复收到。
E: The notice said that we have to confirm receipt.

C: 老样子。
E: Same same.

C: 噢，这有什么，你就当放假不就完了？
E: Oh, what's the matter? Why don't you just treat it like a vacation?

C: 什么那个？能配胰酶的试剂不少，但你要的是哪个？
E: Some what? There are lots of reagents that can make trypsin. Which one do you want?

C: 咱们科有位前辈，他设计的那个神经网络比你现在用的模型简单。你可以用他的那个试试。
E: There's a senior researcher in our department who designed a way simpler neural network than the model you're using. Why don't you try his instead?

C: 嗯，那就好。你也别怪我啰嗦，毕竟刚被「军团」入侵过。我们还是谨慎点为好。
E: Ah, that's good then. Don't hold it against me for being pedantic. We've only just survived a raid by the Legion. Let's keep going at it with caution.

C: 据说翁法罗斯在最繁盛的时候，曾有超过<unbreak>1200</unbreak>只大地兽在这片土地上栖息，多么惊人的数字啊。所以，你知道这意味着什么吗？
E: It's said that during its prime, Amphoreus was home to over <unbreak>1,200</unbreak> dromases. What an astounding number! So, do you know what that means?

C: 噢，天哪，那个人影还在朝你招手，并且变得愈发清晰，你依稀辨认出它正呼唤你过去。
E: Oh dear, that figure is waving at you now, growing clearer by the second. You vaguely recognize it as if it's calling you over.

C: 不光是您，我也想要赔偿。就在前几天，我按惯常的时间来到工坊，准备开始今天的工作。您猜怎么着——栏里的大地兽突然多出来了一头！
E: It's not just you, even I want compensation! Just a few days ago, as I arrived at the workshop at my usual time to start the day's work, guess what? There was suddenly one more dromas in the pen!

C: 你变成大地兽了？
E: You've turned into a dromas?

C: 蕾莉亚——！
E: LELIA—!

C: 为什么你们只是看着？
E: Why are you just standing by and watching?

C: 是神明！是那些高高在上的泰坦！
E: The gods! Those great Titans!

C: 什么情况，还排练不排练了？
E: What's going on? Are we still rehearsing?

C: 伊俄，你负全责。
E: Eio, the full responsibility is yours.

C: 将供奉放在祭坛，双手合十，诚心诵念三遍祷词。
E: Place the offering on the altar, fold your hands, and recite the prayer three times with sincerity.

C: 「长长的直阶，通往全世的座前。」——原来画本里说的都是真的！
E: "The long straight stairway leads to the Throne of Worlds" — So the picture book was telling the truth!

C: 这事说来话长了——
E: That's a long story—

C: 我们也来帮忙！世界都要重启了，最后的时刻不疯狂一把，未免也太亏了。大不了来世再见嘛！
E: We'll help too! The world is about to reset, and if we don't go all out in these final moments, it'd be such a waste. Hey, worst case scenario, we'll meet again in the next life!

C: 呵呵，不通人性的野兽，你们要是听说过我的名字，一定会望风而逃。
E: Hehe, you senseless beasts. If you knew who I am, you'd be running for your lives.

C: 呼哧，呼哧…这帮怪物…怎么像追着要签名的崇拜者一样不依不饶！
E: Huff, huff... These creatures... chasing me like fans desperate for an autograph!

C: 最强的矛和盾。
E: ...is the Strongest Lance and Shield.

C: 言之有理！
E: You're right!

C: 我想让他们知道，刻法勒的声音有多么坚定、温暖，奥赫玛绝对不会被黑潮攻陷，背负世界的泰坦从没有忘记过我们这些平民。
E: Let them feel the determination and warmth in Kephale's voice, let them be convinced that Okhema will stand tall against the black tide, and the Titan who bears the world has never forgotten about us.

C: 刻法勒也不想回答这种，呃，有点蠢的问题吧。
E: Kephale won't answer such... stupid questions.

C: 吟风爵，我果然想吃瓜。
E: Dux Carminum, I'm dying to hear the tea.

C: 阿波罗尼展开信笺，细细阅读了一番。
E: Apollonius unfolds the letter and reads it carefully.

C: 此前我同你说过，维吉妮娅是风一般的诗人。而我…我是山崖上的一枚顽石。
E: As I told you before, Verginia is a poet like the wind. And I... I am but a stubborn boulder on a cliff.

C: …这次的出走，我竟然犹豫了这么久。再会，伙伴们…愿你们能永享这无休的欢宴。
E: ...I can't believe I hesitated for so long about leaving. Farewell, my friends... May you forever enjoy this endless banquet.

C: 列车上的光源设置得很合理，车窗这边的视野也棒。
E: The lighting on the Express is perfect for observations. Great views at the windows too.

C: 上次出诊时，有个孩子哭得厉害，他经常在我这儿看病，该听的故事也都听过了，那天怎么哄他，他都不肯听。
E: The last time I was out in the field, there was a crying child. I'd seen him before many times at the clinic — he'd heard all my usual stories... But that day, no matter what I said to him, he wouldn't listen.

C: 说起来，你还记得我们先前在雪原中的经历吗？
E: Do you remember us walking through the Snow Plains?

C: 帕姆才不会这么做呢，不许你这么说帕姆。
E: Pom-Pom wouldn't do that. You're not allowed to say that about Pom-Pom.

C: 喔——太好了！这样就有两个人一起玩了！
E: Yay! We've got two contestants!

C: 为了让列车重新动起来，花了不少功夫，很辛苦。
E: She said it took a lot of hard work to get it back on track. I bet it was difficult.

C: 总算成行了……
E: Time to depart...

C: 这里可以添加些设备……
E: Some devices can be deployed here...

C: 有个问题不知当问不当……
E: I have a question for you that I am hesitant to ask...

C: 乘坐星穹列车徜徉宇宙…真令人羡慕啊。
E: Wandering the universe on the Astral Express... *sigh* One can only be envious!

C: 你觉得如何？
E: What do you think of this place?

C: 说起来，罗浮上也曾有类似的生灵。但它们并非在空中遨游，而是生活在水中，叫做「渊兽」。
E: That reminds me, there were similar creatures that lived on the Luofu... They didn't travel freely through the heavens though — they lived in water. We called them depth crawlers.

C: 这么一想，列车真是个不错的秘密基地。
E: Now that I think of it, the Express really would make a good secret base.

C: 没人会追到这里来吧……
E: Nobody will think to come looking here...

C: 谢谢你的邀请，我很喜欢这里～
E: Anyway, thanks for the invitation, I really like it here~

C: 我真的不能收下呀……
E: I really can't accept them...

C: 哦！又是一位迷失之人。不要担心，不要着急，我会为你指引道路。
E: Oh! Here's another lost soul. Don't worry. I'll show you the way.

C: 我有些事情想问你…
E: I have a few questions for you...

C: 嗯嗯，好的好的，嗯嗯。
E: Mmm, sure sure.

C: 但为什么是星球仪？这也太奇怪了吧……
E: But why the armillary sphere? That's so odd...

C: 我一句都没听懂…
E: I didn't get any of that...

C: 我往后，大概会常来列车上下棋的……
E: Perhaps I should start making regular chess visits to the Express...

C: 你按这个方子先调一杯。要是喝不惯…那便是糖的问题。本座下次给你带仙舟的糖粉来。
E: You should at least try making one cup. If you don't like the flavor... then it must be the sugar. I'll bring some Xianzhou powdered sugar next time.

C: 不管怎样，我们都必须继续脚踏实地地生活下去…相比藏在宇宙深处的古老存在，大部分人还是更在乎下一顿饭的着落。
E: Whatever the case, we must continue living, one step at a time... Most people are doing their best to survive — they have no time to ponder ancient beings hidden in the universe.

C: 以贝洛伯格目前拥有的力量，想要帮上无名客的忙，恐怕还遥不可及…但我仍旧希望有一天，能成为各位的后盾。
E: With what power Belobog currently holds, we are far from being able to assist the Nameless... However, I do hope that one day we can provide you with reliable support.

C: 「伙伴」…好久没听到这个词了，哈哈，有同路人相伴，真好啊。
E: Companions... I have not heard that word in a very long time. Haha, how auspicious to be in the company of those on the same road.

C: …列车上的大家对我很好，我打算帮上忙之后再逃走。
E: Everyone on the Express has been so nice to me... I'm only running away after I've helped out...
*sigh*

C: 对我来说，纸本书能让我时刻意识到知识的重量，这是数据永远无法替代的感知。
E: To me, holding a physical book constantly reminds one of the gravity of knowledge, an experience that digital data just can't replicate.

C: 可惜，大多数人都不明白这道理…知识看似免费，却最为昂贵。
E: Regrettably, most languish in ignorance... They fail to grasp that while knowledge appears costless, its true value is immeasurable.

C: 可能会变成催吐剂。
E: It might become a vomit-inducing agent.

C: {NICKNAME}，能把列车上的垃圾借我合几个吗？偶尔被子弹屑卡住喉咙的时候可能用得上。
E: {NICKNAME}, can I borrow some trash from the Express to synthesize? Might come in handy when bullets get stuck in my throat.

C: 哈哈，不请自来也行的那种？开个玩笑！放心吧，我是个有原则的人。
E: Haha, can I just show up without notice? Just kidding. I do have principles.

C: 这次你要炸列车了？！
E: Are you going to blow up the Express this time!?

C: 合作对象储备库？
E: The Partner Database?

C: 我打算前往他陨落的地方，为他立碑，并献上一枚纯美骑士的勋章。{NICKNAME}，期待下次的相见。
E: I intend to head to the location of his passing, erect a monument to him, and confer upon him a medal of the Knights of Beauty. {NICKNAME}, I look forward to our next meeting.

C: 不知我可否帮得上忙？倘若需要更多有关「纯美」的信息，请随时来找我。
E: I wonder if I could be of help? Please seek me out anytime if you require more information about the Beauty.

C: 我昨晚一夜没睡……
E: I didn't get a wink of sleep last night.

C: 若能抓住这种机遇，恩公或许也能小赚一笔呢。
E: If you can seize this kind of opportunity, you might find yourself with quite the windfall!

C: 这么大的蛋糕，应该够列车组分的……
E: A cake this size should be enough for the Express Crew to share...

C: 听说这款蛋糕的奶油加了酸梦剂，吃多了不仅不会腻，反而会胃口大增。说不定会越吃越饿呢！
E: I heard they added Sour Dream Potion into the cream for this cake. You won't feel sick even after eating a lot of it. Your appetite will even increase. Perhaps the more you eat, the hungrier you'll get!

C: 静止的画面似乎是空间站接驳车的行程图，它们还能等来下一位客人吗？你很怀疑。
E: The still image on the screen appears to be the route map for the space station shuttle buses. Will there still be passengers for them to pick up? You doubt it.

C: 但是不行，老实说，我很喜欢华莱士，但我可不能为了友情损失一位大客户。
E: But still, no can do. To be honest with you, I like Wallace, but I can't lose a big client just for the sake of friendship.

C: 不能公私分明吗？
E: Can't you separate life and work?

C: 这又脏了，都是你干的好事！
E: It's dirty again all thanks to you!

C: 呣呣呣…扣子怎么会扣不上呢……
E: Hmmm... how can a button be so stubborn...

C: 行政区这儿有几套私宅，都得雇人打理，还要交土地税。你说租出去吧？又懒得费这个心思，时间也是钱啊。再说，那些宅子里还放了不少古董……
E: I have a couple of properties in the Administrative District that require maintenance. I have to pay taxes for them. But I'm far too lazy to rent them out — I mean, time is money! Besides, they're full of priceless relics...

C: 至于下面来的人呢，张口谈政策，闭口谈钱谈生意。我啊，和他们根本聊不来，没劲透了！
E: As for the people who come from below, all they talk about is policies, money, and business. There is absolutely nothing I can talk to them about. How painfully mundane!

C: 对，我是外星人。
E: You're right, I'm an alien.

C: 你刚刚还说在忙…
E: You just said you were busy...

C: 是啊，职业病。我以前是文学记者，每天就是变着法地往句子里塞形容词，要是读者能在三行内弄清楚主谓宾，主编就要扣我奖金。
E: I can't help myself, I used to be a literary journalist. Every day I was trying to add more adjectives to the sentence anywhere I could fit them. I wouldn't get my bonus if readers can easily deduce the subject, predicate, and object within three lines.

C: 《雪国冒险奇谭》是什么？
E: What exactly is Tale of the Winterlands?

C: 其实和我没太大关系，但你应该也有所耳闻吧？新任大守护者继任、下层区重新开放之类的，就是那些在城里传得沸沸扬扬的事。
E: It doesn't really have much to do with me, actually. You've probably heard about what's been going on, right? The new Supreme Guardian assumed her role, and the Underworld reopened. It's all news that has the city abuzz.

C: 虽然都是舞台剧，但隔行如隔山。
E: Both are theatrical arts, true. But the skills they require are hardly transferable.

C: 唉，哪有这么容易的事。
E: I'm afraid it's not that easy.

C: 唉，总之谢谢你愿意听我倾诉，和你聊过之后我感觉好多了。但是千万不要和别人说哦，请保守你我的秘密。
E: No worries. Thanks for listening to me. I feel much better already. Please keep this conversation a secret.

C: 有些剧评人说「贝洛伯格在改变，但音乐剧还是那么老土做作」…总之啊，在那之后小女子又接了些小角色来演，想好好打磨下演技啦～
E: Some critics said that Belobog has changed, but its musicals are still singing the same old tune. The point is, after that, I start taking on small roles. I want to polish my acting chops.

C: 那…你找我有什么要紧事吗？我现在没有聊闲天的心情……
E: Is there something important you wanted to see me about? I'm not in the mood for small talk...

C: 技术顾问是干什么的？
E: What does a technical consultant do?

C: 咦，这不是{NICKNAME}嘛！欢迎光临机械屋！
E: Oh, if it isn't {NICKNAME}! Welcome to the workshop!

C: 我看你只是吃饱了撑的。
E: I think you're just bored.

C: 行了，跟你聊这些真没意思。现在的同龄人啊，格局都打不开……
E: Anyway, why am I talking to you about this? Not everyone of my age sees the big picture...

C: 嘁，怎么都这个点了。我妈喊我回家吃饭，告辞！
E: Huh? Wow, it's getting late. My mom wants me home for dinner. See you later!

C: 我好像记得你，年轻人。怎么，读过防骗教程后有问题想问了吗？
E: I remember you, young person. Do you have any questions after reading the fraud prevention tutorial?

C: 你都帮他们处理什么法律问题？
E: What kind of legal issues do you help them with?

C: 都有些什么书？
E: What books do you have?

C: 有什么好评价的呀，我听说这是可可利亚大人的命令，但我想总归有她的道理吧…她可是大守护者诶，我不相信她还能相信谁?
E: What's there to say? I heard it's on Madam Cocolia's orders, but she has to have her reasons... She's the Supreme Guardian after all. If I can't trust her, who can I trust?

C: 别误会，我可不是为了省钱才只吃一顿的…主要还是因为我每天都会睡到自然醒，不怎么干活，能量消耗自然就少了。
E: Don't get me wrong. My goal isn't to save money... It's just that I sleep most of the day and I don't do much work, so my energy consumption is naturally low.

C: 祝你成功。
E: Here's to your success.

C: 哎呀，就、就算你这么夸我，我也不会感到开心的哦……
E: Well... um... your praise doesn't excite me...

C: 完了完了…
E: Uh-oh...

C: 我有事想问你…
E: There is something I want to ask you...

C: 居然有这么悠久的历史…
E: I didn't know it had such a long history...

C: 而这个风险嘛…自然是要各位顾客自己承担咯。
E: And the risk... Naturally is to be borne by customers themselves.

C: 不过我不喜欢看那些，有点害怕，就…其实我也没去过。这些都是我道听途说的，不好意思呀。
E: But I don't like those. They scare me... I've never been there. I only heard this from other people. I'm sorry.

C: 下次见，替我跟三月和丹恒问好。
E: So long. Say hello to March and Dan Heng for me.

C: 再见，娜塔莎。
E: Farewell, Natasha.

C: 尽管还有很多问题有待解决…但这无疑是个美妙的开端。这些都要归功于你，开拓者。
E: Even though there're still many things to fix... it sure is a great start. And it's all thanks to you, Trailblazer.

C: 今天找我有什么事？机修、聊天或者听歌都可以哦。
E: What are you after today? Repairs, a chat, or just listening to music?

C: 机械屋到底是做什么的？
E: What does the workshop actually do?

C: 你真的下定决心要离开了吗？
E: Have you really made up your mind to leave?

C: 不过这里的气氛最近确实变了。以前战事吃紧的时候，这禁区里根本就是一副死气沉沉的样子。现在你去看，大家的精气神那是明显不一样……
E: But the vibe here has really changed. Back when things were more serious, this restricted zone used to seem so solemn. But now, just look — everyone's spirits are completely different...

C: 不提也罢…我当时只是在执行命令而已。既然杰帕德戍卫官已经承认了你们的身份，那我自然也没有再刁难的必要了。
E: Let's not mention it... I was just carrying out my orders at the time. Since Captain Gepard has already acknowledged your identities, naturally, I didn't have to make things difficult back then.

C: 这你都能猜到？她不会和你聊过这事吧？
E: What a guess! She didn't tell you beforehand, did she?

C: 是的，但我们的交流基本止于工作——不过她与希露瓦来往尤为密切，因此我们在工作之外的生活中也有所接触。
E: Yes, but our interactions mostly revolve around work. Though, she is quite close to Serval, which is to say, our lives do somewhat intersect outside of work.

C: 欢迎下次光临！
E: Come back next time!

C: 只是…目前的进展不太顺利。克拉拉还没有找到合适的办法……
E: But... it's not going well at the moment. I haven't thought of any bright ideas...

C: 正好，我还欠你们一句感谢的话——多谢你们帮这座城市重新走上了正轨，外来者。
E: Good timing, I still owe you a thank you: Thanks for getting this city back on the right track, outsider.

C: 将托帕与布洛妮娅合作一事转告给了奥列格……
E: You told Oleg about Topaz and Bronya's cooperation...

C: 脆弱，纯真，年幼的眼望着窗外见闻
E: Fragile, innocent, young eyes peeking out the windows

C: 上一页记录着浪漫星光，下一秒涂画出悲痛断肠
E: Noting down the starlight, oh it's so romantic, then painting a scene that's heartbreaking and tragic

C: 哟…听好。
E: Right... Listen up.

C: …你可不要和布洛妮娅大人说这些事呀，她会生气的——虽然我们现在已经得到了她的许可就是了。
E: ...Please don't tell Lady Bronya though. She might get upset — even though our work now have her blessings.

C: 哦…你说的是俱乐部的老板史考特先生吧？没有，我跟他不熟。
E: Oh... You mean the boss of the club? No, I don't really know him well.

C: 哟，这不是{NICKNAME}吗？真是好久不见了。
E: Hey, if it isn't {NICKNAME}! It's been a while.

C: 什么升级？
E: What kind of upgrade are we talking about?

C: 好啊，您想聊什么？
E: Sure thing! What's on your mind?

C: 自从决定归还次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神之后，这只扑满在空间站最大的乐趣就是等待你的到来。你们已经很久没见了——也许吧？
E: Ever since you decided to return Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord, the Trotter's greatest joy at the space station has been waiting for your visits. Perhaps, you haven't seen each other in some time?

C: 去剧院碰碰运气吧。
E: Let's try our luck in the theater.

C: 哈？那我要买东西怎么办？
E: So... How am I supposed to go shopping then?

C: 我有一朋友……
E: I have a friend...

C: 新款矿脂护手霜！
E: An all-new petroleum jelly hand cream!

C: 在克里珀堡工作吗？工资多少？
E: Do you work at Qlipoth Fort? How much do you earn?

C: 我们的目的地是……
E: Our destination is...

C: 我也有苦衷嘛……
E: I've got my own dilemma too...

C: 得再进点原料才行。
E: We need more raw materials for that.

C: 好的，请跟我来！
E: Alright, please follow me!

C: 幽囚狱中关了太多犯人，不论道德水准，他们的才华和能力都是顶尖的——这也是他们只能被关在幽囚狱的原因。
E: There are too many prisoners locked away in The Shackling Prison. Morality aside, these people are the cream of the crop in terms of talent and capacities — This is precisely why they have to be locked away in The Shackling Prison.

C: 老板您是要给自己取名字吗？哎呀，这样的需求我还是见的比较少。
E: Oh, seeking a name for yourself? That is a rare request indeed.

C: 建木又长起来了…
E: The Ambrosial Arbor is growing again...

C: 所以…你最喜欢什么菜来着？
E: So... what's your favorite dish?

C: 咱现在还记清清楚楚呢，当时从后厨出来看到建木长出来的画面…建木不再生长之后倒再没出过这么大的动静了。
E: I still remember clearly that scene, when I was in my kitchen and I came out and saw it growing... I've never seen anything so spectacular since it stopped growing.

C: 真希望他能多上点心在书店这里啊…客人，有什么想要买的书吗？
E: How I wish he could pay a little more attention to his bookstore business... Ah well. Have you got any books there that you'd like to buy?

C: 我下次再来光临。
E: I'll be back next time.

C: 简而言之…那个姑娘喜欢诗人。然而如你所见，我在诗歌上的造诣还略有欠缺。
E: In short... this girl loves poets. However, as you can see, I'm slightly lacking when it comes to the poetry department.

C: 这里提到「彦卿」，是一种叫作「对比」的修饰手法。这是在说我比那个天才剑客还要帅气、还要潇洒、还要优雅……
E: I mention "Yanqing" here as a literary device. I'm saying here that I'm even more handsome, dashing, and graceful than the genius fighter...

C: 其实「规范」非常简单，但「技术」特别难。无论我去询问谁，他们都说「诗歌不能谈技术，这不浪漫」，可是技术也可以浪漫呀？
E: These rules are a piece of cake, and it's the techniques that're particularly hard. But no matter who I ask, they always come back to me with "you can't talk about technique with poetry. That's not romantic." But can't technology be romantic, too?

C: 你会工造技术？
E: You know about artifex technology?

C: 因为我是一朵正在收集阳光的蘑菇。
E: Because I'm a sunbathing mushroom.

C: 噢。我更悲伤了。
E: Oh, now I feel even sadder.

C: 别别别，我们这点儿小打小闹就不麻烦地衡司了。
E: No no no, please don't bother the Realm-Keeping Commission with this little tiff of ours.

C: 你什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 你注意到建木又长起来了吗？
E: Did you notice the Ambrosial Arbor was growing once again?

C: 客人？这称呼是从何说起啊…
E: A customer? In this place...?

C: 你犯了什么罪？
E: What crime did you commit?

C: 步离人也会做生意？
E: Borisin know how to do business?

C: 后来有一次，猎群出去劫掠商队时，我爹就把我塞进了兽舰，想让我「手上沾点血，成为一个真正的男人！」
E: One day while the pack was out looting a caravan, my father forced me onto a beast ship so I would "stain my hands with blood and become a real man!"

C: 那一刻我突然意识到，原来万物皆有自己的价值。
E: That was when I realized everything in this world has its worth.

C: 感觉你也没做什么坏事。
E: It feels like you didn't do anything bad.

C: 这种人生大事，你自己都不操心吗？
E: Aren't you even the slightest bit concerned about such an important occasion?

C: 看到了，看到了。说到建木…要不要来一副「建木正气膏」？
E: Yep, I saw it. Speaking of which... Would you like a jar of "Ambrosial Arbor Ointment"?

C: 现在预购，只需要三百巡镝，机不可失时不再来啊！
E: Pre-order now for just <unbreak>300</unbreak> strales. You don't want to miss out!

C: 哈哈，这说明那个叫景元的有眼不识泰山……
E: Haha, that just means Jing Yuan doesn't realize how famous his dear brother is...

C: 抱歉。我这几百年都忙着应付军队和战争事宜，没什么和闲人交流的经验。多有冒犯，请包涵。
E: Sorry, I've been dealing with military affairs and wars for so many centuries that I don't really get a chance to communicate with idlers like yourself. I'm sorry for offending you.

C: 我必须提醒你，神策府的相关资料大都是仙舟机密…总之，请你问的时候适当掂量掂量，尽量不要问一些机要之事。
E: Please let me remind you that most of the information we handle here is top secret... Basically, please be careful and considerate with your questions, and try your best not to ask anything too sensitive.

C: 这个小故事怎么样，还算满意吧？
E: How about this story, then? Good enough for you?

C: 很多人都知道，景元师承自一位大师。但是，绝大多数人都误以为那是一位剑术大师，实际上，很少有人知道那其实是一位相声大师。
E: Lots of folks know Jing Yuan had a mentor. But most people get it wrong and think the mentor was some swordmaster. Nah, only a few peeps know the real deal — the mentor was actually a great crosstalk comedian.

C: 虽然卑职尚在执勤，但聊聊也无妨。您想聊些什么？
E: Despite the fact I'm still on duty, a little chat should be alright. What would you like to chat about?

C: 这臭小子不听老姐这边的需求，只会转移话题，{NICKNAME}大人，你说说他呀。
E: This punk isn't listening to his sister, and keeps trying to change the subject. {NICKNAME}, can you have a word with him?

C: 但要说枯燥，那也是挺枯燥的。幽囚狱这个地方贼古怪，也不知道是不是因为与世隔绝的原因，在这里待久了会觉得时间过得很快。
E: But if we're talking monotonous, yeah. The Shackling Prison is an extremely strange place. I'm not sure if it is due to the separation from the real world, but once you've been here for a long time, it feels like no time has passed at all.

C: 那大人您请自便，有需要再喊我。
E: Then please feel free to look around, {M#sir}{F#ma'am}. Call me if you need anything.

C: 个人的小道消息。
E: A personal gossip from you.

C: 我这个人比较怕麻烦，你要是有那种做起来不累也不麻烦的事情可以来找我。
E: I'm the kind of person who hates inconvenience. If you have any kind of work that's not too tiring, not too troublesome — then I'm down for that.

C: 我是天舶司翔水商会派驻在流云渡的专员，负责接洽来到罗浮进行商业贸易的域外行商。
E: I'm a representative of the Aquaglider Guild sent to Cloudford by the Sky-Faring Commission to handle all Outworld traveling merchants who come and trade on the Luofu.

C: 枪手有着不幸的过去，脸上总是露出被背上回忆笼罩的表情。我一度以为棺材可能是空的——每当别人问他棺材里放着什么，他总是回答是自己。
E: The gunslinger had this troubled past that's etched onto a face clouded by memories. At one point I thought the coffin would be empty — every time someone asked him what was in the coffin, he replied that it was himself.

C: 哟，老爷你又来了？要再随便聊聊吗，反正闲着也是闲着。
E: Oh, you're still here, boss? Wanna have another chat? I'm not up to anything anyway.

C: 当然，每个老板的实际情况都不一样，具体要做些什么，这就得视乎老板们的需求了。
E: But of course, every customer has their own custom order. The specifics of what I actually do are governed by the needs of the customer.

C: 货物装卸这事吧，说起来简单，无非是用机巧臂操纵下集装箱什么的。但实践起来，里面的学问可不少。我也是几十年下来天天干这事儿，这才练出了名头。
E: Handling freight — packing and unloading — sounds simple enough, right? It's just containers being moved around by a big mechanical crane. But in practice, it takes a lot of learning to do. I've been doing this day-in, day-out for decades. That's just how long it takes to earn a reputation for it.

C: 不过您看，十王司根本没有看上去那么可怕。恐怕整个银河，也只有十王司愿意接纳像我这种无法融入社会的人了。
