E: But as you see, the Ten-Lords Commission isn't that scary. I'm afraid in all the cosmos, only they will accept a social outcast like me.

C: 好的，大人若还有问题随时找我。
E: Very well. If you have any more questions, please come and find me.

C: 哎，要是太卜司的人都能像您这样，我也不会生这么大气了。
E: Ah, if everyone at the Divination Commission were like you, I wouldn't have gotten so worked up about things.

C: 肃清鳞渊境内的药王秘传残党。阁下要是有什么线索，随时可以提供给在下。阁下要是有什么疑问…那还是请您去问德威吧。
E: Eliminating the remnant Disciples of Sanctus Medicus here. If you have any leads, please let me know at any time. And if you have any further questions... Then please direct those to Dewei.

C: 没什么事了。
E: I have nothing else.

C: 欢迎客官您下次再来。
E: I warmly invite you to visit again next time.

C: 是啊。那天我正好在送货，远远的看到一群步离人冲杀了出去。
E: I was. I happened to be on a delivery that day, but I saw a group of borisin fighting their way out in the distance.

C: 但我看她离职之后眼睛里有光，是比不少眼神涣散的卜者要健康不少的。
E: But I can see her eyes sparkling after quitting her job. She seems healthier than those diviners who always look lethargic.

C: 您明白了吧？这，可是正儿八经的商业竞争。
E: Do you understand now? We're talking about a bona fide business competition.

C: 我有些印象，金人巷商会在你的帮助下拿下了地区经营权。
E: I think I remember you. The Aurum Alley Merchant Guild got the rights to operate this area with your help.

C: 光有日记可不够，还是得再买几箱「鳞渊冰泉」才好。
E: Just diary books won't be enough. I need to buy some crates of Scalegorge Spring Water...

C: 个人推荐金人巷里的店子，比如说那家「尚滋味」餐厅，去的好像都是罗浮本地人，好吃不贵，做法又很独特，我个人是强烈推荐你去吃吃看的。
E: Personally, I'd recommend the stores in Aurum Alley. For example, Spices Supreme is a restaurant only frequented by the locals. I strongly recommend you to try the unique and affordable dishes there.

C: 客人知道我这人恪守秘密，还是想继续打听…那么打听也得有打听秘密的规矩，比如说秘密交换秘密？
E: You know that I am committed to keeping secrets, but still want to probe...? Fine, but probing has a price, too. Are you willing to share a secret of your own in exchange for one of mine?

C: 来来来，这边请——我这里兜售各色奇珍异宝，老板您要不要来瞧瞧？
E: Come in, come in! I have all sorts of wondrous treasures here! May I interest you with something?

C: 你别瞧着有些物什表面破旧，但来历可不简单，不是失传的手工艺品，就是得去龙潭虎穴里才能搞到的原生态药材。
E: These "rags" may look old and cheap, but their histories are anything but ordinary. They are either lost artifacts or precious medicines that can only be obtained from the jaws of death.

C: 有机生物？那你能变有机苹果？
E: Organic life form? Then, can you turn into an organically produced apple?

C: 体型差距？你不能随地大小变？
E: Size difference? You can change how large you are at will?

C: 你因为什么被关起来的？
E: Why are you locked up here?

C: 那时的会长告诉我「你要好好记住眼前的风景，金人巷商会的使命就是要将这样的繁荣一直延续下去」……
E: At that time, my predecessor told me, "Remember the view you are seeing now. The Aurum Alley Merchant Guild is dedicated to continuing such prosperity for generations to come." Well...

C: 我听说过天才俱乐部的「天才贵族」螺丝咕姆。
E: Well, I've heard of Screwllum, the "Genius Aristocrat" of the Genius Society.

C: 最近一切还好吗？
E: How's everything lately?

C: 客官，要来尝尝正宗的罗浮小吃吗？绝对让您回味无穷！
E: Want to try some local Luofu snacks, customer? You'll love them!

C: 我的心能恢复如初吗？
E: Can you fix my broken heart?

C: {NICKNAME}，若不是老师不在，我们现在估计早已成为同门了吧。
E: If Master were still here, {NICKNAME}, I guess we would have become peers by now.

C: 我开这店主要是和同好交个朋友，你若真找到心头好了，价格都好说。
E: I opened this store mainly to make friends with fandangle lovers. If you find something you really like, I can give you the best price.

C: 你看见的是仙舟「苍城」，仅仅是只鳞片角便已遮天蔽日。飞速行驶中，它与噬界罗睺相撞……
E: You are seeing the Xianzhou Cangcheng. Even a corner of it is colossal enough to block all the stars and darken the sky. It is flying at a dazzling speed and then collides into Rahu, Devourer of Worlds...

C: 无妨无妨，神策府的公务是永远处理不完的，就让青镞再等一等好了。
E: No worries. The work at the Seat of Divine Foresight is endless and will never be finished. Qingzu can wait.

C: 当然是《云骑英烈传》，我小时候可喜欢听了，每次我家附近的说书先生一开讲，我就立马从家里偷偷溜出去听，每次都被我娘提溜回来。
E: The Cloud Knight Martyrs, no doubt. I was so into it when I was little. Whenever the storyteller nearby started his session, I would sneak out of my house immediately to listen to him. My mom never failed to haul me back every time.

C: 在外人看来，本座是权欲熏心，又或者酷爱征伐，才会如此渴求持节将兵吧…这样的流言我听过不少，倒也无所谓。
E: Outsiders might see me craving for military authority, then surmise that I am power-hungry or fanatical about warfare... I've heard many such rumors and have paid them no mind.

C: 好，路上小心。若有任何需求，随时可以向夕葵开口，天舶司一定配合。
E: Please take care on your way home. If you need anything, you can contact Xikui. We'll do our best to help you.

C: 下次见，记得带点儿小点心来。
E: See you. Don't forget to bring me some snacks next time.

C: …我什么时候才能像她一样。
E: ...I wonder when I can become like her.

C: 不过，她以前只和吾谈论工作中遇到的故事，现在却总会提起几位与工作无关「友人」。
E: That said, she used to only relate encounters she had at work to me, but she now tells me stories about her friends outside of work too.

C: …她应该给自己放个假了。
E: ...She should give herself a holiday.

C: 嗯，我这里还有些要处理的事情，请一路小心。
E: Yeah, I've still got some things to take care of here. Take care!

C: 资料已确认。{NICKNAME}，此前未能辨认出你的身份，金人勾魂使四卅七号向你致歉。
E: Information verified. Aurumaton Spectral Envoy No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> hereby apologizes for failing to identify {NICKNAME}.

C: 「不赦十恶」是仙舟联盟律法中最为严重的十条罪名，以下内容引自《十王刑统》：
E: The Ten Unpardonable Sins are the ten most serious offenses in the Xianzhou Alliance's law. The following is quoted from the Ten Lords' Penal Code:

C: 请多保重。金人勾魂使四卅七号为你祈福。
E: Take care. Aurumaton Spectral Envoy No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> prays for you.

C: 请多保重。金人勾魂使四卅七号为你祈福。
E: Take care. Aurumaton Spectral Envoy No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> prays for you.

C: 建木刚开始生发的时候，大家都吓得不轻，人心惶惶的，还有谁会来买我们的高级定制呢？过季的成衣都快跟抹布一个价了！
E: When the Ambrosial Arbor first started growing, everyone was terrified. Who would think to purchase haute couture clothing at such moments in their lives? The out-of-season ready-made clothes are becoming as cheap as dishcloths!

C: 客气了，欢迎客人下次光临惠顾。
E: You're too kind. You're welcome back any time.

C: 客人您说笑了，要是一般的危机，在商言商，那的确是个低买高卖的好时间，何况仙舟上最不缺的便是时间……
E: You must be teasing me. If the crisis had been an ordinary one, it would indeed have been a perfect time to buy low and sell high. We all have plenty of time on Xianzhou to wait for prices to rise, after all...

C: 「看来你对控制金属颇为自信，我只用一杯茶水如何？」
E: "It appears you're rather confident of your metal manipulation. How about I just use one cup of tea?"

C: 家父当时想着临近港口，过路的行人旅客需要歇脚休息。这茶水生意肯定能红红火火，得各位客官照顾，才有了今日之成就。
E: Dad wanted to be near to the port, with all the tired and thirsty people nearby. It was always sure to be a booming business, and we owe all our successes to the kindness of our customers.

C: 想和你聊聊。
E: I want to have a chat with you.

C: 说真的，星槎海没有美食吗？
E: Is it true? That there's no good food in the Starskiff Haven?

C: 我早就已经是烂人了。
E: I'm not exactly a role model to begin with.

C: 正经人谁写日记啊。你写日记吗？我不写日记。
E: Who keeps a diary? Do you write in a diary? I don't.

C: 那石狮子能被吹到星槎海？
E: A stone lion blown to Starskiff Haven?

C: 哎哟，这不是风停了嘛，它呀又回神策府上班去了。
E: *sigh* The wind has stopped, hasn't it? So it went back to the Seat of Divine Foresight to do its job.

C: 最原初的人们手无缚鸡之力，但他们锻炼了肌肉，从此便能承受重量，改造自然！你有想过吗，要是在筋肉的命途上走得足够远，人们能做到什么吗？
E: The ancients were frail. To overcome that, they trained and built their muscles, eventually gaining the power to bear heavy burdens and reshape nature! Now, have you ever wondered what humans can achieve if they keep advancing on the Path of Brawn?

C: 以后再聊吧。
E: Let's catch up another time.

C: 物流行业真是越来越重要了。
E: The logistics industry is becoming more and more important these days.

C: 听起来有点拗口…
E: A bit of a tongue-twister...

C: 对不起…
E: Sorry...

C: 不要问小孩子这么难的问题啦！
E: Don't ask a kid such a difficult question!

C: 有一些不懂的想问问。
E: I'd like to ask you some questions.

C: 没别的事了，我先走啦。
E: That's all. I'll take my leave now.

C: 我给你推荐几名强者。
E: I can recommend some formidable opponents to you.

C: 要是当时我能坚持我的主张，也许他们不至于会遭受「毁灭」的命运。所以，我一定会说服仙舟放弃他们顽固的想法。
E: If I had insisted, perhaps they wouldn't have faced destruction. Thus, I must persuade Xianzhou to look beyond their stubborn ideals.

C: 没有，我说没有，就是没有。
E: No, and I mean no.

C: 嗯，你怎么好像还不知道一样，难道说只有我这么以为吗？
E: You don't seem to agree... Am I the only one who thinks that?

C: 哦，没想到你还记得这件事呢，等我想想，应该是最近的工作记录……
E: Oh, I'm surprised you still remember that. Let me think... I suppose it's included in my recent work log...

C: 呦！看来是位有钱的主。天底下哪有不好搞定的位置，就看您愿意花多少钱了！
E: Oh! It seems like we have ourselves a rich client. Well, there's no seat in this world that I cannot get. It just depends on how much you are willing to spend!

C: 那些负责安保的云骑根本追不上我，我一冲到台上就死死抱住彦卿大人，他们费了半天劲才把我们拉扯开。
E: Those Cloud Knights in charge of security could not even catch up to me. When I got onto the stage, I hugged Master Yanqing tightly, and it took quite a while before they managed to separate us.

C: 全银河？
E: Galactic?

C: 你有什么新创意？
E: Got any bright new ideas?

C: 简短一些…有了！
E: Shortening it... Okay!

C: 不太乐观…
E: I'm not very optimistic...

C: 是面对恐惧！
E: Is to stare down that fear!

C: 妈妈，我想全部都要。
E: Mommy, I want everything.

C: 当然甜了啊！
E: Of course it is!

C: 什么型号啊？
E: What model is it?

C: 没有，完全没有。只要能取一个*醒目*的标题，一切都会迎刃而解。
E: Not at all. An attention-grabbing headline can solve everything.

C: 先不打扰你了。
E: I'll stop bothering you for now.

C: 好啊，慢走，回头记得关注我在《曜青体育》上的专栏。
E: Sure. See you around, and don't forget to follow my column in Yaoqing Sports!

C: 都靠自动机巧记录报告多少年了，谁还用脑子来记啊。
E: For years, we've been relying on ingenia to record automatically — who still memorizes things manually!?

C: 所以真的可以御剑飞行吗？
E: Is it really possible to fly on a sword?

C: 说起来有些不好意思，我就是那个被困在魔阴身云骑身体里的岁阳。
E: It's a little embarrassing, but I'm the heliobus trapped inside the mara-struck Cloud Knight's body.

C: 我好想成为呜呜伯，我怎么就不是呜呜伯……
E: I want to become a Wubbaboo. Oh, why am I not yet a Wubbaboo...

C: 但很可惜，他那幼稚的女儿在得知了这件事后对他大加责怪，于是这个脆弱的家伙用一根绳子结束了自己的性命。
E: Unfortunately, his naive daughter remonstrated him upon learning of the incident, so the weak guy ended his life with a length of rope.

C: 你误会了，受苦不是我的爱好，变强才是我的爱好。
E: Make no mistake, suffering is not my hobby. Getting powerful is my hobby.

C: 我觉得多半是有变强大吧…不然我的苦就白吃了。
E: I think I've gotten more powerful... otherwise, my suffering would have been all for nothing.

C: 好在，有景元的策略，又有另外两位天将的勇武与老练，这桩呼雷之乱总算是没有酿成大祸……
E: Fortunately, with Jing Yuan's strategy and the courage and experience of the other two Arbiter-Generals, we were able to prevent Hoolay's rebellion from becoming a complete catastrophe...

C: 体谅一下，他们忙…
E: Be considerate, they're very busy...

C: 为了整点油炸土豆条。
E: To get some fried potato sticks.

C: 听说三位卜官关系极差…
E: I hear the three managing diviners really hate each other...

C: 不至于，不至于…
E: It's not that bad...

C: …我懂了，谢谢你。
E: ... I get it now. Thank you.

C: 因为…他？
E: Is it because of... him?

C: 没什么，是我丹方写得不够严谨。
E: It's just that I'm not meticulous enough when making prescriptions.

C: 呜…我感觉到了赐福在我体内，不停成长。
E: Oooh... I can feel the blessings in my bones, growing inside me.

C: 昏光庭院该何去何从…
E: What will become of the Twilight Courtyard...

C: 很高兴我们达成了共识。
E: I'm glad we've reached an agreement.

C: …我和你母亲吃一样的菜，迈德漠斯。
E: ...I'll have the same as your mother, Mydeimos.

C: 呃…是好心人听说我的丰功伟业之后，主动送来的，可热情了。我不要，他们还硬往我兜里塞呢。
E: Uh... some kind folks heard about my great achievements and eagerly brought these over. I tried to refuse, but they kept insisting on stuffing them in my pockets.

C: 搁这报菜名呢？
E: What is this, a restaurant menu?

C: 嘿嘿，*我们*希望能像天上的星星那样，散布在每个你失眠的夜晚。而现在，小灰也有一颗属于自己的星星啦！
E: Hehe, we hope to be like the stars in the sky, scattered across every sleepless night of yours. And now, you have a star of your very own, Little Gray!

C: 知道吗？我并非生来便流淌着金血。它就像君王的权柄，是我靠这双手抢来的。
E: You know what? I wasn't born with golden blood. Like a king's authority, I seized it with these hands.

C: 再让你这臭小子下地照料庄稼，还真有些大材小用了。
E: Having a talented kid like you work the fields would be a real waste of potential.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下…抱歉，让你见笑了。
E: {NICKNAME}, I'm sorry you had to witness this.

C: 假如用扎格列斯之手为缇安阿姐的火箭导向——
E: If we use the Hand of Zagreus to guide big sis Trianne's rockets—

C: 拜托，我早就不是抱着大地兽玩偶入睡的五岁孩子了。
E: Come on, I'm not a five-year-old who falls asleep hugging a dromas plushie anymore.

C: 不喜欢就算了吧！
E: No pressure if you don't want it!

C: 唉，我早就知道，你其实打心眼里喜欢「纷争」吧？一天不和怪物摔角，就手痒得睡不着觉？
E: Ahh... I knew all along that you just love Strife deep down, don't you? Can't even sleep a wink unless you've wrestled with monsters, huh?
You—

C: 感情都是吵出来的。
E: Some bonds are forged through fighting.

C: 至少答案是对的。
E: At least the answer was right.

C: 讲话又好听。
E: And such smooth talkers.

C: 听说你回来他就疯了。
E: He became crazy once he heard that you've come back.

C: 那都是江湖上的「浮名」，今年是你我，明年就是阿珍阿强了。
E: That's misguided fame. It might be you and me today, but nobody knows who it'll be next year.

C: 那不就是大暖炉么，也是消耗地髓来供暖吧？
E: Isn't that just a huge heater anyways? Does that also burn Geomarrow to provide heat?

C: 要看你自己看，我要去金人巷逛街了。
E: Well, enjoy yourself with the martial competition, then. I'm gonna go shopping at Aurum Alley.

C: 输就输了呗，有啥大不了的。
E: It's just a loss. It's not the end of the world.

C: 我二十岁时被剑首打败。
E: The Sword Champion beat me when I was <unbreak>20</unbreak>.

C: 当然可以，不过我有一个要求，你需要自己大喊出来，为自己壮壮胆！
E: Of course I can. But I also request that you shout it out to encourage yourself!

C: 差不多了，我该回去了。
E: Alright, I should head back.

C: 版权早进入公共领域了吧？
E: Its rights should be in the public domain already.

C: 空中监察系统已经上线，已检测到访客信息，{NICKNAME}，登录…登录成功。已确认访客并非十王司系统职员，本次调查将屏蔽掉部分囚犯信息。
E: Aerial surveillance system online, visitor information confirmed. {NICKNAME}, logging in... Log-in successful. Visitor is confirmed to not be a member of the Ten-Lords Commission. A portion of prisoner information will be blocked during this investigation.

C: 幽囚狱双年展的方式
E: Shackling Prison Biennial Exhibition mode

C: 我是～拟态海螺！
E: I am~ The conch mimic!

C: 我是～颓废的巨人！
E: I am~ The decadent giant!

C: *略感烦躁的沉默*
E: *tinge of irate silence*

C: 我看到了，你在下面控制着这鸟。
E: I see. You were controlling this bird from below.

C: 只要你找不到，就没有下次。
E: There won't be, if you can't find me.

C: 多亏了你，大家找到了正确的练习节奏。此时你可以卸下责任，悄然离开了。
E: It's all thanks to you that everyone got in the rhythm of doing it right. You can now unburden yourself of your duty and quietly leave.

C: 发射导弹也算武术么？
E: Firing missiles also considered martial arts?

C: 油润酥脆的包子，静静地躺在散发着热气的笼屉里。
E: A soft and fluffy bun is lying peacefully in the hot steamer.

C: 下场比赛见分晓！
E: Find out in the next round!

C: 这是「织机」，一台精密的术算机，用于码头调度。可为什么要将这种精密仪器露天摆放呢？答案很简单：司辰宫里放不下。
E: The loom is a precise calculation device used to manage the dock. Why is such an important instrument placed in the open? The answer is simple: It's too big to fit inside the Palace of Astrum.

C: 广告右侧写着「丹鼎药理，有开必有合」，对侧则是「用药之机，有补必有泻」——虽然完全不知所云，但它足够朗朗上口，应当是一幅成功的广告。
E: On the right side of the billboard, it reads, "In Alchemy Pharmacology, every opening has a closure." On its opposite side, it reads, "In the knowledge of medicine, everything consumed will be excreted." Although one can never make heads or tails of the phrases, they are memorable, making the advertisement a successful one.

C: 「慧骃一族为六肢动物，保有类似马匹的健硕躯干，后四肢着地，极善奔驰。」
E: "Houyhnhnms are six-legged animals with a muscular torso that looks like one of a horse. Their four hind limbs on the ground make them fast runners."

C: 「相传纳努克座下共有七位大君，分别代表『毁灭』命途的七种极致倾向。」
E: "Rumor has it that Nanook has seven Lord Ravagers, each representing one of the seven extremes of Destruction."

C: 买苏乐达送门票啦~
E: Buy a SoulGlad and get a free ticket!

C: 你拨开箱盖，把手伸了进去，掏出一大蓬稿纸。字迹飞扬跋扈，难以辨认，充满了不可遏抑的激情。你努力辨读了起来。
E: You open the lid and reach inside, fishing out a large stack of manuscripts. The handwriting is illegible, bossy, and full of unrestrained emotion. You try your best to read it.

C: 接下来是幻戏社为应聘者准备的测试考卷。试卷上只有几题被零星作答，关键的部分一片空白——想必阅卷人恐怕很难对白卷作出点评吧。
E: After that was a quiz prepared by the club to test its applicants. Only a few scattered questions were actually filled out, and the main part was left blank — presumably, it would be difficult for the marker to leave any comments on a blank submission.

C: 算了。
E: Forget it.

C: 你轻抚卵壳，看到了一面巨大的镜子，倒映出你身后数千名观众，但却没有你的身影。
E: You stroke the eggshell gently and see a huge mirror that reflects the thousands of audiences behind you, but there is no trace of your own figure.

C: 这很好。你想到，「魔术」就是要给人留下惊诧、困惑和遗憾，这才算得上是「舞台上的奇迹」。
E: Wonderful. You believe that a magic trick is only fit to be called a "miracle on stage" when it leaves its audiences shocked, bewildered, and with a sense of regret.

C: 有没有一种可能，也许有人已经悄悄调换了药丸和包装，但是至今无人发现？
E: Could it be possible that someone has already switched the pills and their packaging, but no one has ever noticed?

C: 「我们只知道，就算它被人盗走或损毁，第二天午夜还是会原封不动地出现在这里。而那些对纸箱下手的人，全都遭到了厄运。」
E: "All we know is that, even if they are stolen or destroyed, they will reappear intact here at midnight the next day. What's more, those that moved or damaged the boxes will all met their doom."

C: 你投入了一些财物，并虔诚祈愿「午夜谜箱」护佑你未来的开拓之路万事顺遂。
E: You place some money inside and make a devout prayer that the Midnight Mystery Boxes would protect you in your future Trailblaze journey.

C: 不是…凭什么啊？您这怎么一上就骗吃骗喝的？
E: But of course, I... Wait, you're thinking about food already? We just started the show — shouldn't we at least finish the first act?

C: 那你随便说点啥也行。
E: Well, you can just say anything.

C: 人一输牌就血压飙升…
E: When someone's on a losing streak, their blood pressure tends to rise...

C: 你太恶心了，我们俩合不来。
E: You're disgusting, we're not a good match.

C: 为啥啊，这家人我听你说的，又有钱又懂享受，还喜欢窝在家里，都符合你的喜好啊，不挺好的吗？
E: Why? You said the current one suits you since he is rich, loves luxurious life, and enjoys staying home. Isn't that perfect?

C: 是时候回到梦中去了…先小睡一会儿吧。
E: It's time to return to my dreams... I'll take a little nap.

C: 一个令人恼怒的恶作剧——也可能单纯是一场意外，没人知道。
E: An infuriating prank — or it could simply be an accident. Who knows.

C: 「零卡圣代，美味无负担。」
E: "Zero-calorie sundaes. Delicious and guilt-free."

C: 橱窗里琳琅满目的服饰预示了这家店铺不菲的消费。
E: The displays are full of dazzling clothes that imply the extravagant prices in the store.

C: 「…为了让您回到现实后不会对自己的外观感到失望，我们贴心地关闭了『外貌调整』功能。」
E: ...To ensure you do not feel disappointed in your looks when you return to reality, we have kindly turned off the Appearance Adjustment function.

C: 可惜周围没有梯子，不然你真的很想试试坐上去，悬浮在空中的感觉肯定很棒。
E: A pity there are no ladders around here, or you might really think of a way to sit in it — being suspended in midair must feel really exciting.

C: 啊，一位年轻的逐梦客。
E: Ah, it's a young Dreamchaser.

C: 凡是可能扰乱梦境秩序、或损害其他宾客权益的行为都会受到制裁。
E: Any behavior that may disrupt the Dreamscape's order or infringes upon the rights of other guests will be sanctioned.

C: 相比他们，我对那些真正怀揣梦想的逐梦客更感兴趣。他们选择孤注一掷，带着不成功便成仁的决心来到这里，只为了追逐一个泡影。
E: Compared to them, I'm more interested in the Dreamchasers who risk everything in their venture. It's all or nothing for them, and they're here to pursue something that might not be even real.

C: 惠特克爵士面无表情，炽热的目光穿透了你的脸庞。
E: Sir Whittaker's visage is expressionless, his burning gaze piercing through your face.

C: 不必紧张——我不会对你做什么，也不会深究它的来源。我只是感到好奇…拥有这份力量的人，未来会在梦想之地掀起什么样的波澜？
E: Relax. I won't do anything to you nor investigate the source of your power. I'm just curious... What kind of groundbreaking deeds will someone with that power achieve here in the future?

C: 我可得好好把这位爷供着…接送上下班是小事，洗衣做饭烧水搓澡都不在话下！
E: I'll have to treat this client like a king... chauffeuring him to and from work? No problem! Laundry, cooking, scrubbing his back, all part of the day's work!

C: 事先问问，您想去什么地方游览呢？
E: First things first: Where would you like to visit?

C: 毫无进展…家族的手脚不可能这么干净，肯定会留下痕迹……
E: I'm getting nowhere... The Family's hands can't be this clean, and there must be a clue somewhere...

C: 站住！来，到我面前。这里是皮皮西人专属的俱乐部，你是皮皮西人吗？
E: Freeze! Come over here, to me. This is a Pepeshi-only club. Are you a Pepeshi?

C: 这位身高还不到门把手的皮皮西门卫在你的头顶比划了下，又掏出尺仔细量了量你的腿长，随后露出狐疑的神色。
E: The Pepeshi guard, who stands no taller than the doorknob, makes a gesture over your head before taking out a ruler to carefully measure the length of your legs, and then gives you a scrutinizing look.

C: 你眼睁睁地看着你的手机屏幕兀自亮了起来，嗒嗒的按键声响起，然后……
E: You watch helplessly on as the screen on your phone lights up and the keys start clacking. Then...

C: 趁它还没有想到新的恶作剧方法时，赶紧溜走吧。
E: Sneak off before it comes up with a new way to prank you.

C: 你想啊，逐梦客们来到匹诺康尼是为了什么？还不是为了体验「美梦」。
E: Think about it — why do Dreamchasers make their journey to Penacony if not to experience sweet dreams?

C: 你能清晰地感受到，即便是在梦中，某些难以放下的执念仍在纠缠着她。
E: You can clearly feel despite being in a dream that there's an unshakable obsession that still haunts her.

C: 你有什么心事吗？
E: What's on your mind?

C: 至于一件道具为什么会落选，理由可能五花八门：有些缺乏灵性，有些品控低劣；有些尚不成熟，还有些年纪太大——哦，这么说可能会引起误会——应该叫「使用年限过长」。
E: As for why an item is not selected, the reasons can be many: Some lack spirituality, some have poor quality control, some are immature, and some are too old — oh, this word might be misleading — it should be "past its useful life."

C: 刚才那是路灯小姐唯一掌握的节目，已经为您表演完了。
E: And that's the only action Miss Street Lamp has. She's done with her performance.

C: 看这结实的肌肉、霸气的姿态和深邃的眼神，就知道它是垃圾桶中的极品了！
E: Looking at its firm muscles, dominant posture, and deep eyes, you know it must be an extraordinary trashcan!

C: 你好啊客人，要观看维塔利的「动物」演出吗？
E: Hello, Customer. Do you want to watch Vitali's "Animals" Show?

C: 仔细想想，被这样的家庭收养，也是我的命运呢……
E: Come to think of it. I am probably destined to be adopted by such a family...

C: 你谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 毕竟我们只见过一次——但没关系，我记下她的样子，一定能再找到她！
E: We've only met once, after all... But it's okay. I remember what she looked like. I know I can find her again!

C: ……对不起{F#小姐}{M#先生}，是我失态了。来点苏乐达吧，这能让咱们两个都好受点……
E: ...I'm sorry, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. I lost my composure there. Let's have some SoulGlad. That will perk both of us up a bit...

C: 哈利伯顿敲了敲自己的胸口，那里正传来嘀嗒嘀嗒的计时声。
E: Haliburton knocks on his chest, where you hear a ticking noise.

C: 再见，也希望您度过一个美好的夜晚。
E: Farewell. I hope that you enjoy a wonderful evening, too.

C: 哈利伯顿的胸口中传来急促而沉重的滴答声。
E: A rapid and heavy ticking sound is coming from inside Haliburton's chest.

C: 对不起，我要向所有的皮皮西人道歉。
E: I'm sorry, I should apologize to all the Pepeshi out there.

C: 啊！商店街那些不长眼的逐梦客，真是一想就来气。
E: Bah! I get irate just at the thought of those short-sighted dream-chasing fools on the shopping street.

C: 还能做什么，做生意呗。我是天舶司下翔水商会驻匹诺康尼的负责人，来这儿是打算开拓一下贸易市场。
E: What else can I do? Business, of course. I'm the head of the Aquaglider Guild in Penacony under the Sky-Faring Commission, here to explore the trade market.

C: 好啊，反正现在也没事。
E: Sure, I've got nothing to do now anyway.

C: 哈…说来好笑，我被人惦记了一辈子，没想到竟在这梦里翻了车。
E: Ha... It's a funny story — I was targeted my entire life, but I never expected to get up-ended in this dream.

C: 唉…我当然知道钱换不来「真心」，但正因如此我才更放心。
E: *sigh*... Of course I know money can't buy sincerity, but that's why I feel even more at ease.

C: 女子怒视着公园里的自动乐团，语气中充斥着鄙夷。
E: The lady stares at the park's automated orchestra in seething anger, contempt oozing out of her every breath.

C: 至于自动乐团的演奏…谁愿意听就去听吧！那些人永远无法理解真正的艺术！而一个伟大的音乐家也绝不会被这种「技术」轻易打败！
E: As for the performances by the automated orchestra... Whoever wants to listen can go ahead! Those people will never understand true art! A great musician will never be discouraged by such a travesty on art!

C: 就是他们自己私吞了！还要威胁我们，说不给钱就要把伪造好评的事传出去！奸诈！
E: They're the ones who took the money! They have the audacity to threaten us, saying that if we don't pay up, they'll leak the matter of us faking our reviews! So scummy!

C: 而我，派对客丹西，将用玩乐来向他献上最崇高的敬意！
E: As for me, Dancy the partygoer, I will use fun as my way of expressing my greatest respect to him!

C: 丹西的表情开始凝固，就像冷却下来的热油。
E: Dancy's expression began to freeze, like hot wax solidifying as it cools.

C: 我们聊聊二次元吧。
E: Let's talk about anime.

C: 可匹诺康尼的动画和漫画似乎并非如此。这里的很多角色和情节设置，若是放到常盘国的市场里，一定会被很多人斥责「这不是二次元」！
E: However, animations and comics in Penacony are not this way. A lot of the characters and plot devices used here, if they were released in the Tokiwa market, would have people screaming: "This isn't anime!"

C: 很高兴你能这么想。有机生命大都热衷于歌颂某种并不实际存在的「艺术性」，来掩盖自己在技术上的无能。你与他们不同。
E: I'm very pleased that you feel this way. The majority of organic lifeforms love to extol and obsess over this "art" that does not even exist, so as to cover up their technological incompetence. You are not the same as them.

C: 酒店依照朝向、楼层划分为<unbreak>48</unbreak>个扇区。您的房间位于「红心十二区」<unbreak>666</unbreak>号白金套房内。
E: This hotel is divided into <unbreak>48</unbreak> sub sectors, and your room, Platinum Suite <unbreak>666</unbreak>, is located in Zone <unbreak>12</unbreak> of the Red Heart.

C: 你可以提供什么服务？
E: What services do you provide?

C: 如果您有什么想了解、却又不知该从何开始了解的，不妨来这里点上一杯——一杯饮品换一个故事，保证让您满意而归。
E: If you have questions or are seeking information, please come here and order a drink — a drink for a story. I guarantee my stories will satisfy your curiosity.

C: 如果您刚从梦中醒来，请牢记——此处是现实。
E: If you've just woken up from a dream, remember — this is reality.

C: 为我介绍下「入梦」服务。
E: Please allow me to introduce you to our dream services.

C: 另外…在梦境中，剧烈的情绪波动可能会导致一些预料之外的情况，如果您无法有效管理自己的情绪，也可以向我们寻求帮助。
E: Additionally... in the Dreamscape, intense emotional fluctuations can lead to unexpected circumstances. If you have trouble managing your emotions effectively, you can also seek assistance from us.

C: 再摸摸我吧？
E: Would you pet me again?

C: 为什么？因为这是妈妈给我取的名字！
E: Why? Because it's the name given by my mother!

C: 拨通「窥梦电话」。
E: Dial the Dreampeek Call.

C: 好空虚啊。可恶，就没有什么我能做的事情了吗！
E: I feel so empty. Is there really nothing I can do!?

C: 你？那可是最豪华的飞艇，所有飞车的价钱加起来，都不够买一个车位的。
E: You wish to go there? You do know that your destination is a luxurious airship, right? Even the price of all flying cars combined is not enough to buy a parking bay on that airship.

C: 打开车灯。
E: Switch on the car's lights.

C: （还是保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 你这家伙，看得见我吗？
E: Can you see me?

C: 请放心，在朝露公馆中的所有谈话都是会受到「家族」的保护，绝对保密，绝对安全！
E: Please rest assured that any conversations held within Dewlight Pavilion will be protected by The Family and will be kept completely confidential!

C: 你真的可以让希佩原谅我吗？
E: Can you really get Xipe to forgive me?

C: 那些鼓吹什么「酒香不怕巷子深的」，要么就是幸存者偏差，要么就是还没经过现实的毒打……
E: Those who drum on about "good wine needs no bush" either have experienced survivor bias or haven't been beaten up by the brutalities of reality yet...

C: 他说自己手上有来自朋克洛德的「以太卡带」，急着出手，只要五万信用点就卖给我。当时我只带了苜蓿钞，跟家人们借了个遍才凑齐那么多信用点。
E: He claimed to own an Aether Cartridge from Punklorde and was eager to sell it to me for just <unbreak>50,000</unbreak> credits. I only brought Alfalfa credits with me at that time, so I had to borrow from some of my family to afford it.

C: 哦，天呐，天呐…我都错过了些什么！
E: Oh, dear... What have I missed?

C: 眼前的「钟表小子」哼哧哼哧喘着粗气，扁圆表盘与细瘦双腿紧绷成两点半钟的折角，沉重的「时针」在前后一刻度区间内来回晃动着。
E: The Clockie before your eyes pants and breathes heavily. The angle of their thin, folded legs against the circular clock face shows half-past two, as the heavy hour hand sways back and forth within a quarter-hour interval.

C: 人总不能悲惨到连给自己画饼的资格都没有吧？
E: People can't allow their lives to become so tragic that they even lose their right to dream, can they?

C: 那你找到了吗？
E: Did you find it?

C: 我们每个人都在寻找着什么。
E: We are all searching for something.

C: 只是和你打个招呼。
E: I'm just stopping by to say hi.

C: 这尊雕像象征着里奥撒缪斯，橡木家系的第一位家主。传说他在一位忆者的指引下拔出了紧紧嵌在梦泡中的神剑，深孚众望，橡木家系也由此成为匹诺康尼的核心势力。
E: This statue symbolizes Riothamus, first Family Head of the Oak Family. Legend says that under the guidance of a Memokeeper, he was able to remove the divine sword that was stuck fast inside a dream bubble. This won him great renown with the people and allowed the Oak Family to become a central power in Penacony.

C: 怕什么！嘻嘻，你再吃掉一块不就看不出来了嘛。大份的能吃，小份的也能吃，没毛病！
E: What are you worried about! Hehe, if you take another bite, then you can't even tell! If it's a big portion, you can eat it... Same with a small one, no problem!

C: 我们是偷偷跑出来的。
E: We secretly snuck out here.

C: 你的意思…？不行，不可能，我的爱是如此坚定，绝不会发生偏移。
E: You mean... No, impossible, my love is resolute and will not be swayed!

C: 好吧，为了这家酒吧的人气考虑，稍微牺牲下也没什么。
E: Well, I guess I can make a compromise for the sake of the lounge's popularity.

C: 你…我去向你的主人告状！给我等着瞧！我就不信还处理不了你一个道具了！
E: You... I'll tell your master! Just you wait! There will be consequences!

C: 想听听你对我的看法。
E: I want to know what you think about me.

C: 看过几场。
E: I've seen a few.

C: 我猜，他们巴不得把我的心、我的肝和肺全都拿走，摆在橱窗里卖掉。
E: I suppose they can't wait to take my heart, my liver, and my lungs and put them on display to sell them.

C: 谁是你亲爱的。
E: Ew, who's your darling?

C: …自由的美梦…哈哈，何其荒唐！
E: ...Dreams of freedom... Haha, how absurd!

C: 一个人？哈哈，不不不…我只是在和家人们排练。
E: Alone? Haha, no no no... I was rehearsing together with my family members.

C: 你的幻想家人是怎么回事？
E: What's the deal with your little imaginary family members, then?

C: 能培养出我这种超级骇客的星球，恐怕全宇宙都找不到第二个。
E: I doubt a super hacker such as me could ever hope to come from any other planet in the universe!

C: 有一个算一个，全都是剧本！不知道从什么时候开始，家族根本就容不得半点「计划之外」的故事情节出现了！
E: Every single one of them — they're all scripted! The Family has been turning down any stories that are "outside the plan" for who knows how long!

C: 好在结果不错，新作的灵感正在我的脑海里源源不断地涌现——我有预感，撼动寰宇画坛的惊世名作即将在我笔下诞生！
E: Fortunately, this has worked out wonderfully! I can feel inspiration flooding my mind endlessly... I have a feeling that a masterpiece that will shake the artistic world is soon to be born from my pen!

C: 可我就是做点自己喜欢的事而已，要这些有什么用？简直太折磨了……
E: But, I just want to do something I enjoy. Why do I need these things? It was simply torturous...

C: 果然！象征「开拓」的无名客心胸也很「开阔」…感激不尽。
E: I knew it! Thanks for being the bigger person here, Nameless. I could not be more grateful to you.

C: 接下来要去哪里呢，回到家乡吗？唉，不知道为什么，鼻子突然有点酸……
E: Where am I supposed to go from here? Back home? Ah, I don't know why, I'm getting a bit of a lump in my throat...

C: 聊聊你的田。
E: I want to talk about your fields.

C: 年轻人，你觉得孩子们会对什么样的学科感兴趣？
E: Youngster, what kind of subjects do you think children are interested in?

C: 我不感兴趣。
E: I'm not interested.

C: 我家里还珍藏着钟表小子系列的大量手办，您要是找到了随您挑！
E: I have a large collection of Clockie figurines. Find the item and you can take your pick!

C: 钟表小子博物馆进度如何？
E: How's the Clockie Museum going?

C: 为了能记录匹诺康尼的未来，我在寿命的终点选择了放弃肉体，成为了一种…只能在梦中存留的迷因。
E: To document the future of Penacony, I chose to relinquish my physical form at the end of my lifespan, transforming into a sort of... meme that can only stay within dreams.

C: 最近在做什么？
E: What are you up to recently?

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 又见面了。
E: Hello again.

C: 啾，猫头鹰老师是美梦小镇的设计者，是钟表小子的老朋友，是折纸小鸟们的老师。
E: Tweet, Professor Owl designed Dreamville, and he is an old friend of Clockie's and a teacher of the origami birds.

C: 我等得起。
E: I've got some time.

C: 哎呀，客官您居然对人家这么感兴趣吗？小鸟们都叫我「妃色夫人」啾。
E: Oh dear, are you really that interested in me? The little birds call me Lady Vermilion, tweet.

C: 让我想想…对了，有个责任心很强的孩子，对其他小鸟的要求也很高，希望它不要打扰<color=#dbc291ff>正在休息的人偶朋友</color>啾～
E: Let me think... Oh, that's right, there's this very responsible child that also imposes similar expectations on other birds. I hope it doesn't disturb <color=#dbc291ff>our resting puppet friends</color>, tweet!

C: 当时的我，也正如现在的你一样——闯过层层关卡，跨越一个又一个障碍，终于在这荒凉的梦境中闯出一片天地。
E: I was just like you then — clearing all levels in swathes, leaping and bounding over all obstacles, finally making a name for myself in this desolate Dreamscape.

C: 最近苏乐达的销量突然大幅上涨……
E: SoulGlad's sales numbers have been rapidly rising recently...

C: 我没有崩溃的原因，是一位客人留下的积木玩具。
E: The reason I didn't crash was all thanks to a building block toy left behind by a guest.

C: 在这里生活一定很不容易。
E: Life here must be hard.

C: 我已经找到了自己的使命：守护这片梦域，引导所有误入其中的人们寻回自我。对现在的我来说，就算是注定无法实现的理想也可以成为动力，驱使我认真地生活、前进。
E: I've found my own calling: Protect this dream, and guide those who've stumbled into it to find themselves again. For the present me, even if I'm destined not to realize my ideals, it can still become the motivation to drive myself to live life earnestly, and to move forward.

C: 食鳄的狂狼、噩梦的暴君、阿斯德纳的尖牙…他的称号有很多，但我觉得最合适的只有一个——「反抗者」。
E: The Croc-eating Mad Wolf, Tyrant of Nightmares, Asdana's Fang... He has many names, but I think there is only one title that befits him — Rebel.

C: 古怪的智械似乎并不在乎你作何反应。他的目光似乎落在你身上，又似乎不在。
E: The strange Intellitron does not seem to care about your response. You cannot tell if he is actually looking at you.

C: 既然如此，好吧，好吧…那就按你的意思来吧。
E: Fine, fine... In that case, I'll do as you wish.

C: 他全身上下能被当作口袋用的地方，都插满了鲜花。后来据他自己所说，都是从不同的星球采摘来的，用了特殊的保鲜技术，相当珍贵。
E: Anything that even resembled a pocket on his person was stuffed full of fresh flowers. He later told me that the flowers were rather valuable because they had been plucked from various planets and preserved using a special method.

C: 额外加糖的苏乐达焖饭，请。
E: May I present Extra-Sugary SoulGlad Stewed Rice. Please enjoy.

C: 辣味
E: Spicy

C: 你决定连借口都不找，快步离开。
E: You hastily leave the scene without even bothering to provide an excuse.

C: 又或者…是啊，我刚刚哭了一场。
E: Or I'd tell them I was crying.

C: 母星的家乡菜。
E: Food of your home planet.

C: 你受够这牢房每日供应的泔水了！临刑前最后一夜，你塞给一位贪财的狱警自己半辈子的积蓄，以换最后一次享用佳肴的机会。
E: "Disgusted by the terrible prison food, you secretly hand over half of your savings to a greedy warden, bargaining for one final good meal before your execution."

C: 那种事情…千万不要发生啊……
E: I truly hope... that doesn't come to pass...

C: 所以呢～我才以为度个蜜月也不安生…不过既然是场误会，说开了就没事了。
E: That's why I assumed I wouldn't get a moment's peace even on my honeymoon. But since this is just a misunderstanding, it's all good.

C: 前不久有个住客吃太撑被送去看医生了，我本想去考察下空艇上的医疗团队，却意外发现这里摆着不少价值连城艺术品……
E: A while back, a guest required medical attention for overeating. I meant to check out the airship's medical team, but I ended up stumbling upon the load of priceless artworks here.

C: 投资并不会带给你快乐的，它只是一个过程，无关其他。
E: Investing won't bring you happiness. It's nothing more than a means.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 说起来，叶子店长特别喜欢这艘游艇，为了建造它，可是花费了好多闪亮亮的石头啾！
E: Speaking of which, Shopkeeper Leaf really loves this airship. In order to construct it, he had to spend many glittering stones, tweet!

C: 唔，虽然很想帮客官，但人家想不起来它们跑去哪里了，啾……
E: Oh, I would love to help you, but I can't remember where they went either. Tweet...

C: 我刚才在培训新招的船员，没注意到您在后面，非常抱歉。请问您找我是有什么事吗？
E: My apologies, I was training some newly recruited crew members just now and didn't notice you behind me. Is there something I can do for you?

C: 船长，如果您发现了我们服务中的不足，请随时告诉我。我们致力于为每一位宾客——包括您——提供最完美的体验。
E: If you notice anything about our service that needs improvement, please let me know anytime, captain. We're committed to providing the best experience for every guest, including you.

C: 好的。
E: Understood.

C: 佩德罗按照你的命令，派人更改了空艇的命名与尾翼的涂装。
E: Pedro sends staff members to rename the airship and change her tail livery as you ordered.

C: 很遗憾，我已经记不得那些事。我曾经历一场太空事故。被家族回收时，记忆存储模块已熔化了大半。
E: Regretfully, I can no longer remember anything. I was once involved in a space accident and by the time I was recovered by The Family, a large portion of my memory storage module had already melted.

C: 不过也无须额外掏腰包，一期不漏奉上天价学费就成。我这小半辈子交过的学费，都够他们买下一个小型度假星球咯。
E: But there's also no need for you to pay extra. Just ensure that you pay the astronomical tuition fees on time every semester. They could probably buy a small-sized vacation planet with the tuition that I have paid throughout my time here.

C: 话题永远离不开派对是吧？
E: You can't say anything without bringing up parties, can you?

C: 这次校庆，很多人看中了那些外来访客的流量，准备大赚一笔…殊不知从根本上就错了！
E: Many are counting on the influx of visitors to make a killing at our university's upcoming anniversary, but little do they know that those tourists aren't their cash cows!

C: 你那是什么表情？行，我承认…排练的地点最好也该事先确认一下。
E: ...What's with that look? Fine, I'll admit it. It's not just rehearsing beforehand, but rehearsing beforehand at the right place.

C: 哼，让他们议论去吧，闹得越轰烈越好，越多人关注越好，然后我会证明给所有人看！
E: Humph! Let them talk! The more fuss they make and the more people take notice, the better! Then, I will prove them all wrong!

C: 获得冠军的最重要的因素——钱。球笼赛是匹诺康尼最昂贵的运动，造车需要钱，修建训练场地、更换训练耗材需要更多的钱。
E: The most important factor when it comes to taking victory... is money. Spheroid racing is the most expensive sport in Penacony. Creating a Spheroid costs money, but building a training ground and replacing supplies used in training costs even more.

C: 你看我的心理素质就知道了，咱们谐乐学院盛产优秀车手，大致是得益于我们对信仰之事有一种忘我式的虔诚。
E: As you can see from my mentality, Charmony Academy creates outstanding drivers. This is most likely thanks to our selfless devotion to concepts such as belief and faith.

C: 有说，这车是苜蓿草家系赞助的，他们看中了皮皮西待开发的体育市场，于是斥巨资请来博识学会星际动力学派的专家设计了「飞翔的皮皮西号」。
E: Some say that it came from an Alfalfa Family sponsor — that they saw the potential in the developing Pepeshi sporting market and gave the Intelligentsia Guild's Interastral School of Kinetics a huge stipend to design The Flying Pepeshi.

C: 虽然球笼赛事关学院荣誉，但我们更珍视梦想。别看赛场上各个学院争得你死我活，私下我们经常交流经验，训练结束后都会聚在一起喝麦芽果汁呢。
E: Although the Spheroid Race is a matter of academic honor, we are more focused on our own dreams. On the track, the academies fight tooth and nail, but behind the scenes, we frequently share our experiences and often get together for malt juice after training.

C: 不管再怎么努力，我始终…不属于那个世界。
E: No matter how hard I work, I will never... belong to that world.

C: 太精彩了…哎呦，这就是匹诺康尼宣扬的「同谐」吗，真是可怜又可笑啊。
E: It was truly wonderful... Ah, is this the Harmony that Penacony touts? It is truly pathetic and laughable.

C: 就当你是在夸我了…啧，至少不是什么「颠子」、「怪胎」之类的评价……
E: I'll take that as a compliment... Tch, at least it's better than being called a "wacko" or a "freak"...

C: 虽然那人是这么说的，我总觉得事情不会这么简单。你想啊，能轻而易举地斩断天空…这可不是普通游侠能做到的……
E: Although that's what they told me, I don't think it's that simple. Think about it. Cutting the sky in half with ease... That's not something a simple Ranger could do, is it...?

C: …我吗？我本来就不喜欢吵闹的地方，这里比较僻静，让我觉得安心…也很怀念。
E: ...Me? I don't like noisy places. It's much quieter here. It gives me peace... and nostalgia.

C: 倒也不算吧。作为创作者，我们本来就不该被风格局限。风格是作品的特征，是艺术表达的惯性，但绝对不是必须达到的要求。
E: Not entirely. As creators, we shouldn't be confined to any style. It is a characteristic of our work, a form of artistic expression, but never a requirement that needs to be achieved.

C: 但没关系，无论做演员还是博主，最重要的就是脚踏实地，心无旁骛地朝着梦想前进。
E: But it's okay. Whether I'm an actor or vlogger, staying grounded is key. I need to focus on reaching dream without distractions.

C: 比起有实用意义的建筑物与为了果腹的正餐，甜品的诞生只是为了别人的幸福…不觉得很浪漫吗？
E: Practical buildings are more like a proper meal that's filling, and the birth of desserts is to give others happiness... Doesn't that feel romantic?

C: 唔…差不多吧，「折纸大学年鉴」虽然会记录在校期间发生的大事，但是给同学们留了个人页面，某种意义上和同学录也差不多。
E: Mm... something like that. Paperfold University Yearbook records major events that happened during the years a cohort spent studying here, but leaves a personal page for students, so it is similar to a student record book.

C: 聊聊其他事…
E: Talk about something else...

C: 聊聊其他事…
E: Talk about something else...

C: 在舞蹈中踮足的人偶，身形如谐乐鸽在振翅。
E: A puppet who loses themselves to the dance, their body akin to a Charmony Dove spreading its wings.

C: 一个宁静、温柔的新世界，由一位泰坦编织而成的美梦。
E: A peaceful, gentle new world, a sweet dream woven by a Titan.

C: 房费不是白花了吗。
E: Wouldn't the room fee be wasted?

C: 你等着一辆火车…
E: Wait for the train...

C: 记住了，不准报道坏事。不然读者宁愿去看电视新闻也不看咱们的报纸了。
E: Remember, no negative news allowed. Otherwise, readers would rather watch TV news than read our newspaper.

C: 还是说，咬咬牙上新款「巴顿」？
E: Or should I bite the bullet and get the new Patton?

C: 它就是我们智械的英雄！
E: It is a hero for us Intellitrons!

C: 应该再往左边移一点…
E: A little more to the left...

C: …你有完没完？
E: ...Are you done yet?

C: 说完就赶紧开工。
E: If you are, then hurry and get back to work.

C: 欢迎来到艾迪恩公园。
E: Welcome to Aideen Park.

C: 就这么看着水也挺好。
E: It's just nice to sit back and watch the water.

C: 系统维护中，请稍后……
E: The system is under maintenance... Please wait...

C: 喝不下也得喝啊，总不能浪费了吧，你又不能喝！
E: I gotta drink! Can't let it go to waste, right? Not like you can drink them!

C: 前方有惊梦剧团活动…
E: There's Dreamjolt Troupe activity up ahead...

C: 很久以前，热砂的时刻是一片危险的荒漠……
E: Long ago, the Moment of Scorchsand was a dangerous desert...

C: 都给我打起精神来！
E: Buck up, everyone!

C: 我帮你联系工作人员。
E: I'll help you contact the staff.

C: 人生并不完美…
E: Life isn't perfect...

C: 喝下这瓶苏乐达~快乐美梦速速达~
E: Drink this SoulGlad. Make your dreams a blast!

C: 海报下方用歪歪扭扭的文字写着——「禁止在画像上涂鸦，违反者将被罚去擦洗校长雕像！格拉克斯校长是最伟大的啾！」
E: The squiggly words at the bottom of the poster say: "Graffiti prohibited on the portrait. Those found violating this rule will clean the dean's statue as punishment! Dean Glaux is the greatest! Tweet!"

C: 只有一名学生通过了考核，她的任何方面都符合你的要求——普通身高，普通的短发，戴着普通的眼镜，丢在人群里很快就会消失不见的那种。
E: Only one student makes the cut, everything about her meeting your requirements — ordinary height, ordinarily short hair, and wearing a pair of ordinary glasses. The sort that would instantly disappear in a crowd if you thrust her in there.

C: 钟表小子站在收藏架上，露出温暖亲切的笑容。
E: Clockie stands on the display shelf, wearing a warm and friendly smile.

C: 并不是梦游哦～有人小心翼翼地将你送了回来。
E: No, it's not sleepwalking — someone carefully brought you back.

C: 绘制陶罐是翁法罗斯最古老的记叙方式之一，我喜欢绘制古老的传说，还是要用最传统的方式才有岁月沉淀的韵味。
E: Because painting on dolia is one of the oldest storytelling traditions in Amphoreus. I prefer to depict ancient legends in the most traditional manner possible for that authentic touch.

C: 很多构成我们日常生活的点点滴滴都没有机会被「评分」，就比如你平时喝下的一杯普普通通的水，也许很难用「评分」来衡量它的重要性。
E: Many aspects of our daily lives rarely get a chance to be "rated," like the ordinary glass of water you drink. It's hard to measure the importance of something so simple with a "rating."

C: 你不记得发生了什么是吧？喝了「法吉娜盲盒」的人大多都是你这样。
E: You don't remember what happened, do you? Just like most people who drink the "Phagousa Blind Box."

C: {NICKNAME}退化——星核！
E: {NICKNAME} regresses — a Stellaron!

C: 你看看手中色泽鲜艳、光可鉴人的苹果，一口咬了下去——
E: Gazing at the brightly-colored and resplendent apple in your hand, you take a hearty bite...

C: 嗯…唉……
E: Ugh... Hmm...

C: 欢迎来到刻法勒广场——看见那群盲信{RUBY_B#全知之神}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的蠢材了没？对着石头、泥巴和颜料做成的偶像倒头便拜，幻想着自己也像故事中的人一样可以得到神明的垂青。
E: Welcome to Kephale Plaza. See those dim-witted believers devoted to {RUBY_B#God of Omniscience}Kephale{RUBY_E#}? They're all about praying to idols made of stone, mud, and paint, imagining that they would receive the gods' blessing like heroes from legends.

C: 总之，多亏了这是个承认遗产合法性的城邦…在「再创世」到来之前，只要奥赫玛还没有在黑潮中陷落，我就能无拘无束地生活下去。想睡就睡，想吃就吃，想晒太阳就晒太阳——多好。
E: Anyway, thanks to this city's acceptance of legal inheritance... I can lead a carefree life until the Era Nova, as long as Okhema remains steadfast against the black tide. I sleep, eat, and soak up the sun whenever I please... What a bliss.

C: 「四方的公民啊——欢迎你们来到这里，我们将张开双臂，和你们同享万世不变的祥和与安乐。」
E: "Welcome, citizens from all directions. Within these walls, we extend to you our open arms, sharing eternal peace and joy."

C: 哈哈，老身知道，年轻人都很忙。想做什么就做什么，挺好的！不过要是身心疲劳了，那就来花园里坐一坐，或者去泡泡温泉…可别把自己累着了，啊。
E: Aha, you youngsters are always on the move. Always doing whatever you want. Good! And hey, don't forget to take a break in the garden or a dip in the hot spring... Just don't push yourself too hard, okay?

C: 缇安是*我们*三人中最活泼最勇敢的一位啦，虽然和*我们*一样看上去都是小孩子，但她很愿意做一个战士，飞在最前面保护大家！
E: Trianne is the liveliest and bravest among us. Although she looks like a child like the rest of us, she always dashes headlong into danger and protect everyone as a brave warrior!

C: 塞纳托斯在上，请指引我家人的魂灵…哦，是你啊。有事吗？
E: By Thanatos above, please guide the souls of my family... Oh, it's you. What's up?

C: 哈哈哈，你说得对，我也觉得这种事情挺不靠谱的。所以何必要纠结于缥缈不定的未来呢，好好享受当下的每一天还不够吗？
E: Haha, you're not wrong. I think this whole thing sounds kinda dodgy. So why agonize yourself about the uncertainties of this ephemeral future? Isn't it enough just to fully appreciate each and every day?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 好吧，我理解，大家果然还是对大地兽之类的动物更感兴趣呢……
E: Alright, I understand. People are all way more interested in beasts like the dromases...

C: 客人。请问您需要什么吗？
E: Dear customer, do you need something?

C: 我的确是一位「侍者」，过去也同然。但在悬锋城那时，我的雇主更愿意称我为「清洁工」，或是「解决方案」。
E: I was an "attendant" in the past, too. However, back in Castrum Kremnos, my employers preferred to refer to me as a "cleaner" or a "problem-solver."

C: 足足五十名祭司在阵前角力、拳斗，招招见血；士兵们高举手中的鲜血蜜酿，一有兴趣便亲自下场，失手打死人也是常有的事。
E: Fifty priests, lined up in formation, wrestle and punch, each strike drawing blood. Soldiers raise their hands high, cupped with honey brew mixed in blood. Those interested will take to the ring as well. Accidental deaths in fights are commonplace.

C: 那就努力起舞…努力纵欲…努力浪费岁月吧…像游向明天的小鱼儿……
E: Dance hard then... indulge hard... waste time hard... Little fishy that wants to swim to tomorrow...

C: …错觉，兴许是。
E: ...Misperception, perhaps it is.

C: 白厄，他的武器，缺乏灵魂。不明白，果决的战士，为何如此。
E: Lacks soul, Phainon's weapon does. Understand, I do not, why for such a resolute warrior, it is so.

C: 签…签了！
E: I... I did!

C: 请！别忘了畅饮的步骤——揭开木塞，一饮而尽。
E: Please! Do not forget the proper drinking etiquette — uncork, and down in one sitting.

C: 抱歉，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，我与缇宝大人或许算有些…纠葛，可以的话，我不愿谈论这个话题。
E: Apologies, {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}, there are some... complications between me and Lady Tribbie. I would prefer not to discuss this topic, if possible.

C: 想听你聊聊你的家乡。
E: I want to hear about your hometown.

C: 我得赶快把这个结果记录下来，要是不小心忘了可就糟糕了。
E: I should jot this down quickly — wouldn't want to let it slip my mind.

C: 也不知道这朋友是怎么办到的，真是稀罕事……
E: No one knows how that visitor did it. It is truly a rare event...

C: 哈，当然！莫非你想要说，你思想中的阿卡索斯城永恒存在、真实可信，看得见摸得着的城邦，反而不如你的想象那般确定？
E: Hah, of course! Are you trying to claim that the Icatus in your mind will exist forever, whereas a visible and tangible city is not as much a certainty as the one in your imagination?

C: 我并非不愿思考，而是不愿动摇思考的根基。
E: It is not that I am unwilling to reflect. I am unwilling to shake the very foundation of thought itself.

C: 我是奥赫玛的希诺，以教授人们论辩的技巧为生。
E: I am Zeno of Okhema. I make a living by instructing people on the art of debate.

C: 阿卡索斯的帕门弥德，如你所见，是位修辞学方面的教师。
E: Parmenides of Icatus. As you can see, I am a teacher in the study of rhetoric.

C: 不，我只是被你吸引了。
E: No, I was just drawn to you.

C: 虽然刚才街上乱成那样…但是和真正的黑潮比起来，反而只能算普通的混乱。
E: Though the streets were chaotic earlier, it was nothing compared to the actual black tide. That was just run-of-the-mill disorder.

C: 他当时觉得自己只有一个人，怕被这些不三不四的年轻人欺负，所以回头去找了墓地管理员，打算一起去轰走他们——
E: Feeling outnumbered and worried they might cause trouble, he decided to get the graveyard caretaker to help clear them out.

C: 怎么样，你要不要也来跟我一起训练？看你人高马大的，直接用悬锋人的锻炼方式也没差！
E: So, how about it? Want to train with me? You're tall and strong — you could jump straight into the Kremnoan training regimen without a problem!

C: 但这个高温浴池，它太脏了…我皮肤娇嫩，可受不住这种。
E: But the high-temperature bath... it's too dirty. My delicate skin can't handle that kind of thing.

C: 好，好，真有礼貌。下次见，愿艾格勒注视着你，孩子。
E: Good, good, such courtesy. Until next time, may Aquila watch over you, child.

C: 不不不，不能有一丝怀疑…深呼吸，伊克西翁，迎接自己的宿命吧！
E: No, no, there can't be any doubt. Deep breath, Ixion. Embrace your destiny!

C: 真敢在水边放书啊？
E: You really dare place books by the water?

C: 有空再来和你聊！
E: Let's talk when we have more time!

C: 介绍一下你那学派？
E: Introduce your school?

C: 没错！就像风暴击倒大树——握紧手中的石板，给予你的辩论对手强劲有力的一击！
E: That's right! Like a storm felling a great tree — hand clutching a slate, punching a hole through your opponent's fallacious argument!

C: 正是如此！我就知道，你果然非常适合我们学派！
E: Exactly! I knew you were perfect for our school!

C: 哈哈，我刚才老远就看到你了，模样不凡，定是个聪明人，我果然没看错！
E: Haha, when I spotted you from afar just now, I thought you have an extraordinary energy — must be a clever person! I just knew I wasn't wrong!

C: 可惜，现在研究陷入了瓶颈。都怪那些只顾眼前利益的人，整天要我做*实用*的研究，搞得我连最基础的冥想都做不好！
E: It's a pity that my research has hit a bit of a bottleneck. It's all the fault of those self-serving scoundrels who keep wanting me to conduct practical research. I can't even perform the most basic of meditations now!

C: 再说了，我这么做也是为了促进知识的传播嘛。瑟希斯的精神指引着我们，让我们把知识分享给更多的人——前提是信徒们不能餐风饮露活活饿死呀。
E: Moreover, I'm also promoting the spread of knowledge. Cerces' spirit guides us, for us to share their knowledge with even more people. Of course, their disciples must first be able to put food on their tables.

C: 我想问…
E: I want to ask...

C: 命运泰坦们已经知晓您的诚意，我们会为你求取一份神谕。愿您的家乡——塔拉萨波利斯——平安无虞。
E: The Fate Titans have recognized your piety. We will obtain a prophecy for you. May your home — Thalassopolis — long remain safe and sound.

C: 哎呀，年纪大了就爱唠叨，但愿没耽误你的行程，年轻人。
E: Oh dear, I do tend to ramble on as I get older. I hope I haven't kept you from your plans, youngster.

C: 附近的卫兵看了你一眼，却无动于衷。
E: A nearby guard glances at you but remains indifferent.

C: 好像没什么想聊的了。
E: I don't think I have more to chat about.

C: …我知道，你能做到。
E: ...I knew you could do it.

C: 最近我在奥赫玛到处转悠，寻找合适的角落，我想在奥赫玛重新建造一处昏光庭院。
E: Recently, I've been wandering around Okhema, looking for the perfect spot to rebuild the Twilight Courtyard.

C: 原来葫芦还能治病吗…要是树庭还保留着这类植物的种子就好了。
E: So gourds can even be used for healing? If only the Grove still had seeds from plants like that...

C: 其实还好啦！在见到盗火行者以前，我或许还会被那段阴影所紧缚，毕竟在童年的我看来，那道高大的黑色身影是那样残忍而不可战胜。
E: Honestly, it's not that bad! Before I encountered the Flame Reaver, I might have still been bound by that shadow. After all, as a child, I saw that tall, black figure as cruel and invincible.

C: 没错。如今，盗火行者站在逐火之旅的对立面，它是奥赫玛的敌人，是所有对「再创世」抱有美好期待的人们的敌人。
E: Exactly. Now, the Flame Reaver stands in opposition to the Flame-Chase Journey. They are the enemy of Okhema and all who hold beautiful hopes for the Era Nova.

C: 它薪酬待遇好，工作本身也不复杂，主要是和各种各样的权贵沟通——事实上，我精通于此，我比大部分老前辈做得更好。
E: The pay is great, the benefits are excellent, and the work itself isn't complicated. Most of it involves liaising with various elites — and honestly, I'm better at it than most of the old-timers here.

C: 还是你懂我，我会把它们分得很清楚的。
E: Exactly! You get me — I keep the two separate.

C: 呵呵，并非慈善。不是所有人都能有这样的待遇。
E: Charity? Far from it. Not everyone gets this kind of privilege.

C: 我经常向奥赫玛城中的外乡人打听他们的故乡，在不同人口中，故乡虽然有不同的描述，却有着相近的「韵脚」——也许所有人的故乡都共享一处。
E: I often ask the outworlders here in Okhema about their homelands. Though their descriptions vary, there's a common "melody" to them — as if all homelands share a single origin.

C: 奥赫玛是我们的第四站，我们在这里的表演终于收获了大家的欢迎，也打算在这里多停留一段时间，多积累一些经验和财富。
E: Okhema was our fourth stop. It was here that our performances finally received genuine applause. Encouraged, we decided to stay a little longer, hoping to gain more experience and earn a bit of wealth.

C: 当时我们不可能想到，这个决定救了我们所有人一命——就在第二个月，米里奥斯被黑潮毁灭，据称无人生还。
E: Little did we know, that decision saved our lives. Just two months later, Milios was consumed by the black tide. They say no one survived.

C: 但没办法，太有魅力就是会自恋啊！这也是我的烦恼。
E: But what can I do? My overflowing charm rubs off on me too! Such is my burden.

C: 啊，岁月，无所不能的欧洛尼斯，请把我们命运的消息传递给所有人。
E: Oh, time, the omnipotent Oronyx, please deliver news of our fate to all.

C: 我并非有意针对任何人，只是一想到公民们被花言巧语蒙骗的样子，就难以按耐胸中的怒火……
E: I don't mean to target anyone, but the thought of citizens being deceived by sweet words makes it hard to suppress the anger in my chest...

C: 在黎明云崖，唯一能称得上朝圣之路的，就是泰坦断崖的那条长阶了吧。
E: In Dawncloud Cliff, the only path that can be called a pilgrim's path is the long staircase at the Titan Cliff.

C: 你已经身负找寻一只若虫的使命了，先专心完成它吧。
E: You're already tasked with finding a nymph. Focus on completing that first.

C: 半晌过后，它开口了……
E: After a while, it speaks...

C: 我想对他说「谢谢」、也想对他说「抱歉」，我有一首诗歌想要送给他…还想将他介绍给父母和姐姐……
E: I want to thank him, and apologize to him. I have a poem for him... and I want to introduce him to my parents and my sister...

C: 天灾那天，我被倒塌的柜子压住，是他救了我，但没过多久，他又开始神神叨叨的，一直喊着「别带走他们」，然后就冲出去了。
E: The day disaster struck, I was pinned under a collapsed cabinet. He saved me, but not long after, he started acting strange again, constantly shouting "Don't take them away" before rushing out.

C: 答案恰恰就在躯体之中啊，帕门弥德。我的耳倾听了你的声音，我的眼看到了你的样貌，当你说蠢话时，我面颊上的血液变得更加灼热，也为你感到害臊呢。
E: The answer lies precisely within the flesh, Parmenides! My ears hear your voice, my eyes behold your form. When you spout nonsense, blood burns my cheeks with secondhand shame.

C: 他并未如以往那样再度站起，而是如一尊光荣的雕像，在沉默中倒塌。
E: He did not rise again as he always had in the past, but instead fell silent like a majestic statue crumbling.

C: 嗯…有位织者见惯了冬之民城邦的凛冬。金丝带来消息，它正伏在<color=#dbc291ff>一个通风口上</color>，试图用寒风吹去它的汗珠呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is accustomed to the harsh winters of the Winterfolk city-states. The golden thread brings tidings: They are resting on <color=#dbc291ff>a ventilation shaft</color>, trying to blow away their sweat with the cold wind.

C: 水面有动静了！快快，把鱼竿提起来，拜托啦！
E: Look, ripples! C'mon, reel it in! Please!

C: 呵呵…妈相信你，一定会有许多真诚善良的人和你一起同行。
E: Hehe... I believe in you. You'll definitely find kind, sincere people to walk beside you.

C: 不过…作为补偿，我可以偷偷告诉你，笨蛋披索也给你准备礼物了哦。只是他脸皮很薄，不好意思说出来！
E: Buuut... to make up for it, I can tell you a little secret — that dummy Piso also prepared something for you! He's just way too shy to say anything.

C: 别急，很快的。
E: Don't worry. It won't be long.

C: 这是…锄头柄的倒刺。迷，仿佛能感到收获的艰辛。
E: This is... a splinter from a hoe's handle. Memi, you can almost taste the toil of the harvest.

C: 我很厉害的嘤~只要有我在，小鸟们就不会来偷吃麦穗啦！
E: I'm amazing, eep~! As long as I'm here, no bird's gonna steal a single grain!

C: 一步，两步~
E: One step, two steps~

C: 想做些有意义的事。
E: I want to do something meaningful.

C: 好呀。人家会一直待在这里。{NICKNAME}需要的时候，就来找我吧。
E: That's okay. I'll be waiting right here. Look for me whenever you need me, {NICKNAME}.

C: 「海洋」力量塑造的幻境中，浮现着半神醉梦中的泡影……
E: In the illusion sculpted by the authority of Ocean, a bubble of a drunken demigod emerged...

C: 金血如露，海晏河清。
E: The golden blood is like dew, and the sea runs as clear as a river.

C: 「她如风暴般席卷历史，以烈焰与智谋重塑了翁法罗斯的格局与命运……」
E: "She swept through history like a storm, reshaping the fate and fabric of Amphoreus with flame and cunning..."

C: 你继承了「凯妮斯」的记忆？
E: You inherited Caenis's memories?

C: 你怎么没喝大？
E: Why didn't you drink more?

C: 太美了斯缇科西亚…哎哟，这不{NICKNAME}嘛。
E: Styxia is so stunning... Oh my, look who it is — {NICKNAME}!

C: 不对嗡~
E: Nope, buzz~

C: 这也能尝出来？
E: You can tell?

C: 为什么两种优惠不能叠加起来用迷……
E: Why can't I stack both discounts, mem...

C: 人要想认识世界，就得先认识自己在世界中的位置——我这是在帮你疏通「内」与「外」的联系。不然就以你那远不及胸肌发达的脑子，怎么继续跟我交流？
E: If you want to understand this world, you have to first understand your place in the world — I'm helping you clear the way to connect the "internal" with the "external." Otherwise, how could someone like you with more brawn than brains be able to keep up with me?

C: 人又娇气，脾气又大，可真难伺候！
E: They're squeamish, bad-tempered, and impossible to please!

C: 我们好不容易逃到这里，你也该好好享受在永恒之城的日子。
E: It wasn't easy for us to make it here, so you should enjoy yourself while you're in the Eternal City.

C: 我听说是因为最近移民增多，抽调了些人过去维持秩序，人手就不太够了。
E: I heard that the number of migrants has been increasing, so some of our people were dispatched there to maintain order, leaving us understaffed.
But...

C: 好，给我们挑几个最光亮的吧，不够圆的不要。
E: Okay, pick the brightest ones for us. Pass the ones that aren't round enough.

C: 为孩子们埋下理想的种子是老师的责任——从第一个创办的积木课堂，到后续开设的音符课堂、金币课堂，希望每只小鸟都能找到属于自己的美梦咕。
E: It is a teacher's duty to plant the seeds of dreams for the children — from the inaugural building block class to the subsequent music note classes and Gold Coin Classes. I hope that every bird will be able to find their own beautiful dream, hoot.

C: 本来一切都很完美的…都怪小粉你一开始就说错名字！都被你搞砸啦啾啾啾！
E: Everything was supposed to be perfect... You're to blame, Pinkie, for saying the wrong name at the start! It's all your fault, tweet tweet tweet!

C: 如果以后有珍稀物种相关的事件，可以告诉我哦。
E: Please keep me posted if you find out anything about rare species.

C: 希望以后我们可以为了非人生物的权益，做出更多的努力！
E: I hope we can make more efforts in protecting the rights and interests of non-human creatures in the future!

C: 波少一般喜欢什么类型的奇物？
E: What kind of Curio does Master Capote usually prefer?

C: 咳咳，世玲的意思是，你的科员等级过低，目前无法申请奇物作为研究。其他的事，你就少打听啦！
E: Ehem, I mean, your researcher level is too low. You can't apply for a Curio for your research at the moment. Anything else is none of your business!

C: 你平时都做什么类型的课题研究？
E: What kind of research do you usually do?

C: 要我说，那就是癞蛤蟆想吃天鹅肉！做梦去吧。
E: If you ask me, that can only be his wishful thinking! That can only happen in his dreams!

C: 我没什么要问的啦。
E: That's all I have to ask.

C: 不过在出发之前，我不想再随波逐流了。否则，荒笛大人教会我的一切有关前进的哲理，只会在我心里停滞不前。
E: But before setting out, I don't want to ride with the waves anymore. Otherwise, all the wisdom about moving forward that Lord Terravox taught me would only stagnate within my heart.

C: 你已经解开谜题了？如何做到的…算了，大概是某种我不记得的力量吧。
E: You've solved the riddle already? How did you... never mind. Probably some power I no longer recall.

C: 越看这个符号，越像一个优美的碱水面包结——也许你是真的饿了。
E: The more you look at this symbol, the more it resembles an elegant pretzel. Maybe you're actually hungry.

C: 我那些特产要是卖不完怎么办？再带回去就放坏了，我绝对不允许浪费食物……
E: What if I can't sell all these local specialties? They'll spoil if I take them back... I absolutely cannot let food go to waste...

C: 现在什么进度了？
E: What's the progress now?

C: 没错没错！要不是没找到机会跟您联系，我们还想做您的同款球棒呢！
E: That's right, that's right! If we hadn't lost touch with you, we would've loved to make a replication of your very bat!

C: 咳咳。再吵一句，到时候你们两个都不准上桌！
E: *Ahem* One more word out of either of you, and neither of you will be allowed at the table!

C: 事到如今，又怎么能忘记？
E: How could I forget, after all this time?

C: 德米特里，有没有兴趣学画画？马耳叙阿斯，试试弹水漫琴如何？我会替你们向柯珀丝和弥斯打好招呼。
E: Demetri, are you interested in learning to paint? Marsyas, how about trying the water lyre? I'll put in a good word for you with Karpos and Misia.

C: 抱歉，我没兴趣。先前担任祭司，只是想在乱世里混口饭吃。现在不用考虑这些了，我还是想继续学业，多读些书。
E: Sorry, I'm not interested. I only became a priest earlier because I needed to make ends meet during those chaotic times. Now that I don't have to worry about that anymore, I'd rather continue my studies and read more books.

C: 你这人乱说什么呢——
E: That's a wild accusation—

C: 我，塔兰顿祭司；这边的老头，雅努斯祭司；那边的小姑娘，欧洛尼斯的圣女——
E: Get this straight: I am Talanton's Priest; this old gentleman here is Janus's Priest; and that young lady over there is the Holy Maiden of Oronyx...

C: 大地兽提出了反对意见…
E: A dromas raised its objection...

C: 呼…我现在相信了迷，村长滔天的怒火，确实能毁灭七分之六个世界迷……
E: Phew... Now I believe it. The Chief's outrage really could destroy six-sevenths of the world...

C: 这可不行！坚持自我激励、自我约束，贯彻自由与自律理念的团队，若是失去了挑战目标，就会很快变得松懈，在不知不觉间落后嗷呜！
E: That won't do! A team that prides itself on self-motivation and self-discipline, embracing both freedom and discipline, will quickly become slack without a goal. And before you know it, we'll fall behind!

C: 我可没说让你放下剑柄。织坊需要缝纫，亦需要裁剪。如何分辨纹理、理顺针脚…不熟稔锋刃的人可没法胜任。
E: I never said to put down your sword hilt. A weaving workshop needs both sewing and cutting. Discerning patterns, aligning stitches... someone unfamiliar with blades couldn't handle the job.

C: 带上这盏水晶杯吧。每位曾和我并肩作战的伙伴，都有与我碰杯的资格。
E: Take this crystal chalice. Everyone who has fought by my side has earned the right to share a toast with me.

C: 与你说说也无妨，不与众爵共饮，单纯是因为君王要保持清晰的头脑，对于法吉娜的蜜酿，啜饮一口足矣，再多的话，我暂且无福消受。
E: I don't mind sharing. The reason I don't drink with the duxes is simply that a monarch must keep a clear head. One sip of Phagousa's honey brew is plenty for me. For now, any more than that is a pleasure I cannot afford.

C: 这是风宝的职业习惯了。
E: That's just Cinny's professional habit.

C: 继续当老师教书。
E: You could continue teaching.

C: 啊，感谢你直抒胸臆的慰藉。托你的福，我卸下了重担，终于可以感慨一句，那确实是一番苦旅……
E: Ah, thank you for your heartfelt comfort. Thanks to you, I've been able to unburden myself, and I can finally say... it truly was a grueling journey...

C: 是吗？会欣赏这部作品的人，应当是被墨涅塔和瑟希斯合力诅咒了的人吧。
E: Really? Anyone who appreciates this work must have been cursed by both Mnestia and Cerces.

C: 拿着它吧。「贤者之石」——人们曾称它为炼金术至高的冠冕，获得它便能得到此世的一切智慧。但与整个宇宙的知识相比，那不过是冰山一角。
E: Take this. This is the "Philosopher's Stone." Once hailed as the supreme crown of alchemy, possessing it meant gaining all wisdom of this world. But compared to the knowledge of the entire universe, it's merely the tip of an iceberg.

C: 没错……
E: That's correct...

C: 如今这个世界不缺本应灭绝的动物，食材库丰富了许多。对任何一位喜欢烹饪的人来说，都称得上足够有趣的世界。
E: These days, the world is full of animals that previously went extinct, which has greatly enriched our ingredient inventory. It's quite a fascinating world for anyone who enjoys cooking.

C: 「神谕圣地」。
E: The Sanctum of Prophecy.

C: 列车的方向…
E: About where the Express is headed...

C: 我有别的问题…
E: I have another question...

C: 关于瓦尔特…
E: About Welt...

C: 比如「存护」克里珀的信徒是怎么演变成「星际和平公司」的？好好想想吧，你会发现这件事充满了黑色幽默。
E: For example, how did the followers of Qlipoth the Preservation become the Interastral Peace Corporation? If you think about it, you'll discover it's full of dark humor.

C: 是列车啊。
E: It was the Express.

C: 故事里的主人公们虽然都是小朋友，常常做到大人们无法达成的成就。另外，看《冒险鼹鼠队》的时候，我感觉自己也在冒险。
E: All the protagonists in the story are children, but they often achieve things that adults cannot do. And when I read The Adventurous Moles, I feel like I'm on an adventure, too.

C: 啊，又见到{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}了！我在执行虎克老大的机密任务呢！
E: Ah, it's you again! I'm on a classified mission from Boss Hook!

C: （三把兵器便是一座岛屿，这里算是一处…）
E: (Three weapons make an island. This spot counts as one...)

C: 再说了，这个作者写书写得很慢，下一本书又不知道要等到什么时候了。
E: Besides, the author writes very slowly. I don't know how long I'll have to wait for the next book.

C: 你放心，说是让你做助教，其实不需要什么专业知识。
E: Relax. Though the title is "assistant instructor," it doesn't actually require much technical know-how.

C: 没问题，包在我身上。
E: Not a problem. Leave it to me.

C: 那就开始吧。如果你需要重新布置场地的话，随时和我说。
E: Then let's get started. If you want the mine carts to be reset, feel free to talk to me.

C: 老头对我也挺好的。我知道他怕我没个傍身的手艺，将来在这贝洛伯格吃不开，这才把调度矿车的活计传给我了。
E: The old man has been very good to me. I know he's worried that I wouldn't be able to make a good living in Belobog without the right skills. I guess that's why he decided to pass his skills to me.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all the questions I have.

C: 滴、答…我从早到晚都得扮演钟表小子，连一点属于自己的时间都没有…真羡慕那些变成惊梦剧团的朋友，它们至少还能做自己……
E: Tick, tock... I have to play Clockie day and night, and I don't have any time for myself... I'm so envious of my friends who turned into the Dreamjolt Troupe. At least they can be themselves...

C: 我要离开这里，到外面去！我才不要和你们一起出苦力！
E: I want to get out of here, to the outside! I'm not doing hard labor with the rest of you!

C: 滴、答！你为什么要找我说话？难道…是我的粉丝吗？
E: Tick, tock! Why do you want to talk to me? Is it because... you're a fan of mine?

C: 宾客，来跟我说说话吧，来抱抱我吧，来拆开我的表盘吧……
E: Guest, come have a chat with me. Embrace me, and dismantle my dial...

C: …为什么你不吃？是不喜欢吃肉吗？是不喜欢吃面包吗？！
E: ...Why aren't you eating? Do you not like meat? Do you not like burger buns!?

C: 我们两个太强啦。
E: We're formidable together.

C: 于尔丹托我带个话…
E: Uldan sent me with a message...

C: 到此为止吧，我已经看出来了…你是于尔丹那个老混蛋派来催稿的——这套话术也是那个老东西教给你的，对吧？
E: Let's finish this. I can tell already... That old man Uldan got you to chase up his commission — he's also the one who taught you to talk like this, right?

C: 不过，他还没给这幅画起名字啊。{NICKNAME}，看在你为博物馆跑前跑后的份上，这幅画的冠名权就交给你吧。
E: But he hasn't given this painting a name yet. {NICKNAME}, you've put in the miles running after this for the museum. The honor of naming it should belong to you.

C: 嚯，没想到啊。竟然还有人记得歌剧院首任院长的名字……
E: Oh, now that's unexpected. Who knew that people still remember the name of the theater's first-ever director...

C: 我来帮忙收集展品了
E: I'm here to help with collecting exhibits.

C: 所以，给我演示一下你平时是怎么用它战斗的，成吗？一下就好！
E: Can you give me a demonstration of how you use this in combat, please? Just for a little bit!

C: 这样的话……
E: In that case...

C: 我想再重新考虑一下。
E: I would like to reconsider.

C: 可…这只是我个人的私心……
E: But... don't you think that might be a bit too personal?

C: 一块地髓结晶原石，品相很是高级。
E: A piece of geomarrow ore, looks to be very high in quality.

C: 你似乎在大守护者的办公室里见过同样的摆件。可到底哪个才是复制品？
E: You seem to recall seeing an identical ornament in the Supreme Guardian's office, but which one is the replica?

C: 安装着许多接口的机械铁球，学名是「机关能源中枢」，能够将地髓矿脉转化为各种设备所需的能源。
E: A mechanical iron ball with many connective ports, formally called a mechanism energy hub. It can convert geomarrow veins into energy required for all kinds of devices.

C: 「——『智者』亚历珊德拉•兰德。」
E: "— The Wise, Alexandra Rand."

C: 「——『愚者』希莉儿•兰德。」
E: "— The Fool, Cyrille Rand."

C: 反物质兵团的虚卒冰雕，被八百年前的寒潮冻结至今。
E: An ice sculpture of a Voidranger from the Antimatter Legion. It was frozen some eight hundred years ago when the Eternal Freeze arrived.

C: 我明白，谢谢你。在飞去下一处前，我想问你……
E: I understand. Thank you. Before going to my next destination, I wish to ask you...

C: 谁知道一传十、十传百之后会变成什么恐怖传说呢？
E: Words spread like wildfire. Who knows what kind of horrible legend it will end up as?

C: {NICKNAME}！你总算来了，快帮帮我——
E: {NICKNAME}! You're finally here. Help me out, quick...

C: 呜呜伯看了看你的相机屏幕，似乎对你的照片很感兴趣。
E: Wubbaboo looks at your camera screen and seems to be interested in your photos.

C: （照片不在它嘴里，身上也没有好东西，真是只穷酸的扑满……）
E: (The photo isn't in its mouth, and there's nothing valuable on its body. It really is a poor, pitiful Trotter...)

C: …你问我小吃摊上有什么东西好吃吗？
E: ...Oh, you wanna know which snack stalls I recommend around here?

C: 好嘞。
E: Alrighty.

C: 我觉得你是什么都想吃。
E: I'm pretty sure you'll eat anything.

C: 学狗叫的可不一定就是咱们呀。
E: You didn't ask what'd happen if we win...

C: 你只是担心小吃铺都要没了？
E: You're just worried all your favorite food stands are gonna disappear.

C: 怎么样，您能成为金人巷的「商业顾问」吗？
E: What do you think? Will you become a business advisor for Aurum Alley?

C: 它算不上是你的威胁，但是旁边的易碎品可就不这么想了……
E: It's not that much of a threat for you, but the silent screaming of the fragile goods nearby is too loud to be ignored.

C: 连烟比小秘书更像是小秘书。
E: Lianyan, you seem more like a secretary than Miss Secretary.

C: 这是码头工人阿丰的收支记录，近日收到了公司分多次汇入的信用点。
E: The records show that a dock worker named A-Feng recently received credit remitted by the IPC, spaced out over several installments.

C: 我也用码头物流的嘛，我寄出去的快递总是在路上被损坏，你们有什么头绪吗？
E: I use the shipping services too, you know — do you have any idea how often my packages are damaged in transit?

C: 我听说了你们为金人巷做了不少好事，慢慢吃，我这边还准备了一些打包带走的。
E: I've heard about all the great things you've done for Aurum Alley. Please, take your time! I've packed some for you to take home, too.

C: 但罗浮仙舟一旦展开巡猎，就会远航其他星域，原本往来的商旅也就不再往来了。
E: But then the Luofu departed again on the Path of The Hunt. Our business partners couldn't follow, so they stopped trading with us.

C: 同功坊愿意参加金人巷复兴计划，这肯定会影响很多人的。
E: Thank you! Now that you have joined our revival project, I'm sure many others will follow suit.

C: 我不认同你的想法。
E: That isn't progress.

C: 明曦，接下来请讲讲商会对金人巷的规划与考虑。
E: Mingxi, please share with us what the guild has in mind.

C: …不好意思，耽误您太久，我先回码头了。
E: ...Sorry, you don't have to listen to me daydreaming. I'll head back to the dock for now.

C: 我也是码头工人，我怎么可能向着星际和平公司呢……
E: I'm a dock worker, after all. How could I conspire with the IPC?

C: 你们这里都没有扫码点餐的吗？
E: Don't you use scanning codes to place orders here?

C: 很简单的，你只要记住客人点的餐、分量，以及忌口就成。
E: It's simple, really — you just have to remember the dishes, portion size, and things to avoid for every order.

C: 你们肯定就是这样想的。
E: That was definitely your plan all along.

C: 金人巷的商铺们可不是来陪你们过家家的，大家都是要挣钱的。
E: The shopkeepers in Aurum Alley aren't here to play house with you — we're all trying to turn a profit.

C: 我承认商会在经营码头时赚到了不少，但是跟公司比起来还是杯水车薪。
E: I admit that the guild has made a fortune from the dock, but the IPC can offer much more.

C: 说了你也不认识，真志摩听说过吗？
E: You wouldn't know. Majima, ever heard of him?

C: 目前的规划评级还比较低…也许可以再优化一下？
E: Our current plan hasn't been rated too highly... Maybe we can improve it a bit?

C: 这里的确是「杜氏茶庄」…不过怎么没看到他人影啊？
E: This is indeed Du's Teahouse... But where is the man himself?

C: 你好守灵，这么巧啊你也遛弯？
E: Hello Shouling. What a coincidence. Out for a walk too?

C: 你可以看看我的研究笔记，说不定你能帮我找到一些别的包装角度呢？
E: Have a look at my research notes, maybe you can find another angle to sell this?

C: 听说你需要帮助…
E: I hear you need help...

C: 哎，知道知道！等出了危险再说也不迟！快去快去！
E: Ack, I know that! Tell me about it when you run into danger! Move it!

C: 你费劲力气，却没有办法打开柜子。
E: You pull with all your strength, but the doors don't budge.

C: 你轻轻拍打这个柜子，发出的回响侧面印证了它的弱不禁风——幸好没有踹它一脚，否则它会直接变成破碎的木板。
E: You thump the cabinet lightly. The echo it gives out proved its frailness. Fortunately, you didn't kick it, or it might have turned into a pile of broken planks instead.

C: 这次的地方已经给你标注好了，你多上点心，可别漏了什么关键线索！
E: I've marked the location for you this time. Pay attention and don't miss anything!

C: （戳一下）
E: (Poke it)

C: 你来得刚好！我们确实在做活动：买一块蛋糕，送一个杰伊特制皮皮西笑话！
E: Perfect timing! We do have an event going on: Buy a slice of cake, and you'll receive a special Pepeshi joke from Jay as a complimentary treat!

C: （转身走人）
E: (Turns to leave)

C: 这是个笑话？
E: Is this a joke?

C: 如果要拿到这把钥匙才能停止纷争的话，那就拿去吧啾。
E: If this key can put an end to the conflict, then you can take it, tweet.

C: 嗯…了解。那么您认为，这次反抗成功的关键因素是什么？
E: Hmm... Noted. In your opinion, what was the key factor that led to the success of the rebellion?

C: 滴答，这个是剧团里的采购员工搞来的，说是从一个逐梦客小贩那里买的。
E: Tick-tock, our troupe procurer purchased these. It's said he bought it from some Dreamchaser merchant.

C: {F#小姐}{M#先生}，我觉得<color=#dbc291ff>奇怪的画作</color>就是我们调查的突破口。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, I think that <color=#dbc291ff>strange painting</color> will be the key to our progress in this investigation.

C: 合理的推测。
E: A reasonable deduction.

C: 在把这几处终端的信号纠正过来之后，我们台里就能定位到真正的幕后黑手——当然，最后这一步也要劳驾你出手解决了。
E: After fixing the signals from these terminals, we'll be able to find out the real mastermind behind this incident. Of course, we'll also entrust you with this final step.

C: 一个戴着厨师帽怪模怪样的恐龙出现在电视画面中，它咧开血盆大口用力地嘶吼着，每句话都像在狠狠地喷人。
E: A curious-looking dinosaur, donning a chef's hat, makes a most peculiar entrance. With a gaping maw, he shouts and yells. Each of his utterances spews forth with such ferocity and a cutting acidity that seems to scorch the very souls of his audience.

C: 事先说清楚，现在奉承我可没有奖励——当然了，我的心情确实会变好。
E: Just to be clear, flattery will get you nowhere. It does make my mood better though.

C: （只接待了两个客人，却憋了一肚子的火！）
E: (I'm about to blow a fuse already just after serving two customers!)

C: 我好委屈呜呜。我当然知道自己做了什么，也分得清对错，坦率跟你说…这次的事，我都是故意的哈哈哈哈哈哈哈！
E: I feel so wronged! Of course, I know what I've done. I can tell the difference between right and wrong. To be honest with you... I did it on purpose, hahaha!

C: 其实…我真不是故意的，不是…舒翁最近总不在嘛，我就想…闹出点动静，说不定能把她喊回来。怪物们出了事，舒翁肯定会赶来。肯定会的。
E: Actually... I didn't really do it on purpose. That wasn't it at all... It's just that, well, Siobhan hasn't been around recently. I thought maybe... if I made a scene, she might come back. Siobhan would come rushing back if the monsters were in trouble. I'm sure of it.

C: 没有哇。我只是…稍微多嘲讽了荷官先生几句，笑得大声了点，还说它没有家人……
E: I didn't, woof. I did... taunt the dealer a little. I laughed a little loudly and said he didn't have a family...

C: …我收到你的消息了。怪物们还好吗？
E: ...I've received your message. How are the monsters doing?

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 呼…你在做什么，这些可都是怪物啊。帮着怪物和我们对抗，你是疯了吗？！
E: Phew... What the heck are you doing!? You're helping those monsters fight against us! Are you nuts!?

C: 汪…舒翁，你是不是…不打算要我们了……
E: Woof... Siobhan, are you gonna... abandon us...?

C: 将酒吧暂时托付给{NICKNAME}，是因为听说了家族打算彻底清理梦境酒店。想要阻止他们，我必须重新取得鸢尾花家系的支持。
E: The reason I entrusted this lounge to {NICKNAME} for now is that I heard about The Family's plan to eliminate all monsters in the hotel in the Dreamscape. To stop them, I need to regain the support of the Iris Family.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」永远欢迎新成员的加入。
E: All new members are welcome at Dreamjolt Hostelry.

C: 那些坏人说的没错，我们被噩梦侵袭的命运不会改变哇？
E: Those guys were right. We'll be corrupted by the Nightmare one day, right?

C: 属于你的这杯特调将长期保留在「惊梦酒吧」的饮品单上，以此纪念我们永远的朋友。
E: This special drink that belongs to you will be kept on the Dreamjolt Hostelry drink menu, to commemorate those who will forever be our friends.

C: 对啊，阿基维利虽然不在了，但无名客们继承着「开拓」的意志，他们穿梭于银河间，践行着「开拓」的信念。
E: That's right. Although Akivili is no longer with us, many Nameless continued to hold onto the will of Trailblaze. They stream across the cosmos to fulfill the creed of Trailblaze.

C: 欸，你就是大名鼎鼎的开拓者{NICKNAME}？
E: Ah, you must be {NICKNAME}, the famous Trailblazer, yes?

C: 不过嘛，你在「银河强手棋」中所经历的一切冒险，都来自你自己的经历…你肯定已经见到不少的老朋友了吧？
E: But, all the adventures that you experience in Cosmodyssey originate from your own trials... You must have seen many of your old friends, no?

C: 无论你将去向何方，也许你会一直留在列车上，也许你会走下列车…我不知道。
E: No matter what where you go, maybe you'll remain on the Express, maybe you'll get off... I don't know.

C: 你能想到吗？这么多年，猎犬掘地三尺都抓不到的叛徒，他们的藏身之地，居然就在这个大剧院，就在我背后的那幅画里。
E: Can you even imagine this? The Hounds have been searching for these traitors all these years, never finding a trace of their whereabouts — And yet they were hiding right in this Grand Theater! In the painting right behind me!

C: 听说只要按动某些机关，就能触发他们留下的惊喜。
E: I heard that if you press the right mechanisms, you'll be able to trigger the surprises that they've left behind.

C: 但前一阵子，我们与他失去了联络，影业变得群龙无首，在市场竞争中屡屡受挫……
E: Yet, we lost touch with him a while back, and the company's been a rudderless drift since then. We keep losing ground in the market competition as a result...

C: 米莫萨笑着递来钟表小子主题的软糖，但你感到她的笑容有些沉重，就像这包零食的口味一样复杂。
E: Mimosa smiles and hands you some Clockie-themed soft candies, but you feel her smile looks rather heavy, as complicated and mixed as the tastes of this bag of snacks.

C: 他也许留下了什么。
E: Maybe he left something behind.

C: 感觉比上街推销还累…
E: Feels more tiring than selling on the streets...

C: 哈努兄弟，不要害怕——
E: Do not fear, Brother Hanu —

C: 我的冒险，似乎只能到此为止了……
E: It seems that my adventures will end here...

C: 潮玩用品、好梦美食、球笼飞车…就在商业一条街，这里应有尽有！
E: Trendy toys, scrumptious food, flying spheroids... All right here on the business street!

C: {NICKNAME}导演？久仰大名，我是来自鸢尾花家系的使者，也是美梦剧团的负责人。
E: Director {NICKNAME}? I've heard a lot about you. I'm a messenger from the Iris Family and also the person in charge of the Sweet Dreams Troupe.

C: 请把魔法给我的伙伴们吧。我是个没有内涵的桶，但垃圾桶也有自己的哲学。
E: Please give the magic to my companions. I'm just a shallow, empty trashcan, but even trashcans have their own philosophies.

C: 你就是新到的摄影？这儿都要忙疯了，快过来掌机。
E: You're the new camera operator? Get over here and hold this camera up. We're up to our eyeballs in work.

C: 等下，我还没准备好！
E: Hold on, I'm not ready!

C: 行吧，我这边基本干完了，你去最后一个片场看看吧。那边估计还有得忙呢。
E: All right, I'm just about done here. You head on to the last set to check it out. There's probably more stuff to do there.

C: 不过，负责扮鸟的朋友有点调皮，学着动画片里的折纸小鸟藏起来了。小助手，麻烦你先把演员找出来吧！
E: But, the staff that's playing the bird is a little mischievous, learning to hide just like the origami bird in the animation. Please go look for the actor first!

C: 好嘞，我就在这里等您。
E: Alright, I'll be here waiting.

C: 啥？他要垃圾干什么…我懂了，你想给反派一点恶心的怪癖，好让观众加深印象，真是高超的创作技巧！
E: What? What's he gonna do with trash... I get it, you want to give the villain an odious character trait to create this deep impression on the audience. That really is incredible creativity!

C: 凶狠无情的罪犯。
E: A merciless criminal.

C: 下次再聊。
E: Let's catch up another time.

C: 哼，再见。
E: Hmph, so long.

C: 有兴趣聊聊吗？
E: Wanna chat?

C: 呵呵，请便吧。
E: Ha, be my guest.

C: 但反倒给我带来了麻烦——作为鸢尾花家系旗下的球笼明星，我完全申请不到采访他的机会，要不是他给我们的形象授权没过期，这部外传肯定都不让我拍！
E: But it actually brought me trouble — as a Spheroid star under the Iris Family, I can't even apply for an interview with him. If it weren't for the fact that our authorization for his likeness is still valid, I wouldn't even be allowed to make this extra story!

C: 一个外乡人…
E: An outworlder...

C: 你也看过那部电影？
E: Have you seen that film, too?

C: 我最开始就不会这么设计。
E: I wouldn't design it like this at the start.

C: 那么究竟是什么事呢？
E: So what exactly is going on?

C: 谢谢，你真好！
E: Thanks. That's very nice of you!

C: 呃…那我心灰意冷，离开匹诺康尼…可以吗？
E: Uh... I leave Penacony in utter disappointment... Is that okay?

C: 这个剧本里没有幻想元素吧……
E: There are no fantasy elements in this script, right...

C: 然而，现在的哈努兄弟手无寸铁，根本无法对抗恶棍军团。为此哈努兄弟准备寻求「拼图绅士」的帮助，快去找它聊聊吧！
E: Alas, Hanu presently is ill-equipped to fend off the Malevolent Mischief Makers, which is why he is preparing to seek out the Puzzle Gentleman's aid. Go forth and speak to him!

C: 哼，哼，哼——
E: Hmph, hmph, hmph...

C: 这个击发手感简直和「飞蝗Ⅱ型」一模一样……
E: This thing feels just like the Soaring Locust II...

C: 让我一个人静静吧，钟表小子。我实在不知道该如何面对你…因为我只是一个失败品。
E: Please... just leave me be, Clockie. I just don't know how to face you... because I'm just a failure.

C: 噢！这突如其来的畅快感……
E: Wow! This sudden surge of joy...

C: 但当他们渴求海中的钢铁，燃烧起苍蓝的火焰，为了采掘而融化极地冰山时。
E: But when they ignited azure flames and melted the snow on the arctic mountains to mine the iron in the ocean...

C: 赤红的星辰如同巨兽的反刍的胃囊，也如同血肉铸造的温床滋生污秽。
E: The crimson star was akin to a behemoth's stomach in charge of regurgitation, as well as a hotbed of corruption made of flesh.

C: 此刻，每个被吞噬的仙舟人只有一个诉求——死亡。
E: At that moment, every Xianzhou native who was swallowed had only one wish — death.

C: 统计：从有机生物的心理学角度分析，对艺术的排列组合可以反映个体的个性和思维模式。
E: Assessment: From the analysis of organic life's psychological perspective, the sequence of the art pieces will reflect one's personality and mode of thinking.

C: 三月，我问你，你学剑有没有什么具体可实现的目标呢？比如在演武仪典上拿到个什么段位或者名次？有没有想要战胜的人，比如彦卿、或者是我？
E: Let me ask you something, March. Do you have any specific goals for learning swordplay, like achieving a certain ranking in the Wardance? Or maybe you want to defeat someone, like Yanqing or me?

C: 「我要打十个！」
E: "I'll fight ten!"

C: {NICKNAME}，我可是最信任你了，你得来当我的助教，监督我好好学剑。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're my most trusted friend. You'll be my assistant teacher and make sure I learn swordplay properly.

C: 你拿上弓箭的话，应该有胜算。
E: Maybe you'd stand a chance if you used your bow.

C: 现在，关于如何击败斯科特，我想听听你的看法。
E: Now, I'd love to hear your suggestions on how to defeat Skott.

C: 老规矩，别忘了！
E: Yeah, let's not forget our bet!

C: 等一下，我要录下来。
E: Hold on a sec, I wanna get this on video.

C: 喔！不愧是尾巴大爷！
E: Whoa! You're awesome, Mr. Tail!

C: 除去都是参赛选手外，这两个受害人还有一个共同的特征——他们都是看了罗浮杂俎上的流言，跑到绥园附近瞎逛的傻瓜。
E: Besides the fact that they were participants, they also had a similar characteristic — they're both fools who went to Fyxestroll Garden to poke around after reading the messages on the Luofu's Ghostly Grove.

C: 没想到斯科特还是个纯情的人渣。
E: Oh, I didn't realize Skott was actually a scumbag with a pure heart.

C: 「感情」能换几个信用点？啊？你倒是回答我看看啊？但是信用点可以换感情啊，只要信用点足够多，我想让谁做我的朋友，谁就能做我的朋友！
E: So, answer me this! Do you think anyone would pay credits for my "emotions"? No way! But I can trade my credits for emotions! With enough credits, I can make anyone my friend!

C: 藿藿将尾巴的封印解除，让他深入斯科特内心，被夺取了扭曲欲望的斯科特改头换面。
E: Unsealing Tail, Huohuo makes him enter Skott's inner world. After Skott is relieved of his twisted desire, he turns over a new leaf.

C: 你们称之为「卑鄙」，而我称之为「高效」。
E: What you call "despicable," I call "efficient."

C: 你这长难句我愣是没听懂。
E: Um... I didn't understand a word of what you just said.

C: 不行，不能放过。因为我很卑鄙。
E: No way, I won't let him off the hook, because I'm despicable, remember?

C: 斯科特专员！我查到了！这个女人…这个女人是星核猎手！
E: Specialist Skott! I've found something! This woman... she's a Stellaron Hunter!

C: 还是相信云技术吧。
E: You should have faith in cloud technology.

C: 这场胜利，和「剑术」没有半毛钱关系，是科技的力量。
E: This victory has nothing to do with swordplay, and everything to do with the power of technology.

C: 等到你们讲完时，你注意到青雀的脸上好像有些怒气。
E: By the time you finish speaking, you notice that there seems to be a hint of anger on Qingque's face.

C: 你这么在乎公司给你的自信，有没有想过你一旦离开了公司，你就什么也不是了吗？
E: You talk about how proud the IPC makes you feel, but have you ever thought that once you leave, you'll be nothing?

C: 稍等我一下！我写完就和你打牌去。
E: Just give me a sec! I'll play with you once I'm done.

C: 哦呼，你猜对了。站这儿的我，只是一个真的不能再真的全息投影。
E: Oh, you're right. What you see is nothing but a hyperrealistic holographic projection.

C: …用全息投影也算是线下吗？
E: ...Can you still call that "in person" when you meet him via holographic projection?

C: 我想要的是以太灵，不是一个哲学答案。再说了，想让我和和气气地去问他？不可能！
E: I want to find the Aether Spirit, not a philosophical answer. Also, are you telling me to ask him politely? Impossible!

C: 「让铣床成为你的载体，在锻件与栅极的世界中永存……」
E: "May the milling machine be thy vessel to live forever in the world of forges and gates..."

C: 我相信人是会变的，不过，每个人也有些「本性难移」的部分。刚才，你立刻就回想起了「阿休」这个名字，也许它并不是那么容易舍弃的东西。
E: I believe that people change, but there's always an immutable aspect within each individual. Just now, you immediately recognize the name A-Xiu. It serves as a testament to its unforgettable nature.

C: 看来你们对我误会很深啊，我必须解释清楚，本人可是一直都有在认真工作的。只是偶尔会摸鱼那么几个时辰……
E: It seems you have greatly misunderstood me. I'll have you know that I have always taken my job extremely seriously. I just happen to slack off for a few hours every now and then...

C: 你是懂我的。
