E: You really do understand me.

C: 那倒也未必。
E: Not necessarily.

C: 我好像帮忙找回过几本禁书…
E: I think I helped recover a few of these texts...

C: 不过翻阅至书尾，我只感觉才看了一半。所以我想，可不可以再读一遍……
E: Although, when I got to the end of the book, it feels like the story is only half-finished. So, I was wondering if I could read it again...

C: 好吧，如果还需要补拍，欢迎随时过来。
E: Alright. If you need to retake any pictures, you can come back anytime.

C: 这又是哪个奇异的梦吗？你下意识掐了一把自己的手臂，但垃圾桶仍站立于你面前。果然人无法从现实中苏醒……
E: Is this another strange dream of some kind? Without realizing it, you find yourself pinching your arm, but the trashcan is still there standing before you. Looks like there's no way to wake up...

C: 小桶宝力先生身上画的…是我吗？
E: This picture on Mr. Litter Pony's body... is that me?

C: 他们在从最基础的学起——如何说话，如何尊重他人，如何玩耍时不伸爪子。
E: They've started learning from the very basics... How to speak, how to respect other people, how to not use their claws when playing.

C: 你在叩关赛被淘汰了吗？
E: Did you fail in the knockout stage?

C: 我在第六个实习期里确实负责过苏乐达的广告外包…唉，可能留下了些机械记忆吧。
E: I was in charge of outsourcing SoulGlad's ads during my sixth internship period...  Some of it might have turned into a mechanical reflex.

C: 听说你成了贝洛伯格代表队的教练，我还真是吃了一惊。
E: I hear you're Team Belobog's coach, which really surprised me.

C: 是「山穷水尽」吧？
E: You mean like a crocket?

C: 「仙舟『罗浮』诚邀雅利洛-Ⅵ的战士们莅临，参加演武仪典。」
E: "The Xianzhou Luofu cordially invites Jarilo-VI's warriors to join the Wardance."

C: 说得好！差点忘了！希儿今天有事，没办法参加这次会面，但她托我给你留了个言，咳咳——
E: Well said! Oh, I almost forgot! Seele had other matters today, and couldn't attend today's meeting. But she entrusted me to deliver a message, ahem...

C: 大守护者希望年轻一代能见见世面，于是安排玲可与虎克跟我一起旅行。考虑到咱们仨都不知怎么和银河文明打交道，她甚至指示史瓦罗大佬作为我们的知识向导跟来了。
E: The Supreme Guardian hopes that the younger generation can go out and see other worlds, so she arranged for Lynx and Hook to accompany me. On account of the fact that the three of us know next to nothing about interacting with other cosmic civilizations, she even instructed Svarog to tag along and be our guide.

C: 我明白你的意思了。
E: I take your point.

C: 你个小可爱！我早晚给你炖了！
E: You lil' fudgehead! I'll have you stewin' in a pot sooner or later!

C: 比赛还没开始呢，你怎么就知道我打不过你？我的铁拳未必比你的子弹慢哦。
E: The match hasn't started. How do you know I can't defeat you? My fist might not be slower than your bullet.

C: 你向藿藿和尾巴解释了卢卡日益严重的幻觉，还有失去战意的现状。
E: You explain to Huohuo and Tail about Luka's worsening hallucinations and his current lack of fighting spirit.

C: 卡美丽小姐，{NICKNAME}教练，对不起，我不该轻易地放弃。
E: Miss Carmella, Coach {NICKNAME}, I'm sorry. I shouldn't have given up so easily.

C: 嗯？是发生什么事了吗？
E: Hmm? What happened?

C: 很久以后我才知道，那时的她已经生了重病，在和病痛搏斗。下层区实在太穷了，医生就算尽了最大努力，也还是治不好她……
E: It wasn't until much later that I learned she had a serious illness, and was battling for her life against it. The Underworld is impoverished, and the doctors tried their best, but they couldn't cure her...

C: 他呜呜伯的，有人跟你闹着玩，我可不跟你闹着玩！我偏要跟你以命相搏，你没这个胆子，上这儿来干嘛？
E: Dadgum Wubbaboo! Others might play games with you, but I ain't playing! I'm putting my life on the line here, but if you don't even have the guts to do the same, then what are you here for?

C: 这样一来，我也不用担心转正的问题了。
E: That way, I won't have to worry about getting a permanent role anymore.

C: 你说的没错，如果伊戈尔能看到你在演武仪典的擂台上有多风光，他也一定会很欣慰的。
E: You're right. If Igor could see how impressive you are on the Wardance stage, he would definitely be very proud.

C: 下场比赛这个「铁臂」是谁？
E: Who's this contestant with an iron arm?

C: 也许吧，说来有些丢人…我也不太确定自己是不是真的变强了。
E: You might be right, but... Well, this is kinda embarrassing to say, but... I'm not sure if I've improved or not.

C: 哈哈哈哈！好小子！
E: Hahahaha! I'm impressed kid!

C: 不多玩几天？
E: Why don't you stay for a couple more days and enjoy yourself?

C: 到那时候，希望你能继续做他的教练，我也能继续在你们身边跟踪报道。
E: When the time comes, I hope you'll still be his coach, and I'll still be in charge of covering your stories.

C: 去仙舟联盟的罗浮碰碰运气吧，他们正在举办星天演武仪典。仙舟人向来以「仁」自居，他们帮助过不少被丰饶之民劫掠的星球…也许他们会发发慈悲。
E: You can try your luck on the Luofu of the Xianzhou Alliance, where the Luminary Wardance is currently held. The people of Xianzhou have always prided themselves on their "benevolence" and they have aided many planets ravaged by the Denizens of Abundance... Perhaps, they might lend you a helping hand?

C: 它是某种更大机体的核心部分。有些损坏，进入了休眠状态——把周围的零件捡些过来，他或许还有救。
E: It's a core part of some bigger contraption. It's damaged, and in a state of standby — pick up the surrounding components and put them here, and we may still save him yet.

C: 逻辑：通过演算可知，对仙舟进行征服和抹杀，消除所有非共识个体，才是实现目标的最优解。
E: Logic: According to extrapolation, subjugating and eliminating the Xianzhou alliance and erasing all non-agreeable individuals is the most optimal solution to achieving your goal.

C: （看向战术板）
E: (Look towards the Tactics Board)

C: 无论最后的结果怎样，卢卡都让整个银河认识了贝洛伯格。
E: No matter what final result he ends up with, Luka has made everyone in the cosmos aware of the name "Belobog."

C: 我在老家也算是个明星，你可以相信我，哥们——靠炒作成名的东西，最多只会火几个月。靠双拳打出来的声名，才是永远不会朽坏的。
E: I'm considered a star back in my home world. Trust me, buddy — things that rely on hype only stay popular for a few months. Fame earned through one's fists lasts forever.

C: 抱歉，我们回去会教育他的。
E: Sorry, we'll teach him a lesson once we get back.

C: 卢卡吃坏肚子了…
E: Luka ate some bad food...

C: 我是…真的没想到。
E: I... really didn't think of that.

C: 七步之内拳也不快…
E: The fist isn't all that fast within seven strides, either...

C: 请这位记者朋友提问。
E: Please ask your questions.

C: 确实，我吃饱了就犯困。
E: I agree. I get drowsy after eating.

C: 由于卢卡选手已经获得参加「竞锋守擂」的机会，所以这是{NICKNAME}教练最后一次接受采访，请记者朋友们珍惜提问机会。
E: As Luka has already obtained the opportunity to participate in the "Ringmaster's Challenge," this will be the last time Coach {NICKNAME} will be accepting interviews. Please cherish this opportunity to ask questions.

C: 本场雅利洛-Ⅵ内战比赛打得异常艰难，双方选手可谓是旗鼓相当，直到最后一刻才分出胜负。{NICKNAME}教练能评价下史瓦罗选手么？
E: The battle between Jarilo-VI's best was exceptionally tough, with both contestants evenly matched, and the outcome was not decided till the end. Coach {NICKNAME}, how would you evaluate Svarog's performance?

C: 每个人都在为卢卡选手而尖叫！
E: Everyone is screaming for Luka!

C: 那么，考验正式开始了。
E: Well, let the trial begin.

C: 卢卡居然还不退赛，脸皮真厚啊。
E: I can't believe Luka's still continuing with the matches, what a shameless person.

C: 现有成本只能做成这样了，你凑活玩吧。
E: That's all we could muster with our budget. Just make do.

C: 听懂了。
E: Yep.

C: 第二天，小白搬来了家里的冰箱，那确实很大。小红开来了父亲的货车，比小白家的冰箱还要大。
E: The next day, Blanca brought her fridge to school, and boy it was a big one. Scarlett drove her dad's truck to school, and it was definitely bigger than Blanca's fridge.

C: 唔…画立绘、运营账号、和弹幕互动、发放抽选券、开付费直播。
E: Hmm... drawing, running our socials, bullet barrage interactions, giving out lottery tickets, and hosting paid streams.

E: Do you still remember that special Synesthesia Beacon you used before? The researchers recently made some modifications to it and installed it on the little robot in the station. We can use it to talk to Peppy!

E: "Success across <unbreak>300</unbreak> IPC subsidiaries, these are my interviewing secrets," "Intelligentsia Guild Key Journal Publication Fee Summary," "<unbreak>20</unbreak> training waterfalls for Knights of Beauty aspirants"...

E: Now there's only one squad above us on the leaderboard. I think I heard Miss Gardener mention that this squad is legendary — they've hogged the top spot for ages, but their administrator has never been seen before.

C: 一些人兴高采烈地出了坏主意，一些人没来得及阻止，另一些人就已经执行完毕…最后，就会碰见这样捉襟见肘的时候。
E: Some people gleefully hatched a terrible plan, and some other people went through with it before a third group managed to stop it... That's how we ended up running out of funds.

C: 更大的可能…它出自列车当时的酒保，也就是敝人之手。

C: 对的，我是花火本火。

C: 而「货币战争」系统则可以模拟各种情况，帮助我们提前为不同形势做好准备。它的本质就是一台巨大的「坏账清算模拟器」。
E: The Currency Wars system can simulate various scenarios, helping us prepare for different situations in advance. In essence, it's a massive "Bad Debt Settlement Simulator."

C: 嘿嘿，这次的成果不错，辛苦你了！

E: So these medicinal herbs, they really do all exist?

E: Shortly after, he handed over the manuscript to you, filled with satisfaction.

C: 哎算了，不提这个了，这七比三的方子又失败咯。我给你换了个最低配比五五开的新品，你来尝尝？最后一杯了，要是还不行我就放弃研发新品了。

C: 呃，不会占用你很多时间的，你要不再考虑一下？
E: Well, I won't take up much of your time. Maybe you'd like to reconsider?

C: 可恶，都怪这游戏充钱不能变得更强，不然我才不会输给你！

C: 没什么，又是个推销的罢了。

C: 那么，是时候让你们领会下「机械热潮」的厉害了！要上了，佩拉！

C: 嘿，{NICKNAME}！果然让你拿下冠军首席的称号了，真了不起！

C: 可能得和列车组讨论一下。
E: I'll have to ask the Express Crew about that.

C: 接下来的比赛，将由开拓者——

C: 万一只是谣言怎么办？
E: What if all the leads we get turn out to be fake?

C: 从跟帖上来看，目击者不在少数。也没人听说过龙女大人会什么逃脱魔术吧？
E: Judging from the comments, there were several witnesses. Sure, Lady Bailu runs away all the time, but disappearing into thin air?

C: 浮烟陷入了漫长的沉默，躲在冥差的双眼后，它反复打量着在场的每一个人，最后终于开口——

C: 嗯，我曾听闻过前代将军与精怪交战的逸话，还以为是随口编成的故事。没想到正主寻仇上门来了，只是找到我头上却有些冤枉了。
E: I heard stories of a skirmish between a previous general and a monster of sorts — I'd always assumed they were an old wives' tale. I never imagined the villain of such tales would come to my doorstep seeking revenge. I must say, it seems a bit unfair that I should assume the debt for a conflict I had no involvement in.

C: 我年纪轻轻，将军怎么对我这么有信心啊？
E: Why is the general putting his trust in us? I'm too young to die!

C: 他们在叫咱们一块玩儿呢！
E: They're asking us to play with them!

C: 不知道网友们会作何反应，你们明白，再过段时间「罗浮杂俎」就会热闹起来。
E: I'm not sure how the online community will react, but you can bet the Ghostly Grove will be the talk of the town sooner or later.

C: 这条消息里的描述好离奇啊，似乎很符合岁阳寄生作祟的情况。如果连太卜司这样的机要部门也被岁阳占据，那可就麻烦了。

E: From now on, I will dedicate myself to divining the predetermined futures of the Xianzhou Alliance, and will make these futures known to the world so that all can live in clarity.

E: I'm not sure, but the heliobi are strange creatures — even the sharpest sword can't cut them.

C: 斩了…他们？我以为刚才只是一场比试而已。

E: I believe you humans call this kind of thing a "near-death-experience..." but why would a heliobus experience one of those? Ridiculous...

C: …哎，本大爷卖你个面子，准备好了再叫我。

C: 带上我也一起！
E: Take me with you!

E: I'm not the person at the center of the Angler Mystery, how can I give an answer if I've not been to the scene personally?

E: What about your work in the Divination Commission?

C: …我、我准备好了。
E: ...I—I'm ready.

C: 今晚就在这里住一晚吧？晚安。
E: So we're staying here tonight? Good night!

C: 磁铁石靠近箱子底部后，你听到一声金属物件贴近箱子内壁的声音。你引导着箱子内部的物件，将它从箱子的缺口处取出。
E: With the magnetic stone placed near the base of the box, you heard the metallic item cling to the side of it. You guide the item to the missing hole in the top and extract it.

E: Who's that guy?

C: 喏，她身上有枚玉兆，里面存了个紧急联系人，所以我就一遍遍地打过去求助。至于后来的事，那就不用我多说了吧。
E: Well, she had a jade abacus on her with an emergency contact in it, so I kept trying to call them. I don't need to tell you what happened next.

C: 稍等一下，我还没准备好。
E: Hold on. I'm not ready.

C: 你仔细检查着三月七身上的每一个角落。终于，符箓发出了光芒，源头是——三月七的相机。
E: You carefully check March 7th's entire person. Finally, the talisman begins to glow. The source of the problem lies with... March 7th's camera.

C: 一副快要变成肉棺材的下等躯壳……
E: An inferior shell on the verge of becoming a flesh-coffin...

C: 我…还没想好，你说呢？

E: "Guigui"!? I knew it. You're the one who made those posts! What are you doing making posts like that?

C: 不过今天这事算是个预警，倒是提醒我了，得敲打下粉丝，以后…以后还是要和粉丝保持距离才行。

C: 你成功地培育出了一批新的造物，这批造物身上的特征极为独特。
E: You have successfully nurtured a new batch of creations. The traits of this batch are extremely unique.

C: 你好奇它们身上的特殊之处究竟从何而来。

C: 螺丝咕姆先生为我远程升级了系统，我现在的看管范围扩大了，你可以把它们托管在我这儿了。
E: Screwllum recently upgraded my remote systems, and my operational scope has been expanded. You can leave them with me.

C: 我以为你不会感到意外。
E: I didn't think you'd be surprised.

C: 这个故事到此就结束了。
E: Our story ends here.

C: 隐书妹妹在吗？我要买书～

C: 有没有不那么「刺激」的故事？

C: 有些问题想问你…
E: I've got a few questions I'd like to ask you...

C: 唉，跟你这样没教养的人计较也是白费劲。给我调杯饮料吧，也让新来的见识见识——我，堂堂嘀嗒嘀•嗒嘀爵士的专属调饮师，究竟有多优秀！
E: Alas, debating with such an ill-bred servant is a waste of time. Well, bring me beverages and showcase the extraordinary talents of the personal drinksmith in the esteemed service of Sir Tick-Tock, the Illustrious One!

E: Can't we have a different scene for once?

C: 「看完了过去的真实情景，你认为——我们应该重新变回『美梦剧团』吗？」
E: "Now that you have seen the real past, do you think we should return to the Sweet Dreams Troupe?"

C: 我…我肚子有点疼，想上厕所。
E: I... I have a little tummy ache and I need to use the bathroom.

C: 没有理由，但我就是这么觉得。我看不到它的未来，也就无法接受它的现在。
E: I don't know why, but it's just a feeling I have. I'm unable to see its future, and I struggle to accept its present.

C: 是要欺负我吗？我就是这么觉得。我看不到它的未来，也就无法接受它的现在。

C: （忧郁派就像它的名字那样忧郁，性格好消极啊。）

C: …想起了很多事情。

E: She remembers clearly what flavors each monster likes and what requirements they have for their drinks. We may have quirky tastes that even we ourselves don't recall the reason for, but she just remembers them. It's amazing.

E: Hmph, then do you remember what the other monsters like?

C: 有什么解决的办法吗？

C: …根本就没希望你来。

E: I've been working on this project for almost a year now. With all the resources on the space station and some technical assistance, I've finally made it happen.

E: If a seat belt is only fastened and sturdy when it needs to be unbuckled, is it a seat belt or a stupid belt?

E: Translation?

C: 唔…真的好像啊……
E: Ah... So similar...

E: The crowd disperses, and you take Luka to the Alchemy Commission.

E: Let's give a round of applause for the winner — Luka!

E: Miss Topaz... I appreciate your help!

C: 但是，在这个疯癫的宇宙，就算是常数也会坍塌和变化。「智识」、「神秘」…各个命途的力量相互挤压，不断改写常数的定值。
E: But even constants collapse and change in this universe of madness. Erudition, Enigmata... The various Path powers press against one another, continually rewriting the constant.

E: No, do not.

E: (Put the pillow down)

E: I'm not in the mood for a bedtime story.

E: ...Ehehe. Well, I do yearn for the skies, but I should also occasionally have to turn my face back down to earth.

C: 你有重新选择措辞的机会。
E: You have a chance to reconsider your words.

C: 不过这地宫都还没来得及派上用场，就被废弃了。
E: It's a pity that people back then ended up abandoning this hypogeum before it could serve its purpose.

C: 一段时间后
E: Some time later...

C: 没人能对可爱的生物说不，一种莫名的好感从你心底油然而生。

E: Grumph... (Too many big words. My brain hurts.)

E: (Trying to hold back laughter)

E: Grumph! (Actually... I'm quite interested!)

C: 呜…（唔…心事，心事啊……）
E: Grumph... (Yeah... some-thing...)

C: 来比比谁在高温浴池里泡得久？
E: Bet I can outlast you in the hot bath!

C: 呃…估计是最近被那紫色贼灵纠缠太多次，染上了它的口癖？
E: Ugh... maybe I've been around that purple Spirithief too long. I'm starting to talk like them?

C: 那刻夏？
E: Anaxa?

C: 吃石有什么不好？吃啥补啥嘛。一会儿它可是要载大石头的，不来点硬菜没有劲儿。
E: What's wrong with eating stones? You are what you eat. It's gonna carry heavy stones later, so it needs something solid to fuel up.

C: 活跃一下气氛。
E: Let's liven things up a bit.

C: 万一它真的很危险的话怎么办？
E: What if it's actually dangerous?

C: 反对动物表演！
E: Say no to animal shows!

C: 收拾心绪，也是启程的一环呀。拜托啦，不会花太久的，就当是满足人家的小小心愿，可以吗？
E: Getting your thoughts in order is part of preparing to leave, you know? It won't take long, I promise. Just think of it as granting me a little wish, alright?

C: 村长，是这边，这边……
E: Uh... Chief, over here...

C: 原来是这种「拯救」吗？
E: I see... so this is the "saving" you had in mind?

C: 没关系。准备好了，记得来找我们哦。
E: No worries. Once you're ready, just come find us.

C: 据说，这位特邀评审员曾在各地漫游，品鉴过的美食不计其数，尤其擅长烹制生鲜食材，更是享有「厨房杀手」的美誉！
E: Word has it she's traveled far and wide, tasted countless delicacies, and is especially skilled at preparing raw ingredients. They say she's earned the title... "The Kitchen Slayer!"

C: 我算是明白，这家餐馆的菜单为何如此简陋了。
E: Now I see why this restaurant's menu is so minimalist.

C: 开放式选题哦。欢迎踊跃发言。
E: The floor's open! Feel free to speak up~

C: 很遗憾，只有白厄投给了自己呢。
E: Oh dear, only Phainon voted for himself.

C: 缇宁不同意，甜是种复杂的感受。心情差的时候，吃什么都觉得没味道。

C: *我们*也同意！这场比赛绝对会成为小妖精们关注的焦点！
E: We're in too! This competition will definitely be the focus of those little fairies' attention!

C: 我们正是——美食五大天王迷！
E: Together, we are the Five Gourmet Overlords, mem!

C: 不用提醒，我看得出来。先给你试试吧。
E: No need to remind me. I can tell that. I'll let them test you first.

C: 起初，你以为这只是场普通的比试，不过是白厄和万敌又一次惯常的较量。
E: At first, you thought this was just another friendly cook-off, a typical Phainon vs. Mydei showdown.

C: 迷…吃不下了迷……
E: Mem... can't eat another bite, mem...

C: 只有亲身体验过种植的艰辛，才能深刻认识到浪费食物是件多么可耻的行为吧。
E: Only by experiencing how tough farming really is can you understand just how shameful wasting food is.

C: 连金织女士吃了都说好！现场的各位，还不赶快下单购买？
E: Even Lady Goldweaver endorses them! Everyone, hurry up and place your orders!

C: 下一个问题！我们收到了部分顾客的来信，据说啊，有妖精担心如此庞大的农作物，是通过技术手段人为培育出来的，对身体有害。
E: Next question! We've received correspondence from customers worried that these enormous vegetables, possibly technologically modified, might be unsafe to eat.

C: 肯定是有利可图！
E: She's clearly after something!

C: 算啦。趁着宴会还没开始，去和伙伴们聊聊天吧。大家忙活这么久，肯定也有好多话想说。
E: Ah well. Since the feast hasn't started yet, might as well take the chance to chat with everyone. After working so hard, I bet they've got lots to say.

C: 若非此次奇遇，恐怕我再难有机会拾起针线，以一介改衣师的身份与各位攀谈。「浪漫」的神权，总算是适得其所了。
E: Were it not for this strange twist of fate, I doubt I would've ever had the chance to pick up the needle and thread again, and chat with you all as a simple dressmaster. The divine authority of Romance has finally been put to fitting use.

C: 代替你去接受了村长的感谢。还记得吗？它视力不好，把我们俩认错啦。
E: I went and accepted the chief's thanks on your behalf. Remember? With their poor eyesight, they mistook me for you!

C: 我…正如评审会上所说，我原本应聘了餐馆的厨师，却未能通过考核，好在对美食品鉴还有些心得，便接受邀请，成为了评审嘉宾。
E: I... well, like I said at the review, I originally applied to be a chef, but I failed the cooking test. Luckily, I've still got a decent palate. So they invited me to join as a guest judge instead.

C: *我们*也会想办法，努力帮上更多忙的！
E: We'll try our best too, and help out even more!

The passing sage from another school brings admonishment.

C:
然而石头老板并没有放弃，他发誓一定要夺回这个原本属于自己的地方。他封锁了小镇的资源，发起激烈的进攻…资源匮乏加上各种灾害，美梦小镇很快陷入了绝境，镇民们争执不断。
还好钟表小子找来了木头老爷帮忙，在木头老爷的劝说下，镇民重新团结了起来。

石头老板也不敢肆意妄为了，只能和大家幸福地生活在一起。
善良的村民们接纳了石头老板，让他和他的生意在小镇里继续存在，但石头老板不满足于此，他的野心之火一定会在平静中重燃。

日子一天天过去，镇民们逐渐忘记了石头老板的凶恶，但这个坏蛋一定还在觊觎着美梦小镇。终有一日，他和他的爪牙会再次归来……

（注：本篇内容与正传不处于同一世界线，相关故事请以《钟表小子》与《美梦往事》正传为准）
E: Boss Stone did not throw in the towel. Instead, he vowed to reclaim control of the town. He blocked access to resources and launched a vigorous attack in retaliation... Due to the scarcity of resources, coupled with various disasters, Dreamville found itself in dire straits. The townsfolk were in constant dispute. Fortunately, Clockie sought the help of Old Man Wood, who managed to persuade the townsfolk to reunite. Boss Stone dared not act rashly again, thus he had no choice but to blend into the townsfolk and live a happy life. The good-natured townsfolk accepted Boss Stone as one of them and allowed him and his business to remain in the town. However, it wasn't good enough for Boss Stone, and the flame of ambition in his heart was bound to rekindle amidst the peace. As days went by, the townsfolk gradually forgot about Boss Stone's wickedness, but there was no doubt the villain still had his eyes upon Dreamville. He and his lackeys were bound to return someday... (Note: The content of this passage does not exist in the same timeline as the canonical events. For canon, please refer to Clockie and Dreamjoy Memoir.)

C:
「纷争」的火种已被归还。

尼卡多利是司掌纷争与竞技的泰坦，按照黄金裔内部流传的神话，它向众神宣战，令世间陷入无休止的纷争。但最终战神也为战争付出了代价，其神体被黑潮侵蚀，陷入无穷无尽的疯狂。因为其怒火和壮志未曾熄灭，它的眷属军团至今仍徘徊在大地上，对想象中的敌人发动战争。

尼卡多利是一位身着洁白圣甲的高贵武者，相传它手握的天谴之矛一击便足以焚毁最强盛的城邦，那嗜血的性情也令它成为了鲜血与献祭之神。战士们聚拢在它的身下，渴望随同尼卡多利征战，得到荣耀的死亡。它的信徒建立起名为悬锋城的要塞，如他们的神明那般，为这世间带来动荡与恐惧。

曾经，这位战争之神也是守护的象征，以极致的暴力熄灭纷争，用战事维持着翁法罗斯的平衡。
E:
The Coreflame of "Strife" has been returned.

Nikador is the Titan of strife and competition. According to the mythology circulated among the Chrysos Heirs, they declared war on the gods and cast the world into endless strife. However, battles also took a toll on the god of war, as the divine body became corroded by the black tide, and they fell into endless madness. As their rage and ambition were never quelled, their Titankin legion still roams the land waging war against imaginary enemies.

Nikador is a noble warrior that wears pure white sacred armor. Legend has it that the Lance of Fury that they wield can raze even the most powerful and prosperous city to the ground. Their bloodthirsty temperament has also made them a god of blood and sacrifice. Warriors gather under them and yearn to follow Nikador into war and achieve an honorable death. Their disciples built a fortress known as Castrum Kremnos that brings turmoil and fear to the world, much like their god.

There was a time when this god of war was also a symbol of protection: Using extreme violence to extinguish strife and using war to maintain the balance of Amphoreus.

C:
不败者，一切战场的领主，悬锋城与废墟的王，
战车大匠，尸山王座，胜利父，
荣耀僭主，裂地惊海的雷，翁法罗斯的守护者，
纷争的泰坦，天谴之矛，尼卡多利。
全体世间应听遣的将领，永恒且锋利的兵戈，纷争与断绝纷争的法则。
礼赞尼卡多利，最伟大的征服者，最伟大的守护者。
E:
The undefeated. The sovereign of all battles. The king of Castrum Kremnos and of ruins,
Grand Artisan of the war chariot, the throne upon a mountain of corpses, and father of victory,
The usurper of glories, the lightning that split the sea, the Guardian of Amphoreus,
The Titan of Strife, the Lance of Fury: Nikador.
A general that all the world should heed, the eternal sharp sword, the law of Strife and of ending Strife.
Praise Nikador, greatest of conquerors, greatest of guardians.

C: 照片当然不是现实，但如果有足够多的照片，是不是就能更接近现实一些呢？
E: Of course photos aren't reality, but if you have enough of them, doesn't reality come a little closer?

C: 不痛啊。
E: Didn't hurt.

C: 艾丝妲你在啊…那我就安心托管了，拜拜。
E: Asta! Here's the key. Gotta go now — bye.

C: 要坏掉了！
E: I'm breaking!

C: 飞舞吧，风暴！
E: Dance, wind storm!

C: 感觉不错，我还要更加专注才行。
E: Feeling good. I must stay focused.

C: 形势已迫在眉睫。
E: *Ahem* We have a situation at hand.

C: 历经冰雪，铸成此志，永不终结！
E: Years of cold hardens the will. We shall never fall!

C: 我不会辜负这份期望。
E: I'll put this strength to good use.

C: 今天要干什么？有钱我就干，没钱…也行，只要你开口，伙计。
E: So, what's the job this time around? If you've got the cash, I've got the... No cash? N—Not a problem! Haha, just say the word, pal...

C: 希儿姐姐，虎克这次一定会赢过你！
E: You won't beat Hook this time, Miss Seele!

C: 搏击不是因为我喜欢暴力，拿冠军也不是为了和谁炫耀…我只是觉得这地下的恶棍太多，得给孩子们立个好榜样。
E: I don't fight because I like violence, or want to win the championship, or to show off to anyone... I just think there are too many thugs in the Underworld and the kids need a good example.

C: 收集也是一种乐趣。
E: The enjoyment of collecting.

C: 外乡人看着弱不禁风，胆子倒挺大。要不是在仙舟上，要不是碰见我，他背着那么大的箱子，坏人不劫他劫谁？
E: That outsider looks weak, but is pretty brave. If he weren't on the Xianzhou and hadn't met me, he'd totally get robbed just for lugging such a huge case around.

C: 小菜一碟！
E: Piece of cake!

C: 在我心中，她一直还是那个向往着星海间万千世界的孩子，她一直还是…停云。
E: In my heart, she has always been that child who yearned for the many worlds across the vast universe. She has always been... Tingyun.

C: 只此，一箭！
E: Cloudkites, formation! Bolt from the blue!

C: 小吝，无咎。
E: No matter.

C: 我翘家在长乐天玩儿时，老能碰上她和素裳来看诊。有几回是素裳扛着她来，有几回是她扛着素裳来，还有几回是她俩一块儿挂彩——原因嘛，都是表演事故。
E: Well... Um... Whenever I run off to play in Exalting Sanctum, I always bump into her and Sushang — they're usually in need of medical assistance... Sometimes Sushang is carrying her, sometimes she's carrying Sushang... and sometimes they're both in bad shape. How come? Performing arts can be dangerous, I guess.

C: 小弟弟，让我瞧瞧你的剑术是否精进。
E: Young man, show me your progress.

C: 现在退下，我便饶你一命。
E: Stand down and I'll spare you.

C: 何不早降？
E: You could've surrendered.

C: 小女子乃是十王敕使「寒鸦」，列名拘、锁、刑、问四位判官之末。多得十王赏识，能执掌天笔，录罪判罚。
E: I am Hanya, envoy of the Ten Lords. Out of the four duties of a judge — detention, interrogation, incarceration, and punishment — I am in charge of interrogation. Held in high esteem by the Ten Lords, I am the wielder of the Oracle Brush, recording crimes and punishments.

C: 藿藿：你、你好…那个，没事我就走了，再、再见……\n尾巴：是让你来打招呼的，不是来道别的！
E: Huohuo: H—Hello! Uh, I mean... Well, I... I guess I'll take my leave now. B—Bye...\nTail: You were supposed to say hi, not bye!

C: 尾巴：你们这些小崽子，都给我让开…\n凶神恶鬼，有老子足矣！
E: Tail: Move aside, amateurs...\nFiends or devils, I'll crush them all!

C: 符太卜有事没事就来找我讨糖水喝。我说了很多次，糖水喝太多于健康无益，可她偏要喝，还说「喝不到糖水更有碍健康」…真是一点办法都没有啊。
E: Diviner Fu comes to me asking for sugary drinks whether she is ill or not. I've told her many times that drinking too much has no health benefits, but she insists on drinking it anyway. She even says, "Not being able to have sugary drinks is bad for my health." What can you do...

C: 起死回生之术，令人仰止。
E: The art of resurrection is astonishing to behold.

C: 蜕变总免不了挣脱过去。
E: Metamorphosis is always about breaking free from the past.

C: 又是九死一生。
E: Another stroll at death's door.

C: 累了就上哪坐坐吧。
E: If you're tired, just find a place to sit down for a while.

C: 谢谢。我会铭记于心。
E: My gratitude is yours.

C: 放心，由我代劳。
E: Worry not, for I shall shoulder this responsibility.

C: 研究的进展正在螺旋上升。
E: Research is progressing at astronomical speeds.

C: 不错，加五分。
E: Not bad... five points.

C: 诶呀，最近总是见到你嘛…我在哪儿看见的？这能让你知道吗，嘻嘻～
E: Oh wow, we seem to be crossing paths a lot lately... Where could I have seen you before? Can you figure it out?

C: 生命本身…便是谜。
E: Life is a puzzle in and of itself.

C: 并肩作战也是同行者的义务。
E: It is the duty of fellow pathstriders to fight side by side.

C: 长路漫漫，且行且看。
E: A vast journey awaits, venture and observe.

C: 人活一辈子，要有所信、有所不信。你要相信他人的善意、勇气的意义，还有类似的什么乱七八糟的鬼东西。但你永远不要相信，这些好事会无缘无故让你遇到——你得自己去创造它们。
E: In this life, you gotta believe in some things and doubt others. Believe in folks' good intentions, the value of courage, and all that other hodgepodge. But never believe that these good things will just fall into your lap – you gotta make 'em happen.

C: 和你们，已经没道理可讲。
E: There's no reasoning with you bunch anymore.

C: 为观摩银枪•修罗殿下的决斗，在下曾亲身到访仙舟「罗浮」。其对手是一名使用忍•义手的赤鬼•忍者，战斗意志纯一无杂，绝非等闲之辈。
E: To witness the duel of Lord Silvergun Shura, I once visited The Xianzhou Luofu. His opponent was Red Oni Ninja who used a ninja prosthetic arm, with a pure and unwavering fighting spirit, far from ordinary.

C: 有事吗？没事我就走了。
E: Need something? If not, then I'll be leaving.

C: 丹恒像夜空中默默发光的星星，不愿引人注意。但*我们*最清楚啦，一颗星星如果想照亮其他的星星，它爆发的力量将是超乎想象的！
E: Dan Heng is like a silent star in the night sky that's not keen to draw attention to itself. But we know very well that, should a star want to illuminate other stars, it must be capable of unimaginably explosive powers!

C: 缇安：要、来、了！
E: Trianne: It's co-ming!

C: 尼卡多利与艾格勒之间曾历经漫长的神战，而如今，天空与纷争的代表站在了同一条战线——这便是人能胜过神的证明。
E: Nikador and Aquila had fought a long divine war in the past, and now the representatives of Sky and Strife stand as comrades. This is proof that humanity can overcome the gods.

C: 有人同我说，研究神明是一种亵渎和冒犯，我回他，那你也太容易被冒犯了，我若说我还想「登神」，你又该如何应对呢？
E: Someone once said to me that studying gods is blasphemy and an offense. I responded, "You're offended that easily? Then what would you do if I said I wanted to reach apotheosis?"

C: 蜗居公主，让我瞅瞅你那大镰刀？
E: So, Princess Homebody, can I have a look at your big scythe?

C: 不妙的预感啊…又要变得湿漉漉了…
E: I've got a bad feeling about this... Gonna get all wet again...

C: 亡魂，返归尘土。
E: Dead souls... Return to dust.

C: 血战到底。
E: A bloody fight to the end.

C: 制造特殊领域，领域内敌人不会攻击我方目标。与领域内敌人进入战斗后，大丽花立即开启结界，并且对处于<u>弱点击破状态</u>下的敌方目标造成<color=#f29e38ff><u>超击破伤害</u></color>。

E: I have the numbers advantage. You have no chance of winning.

E: Dux Beast has a chance to persuade an opponent to leave the battle immediately!

C: 穿戴者首次受到伤害时：后退至队伍最后，并使自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When the wearer takes damage for the first time: Moves to the back of the team and increases <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的奇兽爵召唤<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>只<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>级的咕噜鱼儿
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Dux Beast in the team summons <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> level-<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Gurgling Fish.

C: 我方奇美拉获得【丹恒的祝福】，使他们受到的伤害减少<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点。伤害最低降至1点
E: Ally chimeras gain "Dan Heng's Blessing," reducing DMG taken by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>. DMG can be reduced to a minimum of 1.

C: 对战开始时：对随机1名对手造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: At the start of combat: Deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG to 1 random opponent.

C: 进入商店时：自身经验+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: When entering the store: This unit gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Experience.

C: 队伍中最强的燕麦粥被击倒时：使所有同伴<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>，<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>
E: When the strongest Oatmeal in the team is knocked down: Causes all companions' <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK to increase by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> and <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP to increase by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.

For each stack of "<u>Critical Boost</u>" gained, this effect additionally deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>Super Break DMG</u>.

C: 进入蓄力状态，下回合使用【在滔滔血海中沉溺】。
E: Enters the Charging state. Uses "Drowned in the Crimson Sea" in the next turn.

C: 攻击对我方目标造成伤害时，被击中目标降低生命值的一部分转化为<u>【侵蚀】</u>，受到<u>【侵蚀】</u>效果的我方目标伤害大幅降低。
E: When attacks deal DMG to targets, a portion of the reduced HP from the hit target is converted into <u>"Corrosion."</u> Targets affected by <u>"Corrosion"</u> have their DMG greatly reduced.

C: 沉没于原始忆域的美梦，如今充塞着「繁育」的虫鸣——于此，谎言变作另一个谎言。
E: Sweet dreams sunken in the Primordial Memory Zone now swarm with the drone of the Propagation. Here, one lie begets another.

C: 花火与知更鸟打赌，请她用「同谐」的歌声唤醒入梦者，破除十二时刻。若知更鸟失败了，花火将启用先前埋设的炸弹，把美梦炸上天。
E: Sparkle made a bet with Robin, asking her to use the song of Harmony to wake the dreamers and break the Twelve Hours. If Robin failed, Sparkle would trigger the bombs she had planted earlier and blow the sweet dream sky-high.

C: 你所见的黑猫是「末王」逆时而行的一缕神躯。若你有非要弥补不可的遗憾，就在心底倾尽全力去呐喊。这将改变它的未来，你的过去。
E: The black cat you saw was a divine fragment of Terminus traveling against time. If you had regrets that must be mended, cry out with all your might from the depths of your heart. This would change its future, and your past.

C: 流萤向你坦言何为真正的三次死亡。失熵的症状出现，这是流萤启用「繁育」力量的后果，她将失熵而死，即第三次死亡。流萤请你闭上眼睛，想象在美梦中初遇时的场景。
E: Firefly confessed the truth of her three deaths to you. The symptoms of entropy loss manifested, which was the price for invoking the power of Propagation. She was thus doomed to die from it, thereby completing her third death. Firefly asked you to close your eyes, to imagine the scene of your very first meeting in the dream.

C: 完成狮震八方「困难」难度挑战
E: Complete the Earthshaker Leo challenge in Hard mode

E: Defeat a total of #4 opponent chimeras in a tournament

C: ●初始获得金血祝颂：#1
E: ● Initial Golden Blood's Boon: #1

C: 当一朵花含苞待放
E: When a Bud Readies to Bloom

C: 她的长梦值得拥有更美好的结局，当遗憾业已存在，它也将弥补的机会永永远远地交到了你的手中。
E: Her long dream deserves a better ending. While the regret already exists, she has forever placed the chance to make things right in your hands.

C: 「当你有机会做出选择的时候，不要让自己后悔」——不知为何，你又回想起了这句话。
E: "When you have a chance to make a choice, make one that you know you won't regret." For some reason, those words come back to you again.

C: 寻找真相
E: Uncover the truth

E: Head to the Party Car to find the one who's making a sparkly return

E: Discuss your next trip with the others

C: 击败「神主日」
E: Defeat the Great Septimus

C: 好的，来了。
E: Alright. Coming!

C: 事实上，我也是他们的一员。
E: Actually, I'm one of them.

C: 可不是什么小鱼小虾——在匹诺康尼，你算得上天大的威胁，即便只是尝试入梦，也会立刻被察觉。
E: You're no small fry. Here in Penacony, you're a colossal threat. They'll be on to you even if you just try to enter the dream.

C: 那意味着，就算潜入成功，我也不可能摆脱家族的追捕。
E: That means even if I manage to sneak in, I won't be able to escape the Family's pursuit.

C: 「我们还会再见面吗？」
E: "Will we see each other again?"

C: 「那我们……」
E: "Then we..."

C: 来打个招呼，你在这做什么呢？
E: I came over to say hi. What brings you here?

C: 咦，杂音消失了？
E: Huh? The static's gone?

C: 知更鸟小姐…太光芒四射了……
E: Miss Robin... you're absolutely dazzling...

C: 追查要犯本就是我的职责。
E: Tracking down criminals is my duty.

C: 在一位…姑且形容为优雅吧。这位优雅的忆者女士，帮助你们逃离了那里。但仓促间，你和流萤就此失散。而她接下来的经历，或许和你记忆中存在出入。
E: With the help of a... let's say "graceful" Memokeeper lady, you managed to escape from there. But in the rush, you and Firefly got separated. And her experiences afterward might differ from what you remember.

C: 我可不是带着如释重负的心情，我是在享受…一生仅有一次的刺激。
E: It's not relief I feel. I'm savoring... a once-in-a-lifetime thrill.

C: 分别时，她还没有名字，就像曾经的我。但我希望…离开世界时，她已经找到了——无论名字，还是生存的理由。
E: When we parted, she had no name, just like me. But I hope... by the time she leaves this world, she will have found both a name and a purpose for her life.

C: 我感受到了，「死亡」已经再次投下阴影，就在这附近。不出意外，他们很快就会遇上。
E: I can sense it. "Death" has cast its shadow once again. It's close, and unless things change, they'll cross its path before long.

C: 在那之后，她抵达了流梦礁——一片流放之地，真正的匹诺康尼。以「死亡」作为理由，家族竭力隐藏着它的存在。
E: After that, she arrived at Dreamflux Reef... land of the exiles, the true Penacony. The Family went to great lengths to conceal its existence, using "Death" as their justification.

C: 砂金先生，恭喜你揭开了「死亡」的真相，但就我所知，你更应该出现在流梦礁。
E: Mr. Aventurine, congratulations on uncovering the truth behind "Death", but from what I know, you should be at Dreamflux Reef instead.

C: 随后，有趣的事发生了——而你正是那个「变数」。
E: But then, something interesting happened: You turned out to be that "variable."

C: 不然呢？我一个愚者在梦里还能追得上忆者吗？每次都只差一点，她就带着你嗖地一下不见了。
E: What else could I do? As a Fool, how could I ever catch up to a Memokeeper in a dream? Every single time, just when I was about to reach you, poof, she'd vanish with you.

C: 回来得比想象中更快啊…有结果了？
E: You're back sooner than I thought... Any results?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>00</unbreak>：<unbreak>00</unbreak>█因众星属于所有人，也便从未属于任何人。若你爱着所有人，便是不爱任何人。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>00</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak>█Because the stars belong to everyone, they have never belonged to anyone. If you love everyone, then you love no one."</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>她们会搞点大动静出来，为你们破除十二时刻。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>They'll stir up something big to help break you free from the Twelve Hours.</color>

C: 最后一次了，万一你死掉，想让人们怎么回忆你的结局？
E: Lemme check one last time. If you were to die, how would you want people to remember your ending?

C: 与此同时：故事的起点 亦是 最后的舞台
E: At the same time: The beginning of the story, and also, the final stage

C: 我们追逐那最初的光。
E: We must pursue that primordial light.

C: 人们怀抱希望，不是因为未曾直面注定的死亡。
E: People hold onto hope not because they have never faced inevitable death.

C: 但悲伤的记忆也同样珍贵——<color=#dbc291ff>你若能坦然地接受分别，就能拥有创造重逢的力量。</color>
E: But even sad memories are precious. <color=#dbc291ff>If you can accept farewells with grace, then you'll gain the strength to create reunions.</color>

C: 去吧，亲手将那花束送出，让所有人不再遗憾。
E: Go forth and deliver that bouquet with your own hands, so that no one will be left with regrets.

C: 你有资格知道这一切。而到了那时，你已经拥有了面对未来的勇气，而潜在的危险也早已过去。
E: You deserve to know it all. And by then, you'll have the courage to face the future, and the potential dangers will be long gone.

C: 听着…<color=#dbc291ff>你是注定{RUBY_B#跨越}带来{RUBY_E#}「终末」的人。</color>
E: Listen... <color=#dbc291ff>you are the one who is destined to {RUBY_B#transcend}bring about{RUBY_E#} the Finality.</color>

C: 确实是很合适的地方…{NICKNAME}，你眼光很好呢。
E: It really is the perfect spot... {NICKNAME}, you've got great taste.

C: 而每一次表针被回拨，我都将跌下时间的螺旋，让你修好过我的事实被抹去，让我再度损毁。
E: And every time the clock hands are rewound, I would tumble down time's spiral, undoing and erasing your deed, and becoming undone once more.

C: 工作的进度的确可以被无限地分割，但这并不代表需要无限的时间。随着越来越短的进度差距，所需的时间也会收敛为一个有限的级数。
E: While work progress can indeed be infinitely divided, it doesn't mean it requires infinite time. As the progress gaps become shorter and shorter, the time needed converges into a finite level.

C: 你拿起涂抹油彩的陶板，投入火坑，那是你们许多个日夜的心血。思念随火光和烟尘徐徐上升，直到在空中消失不见。
E: You pick up the painted clay tablet and cast it into the fire pit. That was countless days and nights of hard work. Your longing rises with the flames and smoke, until it all vanishes into thin air.

C: 剑理与数理无异，强悍的肉体仍需头脑操控。你拜访了某位曳石学派贤人，与其交流心得、切磋技巧。一天结束，你大汗淋漓——锻炼思维并不比肉体更加轻松。
E: The principles of swordsmanship are no different from mathematics. Even the strongest body needs a mind to guide it. You visited a Helkolithist Sage to exchange insights and hone your skills. As the day ends, you're drenched in sweat. Training the mind proves no easier than training the body.

C: 花苞随着某种脉搏的节律鼓动，猩红色孢子随之喷涌而出。
E: The flower bud pulsates with a certain rhythmic beat. Following that, crimson spores gush forth.

C: 橡木家系的家徽。橡木年轮上的三个缺口，究竟是对希佩三重面相的礼赞，还是在暗喻寄居木中的蛀虫？
E: The Oak Family's insignia. Are the three notches in the oak's growth rings a tribute to the Triple-Faced Soul, or do they hint at the woodworms dwelling within?

C: 好哦。小灰，和*我们*一起，成为奇美拉训练家吧！
E: All right! Little Gray, join us and become a chimera trainer!

C: 它是艾格勒赐下的圣卷。乌拉尼娅要借助此物来记录天空下的所见，作为晨昏之眼目光的延伸。
E: They are holy scrolls bestowed by Aquila. With them, Urania records all that unfolds beneath the sky, as an extension of the Eye of Twilight's gaze.

C: 「律令·其一」的回声
E: Echo of "Divine Law (I)"

C: 将场上所有气球转换为相同颜色后，即可完成一轮挑战。在限定时间内完成越多轮次的挑战，可以获得越丰厚的奖励。
E: After changing all balloons on the field to the same color, a Challenge Cycle will be completed. The more Cycles of challenges you complete within the time limit, the greater the rewards you receive.

C: 开拓
E: Trailblaze

C: 正在编译着色器
E: Compiling shaders

C: 队伍编成•黑天鹅
E: Added to Team With Black Swan

C: 凭一纸契约便想束缚彼此，该说这是幼稚，抑或是那女人的花蕾下本就藏着毒蛇？说不定正因如此，招惹她时沾染的那阵异香…才更令人贪恋呀。
E: Using a mere paper contract to bind two parties... Should I call it naivety, or does a poisonous serpent truly hide under that woman's petals? Perhaps that's why the strange fragrance one picks up when entangled with her... feels so irresistible.
